Name: Maker Faire
Description:
Part science fair, part county fair, and part something entirely new, Maker Faire is an all-ages gathering of tech enthusiasts, crafters, educators, tinkerers, hobbyists, engineers, science clubs, authors, artists, students, and commercial exhibitors. All of these “makers” come to Maker Faire to show what they have made and to share what they have learned.

The launch of Maker Faire in the Bay Area in 2006 demonstrated the popularity of making and interest among legions of aspiring makers to participate in hands-on activities and learn new skills at the event. 200,000 people annually attend the two flagship Maker Faires in the Bay Area and New York, with an average of 44% of attendees first timers at the Bay Area event, and 61% in New York. In 2017, over 190 independently-produced “Mini Maker Faires” plus over 30 larger-scale Featured Maker Faires will have taken place around the world, including Tokyo, Rome, Shenzhen, Taipei, Seoul, Paris, Berlin, Barcelona, Detroit, San Diego, Milwaukee, and Kansas City.

Maker Faire is primarily designed to be forward-looking, showcasing makers who are exploring new forms and new technologies. But it’s not just for the novel in technical fields; Maker Faire features innovation and experimentation across the spectrum of science, engineering, art, performance and craft.

Maker Faire is a gathering of fascinating, curious people who enjoy learning and who love sharing what they can do. It’s a venue for makers to show examples of their work and interact with others about it. Many makers say they have no other place to share what they do. DIY (Do-It-Yourself) is often invisible in our communities, taking place in shops, garages and on kitchen tables. It’s typically out of the spotlight of traditional art or science or craft events. Maker Faire makes visible these projects and ideas that we don’t encounter every day.

Name: Melbourne International Comedy Festival
Description:
Melbourne International Comedy Festival is one of the three largest comedy festivals in the world and Australia’s largest ticketed cultural event. The Festival sells in excess of 600,000 tickets annually, with an aggregate annual attendance including free performance of more than 770,000 people, boosted by millions more for nationally broadcast Festival programming on TV, radio and digital channels.

The Melbourne International Comedy Festival brand is recognised nationally as Australia’s leading comedy organisation and stands proudly as one of Victoria’s big four events alongside the Australian Open, Spring Racing Carnival and the AFL Grand Final Series.

Conceived to promote the comedic arts in Australia, Melbourne International Comedy Festival has earned its global reputation through creative, eclectic programming. The organisation is active year-round with national touring, educational and artistic development programs complementing the presentation of the annual four-week festival.

The 2024 Festival will take place from 27 March to 21 April.

Description:

The Greater Cincinnati and Northern Kentucky jewel attraction is home to: The world’s first and only Shark Bridge; the world’s first Shark Ray Breeding Program; Mighty Mike – the biggest and baddest American alligator outside the state of Florida; the largest and most diverse collection of sharks in the Midwest; and one of the world’s largest and most diverse penguin exhibits. 

Newport Aquarium is open to the public 365 days a year and is located across the Ohio River from downtown Cincinnati at Newport on the Levee.

Hydra Studios specialise in high end cinematic content. We’re an experienced bunch, brought together by a love of what we do and a strong belief in how we should do it.

Hydra creates a broad range of CGI animation, from photoreal character performances to stylised action. We avoid formulaic approaches preferring to focus on each piece of work as something unique.

We welcome creative and technical challenges that heighten quality and inspire originality. We’re not big on hierarchy or restrictive infrastructure - Hydra is about collaboration and flexibility; pushing creative aspirations through the roof whilst keeping costs grounded.

Name: Broward Center for the Performing Arts
Description:
The Broward Center for the Performing Arts overlooks the New River in downtown Fort Lauderdale, The Center brings Broadway musicals, operas, ballets, concerts, plays, multi-cultural performances, films, lectures and numerous community workshops and educational events to South Florida while also creating unique and successful collaborations with partners in the arts, community, government and business.  

The vision to create a cultural centerpiece came to life at the Broward Center in the form of a grand, multi-venue arts and entertainment complex. The complex opened in 1991 and soon became the anchor of the downtown arts district.

The Center's mission includes a strong focus on integrating the arts into education. A long-standing partnership with the School Board of Broward County has created an award-winning model for other communities through the Student Enrichment in the Arts (SEAS) program.SEAS activities are designed to advance specific educational goals tied into state standards, helping to develop our future workforce.

Giant Pictures owns and operates the specialty theatrical label Drafthouse Films and serves as distribution and technology partner of the Tribeca Festival, giving us a unique edge in connecting independent films with passionate audiences. Learn more at www.giant.pictures

Description:

As the Side-Eye Sorceress, Luvvie offers hilarious, thoughtful and insightful commentary on what’s happening in the world, both real and virtual. Shady cats, problematic politicians, and clueless athletes are just a few of the topics that may make the blog, along with coverage of cultural phenomenons, real world heroes, or her special flavor of television recaps. Name: Carnival Film & Television Limited
Description:
Carnival Films is a division of NBCUniversal International Studios and one of the UK's leading drama specialists. Since 1978, Carnival has produced hundreds of hours of drama that have been broadcast and performed around the world, garnering over 200 award wins and nominations, including Primetime Emmys, Golden Globes, BAFTAs, Oscars and TONYs. Carnival’s shows include global phenomenon Downton Abbey and series such as Belgravia (EPIX/ITV), The Last Kingdom (Netflix), Jamestown (Sky1), Stan Lee's Lucky Man (Sky1), Poirot, Hotel Babylon, Whitechapel, US shows Dracula and The Philanthropist, as well as mini-series such as the original Traffik, David Nicholl’s The 7:39, David Hare’s Worricker Trilogy, William Boyd’s BAFTA-winning Any Human Heart, The Hollow Crown, a co-production with Neal Street, and Peter Morgan’s BAFTA-winning The Lost Honour of Christopher Jefferies.

Carnival is responsible for the TV sensation Downton Abbey, winner of three Golden Globes and fifteen Primetime Emmy awards, including Best Mini-Series.  It is the most nominated non-US show in the history of the Emmy’s with a total of 69 nominations and is distributed in over 250 territories worldwide.  Among numerous national and international awards, including three Screen Actors Guild Awards and four National Television Awards, the show has even garnered a Guinness World Record for highest critical ratings for a TV show, and a BAFTA Special Award in recognition of its outstanding global success. 

Carnival was recognised as best production company at both the Bulldog Awards and Broadcast Awards.

Name: Artists Den Entertainment
Description:
The Artists Den is a critically acclaimed television and digital music series best known for presenting intimate, secret concerts by extraordinary artists in non-traditional, often historic settings for the TV show Live from the Artists Den. The show connects fans with a unique and intimate musical experience for some of the industry's finest acts. Featured artists include John Legend, alt-j, Alabama Shakes, Ed Sheeran, Imagine Dragons, Lady Antebellum, The Killers, Zac Brown Band, and Shawn Mendes.

Our artists have performed in a variety of extraordinary venues, including Graceland, a Masonic temple, a 1930s silent movie theater, the world’s oldest merchant sailing vessel, a former archdiocese cathedral, The New York Public Library, The Metropolitan Museum of Art, and a repurposed window factory in Brooklyn. The Artists Den has filmed 70 episodes and is broadcast around the world in the United Kingdom, China, Japan, Germany, Australia, New Zealand, Canada, Israel, and across Latin America.

Name: Golden Village Multiplex Pte Ltd

Golden Village was established to develop and operate modern, luxurious multiplex cinemas and is the first local cinema company to personalize the movie-going experience through its Movie Club program.

The prime mover in the introduction of the multiplex to Asia, Golden Village’s first imprint in Singapore was made on 28 May 1992 with the successful opening of the Yishun 10 cinema complex. Today, GV has a reputation of offering the widest choice of movies, unparalleled comfort, state-of-the-art design, prime locations and convenience.

Name: BIPOC TV & Film
Description:
BIPOC TV & Film is a nonprofit movement advocating for and amplifying Black, Indigenous, and People of Colour professionals working and creating content in Canada's film and TV industry. Our purpose is grounded in the principles of inclusion, equity, solidarity and community. From writers, directors, producers and actors to editors, crew members and executives, our members are a mix of emerging, mid-level and established industry professionals. BIPOC TV & Film is dedicated to the economic empowerment, creative sovereignty and career advancement of BIPOC both in front and behind the camera.

Through our dynamic programming, we offer many opportunities to our community (at no cost) and our allies within the Canadian screen industry: Education, Mentorship & Training; Panels & Networking Events; Advocacy & Outreach.

BIPOC TV & Film was founded in 2012 by Writer/Director Nathalie Younglai, who saw a need to form a community for others like her, who were also feeling isolated by the overall lack of diverse representation in the industry. 

In 2020, BIPOC TV & FILM took the leap from being a 100% volunteer-run organization to a registered non-profit and hired its first Executive Director. This evolution ushers in a new era and offers opportunities to expand our current offerings, build new programming and partnerships, and strengthen our impact.

Our world is experiencing a renaissance, an awakening, a reckoning. 

Join us in our quest to reimagine, reframe, and revolutionize our screens and create opportunity for all!

Name: NOT ALONE Productions
Description:
Somos una productora de cine centrada en el acompañamiento a las creadoras durante la fase de desarrollo de sus proyectos audiovisuales.
Not Alone Productions se fundó con el propósito de ayudar a las creadoras y creadores a afrontar las primeras fases de desarrollo de un proyecto audiovisual, ya sea un cortometraje, una película o una serie, y ofrecer asesoría de la historia tanto en la parte creativa como en su financiación. Poniendo especial énfasis en que los proyectos tengan un buen recorrido de laboratorios de desarrollo.
En apenas dos años, conseguimos llevar los proyectos de nuestras creadoras a programas de referencia dentro de la industria audiovisual como La Incubadora de la ECAM, el Festival de Sitges o el Festival de Cannes.
De forma natural, Not Alone desarrolló su faceta de productora de cine que comenzó con los cortometrajes “Nahid & Adele” y “Lo peor que podría pasar”, los cuales llegaron a distribución consiguiendo numerosas selecciones en su recorrido por festivales.
Otro de nuestros servicios que destaca son las asesorías a empresas productoras en la elaboración de planes de financiación y solicitud de ayudas públicas.

Name: OTT.X
Description:
About OTT.X
OTT.X is the nonprofit trade association bringing together the full spectrum of the streaming ecosystem — content creators, platforms, technology providers, advertisers and service partners — to shape the future of audio-visual entertainment delivered via OTT. 

Our Mission
To connect, learn & solve — enabling innovation, collaboration and competition that empower an open, inclusive and forward-thinking streaming industry where diverse voices thrive, emerging platforms flourish and audiences connect with content in bold new ways. 

What We Do
Connect: We create spaces—live events, webinars, salons—where industry professionals forge meaningful relationships, discover partners and expand their networks. 

Learn: Through working groups, research reports, and thought-leadership sessions, we help members stay ahead of market trends, business model shifts and tech advancements in streaming media. 

Solve: We convene stakeholders to tackle shared challenges—from standards and metadata to monetization and ecosystem interoperability—so the industry can scale and evolve together. 

Why Join Us
For over 30 years our association (formerly known as the Entertainment Merchants Association) has supported the home-entertainment and streaming industries. 

Membership opens access to peer networks, exclusive events, insights and working groups — positioning your organization to lead in the fast-changing OTT landscape. 

Our Vision
A vibrant, global ecosystem of companies continually advancing the consumer experience — shaping how audiences discover, engage with and pay for audio-visual content — powered by collaboration, diversity and innovation.

Name: A+E Networks Latin America

Description:
Womenworking.com is founded by Helene Lerner, a prolific author, independent public television host, Emmy Award-winning executive producer and a Fortune 500 workplace consultant. Under the umbrella of Creative Expansions, Inc. the company she founded in 1994, Lerner has produced more than 20 televised specials and received American Public Television’s (APT) “MVP” award for her outstanding contributions to public television. She is also the author of 13 books including The Confidence Myth: Why Women Undervalue Their Skills and How to Get Over It.

The purpose of WomenWorking.com is to provide women with the support and information needed to overcome obstacles and make the most of their lives, both personally and professionally. Not only do we need more female leaders at the top, but we need more women at all levels of business, government, and nonprofits to step up—there’s no time to waste. Real confidence is stepping out of your comfort zone and moving forward when you think you can make a difference, even with "shaky knees".

Name: Advocacia Dias de Souza
Description:
Com dezenove anos de atuação no Distrito Federal, a Advocacia Dias de Souza possui vasta experiência no atendimento de clientes de projeção nacional e internacional, que lhe confiam o patrocínio das suas principais demandas envolvendo direito público, especialmente nos ramos do direito constitucional, tributário e administrativo. Com foco no resultado, é reconhecido pelos clientes e parceiros como um escritório de excelência na prestação de serviços jurídicos relativos ao contencioso judicial e administrativo.

CONTENCIOSO JUDICIAL

A atuação do escritório é completa, iniciando-se na plena compreensão do problema e de seu impacto na vida econômica e financeira do cliente, porém levando-se em consideração seu possível desfecho, diagnosticado em razão de nossa vasta experiência perante os Tribunais Superiores. Disso decorre que seja oferecida uma solução personalizada para cada situação concreta que lhe é apresentada. O foco no resultado é refletido nas iniciais, recursos e memoriais de julgamentos, que contém teses vanguardistas e precursoras de jurisprudência favorável aos contribuintes. Além disso, possui presença diária na Justiça Federal, no Tribunal Regional Federal da 1ª Região, no Superior Tribunal de Justiça e no Supremo Tribunal Federal, para realização de despachos pessoais com Juízes, Desembargadores e Ministros, e sustentações orais, sempre orientado por uma postura proativa, transparente e objetivando a efetividade.

CONTENCIOSO ADMINISTRATIVO

Assim como no contencioso judicial, a Advocacia Dias de Souza pauta sua atuação perante os tribunais administrativos na proatividade, na transparência e no resultado. Com presença diária nas sessões de julgamento do Conselho Administrativo de Recursos Fiscais - CARF, patrocina casos de relevância para a definição da correta aplicação da legislação tributária federal. Atuando nos processos desde o momento em que chegam ao CARF até o julgamento final perante a Câmara Superior de Recursos Fiscais, mediante despachos pessoais de memoriais e realização de sustentações orais, obteve decisões favoráveis em questões concretas de extrema relevância a seus clientes.

Name: American Coaster Enthusiasts
Description:
American Coaster Enthusiasts, or ACE, is a non-profit organization founded in 1978. The group consists of more than 7,000 members from across the United States, Europe, and Japan. ACE is the world's largest ride enthusiast organization that prides itself in its award-winning publication, events, and preservation efforts for roller coasters around the world.

ACE holds events, both national and regional at parks across the country and around the world. ACE events are usually highlighted by Exclusive Ride Time (ERT), during which the host park allows ACEers on select rides either before the park opens or after it closes.

ACE also publishes two magazines, ACE News, which is a bimonthly newsletter, and RollerCoaster!, a quarterly full-color magazine. Both are included in memberships. Select regions also publish regional newsletters to inform members of news and events in their area.

Preservation is also an important aspect of ACE's goals. Believing that all roller coasters are of significant historical value, the organization seeks to relocate or save historic coasters that are in danger of demolition. It is also ACE's goal to educate the public about the historic value of roller coasters and the amusement parks that house them.

For more information on ACE and its efforts, please see visit our webiste (www.AmericanCoasterEnthusiasts.org) and check the "About ACE" section.

At Julien’s, we exist to bring those moments back into your life through iconic artifacts and one-of-a-kind collections.

The experienced staff of the Convention Center have the resources, experience and professionalism to handle any need in-house, whether a passed hors d'oeurves reception for 50 or a formal sit down dinner for over 2,000 featuring authentic Cajun cuisine, complex sound and lighting for elaborate shows or private wireless telecommunications networking. 

CONVENTIONS, MEETING SPACE, & SPECIAL EVENTS 
The CAJUNDOME Convention Center offers multiple meeting space options ranging from a small board room of 10 guests to a 4,000 guest general session. These spaces can accommodate a number of events including corporate and leisure trade shows, corporate meetings and events, theater style presentations, private or public receptions and banquets, non-profit fundraising events, school dances and graduation ceremonies and celebrations, just to name a few. Rentals include assistance from our experiences and knowledgeable staff, easy load-in and access, and free on-site parking. 

CATERING
Artisan Catering is the exclusive caterer for the CAJUNDOME Convention Center. Artisan’s experienced and award winning culinary team is ready to plan your next event, and no matter how elaborate your vision is, we can coordinate our culinary efforts with other local vendors to streamline the entire process for you. 

CONTACT US
The Convention Center is only one of many great reasons to hold your next convention, meeting, trade show, reception or event in Lafayette.

Description:
Spectra Studio is a multidisciplinary collective based in Los Angeles, California. 

We combine art with the possibilities of technology to transform ideas into tangible,

Experimental by nature, our practice is fueled by research, collaboration and discovery. We aim to evoke emotions, express the inexplicable, and reflect on how we relate to the physical, the digital, and the unknown.

Name: Tomorrow's World Today
Description:
Tomorrow’s World Today is an Emmy-nominated television show owned and produced by Flying Cork Media that focuses on finding a better way for us to live more sustainable lives. What’s the next innovation that we can use today that will also make a difference tomorrow? 

Our show and website spotlight the latest in technology and sustainability in four different areas: inspiration, creation, innovation, and production. Our field reporters travel the world in search of the innovative pioneers who are utilizing our natural and technological resources.

New ideas are the source of innovation. What will you do with yours for tomorrow’s world, today?

Name: Rode Hoed
Description:
Rode Hoed is a professional full-service events venue located on the historic UNESCO World Heritage canals of Amsterdam. Imaging a board meeting, an international congress or even a romantic church wedding; seven diffirent halls, a spacious foyer with a beautiful café, and perfectly accessible on foot, by bicycle, car or boat: with a capacity of 450 persons. With our in-house professional kitchen of organic dishes we serve our guests delicious lunches and upscale diners. Our experienced technicians make sure that everything runs smoothly at your event.

The Ancient Greeks had the Agora and the Romans the Forum. Here in Amsterdam we have the Rode Hoed that stands in a 400 year old tradition of facilitating an influx of idea’s. Rode Hoed is a keen watcher and booster of societal debates and also a producer of debates, symposia, literary and even musical gatherings. In fact, our Oosterhuiszaal resonates a beautiful acoustic sound. We’ve become famous in the Netherlands for our cultural programming and therefore often have the honour to welcome the (non-)famous subjects of the Dutch policital, cultural and intellectual society in our midst.

Name: EPIC ON
Description: EPIC ON is a one stop destination for the consumption of entertainment on digital platforms which was launched by IN10 Media, EPIC On offers viewers a completely integrated entertainment offering with both on-demand and live TV. It comes packed with hours of on-demand content, including exclusive originals, Indian TV shows, music and health, travel ,food, adventure, mythology and lifestyle videos across multiple languages.

Name: STORYLAB Argentina
Description:
Somos una productora integral de contenidos creada en Argentina en el año 2013 por Nacho Viale y Diego Palacio, con oficinas en Uruguay y Estados Unidos desde 2019.
Nos especializamos en el desarrollo de contenidos y la realización de producciones audiovisuales de calidad. 
Pensamos, creamos y comercializamos contenidos originales para audiencias locales e internacionales.
Realizamos una amplia variedad de formatos, como programas de interés general, series de ficción, realities documentales y branded content. 
Nuestro portfolio incluye producción integral, writers room y servicios de producción. 
Entre nuestros trabajos más exitosos se encuentran la creación de la Serie Original de Netflix “Estocolmo”, la producción de las dos temporadas de la serie “La Casa del Mar” (DirecTV) nominada en 2016 a los INTERNATIONAL EMMY AWARDS como Mejor Drama, el docu reality MIL MANOS POR ARGENTINA para Flow nominado en 2020 a los INTERNATIONAL EMMY AWARDS en la categoría “Short Form Series”, la creación de Post Mortem (Flow) la serie Argentina más vista del año 2020  y la producción integral de los dos programas de interés general con mayor permanencia y popularidad de la televisión argentina, “La Noche de Mirtha” y “Almorzando con Mirtha Legrand”
Location: CABA, Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires

Old dogs. New Tricks.

Highwire Games is a small team of veteran game developers -- with a proven record of creative vision and disciplined, high-quality production -- applying our expertise to new platforms, creating new experiences and reaching new audiences.

Gato Studio (formerly Gato Salvaje Studio), it's an independent video-game developer and publisher, stablished in A Coruña since 2010. Company contact: info@gatosalvajestudio.com

Name: Parque de las Leyendas
Description:
El Parque de las Leyendas (PATPAL) es el zoológico nacional , un jardín botánico y un centro arqueológico  ubicado en la ciudad de Lima, cuya simbiosis integra la riqueza y tradición del Perú. 
El Parque de las Leyendas fue fundado por Felipe Benavides Barreda durante el gobierno de Fernando Belaúnde Terry en 1964. Está ubicado en el Distrito de San Miguel en la ciudad de Lima. 
A inicios de los años 70, un zoológico que existía en el distrito de Barranco fue cerrado definitivamente, y todos los animales que se encontraban alojados allí, fueron trasladados hasta el Parque de las Leyendas. 
El nombre viene de 10 leyendas incas y pre-incas que fueron ilustradas por Sabino Springett y colocadas en unos muros en la entrada, las cuales fueron retiradas alrededor del 2008; actualmente se conservan solamente los textos en el conocido atractivo "Patio de Leyendas" dentro del Parque Cultural. 
Las exhibiciones están divididas en: Arqueología, Botánica, Zoología. 
El Parque alberga 54 restos arqueológicos entre monumentos, templos, murallas, caminos, canales empedrados, etc.
Destacan las Huacas: Tres Palos, La Cruz, San Miguel y La Palma; esta última decorada con frisos representando al ave Piquero y cruces escalonadas. 

EL PATPAL cuenta con 470 colaboradores entre los cuales se encuentra profesionales, técnicos y trabajadores que se desarrollan en las diferentes áreas que dan vida a la institución.

Name: Pathé Switzerland
Description:
With locations in Bern, Dietlikon, Ebikon, Spreitenbach, Geneva and Lausanne, Pathé Switzerland operates 7 multiplex cinemas with 71 screens. With over 300 films and 150,000 screenings (in both original and dubbed versions) per year, Pathé cinemas offer the most comprehensive and diverse film program. In addition, Pathé Swit-zerland offers live broadcasts of operas, ballets, plays, and musical events such as concerts.

Pathé Switzerland operates premium cinemas with the highest level of comfort and the newest technology. In the Pathé Balexert, Mall of Switzerland, Westside and Pathé Spreitenbach cinemas, selected films are shown in IMAX, which offers an incomparable picture and sound quality. Pathé Switzerland operates cinemas with 4DX in the Pathé Dietlikon, Flonplex and Pathé Westside cinemas. D-BOX seats can be found at Pathé Balexert in Geneva.

Located in the heart of Cork City, the Opera House has been a Cork cultural institution for nearly 170 years and will continue to strive to present and produce both indigenous and international top class acts for the people of Cork and further afield.

Cette salle peut également être séparée par un mur mitoyen pour offrir 2 salles de 1250 pieds carrés et offre de l'équipement multimédia à la fine pointe de la technologie signé HomeSync. Le système audio-vidéo comprend 2 projecteurs haute définition avec écran motorisé, ensemble de haut-parleurs encastrés pour un son optimisé qui sauront répondre aux besoins de votre événement présentiel. Name: Change Moments
Description:
Wir überraschen Menschen im Alltag und an ihrem Arbeitsplatz und schaffen so unvergessliche Momente, die wir mit versteckter Kamera filmen. 

2016 startete Change Moments mit einem ersten Video, in dem sie MitarbeiterInnen in verschiedenen Coiffeur Geschäften überraschten und ihnen so unsere Dankbarkeit ausdrückten. Die MitarbeiterInnen waren berührt, haben sich extrem gefreut und wir unsererseits waren sehr überrascht, wie viele Menschen sich durch das Video dazu inspirieren liessen, selber öfter Wertschätzung und Dankbarkeit ihren Mitmenschen gegenüber auszudrücken.

So war unsere Idee geboren: Menschen überraschen mit Wertschätzung und Dankbarkeit und so alltägliche Momente unvergesslich und speziell zu machen: Change Moments.

Eine simple Idee, festgehalten mit versteckter Kamera, die mit jedem Video Menschen inspiriert hat, in ihrem Alltag Momente zu verändern.

Name: EMI (Pakistan) Ltd
Description:
EMI Pakistan Limited, previously the Gramophone Company of Pakistan is the oldest and the largest music company in Pakistan. It is proud to own unique gems of the golden era of Pakistan’s music industry dating back to 1939. EMI Pakistan is a trusted name and prides itself in being the custodians of the country's musical heritage. With over 55,000 tracks and 3,400 contracted artists, by volume it has the largest single repertoire of music in the industry and an impressive collection of over 6000 hours of subcontinent music.

From 1948 – 1996, EMI Pakistan had the largest distribution network for traditional formats and currently, it has the largest electronic/digital distribution platform in Pakistan and internationally. Its rich library boasts a range of genres, from pure and light classical, Sufi music, prose recitals, instrumentals to film soundtracks and pop. Some of the greatest names in Pakistani music including Noor Jehan, Mehdi Hassan, Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan, Ghulam Ali, Iqbal Bano, Farida Khanum, Ghulam Farid Sabri, Alam Lohar and many others, are associated with the company.

It is the first music label in the region to digitize archives from non-digital platforms. Aspiring to remain the top name in the music industry for years to come, EMI Pakistan has also been extensively servicing its digital platforms. With a distribution channel including 800 online stores, EMI Pakistan caters to its universal customers to their fullest contentment.

Name: VR Esport Arena by Phenomena
Description:
Phenomena is a global leader in virtual reality (VR) attractions for location-based entertainment (LBE) venues, such as family entertainment centers (FECs) and arcades. Our flagship product is the VR eSport Arena, which can be enjoyed in 3 different options: 
Software Only 
Arena Lite
Arena Pro
We cater to the diverse needs and budgets of our customers 

GREAT! HOW MUCH CAN I MAKE WITH THIS VR ATTRACTION? 
Glad you asked - click on the link below 
https://www.vresportarena.com/roi-calculator

More information: 
1.  **Software:**
Our software offering provides a cutting-edge VR eSport gaming and operation solution for LBE venues looking to enhance their gaming experience without the need for additional hardware. With an extensive library of immersive and interactive games, our software solution enables FECs and arcades to seamlessly integrate our VR eSport attractions into their existing setup.  https://www.vresportarena.com/software

Name: (Le) Poisson Rouge
Description:
(Le) Poisson Rouge is a multimedia art cabaret founded by musicians on the site of the historic Village Gate. Dedicated to the fusion of popular and art cultures in music, film, theater, dance, and fine art, the venue's mission is to revive the symbiotic relationship between art and revelry; to establish a creative asylum for both artists and audiences.

LPR prides itself in offering the highest quality eclectic programming, impeccable acoustics, and bold design. The state-of-the art performance space, engineered by the legendary John Storyk/WSDG, offers full flexibility in multiple configurations: seated, standing, in-the-round, and numerous alternative arrangements. The adjoining lounge is open during the day as a café, and at night as a secondary bar and event space. A work of art itself, the physical facilities are the embodiment of the experimental philosophy that drives the venue.

LPR is a source you can trust for exposure to visionary work, people of character, and a consistently dynamic environment. We invite you to immerse yourself in a nightlife of true substance and vitality. Bring open mind and drinking shoes.

Name: Mega Model Sul
Description:
A Mega Model foi fundada em 1995 e é a única multinacional de origem brasileira no segmento. Atendemos a diversos clientes nacionais e internacionais no em campanhas publicitárias, desfiles em semanas de moda e editoriais nas principais revistas do mundo. Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: STREETOPIA
Description:
O Streetopia é o destino de quem enxerga o basquete como algo muito além do esporte. Aqui, você encontra informações selecionadas sobre a NBA, basquete nacional e internacional, desde o amador ao profissional, assim como sport business, música, sneakers, arte, moda, comportamento, inovação, e tudo sobre as principais pessoas e movimentos que transformam o futuro ao redor do mundo. 
Você também poderá participar de nossos eventos, torneios e grandes festivais, criados especificamente para suprir uma demanda de experiências positivas, saudáveis e de entretenimento para jovens e famílias. Desenvolvemos projetos sociais dedicados a recuperação e revitalização de locais para a prática do basquete e também na entrega de calçados adequados para atletas em comunidades. Criado em 2013, o Streetopia nasceu do desejo de recuperar um passado glorioso do nosso basquete e atuar de forma incisiva através dos aspectos influentes e transformadores que hoje o esporte carrega.
Streetopia is a one-stop-shop for those who envision basketball as something far beyond the sport itself. Here, you will find curated information about the NBA, national and international basketball, from college to professional leagues, in addition to highlights of sport business, music, sneakers, art, fashion, behavior, innovation, and everything else surrounding key people and movements shaping our future around the globe. You may also participate in our events, tournaments and major festivals, carefully designed to meet the demand for positive, healthy and entertaining experiences for youngsters and families. Streetopia also develops social projects aimed at the recovery and revitalization of places for the practice of basketball, and it also provides proper shoes for athletes in city developments. From its inception in 2013, Streetopia was conceived from the desire to recover a glorious past of Brazilian basketball and also to act incisively upon the influential and transforming aspects that sports have.

Name: Candytopia
Description:
What if an eccentric chocolatier and a daredevil pop star had a whirlwind romance, got married while skydiving, and had a glamorous, glittering love child who grew up to rule a small nation?  Welcome to Candytopia, where colossal candyfloss constructions meld with a tantalizing taffy twistedness!

Explore our sprawling sanctuary of confectionary bliss, tastefully curated by Hollywood Candy Queen Jackie Sorkin and realized by master fabricator Zac Hartog. This three-month event celebrates the vibrant colors and flavors of our favorite sugary delights through a series of interactive art installations in over a dozen environments, from flying unicorn pigs to a marshmallow tsunami. Bring your family, your friends, and your sweet tooth for an experience like none other!

If you ever dreamed of nibbling your way through Candyland or scoring a Golden Ticket, you’ve come to the right place. Treat yourself to Candytopia, and let your tastebuds and your imagination soar!

Name: Palm Beach Cannes
Description:
Il est grand temps de rallumer les étoiles ! Depuis le 5 avril 1929, le Palm Beach brille tel un joyau à la pointe de la Croisette. L’établissement emblématique de la Côte d’Azur a vu défiler les plus grandes légendes de la scène mondaine : le Duc et la Duchesse de Windsor, Grace Kelly, WinstonChurchill, John Fitzgerald Kennedy...

Palais lointain à l’écart du tumulte du centre-ville, son architecture mythique et ses soirées de prestige ont marqué les générations, participant à la légende cannoise.Après cinq années de travaux pour restaurer ce bâtiment au patrimoine incomparable, la nouvelle vision du Palm Beach intègre à la fois préservation de son histoire et création d’une identité moderne. Restaurants, casino, boutiques, vie nocturne, événements, piscine, spa et remise en forme... Dans ce royaume onirique, tous les rêves sont exaucés !

Une adresse mythique, offrant l’exclusivité et un service cinq étoiles au bord de la Méditerranée.

___

« It’s high time to turn the stars back on! » Since April 5, 1929, the Palm Beach has shone like a jewel at the tip of the Croisette. This emblematic Côte d’Azur establishment has welcomed legends of the social scene: the Duke and Duchess of Windsor and Duchess of Windsor, Grace Kelly, Winston Churchill, John Fitzgerald Kennedy...

A remote palace away from the hustle and bustle of the city center, its architecture and its prestigious evening events have marked the Cannes legend. After five years of restoration work on this incomparable heritage, the new vision of the new vision of the Palm Beach combines the preservation and creating a modern identity.
Restaurants ,casino, boutiques, nightlife, events, pool, spa and fitness...In this dreamlike kingdom, all dreams come true!

A mythical address, offering exclusivity and five-star service on the shores of the Mediterranean.

Name: Nonesuch Theater
Description: The jewel-box theater of downtown Fort Collins, CO. Nonesuch is an intimate live theater experience with 49 seats and year round, professional entertainment. Enjoy a cold beer, glass of wine or other refreshments downtown near shopping and dining. Venue and services available for special events and the perfect size for private parties and presentations. Home of la-de-da performing arts - training for all ages.

Name: DEAG Deutsche Entertainment AG
Description:
Die DEAG Deutsche Entertainment Aktiengesellschaft (DEAG), ein führender Entertainment-Dienstleister und Anbieter von Live Entertainment, produziert und promotet Live-Events aller Genres und Größenordnungen in Europa. Mit ihren Konzerngesellschaften ist die DEAG an 24 Standorten in ihren Kernmärkten Deutschland, Großbritannien, Schweiz, Irland, Dänemark, Spanien und Italien präsent. Als Live-Entertainment-Dienstleister mit integriertem Geschäftsmodell verfügt die DEAG über umfassende Expertise in der Konzeption, Organisation, Vermarktung und Durchführung von Live-Events. 
1978 in Berlin gegründet, gehören heute die Bereiche Rock/Pop einschließlich Urban und Electronic Dance Music, Classics & Jazz, Family-Entertainment, Spoken Word & Literary Events, Arts+Exhibitions, das Ticketing und Entertainment-Services zu den Kerngeschäftsfeldern der DEAG. Live Entertainment für alle Generationen sowie Arts+Exhibitions sind wichtige Bausteine für die Weiterentwicklung des DEAG-eigenen Content.
Für rund 6.000 Veranstaltungen werden jährlich über 10 Mio. Tickets für DEAG-eigenen und Dritt-Content umgesetzt – ein kontinuierlich wachsender Anteil davon über die Ticketing-Plattformen der DEAG-Gruppe myticket.de, myticket.at, myticket.co.uk, gigantic.com und tickets.ie.

Name: PictureTime DigiPlex Private Limited
Description: PictureTime is a Mobile Digital Movie Theatre. It is the world's first state of the art, digital mobile cinema, exhibiting the latest films, educational programs, and interactive governance engagements in rural and Tier3 Cities.

Name: Dynasty Sports & Entertainment
Description:
Dynasty Sports & Entertainment is the premier pricing, distribution and inventory management platform in the sports, music and other live event space. We provide our partners with unmatched pricing and inventory strategies, a tailored data and analytics platform, and proprietary technology and tools to maximize revenue yield while broadening distribution. 

Dynasty’s team of executives include seasoned primary and secondary market industry veterans that have extensive experience in crafting business plans. These business plans have successfully assisted our partners in achieving incremental revenue while protecting the team brand all while strengthening the core of their business – the season ticket member.

Name: Kreativ Media Partners
Description:
Kreativ Media Partners is a full-service talent management firm with a presence in Los Angeles and New York. Founded by Brent Paxton, Kreativ Media Partners champions the boldest voices in film, television, and music.

We are a team of passionate advocates and tireless champions dedicated to nurturing extraordinary actors, directors, cinematographers, composers, producers and writers. We believe in the power of collaboration and mentorship, guiding each artist on a personalized journey to unlock their full potential and achieve their wildest dreams.

At Kreativ Media Partners, we don't just manage careers; we cultivate artistry. We foster a dynamic and supportive environment where your aspirations are nurtured, your vision is amplified, and your unique voice resonates.  We challenge conventional wisdom, think outside the box, and leverage our industry expertise to forge innovative pathways to success. We are committed to breaking barriers and connecting international talents with the global stage.

More than just a management firm, Kreativ Media Partners is a launchpad for your dreams.  Join us, and let's create the future of entertainment, together.

Name: FringeArts
Description:
FringeArts is Philadelphia’s home for contemporary performance, presenting progressive, world-class art that stretches the imagination and boldly defies expectation. As the city’s lead experimenter in the arts, FringeArts exposes audiences to unpredictable dance, theater and music performances by accomplished and emerging innovators who are pushing the boundaries of art-making and redefining the artistic landscape worldwide.

Year-round programming is presented at FringeArts’ state-of-the-art center on the Delaware River Waterfront—a renovated historic building that also houses a restaurant and beer garden. Each September, the organization presents the annual Fringe Festival, a 17-day celebration that fills the city’s neighborhoods with more than 1,000 curated and independently produced contemporary performances.

As a catalyst for cultural and community development, and a destination that brings artists and audiences together, FringeArts amplifies the vibrancy of the city’s arts community and enriches the lives of those who reside, work and visit here.

Name: Filmnet
Description:
At FilmNet, we all thrive to achieve the bigger goals day-in-day-out. Back in 2014, when the concept of VOD was but a mere dream, we began our journey. The management had a dream to provide thousands of locals with the ability to watch the content they demand, whenever - wherever.

As difficult as it was we managed to get the service up and running and slowly we watched the dream become a reality. Day by day we grew in numbers and began to see the dream realized. There were many challenges from establishing our first HQ to solidifying our footsteps in the market as the first official VOD platform.

Today after a few years of activity we are rethinking the road ahead. We are becoming more agile, restructuring the organization, carefully nitpicking our partners, and forming a solid alliance of talent, potential, assets, and artists. We are here to form a new future for the industry and present true quality, passion, and prospect to our users, employees, and partners alike.

So join us; whether you are an inspiring actor, a new talent, a film enthusiast, or a mega-corporation, we are here to provide the best possible solution. We are always open to new ideas, new beginnings, new customers, and new partners. We woe to be by your side in the steps necessary to achieving a VOD experience worthy of your trust. Then we can take what we have created together and market it to the entire world.

Welcome to FilmNet; Hope to see you soon

Name: Circus Knie
Description:
Die Zirkus-Dynastie Knie, 1803 von Friedrich Knie  gegründet, gehört seit über 200 Jahren zu den ältesten und führenden Zirkusunternehmen Europas.

Zur Unternehmung gehören nebst dem Circus Knie auch das Winterquartier, Knies Kinderzoo und die Eventlocation Knie's Zauberhut in Rapperswil. Während der Tournee beschäftigt der Circus Knie mehr als 200 Mitarbeitende. Der Tierbestand im Zirkus beträgt über 50 Tiere, derjenige in Knies Kinderzoo rund 350 Tiere.
Der Circus Knie tourt jährlich während rund 9 Monaten durch die Deutschschweiz, die Romandie und das Tessin und vermittelt Faszination, Nervenkitzel und generationen-übergreifende Unterhaltung. Firmenkunden bietet der Circus Knie eine einzigartige Event- und Werbeplattform, die für Aufmerksamkeit und positive Emotionen sorgt.

Die Gebrüder Knie Schweizer National-Circus AG ist zu 100 % in  Familienbesitz und Mitglied der Vereinigung der privaten  Aktiengesellschaften (VPAG).

Pilot produced the award winning Globe Trekker series which ran for 25 years and more than 200 episodes, and broadcast to over 30 million viewers across 50+ countries worldwide. 
Pilot’s highly acclaimed programmes have won more than 50 international awards, including 6 American Cable Ace awards. Pilot has released music from its series on 14 CDs. 
Pilot also produces a range of history, lifestyle and food programmes, including Bazaar, Adventure Golf and its food anthology series ‘The Story of…’. It’s currently producing a second season of its history series Empire Builders. For more information visit our website: www.pilotguides.com

Desde hace siete años, PRODU se consolida como un referente en la industria con los prestigiosos galardones que otorga: Premios PRODU, que reconocen la excelencia en la producción latina y Premios PRODU Tecnología, un homenaje a la industria que innova año a año para ofrecer las mejores herramientas a la producción audiovisual. Y el FIAP, en sociedad con PRODU, que buscan reconocer la excelencia en ideas que transforman, inspiran y apasionan audiencias. 

En redes sociales, PRODU totaliza más de 4,7 millones de impresiones globales por mes con sus cuentas en Facebook, Instagram, X, LinkedIn (y otras), a las que se suman más de 130.000 usuarios por mes en su web site y más de 210.000 páginas vistas por mes.

PRODU, la voz de la industria.

CBS News and Stations is home to the nation’s #1 news program 60 MINUTES, the CBS News Streaming Network, the first 24/7 digital streaming news network, the award-winning broadcasts CBS MORNINGS, CBS SATURDAY MORNING, the CBS EVENING NEWS WITH NORAH O’DONNELL, CBS SUNDAY MORNING, CBS WEEKEND EVENING NEWS, 48 HOURS and FACE THE NATION WITH MARGARET BRENNAN. Name: Mojo Concerts
Description:
Mojo Concerts is de grootste en bekendste concertorganisator van Nederland. Van de Red Hot Chili Peppers en Madonna tot U2 en Robbie Williams. Van het 'North Sea Jazz Festival' tot 'A Campingflight to Lowlands Paradise'. Van de Amsterdam Arena tot 013 in Tilburg. Iedereen heeft dankzij Mojo wel eens een onvergetelijke avond gehad.

Mojo organiseert ieder jaar tussen de 120 en 150 concerten waar ruim 1,2 miljoen bezoekers op af komen. Mojo begon in 1970 met Kralingen, het eerste grote popfestival in Nederland. Dit Europese 'Woodstock' trok in drie dagen 130.000 bezoekers. Ook daarna was Mojo verantwoordelijk voor verschillende mijlpalen in de Nederlandse (pop)geschiedenis; zo was Bob Dylan in de Kuip in 1978 bijvoorbeeld het eerste Nederlandse stadionconcert. Vanaf 1993 organiseert Mojo jaarlijks het Lowlandsfestival, een 'campingflight' met een unieke mix van rock, dance, theater, film en entertainment.

Al 40 jaar verzorgt Mojo de meest uiteenlopende concerten en een breed scala aan festivals zoals 5 Days Off, Two Sevens Splash en Fields of Rock. Mojo volgt nieuwe ontwikkelingen op de voet en blijft innovatief, zowel in programmering als bij de ontwikkeling van publieksvoorzieningen.

Mojo Concerts is tevens verantwoordelijk voor het boeken van artiesten in het Nederlandse clubcircuit, bijvoorbeeld in zalen als Paradiso, de Melkweg, Tivoli, 013, de Effenaar, Watt en het Paard. Concerten van artiesten waarvoor Mojo de heeft boeking heeft verzorgd vind je onderaan de homepage onder het kopje Clubcircuit.

Mojo Concerts is onderdeel van Live Nation, een Amerikaans concern dat zich richt op live entertainment. Live Nation organiseert op jaarbasis 33.000 events en produceert diverse tournees van wereldsterren als Madonna, The Rolling Stones en Coldplay.

Description:
Sonhos que unem pessoas. 

Somos uma empresa de experiências ao vivo que pensa a comunicação de modo integrado. Mapeamos comportamentos, tendências e aspirações da sociedade para criarmos plataformas de comunicação com alto poder de engajamento.
 
Buscamos promover transformações reais, sejam elas sociais, comportamentais ou econômicas. Trabalhamos para criar fortes conexões emocionais entre marcas e as comunidades que se mobilizam em nossas jornadas.
 
Somos parte do maior grupo de comunicação com capital 100% nacional do país. Temos o entretenimento em nosso DNA.
 
Hoje atuamos no Rio de Janeiro, São Paulo e Brasília.
 
Visite o nosso site e saiba mais.

ENTERTAINING AND HIGH QUALITY TV

U.S.A., Mexico, France, Spain, Russia and Nigeria. Canal 13 Chile

Name: Eros Media World PLC
Description: Eros Media World Plc, (“Eros”, the “Company”) (NYSE: EMWP) is a global media and entertainment company that acquires, co-produces and distributes films, digital content and music across multiple formats such as theatrical, television, OTT digital media streaming and emerging web 3.0 ecosystem to consumers around the world. The Company also owns the leading South Asian OTT platform Eros Now, which has rights to over 12,000 films across major Indian languages

Name: Studio71, LP
Description: Studio71 is a global media company that produces and distributes premium, brand safe content across all video platforms. The S71 content division produces thousands of original videos for Studio71’s owned and operated channels, podcasts, and apps, and publishes over 1,800 partnered creator channels that generate over 13 billion monthly views across YouTube, Connected TVs, and social media platforms. The S71 sales division connects advertisers with Studio71’s top digital creators for targeted media campaigns and custom branded content. Studio71 is headquartered in Los Angeles with offices in Berlin, New York, Toronto, and London.

Name: Legend
Description:
Since its founding in 2001, Legend has earned a reputation for innovative Stereoscopic 3D Conversion and Visual Effects services through its talented artists and market-leading technology. 

Spring 2018 will bring with it the addition of 600 employees to its new Luoyang City facilities in Henan Province, China, joining the nearly 1000 employees across the Los Angeles, Toronto, and Pune, India locations. 

Legend offers full-scale VR and VFX creative, production, and post-production services – from concept to final color – for major brands, studios, and agencies, as well as CG services through its Animation division.

Name: CBS Radio
Description: CBS RADIO merged with Entercom Communications (now Audacy, Inc.) in 2017. Come visit our Audacy Inc. LinkedIn page to find out more!

Name: The Jim Henson Company
Description:
The Jim Henson Company has remained an established leader in family entertainment for over 65 years and is recognized as an innovator in puppetry, animatronics, and digital animation. The Company’s most recent credits include the Oscar-winning Guillermo Del Toro’s Pinocchio for Netflix, the Emmy-winning Fraggle Rock: Back to the Rock for Apple TV+, the feature film The Portable Door for MGM+, and the upcoming Alexander and the Terrible, Horrible, No Good, Very Bad Road Trip starring Eva Longoria and Cheech Marin for Disney+. Other television credits include Slumberkins and Harriet the Spy for Apple TV+; Dinosaur Train, Splash and Bubbles, and Sid the Science Kid all for PBS; Earth to Ned for Disney+; and Word Party and the Emmy-winning series The Dark Crystal: Age of Resistance, both for Netflix. Iconic catalogue titles include Fraggle Rock, The Storyteller, the sci-fi series Farscape, and the ground-breaking fantasy classics The Dark Crystal, and Labyrinth.

Headquartered in Los Angeles with additional locations in New York and London, The Company is also home to Jim Henson’s Creature Shop, a pre-eminent puppet and creature building group and industry leader in puppeteered digital animation, with international film, television, theme park and advertising clients.

The Company’s Henson Alternative credits include the feature film The Happytime Murders, and the popular live puppet improvisational show Puppet-Up! – Uncensored.

Name: aha
Description: Arha Media & Broadcasting Private Limited, a joint venture by Geetha Arts and My Home Group which offers Telugu-language content finished a year on February 8, marking a year of painting the town orange. Since its launch, on the back of a differentiating content library with a mix of originals, exclusives and theatrical acquisitions, aha has charted its own success story. Today, it serves an incredible 40 million+ unique viewers with 10 mn+ app downloads worldwide. Establishing itself as the one-stop destination for Telugu speaking viewers globally, the streaming platform starts the new year with an aim to entertain its audience and expand its bouquet of offerings.

Name: Ludia
Description:
Founded in Montréal in 2007, Ludia is one of Canada's leading mobile video game companies. Our ambition is to become a part of everyone’s life, to spark the flame of their imagination and make a positive impact on their daily lives. The studio is proud to develop a high-quality games’ portfolio based on iconic brands such as Jurassic World Alive, DreamWorks Dragons: Titan Uprising, Warriors of Waterdeep, Lovelink, Jurassic World: The Game, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Legends, DreamWorks Dragons: Rise of Berk, and much more. Awarded “Canada’s Best Game Maker” by Apple, Ludia was also recognized “Montreal’s Top Employers 2021”
-
Fondé à Montréal en 2007, Ludia est l’un des leaders de l’industrie des jeux vidéo mobiles au Canada. Notre ambition est de faire partie de la vie des gens, de susciter des émotions et d'avoir un impact positif sur leur quotidien. Le studio est fier de développer un portefeuille de jeux de haute qualité basés sur des licences iconiques tels que Jurassic World Alive, DreamWorks Dragons : Titan Uprising, Warriors of Waterdeep, Lovelink, Jurassic World : The Game, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles : Legends, DreamWorks Dragons : Rise of Berk, et bien plus encore. Le studio de développement accueille une équipe enthousiaste et audacieuse. Élu « Canada’s Best Game Maker » par Apple, Ludia a également été nommé « Montreal’s Top Employers 2021 ».

Name: elrowFamily
Description:
Since 1870 and through 6 generations, the Arnau have only had one thing in mind, to entertain and make people have fun. Today, more than ever, this remains our mission in a new period for this long line of entertainers, under the name of elrow Family.

We want you to enjoy our shows and performances. Our overwhelming obsession is to never let our public down. Our driving goal is for you to have fun and a great time when you come. While we continue to do so, we can only say it is an honour for us to be here for you and make you a little bit happier.

You are also part of the show. So welcome to the elrowFamily.

*GREAT SHOWS NEED EVEN GREATER TEAMS*

Know more about us at elrowfamily.com

Name: Holovis
Description:
Holovis design and install world-class experiential solutions for global themed entertainment, visitor attractions and enterprise clients.

Our business has two main areas of complimentary expertise. Our AV specialists focus on system integration and complex AV design, installation and commissioning while our award-winning creative design and software teams have delivered market-defining  attractions, experiential content, digital centrepieces and turnkey experiences.

These synergistic capabilities from our diverse interdisciplinary teams combine seamlessly to create unique solutions which mix cutting-edge technologies with innovative storytelling and immersive learning.

We have offices in the UK (Midlands HQ), US (Orlando), China (Shanghai), Saudi Arabia (Riyadh), and the UAE (Abu Dhabi). Our work is carried out by our in-house global teams of specialist engineers, developers, creatives, producers, data scientists and project managers.

Our list of highly-satisfied clients include Comcast, Madame Tussauds, LEGOLAND Parks, McLaren, the British Museum, Ferrari World Abu Dhabi, Dubai Parks & Resorts, Jaguar Land Rover and Miral.
 
Our work rigorously complies with our proven Holovis Project Management System. This, combined with our ISO-9001 accreditation, provide a double-layer of quality control and service. This means we deliver work correctly, professionally and on-time to our clients.

Name: The Chosen
Description: The table is set. Season 5 is streaming now @primevideo and “The Chosen” app worldwide.

Name: ODEON Cinemas Group
Description:
ODEON Cinemas Group is proud to be Europe's largest cinema operator, with brands in the UK, Ireland, Sweden, Finland, Norway, Spain, Italy, Germany and Portugal.

We welcome 100 million+ guests each year to enjoy great hospitality while watching the latest films and entertainment in 290+ cinemas and 2,500 screens. 

We make movies better by developing world-class cinemas that deliver memorable entertainment experiences for our guests, while offering fantastic careers for our people.

As an AMC company, ODEON Cinemas Group is part of the largest movie exhibitor in the world with around 950 theatres and 10,500 screens. Together, we make movies better.

ODEON IN THE UK & IRELAND
Founded in 1930, ODEON is the largest and best-known cinema chain in the UK and Ireland. Since then, the world-famous ODEON Luxe Leicester Square has hosted hundreds of Europe’s biggest film premieres and was the first Dolby Cinema in the UK.

Perry Barr in Birmingham saw the first ODEON cinema open in 1930, and established the brand as not only somewhere to watch films, but somewhere to experience them too. Iconic art deco architecture and the very latest technology became synonymous with ODEON where you didn’t just go to see a film, you ‘went to the cinema’.

As well as our amazing cinema colleagues, we have teams working behind the scenes across the region and in our support offices in London, Manchester and Dublin, as well as in our Guest Service Centre.

OUR VISION
Creating inspiring entertainment experiences for every guest, with safety at the heart of everything we do.

OUR VALUES
Fun & Passion
Trust & Respect
Quality & Service
Co-operation & Accountability

Name: Parkwood Entertainment
Description: Parkwood Entertainment is an entertainment and management company founded by entertainer and entrepreneur, Beyoncé in 2010.  With headquarters in New York City the company houses departments in music and video production, management, marketing, digital, creative, philanthropy, publicity and a newly formed record label, Parkwood Music.  Under its original name, Parkwood Pictures, in 2008, the company released the film Cadillac Records (2008), in which Beyoncé starred and co-produced. The company also released the film, Obsessed (2009), with Beyoncé as star and executive producer. Parkwood Entertainment produced The Mrs. Carter Show World Tour (2013-2014) and co-produced the ON THE RUN TOUR (2014).

Name: SISTIC Singapore
Description:
SISTIC is Singapore’s largest ticketing agency and one of the country’s leading e-commerce players, selling over 6 million tickets annually. A pioneer in the industry, we partner with an extensive portfolio of major events and experiences.

We help event organisers and content creators grow by enabling consumers to discover, engage and consume our digital and live experiences via SISTIC and our partner networks. We empower our clients and ecosystem partners to achieve success in Singapore and beyond by leveraging our marketplace, data insights and innovation.

Name: Cartoon Network
Description: Cartoon Network (CartoonNetwork.com), currently seen in more than 99 million U.S. homes and 166 countries around the world, is Turner Broadcasting System, Inc.’s ad-supported cable service now available in HD offering the best in original, acquired and classic entertainment for youth and families. Nightly from 9 p.m. to 6 a.m. (ET, PT), Cartoon Network shares its channel space with Adult Swim, a late-night destination showcasing original and acquired animated and live-action programming for young adults 18-34.

Name: Actors' Equity Association
Description:
Actors' Equity Association (“Equity"), founded in on May 26, 1913, is the U.S. labor union that represents more than 51,000 professional Actors and Stage Managers. Equity fosters the art of live theatre as an essential component of society and advances the careers of its members by negotiating wages, improving working conditions and providing a wide range of benefits, including health and pension plans. Actors' Equity is a member of the AFL-CIO and is affiliated with FIA, an international organization of performing arts unions.

Equity is governed by its own members through an elected Council, representing principal actors, chorus actors and stage managers living in three regions: Eastern, Central and Western. Members at large participate in Equity’s governance through a system of regional Boards and Committees. Equity has 28 designated area liaison cities with over 100 members each.

Equity’s President is Kate Shindle. Mary McColl is Executive Director. 

Actors’ Equity Association offices are located in New York City, Chicago, Los Angeles and Orlando. 

Get Social With Equity | #EquityWorks

-Facebook.com/ActorsEquity
-Twitter @ActorsEquity
-Instagram @ActorsEquity
-YouTube: ActorsEquity100

Name: Firefly Drone Shows
Description: Firefly Drone Shows is a team of trained and certified pilots, engineers and world class artists who work together to blend emerging technologies and the most advanced software with illuminated art. Fully compliant and approved by the FAA, Firefly offers precisely designed and synchronized drone light shows for a variety of private and corporate events, as well as custom applications that fit the needs of any client. Often referred to by their audiences as ‘Robotic Fireworks’ and an ‘Interstellar Experience’, Firefly creates an endless amount of electrifying visuals in the sky with a swarm of drones moving in perfect harmony.

Name: Full Picture
Description:
Full Picture is a collective of entrepreneurial-minded, cross-industry experts who dream big, connect the dots in unexpected ways, and consistently deliver legacy-defining initiatives for our clients. We have four divisions that work separately or together to develop amazing ideas and drive powerful results. 
Public Relations – Build buzz and create stand-out media moments through expert brand positioning, targeted press coverage, and special events.

Brand Management – Transform ideas into business opportunities through brand partnerships and brand extension deals, including endorsements, sponsorships, and licensing.

Production – Develop and create original TV and digital content across all media platforms, engaging talent and captivating audiences with compelling stories.

Consulting – Leverage rich experience and a best-in-class network across multiple industries to deliver unique opportunities that take our clients to the next level.

Name: NOW
Description:
Hello entertainment lovers. We’re NOW, one of the UK’s leading streaming platforms, where brilliant simplicity meets brilliant entertainment. Here, we do TV a little differently. We’re home to new and exclusive movies, critically acclaimed shows and unmissable live sports - all without a contract. Watch it all your way on 60+ devices - whether it’s a Sky Original on the big screen or catching the Premier League on the go.

With the team launching a huge rebrand in 2021, we’re incredibly proud of how much we’ve grown. We started as just as handful of people at Sky HQ and have expanded to 250 people at NOW. We’re passionate about diversity, inclusion and collaboration - always striving for the best talent. Everyone at NOW helps grow our brand, accomplish more and shake up the industry. Join in.

Name: MACRO
Description: MACRO is an award-winning multiplatform media company that represents the voices and perspectives of Black people and people of color. We create and finance film, television, digital content, technologies, and brands which are driven by people of color that encompass universal themes to which all people can relate and connect.

Description: We are the new generation of live entertainment. We create market and produce live experiences, concerts and events — just about anything that makes people stand up and cheer.

Name: Visinema
Description:
Visinema was built from great visions by young individuals with progressive ideas and a business strategy that not only carries idealism, but also flexibility to step up to the latest challenges and changes. 

We believe that Indonesian values and local content, through IP development and nurturing local talent, is universally relevant, and can be presented through our storytelling.

In the past few years, we have proven that stories can come to life and be experienced in many ways through technology, as a way to shape our collective memory as a nation.

Name: Kinepolis
Description:
Kinepolis Group NV was formed in 1997 as a result of the merger of two family-run cinema groups and was listed on the stock exchange in 1998. Kinepolis offers an innovative cinema concept which serves as a pioneering model within the industry. In addition to its cinema business, the Group is also active in film distribution, event organization, screen publicity and property management. 

In Europe, Kinepolis Group NV has 64 cinemas spread across Belgium, the Netherlands, France, Spain, Luxembourg, Switzerland and Poland. Since the acquisition of Canadian movie theatre group Landmark Cinemas (2017) and American movie theatre group MJR (2019), Kinepolis also operates 36 cinemas in Canada and 10 in the US.

In total, Kinepolis Group currently operates 110 cinemas worldwide, with a total of 1,144 screens and more than 200,000 seats. Kinepolis employs approx. 4,000 people, all committed to giving millions of visitors an unforgettable movie experience. 

More information on www.kinepolis.com/corporate. 
Jobs: https://jobs.kinepolis.com/

Name: Searchlight Pictures
Description:
Searchlight Pictures is a global specialty film and television company that develops, produces, finances and acquires motion pictures and series for both worldwide theatrical and streaming releases. It has its own marketing and distribution operations, and is part of The Walt Disney Studios, a division of The Walt Disney Company. Founded in 1994 as Fox Searchlight Pictures, the company’s titles have grossed over $5 billion worldwide, amassing 52 Academy Awards including five Best Picture winners since 2009:Slumdog Millionaire, 12 Years a Slave,Birdman,The Shape of Water,andNomadland; 64 BAFTA Awards; 35 Golden Globe Awards, and 10 Grammy Awards. Searchlight recently released Geremy Jasper'sO'Dessastarring Sadie Sink; JamesMangold’s 8-time Academy Award nominatedA Complete Unknownstarring Timothée Chalamet as Bob Dylan; Marielle Heller’sNightbitchstarring Amy Adams; Academy-Award winnerA Real Pain,starring Jesse Eisenberg and Kieran Culkin; and Yorgos Lanthimos’ 4-time Academy Award winner Poor Things, starring and produced by Emma Stone. Upcoming releases include Jay Roach’sThe Rosesstarring Olivia Colman and Benedict Cumberbatch; HIKARI’sRental Familystarring Brendan Fraser; Bradley Cooper’sIs This Thing On?starring Will Arnett and Laura Dern; Ready or Not 2: Here I Come from directors Matt Bettinelli-Olpin and Tyler Gillett; and Andrew Stanton'sIn The Blink of an Eyewith Kate McKinnon, Rashida Jones, and Daveed Diggs. The company includes Searchlight Television, the division which develops and produces series for streaming, network, and cable partners, and earned a Primetime Emmy Award for Best Actress for its first production “The Dropout'' from Elizabeth Meriwether, in partnership with Hulu and 20thStudios. Searchlight Television also produced the limited series “La Máquina,” with Gael García Bernal and Diego Luna.

For career opportunities with Searchlight Pictures, visit jobs.disneycareers.com

Name: Central Casting

Bienvenido!

The company develops, produces and distributes award-winning projects in a variety of media including television, digital, feature films, music programming, commercials, graphic and interactive design, exhibitions, experiential and live events.  The company’s global network has given it a foundation for identifying and incubating in-house and new talent, while offering their client base a worldwide platform for the production, development and distribution of content.

The company has been honored with Academy Awards, Emmys, Golden Globes, Grammys, Webbys, NASA Awards, The Smithsonian Cooper-Hewitt National Design Award for Communication Design, two Palme d’Ors at the Cannes Lions International Advertising Festival, and just about every other accolade and trophy associated with the advertising, marketing, and programming businesses.

Name: Herschend Family Entertainment
Description:
Our story began 75 years ago when the Herschend family discovered wonder deep in an Ozark Mountain cave—and chose to share it with the world.

Today, Herschend is the largest family-held themed attractions company, with more than four dozen leading attractions and immersive experiences across North America.

While each brand offers something unique, all are united by a shared purpose: Bringing Families Closer Together by Creating Memories Worth Repeating. Our 22,000 passionate hosts make this purpose possible through everyday acts of love and service—what we call Heartspitality—the intersection of heart and hospitality.

We’re proud to love in all we do, every day—caring for each other, welcoming our 20 million annual guests with warmth, and making a positive difference in the communities we serve.

Name: 3 Arts Entertainment
Description: 3 Arts is a leading management company based in Beverly Hills, with another office in New York.

Name: Warner Home Video
Description:
With distribution in 90 international territories, more than any other studio, Warner Home Video commands the largest distribution infrastructure in the global video marketplace. Warner Home Video dominates the U.S. sales categories as the number one company in total video sales (DVD and Blu-ray combined), DVD sales, new theatrical releases, TV on DVD releases and total high-definition titles sold. Internationally, Warner Home Video is the number one studio with 16% world market share and a 23% world market share among all Hollywood Studios. Warner Home Video has also been the number one studio in overall DVD sales 13 consecutive years.

Warner Home Video’s film library is the largest of any studio, offering top quality new and vintage film titles from the repertoires of Warner Bros. Studios, Castle Rock Entertainment, Turner Entertainment, the classic MGM library and select titles from RKO, HBO Home Video, New Line Home Video, Redbus Films (in the U.K.) and BBC Video (in North America). In addition to releasing current and library feature films, Warner Home Video has also established itself as a leading distributor of rental and sell-through titles in all specialty categories.

MNC Land develops world-class, game-changer innovative projects that adopt global best practices to deliver exceptional experiences.

Name: Jam Filled
Description: In 2008, three guys decided to build a company that they would want to work for.
