A dynamic workplace for like-minded creative artists, Jam Filled will remind you why you love cartooning: every project is produced with an eye for quality and an ear for fun!

Name: Roborace
Description:
Roborace is the world’s first competition for human + machine teams. It is a new platform for brands, organizations and individuals to test the development of their automated driving systems. 

Race formats will feature new forms of immersive entertainment to engage the public’s imagination. Through sport, innovations in autonomous technology will be advanced, accelerating improvements to road safety. 
 
Roborace will redefine the way you think about AI.

Name: PT MNC LAND Tbk
Description:
PT MNC Tourism Indonesia Tbk has grown to become one of the largest Tourism & Hospitality Groups in Indonesia, focusing on the development of its flagship project, namely MNC Lido City SEZ, as well as various projects in hospitality, amusement, and property management segments.

MNC Tourism develops world-class, game-changer innovative projects that adopt global best practices to deliver exceptional experiences.

Name: THE RIG.
Description:
Introducing THE RIG., a one-of-a-kind destination that aims redefining adventure tourism. Strategically located in the Arabian Gulf, this pioneering project is led by the Oil Park Development Company (OPDC), a closed joint-stock company wholly owned by the Public Investment Fund (PIF) of Saudi Arabia.
 
Inspired by offshore oil platforms, THE RIG. pays homage to the Kingdom's oil and gas heritage with the ambition to deliver exceptional adventure experiences.
 
Spanning 300,000 square meters, THE RIG. will cater to extreme sports enthusiasts and thrill-seekers with a carefully curated selection of over 70 unique attractions and activities, including water sports, extreme activities, amusement parks, and indoor entertainment.
Additionally, THE RIG. will feature 3 distinctive hotels, 11 distinguished restaurants, and a world-class marina. 
 
For more detailed information on THE RIG., please visit www.therig.sa.

Name: Annapurna Interactive
Description: Established in 2016, Annapurna Interactive works with game creators from around the world, helping them create and release personal experiences for everyone.

Name: Frontier Touring
Description: Frontier Touring is one of the most respected, long-standing, and proactive concert promoters in Australasia. Formed in 1979, Frontier has had a fundamental role in entertaining Australians and New Zealanders across four decades.

Name: Fred Rogers Productions
Description:
Here at Fred Rogers Productions, kids come first, now and always. We connect with them through shows that are fun, relatable, and put their social and emotional learning front and center. That’s how we’ve earned the trust of parents, caregivers, and teachers. 

We bring our one-of-a-kind expertise in early childhood development to partnerships with talented creators, writers, illustrators, animators, and producers. Together, we create shows that foster a natural enthusiasm for learning and that make kids smile while they learn big life lessons. And we are always exploring how to make the most of new ways for kids to watch and play.

Name: Rock Lititz
Description: Rock Lititz is a one of a kind production community that supports innovative creativity within the live event industry. With resources ranging from design, engineering and manufacturing through rehearsals, and beyond, Rock Lititz is a one-stop-shop to collaborate on any live experience.

Name: COPAG - Cartamundi Entertainment
Description:
Pioneira na fabricação de cartas e maior na distribuição de card games no mercado brasileiro, a Copag se transformou em uma das principais empresas mundiais do segmento de baralhos. Fundada em 1908, a empresa faz parte do Grupo Cartamundi - maior do segmento de baralhos no mundo - desde 2005.

A Copag possui um amplo portfólio de baralhos, jogos infantis e cartas personalizadas. Hoje, a empresa disponibiliza mais de 70 produtos destinados aos públicos infantil, adolescente e adulto.

Conheça a Copag e se apaixone.

Copag - Diversão sem limites!

Name: 88ALPHA
Description:
88ALPHA is holding company specialized in Hospitality and Entertainment Management Solutions.
The company own and manage multiple venues through its subsidiaries including restaurants, lounges, nightclubs, and family entertainment centers. 
88ALPHA offered services range from Restaurant and Nightclub Management. Family Entertainment Management, Talent Booking, Artist Management, Brand Development, and PR Solutions.

Name: LuxuryKSA
Description:
LuxuryKSA Is A Progressive Management & Entertainment Service Company In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia; Specializing In All Aspects Of Public & Private Event Management; Talent Management, And Production Services.
The Name Has Been Developed To Integrate A Number Of Related Services Under One Umbrella. The Umbrella Consists Of A Group Of Companies Developed Under Luxury Investments, Which Includes Subsidiaries Such As Luxury Events, Luxury Agency And Luxury Studios.
LuxuryKSA Scope Of Work Involves Concept Development, Creative Direction, Strategic Marketing, Brand Management, Public Relations, Event Execution And A Wide Selection Of Live Entertainment.
Fuelled By Passion And Unique Ideas, LuxuryKSA Professionals Invests Excessive Attention To Details; To Provide Audiences And Clients With A Well-Rounded Entertainment Experience.

Name: Theorycraft Games
Description: We’re hellbent on serving player needs through unapologetically deep games that give everyone the chance to connect, to compete, and to be infinitely delighted by stories they are at the center of.

Name: Black Talent News
Description:
Blacktalentnews.com is a leading entertainment industry website that offers news, information and resources relevant to Blacks in the entertainment industry.

Blacktalentnews.com is the only web site focused solely on the business of black entertainment. Launched as a business-to-business website, Black Talent News’s broad appeal and consumer flair has attracted a significant general consumer audience who is interested in what’s new and next in black entertainment. Visitors look to Black Talent News to keep them informed about the latest, the most important, and the most interesting developments in the business of entertainment through the site’s intelligent, compelling and thoughtful, content-rich editorial environment and multimedia coverage of entertainment news.

Blacktalentnews.com features late-breaking entertainment news (film, television, theatre, new media); black box office reports (grosses and analysis); movie reviews, summaries and trailers; industry events calendar; career opportunities; film and television production charts; interviews with leading industry professionals; a weekly e-newsletter, interactive user forums, and links to other industry resources.

Name: Eventim Brasil
Description:
Sobre a Eventim Brasil
A Eventim está presente em 27 países e é responsável pela comercialização de mais de 250 milhões de ingressos para aproximadamente 180 mil eventos por ano, incluindo grandes produções como os Jogos Olímpicos de Paris, do Rio de Janeiro e de Londres, a final da Copa Libertadores da América de 2019 e 2021, a final da Conmebol Sul-Americana de 2019 e 2021 e turnês internacionais de artistas como Coldplay, RBD, Paul McCartney, Roger Waters, Andrea Bocelli entre muitos outros.

Name: Sua Música
Description:
Nossa missão é desenvolver, amplificar e conectar o universo da música.

Somos o Sua Música, a maior plataforma de conteúdo de música brasileira, onde artistas lançam seu repertório grátis para milhões de fãs, que também se conectam e engajam através do nosso site, aplicativo e redes sociais.

Visão
Ser a maior plataforma de música brasileira e expandir o modelo para outros países.

Name: Tuboleta Colombia (oficial)
Description:
Tuboleta es una compañía Colombiana con 25 años en el mercado del ticketing manteniéndose como la empresa líder de Colombia.  

Al incursionar en el mercado Colombia Tuboleta marcó un hito porque agregó los canales digitales a la comercialización convirtiéndose en uno de los primeros E-Commerce en Colombia.

En la actualidad Tuboleta sigue evolucionando buscando y ofreciendo la mejor experiencia de usuario manteniendo el liderazgo en el sector y siendo la empresa que ha comercializado los espectáculos más importantes del país.

Name: UBC - União Brasileira de Compositores
Description:
União Brasileira de Compositores - UBC é uma associação sem fins lucrativos, dirigida por autores, que tem como objetivo principal a defesa e a promoção dos interesses dos titulares de direitos autorais de músicas e a distribuição dos rendimentos gerados pela utilização das mesmas, bem como o desenvolvimento cultural.

A UBC foi fundada em 1942 por autores e atua até hoje com dinamismo, excelência em tecnologia da informação e transparência, representando mais de 18 mil associados, entre autores, intérpretes, músicos, editoras e gravadoras.

Name: TicketOne
Description:
Established in 1998, TicketOne is the first Italian company providing ticketing, marketing, information and e-commerce services for music, entertainment, sport and culture events. TicketOne is leader in Italy in its own industry with several millions of tickets sold through its multi-channel platform. Its customer base includes all the most important music promoters as well as, in the sport market the Italian Tennis Federation, the Italian Rugby Federation, 23 football teams playing in both A, B and LegaPro division, and the Italian racetracks where every year Formula 1, MotoGP and Superbike competitions are held. The customer base includes also the most famous theatres (both traditional and entertainment), musicals, cabarets, family shows, summer theatre and opera festivals together with exhibitions and museum circuits – basically managed through the subsidiary TOSC. 

Since 2007, TicketOne has become part of a European circuit led by the German company CTS Eventim (listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange) with the perspective of both further expand its foreign customer base and promote also abroad the Italian events sold. Furthermore, the CTS Group brings a strong technological and commercial boost, thanks to the continuous improvement on the IT systems and to the launch of innovative services for both promoters and final consumers. TicketOne’s distribution channels are: internet web sites, call centres, nationwide outlet retails. 

TicketOne is based in Milano and Rome and has approximately 120 employees.

Name: Sago Mini
Description: Sago Mini is an award-winning company devoted to learning through play. Thoughtfully designed to spark imagination and curiosity, Sago Mini makes apps, toys and play experiences for preschoolers worldwide. For kids. For parents. For giggles.

Name: Invoke Studios
Description:
Chez Invoke, notre mission est d’avoir du plaisir à créer de grands jeux. 
Nous croyons que les meilleurs jeux sont créés par des gens qui aiment leur métier, et qui évoluent dans un environnement qui valorisent les membres de leurs équipes ainsi que leurs idées. 
Nous sommes un studio de Wizards of the Coast et nous avons l’honneur de perpétuer la tradition d’excellence de la maison, qui a donné naissance à des marques légendaires.
Notre nouvelle aventure ne fait que commencer, et nous recherchons de nouveaux membres pour rejoindre notre communauté. 
Chez Invoke, tu as la possibilité de jouer un rôle clé en tant que membre d’une équipe ouverte et talentueuse! 
//
At Invoke, our mission is to Have Fun Building Great Games.
We believe the best games come from people who love what they do, in an environment that values them and their ideas.
As part of the Wizards of the Coast family, we're honoured to carry on a tradition of quality games built on legendary brands. 
Our new adventure is just beginning, and we are looking for new adventurers to join our community. 
At Invoke, you get to play your part as a valued member of an open and dedicated team!

Name: Brigade
Description: BRIGADE is a leading full-service entertainment marketing firm spanning the digital, creative, media and publicity realms. Since our inception in 2010, we have quickly evolved into a trusted marketing partner for studios, television networks, filmmakers, festivals and production companies.

Name: LEISURE
Description:
Leisure has opened its innovative experiences to the Middle East with the launching of the largest indoor and outdoor family entertainment destination in Qatar.
 
Set within the state-of-the-art Doha Festival City, Leisure’s theme parks – Virtuocity, Snow Dunes and Angry Birds World have introduced ground-breaking concepts in entertainment, tethered by the company’s motto of beyond boundaries.
 
The destination is home to unique entertainment attractions which include:
 
Virtuocity, a cutting edge entertainment and technology environment, incorporating the Qatar’s first 200 seat e-Sports gaming arena, escape rooms, virtual reality experiences, console lounges and VIP suites. 
 
Snow Dunes is Qatar’s first indoor snow experience, offering thrilling rides within a visually stunning environment.
 
The world-renowned Angry Birds World features popular Angry Birds characters who play and engage with visitors as they journey through this exciting indoor and outdoor rides and entertainment based theme park. 
 
To give you more information, you may also check the links below:
 
www.angrybirdsworld.qa
www.virtuocity.qa
www.snowdunes.qa

Name: Shadowbox Studios Shinfield
Description:
Shinfield Studios Creative Media Hub - 18 purpose built sound stages, together with workshops, backlot, plus contemporary offices. 
 
Shinfield Studios is owned and operated by Shadowbox Studios (shadowboxstudios.com), a leading independent global studio platform owned by affiliates of Commonwealth Asset Management and Silver Lake.  In addition to Shinfield, Shadowbox owns and operates an existing 9-stage, 850,000 sq ft studio campus in Atlanta, Georgia, USA, that has been home to such blockbuster features as “Jumanji: The Next Level”, “Jungle Cruise” and “Godzilla: King of the Monsters”.
 
In addition, we are actively developing multiple new studio campuses globally.

Name: Parallax Studios
Description: Parallax Studios is the premier production and visual development studio based in Los Angeles, offering a suite of visualization, art and design services by a seasoned team of industry experts and artists. Parallax brings expertise across previs, cinematics, animation, motion graphics and concept art with top tier talent.  We create best-in-class, culturally significant visual art and creative campaigns that bring stories and ideas to life.

Name: Minly
Description: Minly is a platform that enables the spread of positivity from (من) a celebrity to (لي) their fan, with the purpose of creating joyous and unforgettable moments through personalized experiences.

Name: LW Theatres
Description:
Owned by theatrical visionary Andrew Lloyd Webber – who has created some of the world’s most popular and timeless musical productions – we know a thing or two about staging the spectacular. Since we started up back in 1977, our passion and pride for what we do has seen us become the largest operator of musical theatres in London. With one in three audience members at a London musical walking through the doors of our West End theatres, chances are, if you’ve seen a musical in the capital, you’ve been to visit us.

We’re continually looking for ways to innovate, experiment and improve. To make every customer experience truly extraordinary.

That’s why, in July 2018, we officially rebranded from The Really Useful Theatres to LW Theatres, improving the look of our website while finding new ways to step up our service. We want you to enjoy every second with us, from the moment you book your ticket to the moment you leave our theatres. Whether you’re coming to see long-running classics like The Phantom of the Opera or exciting new shows such as Back to the Future: The Musical, LW Theatres is the official place to buy your tickets.

We guarantee the best possible seats and unbeatable availability when you come to one of our productions, making LW Theatres your first and only port of call when it comes to seeing that special show you’ve had your eye on.

In our diverse family of iconic and historic theatres, each has its own distinctive personality and incredible headline events, but every one is united by a tireless determination to go above and beyond, onstage and off.

Whether you’re at Theatre Royal Drury Lane or The London Palladium; the Cambridge Theatre or the Adelphi Theatre (co-owned with the Nederlander Group); the Gillian Lynne Theatre, or His Majesty’s Theatre, you’ll find that every experience you enjoy with LW Theatres is so much more than simply a show.

Name: Maxwell Social
Description: An actually social social club, event venue and creative studio.

Name: StarMaker
Description: StarMaker, is the world's most popular audio social platform. Based on online karaoke and voice chat rooms, with leading audio technology, rich social interaction functions, deeply localized operation strategies and comprehensive music library coverage, StarMaker has rapidly completed its global expansion. At present, StarMaker's users are widely distributed in Southeast Asia, the Middle East, Europe, America, Latin America and other regions, covering more than 100 countries around the world, and have become the leading audio application in many markets.

Name: FICO Eatalyworld srl
Description: FICO is the Italian food theme park in Bologna.

Name: DreamHack
Description:
DreamHack is an immersive, gaming lifestyle experience where the community comes to life. Millions of fans tune in to DreamHack broadcasts each year, and the 24 hour-a-day festival weekends feature everything gaming under one roof. Attendees experience professional esports tournaments, amateur and varsity gaming tournaments, world-famous bring-your-own-computer (BYOC) LAN party, cosplay championship, panels, art, activities, expo, screenings, live music and more. In 2020, DreamHack merged with ESL to create ESL Gaming, the world’s largest esports and gaming lifestyle company. The two organizations have been shaping the industry and leading esports and gaming innovation, across the most popular video games with numerous online and offline esports competitions and festivals. 

ESL Gaming is part of MTG, the leading international digital entertainment group. More information is available at dreamhack.com and about.eslgaming.com.

Name: SB Projects, LLC
Description:
SB Projects is a diversified entertainment and media company at the intersection of music, film, television, technology, brands, culture and social good. Founded by one of Time Magazine's 100 Most Influential People In the World, Scooter Braun, SB Projects boasts an elite roster of the top pop culture icons under its management, record label, and publishing companies that include Justin Bieber, Ariana Grande, Kanye West, Zac Brown Band, Carly Rae Jepsen, Dan + Shay, Tori Kelly, Martin Garrix, Karlie Kloss and more.

SB Projects houses a film and television production division, which made waves in the industry with its first documentary film, “Never Say Never”, one of the highest grossing films in box office history. They continued to expand their roster of television and film projects with credits including, Justin Bieber’s “Believe” (2013), "The Giver" (2014) and CBS’s "Scorpion” (2014-Present). In 2018, SB Projects announced they are working on an untitled-scripted family drama for ABC, inspired by the musical legacy of singer, Selena Quintanilla. SB Projects also continues to impact new verticals under its tech incubator, Silent Labs, which holds investments in Uber, Spotify, Songza, Casper, Waze, and Pinterest among others.  

SB Projects remains committed to the company’s founding philosophy of giving back and designs a philanthropic element into each new initiative. In 2017, SB Projects worked with founder Scooter Braun to organize the One Love Manchester benefit concert and Hand in Hand: A Benefit for Hurricane Relief telethon, within just months of one-another.

Name: Universal Music Brasil
Description:
Nós somos UMG, a Universal Music Group. Nós somos a maior empresa de música no mundo. Em tudo o que fazemos, estamos comprometidos com a arte, inovação e empreendedorismo.

Nós controlamos uma ampla gama de empresas envolvidas na música, na parte da edição de música, merchandising, e conteúdos audiovisuais em mais de 60 países.

Nós identificamos e desenvolvemos artistas e compositores, e nós produzimos, distribuímos e promovemos a música dos maiores artistas para encantar e entreter os fãs ao redor do mundo.

O nosso vasto catálogo conta com mais de um século de músicas e compreende a maior, mais diversificada e multi-cultural coleção de música já existente.

Com o avanço da tecnologia digital e a constante mudança do mundo, o nosso compromisso incomparável é para liderar o desenvolvimento de novos serviços, plataformas e modelos de negócios para a entrega de música e conteúdo relacionado, capacitando inovações e permitindo novas oportunidades comerciais e artísticas para florescer.

Sabendo que a música é uma força poderosa para o bem no mundo, é única em sua capacidade de inspirar as pessoas e aproximá-las, trabalhamos com os nossos artistas e funcionários para servir as nossas comunidades.

Nós somos a casa para os maiores artistas, pessoas inovadoras e empreendedoras da música.

Juntos, somos UMG, a Universal Music Group.

Name: Uhuu
Description:
Nascemos com um propósito de levar mais momentos Uhuu para a vida das pessoas. Por isso, utilizamos o que há de melhor em tecnologia e segurança para criar uma experiência completa para as pessoas, antes, durante e após os eventos. Assim realizamos sonhos e ajudamos a tornar esses momentos inesquecíveis.

• A diversão nos inspira, a inovação nos move e a empatia nos fortalece.
• Somos apaixonados por entretenimento e tecnologia.
• Temos energia para enfrentar imensos desafios e coragem de transformar algo que amamos em nosso trabalho.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: 9GAG
Description:
9GAG makes content and videos viral. 

We are a global cross-platform digital and social media network of 150 million global audiences, predominantly Gen Y & Z:
- 40 million followers on Facebook, 49 million on Instagram and 15 million on Twitter. 
- #1 entertainment brand, #6 most followed brand page on Instagram globally
- #1 ranked global social media platform in entertainment & gaming, #1 ranked US's cross-platform video creators
- distribute 2.2 billion social video views on a monthly basis (source: tubular labs). 
- top 300 websites worldwide

Our mission is to make the world happier.

We are backed by: Freestyle Capital, True Ventures, First Round Capital, Greycroft Partners, 500 Startups, Y Combinator and a group of great angel investors in the United States. eg Anthony Soohoo, Benjamin Ling, BoxGroup, Gary Vaynerchuk, James Hong, Kevin Rose, Karl Jacob, Lowercase Capital, Maneesh Arora, Naval Ravikant, Othman Laraki, Philip Kaplan, Rich Chen, Rich Lefurgy, Scott and Cyan Banister, Tim Ferriss.

Name: Adirondack Studios
Description:
Since 1975, Adirondack Studios (ADKS) has provided award-winning creative solutions for designers, artists, producers and owners of entertainment and cultural destinations worldwide. 

With our background rooted in theatrical production, Adirondack Studios prioritizes storytelling and guest experience by examining thoughtful design approaches, innovative fabrication methods and materials and out-of-the-box thinking across the breadth of the project cycle. 

With a combined space of 210,000 sf. in production facilities in upstate New York, Orlando and Dubai, as well as offices in Pasadena, Singapore and Shanghai, ADKS’ team of 300 artisans, managers and installers has provided ideation, concept & schematic design, design development, custom fabrication, technical support and installation & commissioning services for some of the world’s biggest amusement and leisure attractions, real estate developments, performance venues, public art, brand experiences and cultural exhibits – over 4,700 projects and counting. 

Regardless of region, scope or vertical, we have the team, talent and capabilities to truly make a scene. 

Clients and projects span the global entertainment industry and include Universal Destinations & Experiences, Disney Parks, Experiences & Products, Resorts World Sentosa, Doha Oasis, Dubai Parks & Resorts, Level99, Cedar Fair Entertainment, Carnival Cruise Lines, Warner Bros., SkyFly: Soar America, Hersheypark, One World Observatory, Meow Wolf, Christian Dior, Crayola, Dell, Google, Brookfield Properties, San Francisco Opera, Metropolitan Opera, The Joffrey Ballet, Lincoln Center, New York Hall of Science, National Geographic, National Comedy Center and The Franklin Institute.

Regardless of region, scope or vertical, we have the team, talent and capabilities to truly make a scene.

Name: TODA - Theatre of Digital Art
Description:
A 360° immersive event venue, fully equipped with advanced multimedia technology, offering flexible layouts designed for bespoke events. The space is supported by end-to-end professional event services, with dedicated in-house production and event teams managing every stage of planning and execution. State-of-the-art 360° digital projection is complemented by in-house audiovisual capabilities, including professional sound, lighting, and robust technical infrastructure. 
Bar and catering services are available, providing curated beverage offerings and tailored catering solutions to suit your event format and audience. 
The venue accommodates a full spectrum of events, from corporate gatherings, concerts, and live performances to brand activations, wellness experiences and private celebrations.

Name: Mixfame.com
Description:
Mixfame.com is a Online Casting platform, that connects talented individuals with casting professionals and jobs within the entertainment industry.  A very niche oriented, but globally rising industry. 

We are a 18 person team, with strong industry background, operating out of our main office in Dubai, UAE - providing facilitation, audition and casting director services, payroll services, coordination and planning for events, production and movie crews. 

With a technology-first approach, we solve problems and provide tools to casting professionals, bookers, coordinators, producers and directors wanting to find temporary staffing, actors, models or anything in between - in a one-place-for-all approach that saves not only time, but money on the budget!

We strive to empower you, enabling you and your production team to solve your projects from logistics to payroll, in a professional and transparent way, ultimately developing the industry as a whole in the region.

Name: Estádio Mineirão
Description:
Palco de partidas históricas, conquistas inesquecíveis e momentos que marcaram gerações, o Gigante da Pampulha também se afirma como destino dos maiores shows e eventos de Belo Horizonte, recebendo artistas e públicos do mundo inteiro.

Além das grandes emoções, o Mineirão faz parte do cotidiano dos belo-horizontinos como um espaço de lazer, esporte, convivência e cultura, reforçando a vocação do estádio como uma arena multiúso e democrática.

O Mineirão é patrimônio do povo e palco do mundo.

Name: Bizarro Live Entertainment
Description: Productora de conciertos masivos en Chile. Ha tenido el honor de ser responsable de la visita a Chile de artistas.

Name: Mexico Grand Prix
Description:
La Ciudad de México está de F1ESTA!

𝟳 𝗰𝗮𝗿𝗿𝗲𝗿𝗮𝘀 𝗵𝗮𝗰𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗱𝗼 𝗵𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗿𝗶𝗮
Por cinco años consecutivos, el FORMULA 1 GRAN PREMIO DE LA CIUDAD DE MÉXICO Presentado por Heineken se ha posicionado como el "Mejor Evento del Año de F1" a nivel mundial, distintivo avalado por FIA y FOM, las máximas autoridades del automovilismo profesional. 
Se trata de un logro jamás alcanzado por otro país en la historia.

𝟮.𝟰 𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗼𝗻𝗲𝘀 𝗱𝗲 𝗮𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗱𝗼𝘀
Es un evento incomparable que en México ha reunido durante siete carreras a más de 2.4 millones de adicionados nacionales e. internacionales.

Durante la edición 2022; 395,902 asistentes de más de 40 países como México, Estados Unidos, España, Argentina, Japón, Canadá y Chile, se reunieron en el emblemático Autódromo Hermanos Rodríguez para presenciar uno de los eventos más importantes del Campeonato Mundial de Formula 1.

Con una pista del más alto nivel mundial y a lo largo de 7 ediciones, el FORMULA 1 GRAN PREMIO DE LA CIUDAD DE MÉXICO Presentado por Heineken ha contribuido a la economía del país con un total acumulado de 49 mil millones de pesos y la generación de más de 64 mil empleos.

Te invitamos a estar al día de las noticias más relevantes en el mundo de F1 en nuestro newsletter 𝗥𝗮𝗰𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗡𝗲𝘄𝘀: https://bit.ly/3q8IYWi

𝘌𝘭 𝘭𝘰𝘨𝘰 𝘍1 𝘍𝘖𝘙𝘔𝘜𝘓𝘈 1, 𝘦𝘭 𝘭𝘰𝘨𝘰 𝘍1, 𝘍𝘖𝘙𝘔𝘜𝘓𝘈 1, 𝘍1, 𝘍𝘐𝘈 𝘍𝘖𝘙𝘔𝘜𝘓𝘈 𝘖𝘕𝘌 W𝘖𝘙𝘓𝘋 𝘊𝘏𝘈𝘔𝘗𝘐𝘖𝘕𝘚𝘏𝘐𝘗, 𝘎𝘙𝘈𝘕 𝘗𝘙𝘌𝘔𝘐𝘖 𝘋𝘌 𝘓𝘈 𝘊𝘐𝘜𝘋𝘈𝘋 𝘋𝘌 𝘔𝘌́𝘟𝘐𝘊𝘖 𝘺 𝘭𝘢𝘴 𝘮𝘢𝘳𝘤𝘢𝘴 𝘳𝘦𝘭𝘢𝘤𝘪𝘰𝘯𝘢𝘥𝘢𝘴 𝘴𝘰𝘯 𝘮𝘢𝘳𝘤𝘢𝘴 𝘤𝘰𝘮𝘦𝘳𝘤𝘪𝘢𝘭𝘦𝘴 𝘥𝘦 𝘍𝘰𝘳𝘮𝘶𝘭𝘢 𝘖𝘯𝘦 𝘓𝘪𝘤𝘦𝘯𝘴𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘉𝘝, 𝘶𝘯𝘢 𝘦𝘮𝑝𝘳𝘦𝘴𝘢 𝘥𝘦 𝘍𝘰𝘳𝘮𝘶𝘭𝘢 1. 𝘛𝘰𝘥𝘰𝘴 𝘭𝘰𝘴 𝘥𝘦𝘳𝘦𝘤𝘩𝘰𝘴 𝘳𝘦𝘴𝘦𝘳𝘷𝘢𝘥𝘰𝘴.

Name: Uci Italia spa /Odeon & Uci Group
Description:
UCI Cinemas fa parte di ODEON Cinemas Group, il più grande Circuito di esercenti cinematografici in Europa che ogni anno accoglie più di 100 milioni di clienti nei suoi 350 cinema che contano 2.700 schermi.
Grazie alle competenze sviluppate in decenni di esperienza, il nostro brand è basato su alcuni valori fondamentali: la creazione della migliore esperienza cinematografica per i nostri clienti, la costruzione di strutture all’avanguardia e la crescita professionale delle persone che lavorano con noi.

ODEON Cinemas Group fa capo a AMC, la più grande catena di esercenti cinematografici a livello mondiale con circa 1.000 cinema e 11.000 schermi distribuiti in tutto il mondo.

In Italia, negli ultimi anni, la crescita del nostro business è stata esponenziale e questo ci ha permesso di diventare leader di mercato con 40 multisale, oltre 1200 dipendenti e più di 18 milioni di biglietti venduti ogni anno.
Il nostro successo deriva dagli elevati standard di qualità che caratterizzano le nostre strutture e dall'impegno che mettiamo ogni giorno, a tutti i livelli dell’organizzazione, per creare entusiasmanti esperienze di intrattenimento, attraverso una cultura aziendale e a valori in cui crediamo fermamente.
Indipendentemente dalla loro dimensione i cinema UCI combinano un'architettura e un design moderno e funzionale con un elevato livello di comfort e attenzione al cliente. All'interno dei nostri multisala offriamo non solo grandi schermi e popcorn, ma anche il meglio della tecnologia applicata al suono e alla proiezione dei film (IMAX e iSens), poltrone VIP e un’ampia offerta di prodotti food per tutti i gusti.

Name: STX Entertainment
Description: STX Entertainment is a next-generation film and television studio that produces, acquires, distributes, and markets content at scale. From blockbusters like Greenland, Hustlers, Bad Moms, and The Upside to hits like The Gentlemen, Molly's Game, and The Gift, STX produces star-driven films for a global audience. With a wide range of partners including Universal Pictures Home Entertainment and Showtime (which handle the physical and premium television releases of STX Entertainment content, respectively), the studio is a fast-growing, industry powerhouse. Most recently, STX Entertainment has expanded into the television space with the hit reality show, FBoy Island which premiered on HBOMax and has since been renewed for a second season. Upcoming projects include Ferrari starring Adam Driver and directed by Michael Mann, Muscle starring Vin Diesel, and Greenland 2: Migration, the sequel to the global hit starring Gerard Butler as well as a number of direct to platform productions like Night Wolf starring Kevin Hart, I Slept with Joey Ramone starring Pete Davidson, and My Spy 2 starring Dave Bautista.

Name: Neverland Park Argentina
Description:
Neverland es la cadena de parques de diversiones indoor líder en Argentina, con más de cuatro décadas de trayectoria creando momentos inolvidables para millones de familias.

Nuestro origen se remonta a 1976, cuando en Jesús María, Córdoba, se dio el primer paso hacia un sueño: ofrecer espacios de entretenimiento con calidez, seguridad y diversión. En 1980 inauguramos el primer Centro de Entretenimiento Familiar del país, marcando el inicio de un concepto innovador que transformó la manera de jugar y compartir en familia.

Hoy contamos con más de 30 parques en las principales ciudades de Argentina y más de 3 millones de visitantes al año. Nuestro crecimiento sostenido se apoya en un modelo de gestión de clase mundial, una cultura centrada en la experiencia del cliente y una estrategia enfocada en la expansión, la innovación y la calidad.

 Neverland. Inspirando sonrisas, generando recuerdos

Name: SKS365 Group
Description:
We are one of the leading sports betting and gaming operators in the Italian market, bringing entertainment to life for our customers in a responsible, safe and sustainable way.
Through the Planetwin365 brand, SKS365 oﬀers a unique and diversified gaming and entertainment experience to 600,000 registered online customers via the Planetwin365.it website and oﬀline, through a retail network of nearly 1,000 street shops in Italy.
As one of Europe’s fast-growing and award-winning Sportsbook & Gaming organizations, we have over 500 people working in 4 locations that strive to create value for the end-user though a great, market-leading offer.
SKS365 is the home of WORK.LIVE.PLAY. - a dynamic model that allows our people to create a more personal way of working while remaining productive in their roles and feeling they have purpose and impact within the organisation. This is the culture of open feedback, self-improvement, individuality, diversity and fun which we all shape together!
Would you like to be part of something that is truly remarkable? And feel passionate and supported in everything you do?
Check out our current vacancies and join us: https://www.sks365careers.com/vacancies/vacancy-search-results.aspx

Name: IMM Esporte e Entretenimento
Description:
Unir marcas e produtos a experiências únicas é a nossa especialidade, gerando resultados para as empresas e muita emoção para milhares de consumidores. Somos referência em entretenimento ao vivo e o nosso portfólio é o nosso maior diferencial. 

 
Vamos do Rio Open, o maior torneio de tênis da América do Sul aos musicais da Broadway, da magia do Cirque du Soleil ao melhor festival de restaurantes do mundo, o Taste Festivals, passando pelo São Paulo Fashion Week, o evento de moda mais importante da América Latina e pelo GO CUP, o maior torneio de futebol infantil do mundo, para chegar em 2021 com duas novidades surpreendentes: a São Paulo Oktoberfest e uma grande paixão nacional, a Fórmula 1.

Vamos juntos?

Name: PRETTYBIRD
Description:
PRETTYBIRD is a global creative studio driven by culture, powered by craft, and home to the visionary storytellers shaping the future of entertainment.

From their roster of A-list directors to tech innovators to interdisciplinary artists, PRETTYBIRD is built on diverse talent both in front of and behind the scenes. They have established themselves as a leader in the entertainment industry with wins from Cannes Lions, D&AD, Clio, AICP, MTV VMAs, and the Grammy and Emmy Awards. Notably, PRETTYBIRD was named Ad Age’s Production Company of the Year, twice, in 2015 and 2021.

With offices in Los Angeles and London, the executive team includes co-founder and CEO Kerstin Emhoff, co-founder and director Paul Hunter, and President Ali Brown. Their collective industry experience contributes to PRETTYBIRD’s reputation as one of the most inclusive global creative communities in the entertainment industry.

Name: Ludo Studio
Description: Ludo is a multi Emmy, Logie and AACTA Award winning studio and Screen Producers Australia, Media Super Business of the Year in 2020. We create and produce original drama, comedy, animation & digital stories.

Name: Milwaukee World Festival, Inc.
Description:
A 501(c)(3) organization, Milwaukee World Festival, Inc. hosts a variety of festivals and other events and manages Summerfest, The World's Largest Music Festival, an annual 9-day music celebration that averages 900,000 attendees and began in 1968.

In addition, the organization manages the operations of Henry W. Maier Festival Park, situated on a 75-acre permanent site along the shores of Lake Michigan in downtown Milwaukee. The property is the setting for a series of events, concerts and ethnic and cultural festivals that attract an average of 1.4 million patrons each year.

Name: Suma Content
Description:
Suma Content is an independent audiovisual content production company whose core values are quality, authenticity and commitment to diversity, united under our seal to generate social impact through culture.

At Suma Content we have the necessary infrastructure to produce and tell unique, inspiring and barrier-breaking stories; we seek to give voice and creative freedom to our authors, to develop global content and themes for a wide variety of partners and clients, being able to entertain audiences both nationally and internationally.

Name: Guvera
Description:
Founded in 2008, Australian-born Guvera is an award-winninng music and entertainment streaming service that is supported by a multi-skilled, global team working at the intersection of tech innovation, music and brands. 

Brands are central to Guvera's proposition and our mission is to be the global leader in brand-funded music and entertainment. We offer an immersive and genuinely engaging entertainment experience through our unique brand channel environment. 

Through commercial collaboration with brands, we design tailor-made solutions to grow their business and deliver a music experience that fans genuinely enjoy and that artists actually benefit from.

Guvera's HQ is in Australia, with operational hubs in Indonesia and India.

AWARDS
Best Music App, Australian Mobile Awards 2013
Best Startup, Australian Mobile Awards 2013
Winner, Asia App Design Awards, entertainment category, 2015
Gold  Winner Australia App Design Awards 2015 
Shortlisted for the Glomo Music App Award 2016
Awarded Best in Category for 'Mobile Apps - Entertainment' in the Horizon Interactive Awards 2016
Nominated for Best Streaming Audio in the Webby Awards 2016
Gold Winner of Entertainment Category in the [app] Design 100 Awards 2016
Finalist in the Music Category for MediaPost's APPY Awards
Shortlisted for Best Mobile App by Asia's Group Special Mobile Association (GSMA)

HISTORY
2008 - Founded by Claes Loberg 
Feb/March 2010 - Launch beta in Australia and the US 
Jan 2013 - Release mobile apps for iOS and Android in Australia 
Aug 2013 - Release iPad app 
Jan 2014 - Release Windows app 
Feb 2014 - 2015 Global launch

Name: Star Stable Entertainment AB
Description:
Star Stable Entertainment is the home of the #1 fastest-growing horse adventure game in the world - Star Stable Online. 

With over 21 million registered users, across 180 countries, and supported in 14 languages, we are proud to provide an expanding gaming and entertainment platform that fosters social connections, adventures, and creativity for an underserved community of gamers.

Founded in 2011, Star Stable Entertainment has grown to become a multi-channel entertainment company; the home of an independent record label, short-form animations, book series, comics, and mobile apps.

We are a dedicated team of over 180+ employees, hailing from all around the globe. Many of our current employees started out as SSO players who went on to bring their knowledge and passion behind the scenes. We are very proud to have a ratio of 54% female identifying employees and we remain steadfast in our mission; to inspire girls and young women, to celebrate the power of sisterhood, and to create a more inclusive gaming environment.

We are on an adventure to scale our unique impact in the world with two new franchises across desktop/mobile, a long-form animation and licensing program all currently in development. We are working with both internal and external development teams. And, we’re hiring! 

Learn more about our open roles at jobs.starstableentertainment.com

Name: Stage Entertainment Nederland
Description:
Stage Entertainment Nederland, Nederlands grootste theaterproducent, creëert en produceert hoogwaardige musical en toneelproducties voor de Nederlandstalige markt en is onderdeel van Stage Entertainment. 

Naast het produceren van musicals en theaterproducties is het bedrijf ook eigenaar van twee grote theaters in Nederland. Het Circustheater in Scheveningen en  het Beatrix Theater in Utrecht.

Name: Action Zone
Description:
The UAE’s first entertainment centre, Action Zone stands for the top destination for gaming, rides, indoor playgrounds and celebration headquarters for all ages. 

In the end of 2016 , Action Zone underwent a complete revamp, and successfully launched its brand new flagship branch in Mohamed Bin Zayed city. Featuring a revolutionary new space and design, on point marketing communication in addition to unmissable visual identity and value added offers, the new Action Zone presents a state of the art upgraded play experience for everyone. 

With over 30 years of experience in the gaming industry in Abu Dhabi and Al Ain, and soon in Dubai, Action Zone is looking for the best and brightest to join our growing team in this crucial time of reform.

Name: Rebel Girls
Description:
Rebel Girls, a certified B Corporation, is a global, multi-platform empowerment brand dedicated to helping raise the most inspired and confident generation of girls. We purposefully create content, products, and experiences to empower Gen Alpha girls and equip them with the knowledge and tools they need to thrive. Because confident girls will radically transform the world.

With a growing community of 35 million self-identified Rebel Girls spanning more than 115 countries, the brand engages with Generation Alpha through its book series, premier app, events, and merchandise. To date, Rebel Girls has sold more than 11 million books in 62 languages and reached 55 million digital audio listens. Award recognition includes New York Times bestseller list, 2022 Apple Design Award for Social Impact, 10 Webby Awards, Oprah's Favorite Things, and more.

Name: Kraft Sports + Entertainment
Description: Kraft Sports + Entertainment, a division of The Kraft Group, oversees marketing, sales, content development, and event operations for the New England Patriots, the New England Revolution and Gillette Stadium. Led by Robert and Jonathan Kraft, Kraft Sports + Entertainment has set the standard for delivering world-class concerts and sporting events to the people of New England for more than 20 years.

Name: T1 Entertainment & Sports
Description: T1 Entertainment & Sports is a global esports joint venture that owns and operates the ultra-successful T1 League of Legends (LoL) Champions Korea (LCK) team, along with teams in competitive gaming segments that include Valorant, PUBG, and more. Building upon the rich legacy of SKT T1, T1 will expand its teams globally, celebrate new victories, and create even more opportunities for fans to embrace T1’s gaming culture, content, and players in every corner of the world.

Name: Avalon Entertainment
Description:
Avalon is a multi-award-winning talent management, television production and live promotion group with offices in London, Los Angeles and New York. Avalon, ARG and The Agency together represent a diverse and distinctive roster of artists including actors, comedians, writers and directors, among them Academy Award, BAFTA, Emmy, Tony and Olivier Award-winners.

Avalon is the UK’s largest true independent television production company, with over 40 shows in production in the last year including: hit entertainment format Taskmaster (Channel 4 in the UK, Network 10 in Australia, TV4 in Sweden, TVNorge/Discovery+ in Norway); Last Week Tonight with John Oliver (HBO); Starstruck (HBO Max/BBC); Not Going Out (BBC), the UK’s longest running sitcom on air; Breeders (FX/Sky); The Chris & Rosie Ramsey Show (BBC); and Fantasy Football League (Sky). Avalon has produced over 4,000 episodes of hit programming for audiences in the UK, US and around the world, winning over 30 Emmy Awards and BAFTAs from nearly 100 nominations.

Other landmark Avalon shows include Catastrophe (Amazon/Channel 4), Flatbush Misdemeanors (Showtime), The Russell Howard Hour (Sky), TV Burp (ITV), and the cult classic workplace sitcom Workaholics (Comedy Central). Avalon has also produced over 60 comedy specials for various platforms including Amazon, HBO and Netflix, as well as numerous podcasts and radio shows, including the UK’s biggest podcast Shagged. Married. Annoyed. with Chris & Rosie Ramsey. Avalon’s dedicated distribution arm licences its catalogue of programmes and formats to over 200 territories worldwide.

Avalon also produces and promotes live comedy around the world and has promoted more winners and nominees of the prestigious Edinburgh Comedy Award than any other company. Avalon produced Newman and Baddiel: Live at Wembley, the UK’s first arena comedy show, Jerry Springer: The Opera, winner of four Olivier Awards, and is currently producing Operation Mincemeat: A New Musical.

Name: Nowaar Entertainment
Description:
Nowaar is a fully integrated entertainment company based in
Riyadh, Saudi Arabia that focuses on experience-based
events and AV (Films, TV Shows, and Music) content
developments & investments.

Nowaar’s speciality is understanding the local
content and developing it with the highest
international standards through a wide network of
local and international talents. Nowaar’s work has
been awarded and celebrated in several events
including google award for MENA contents and
UNESCO.

Name: B2Tech
Description: B2Tech is a leading omnichannel technology solutions provider to the Sportsbook & iGaming industry with a strong presence and focus on emerging markets.

Name: Machinima
Description:
Machinima is the premier provider of digital content at the intersection of gamer entertainment and culture. Supercharged by parent company Warner Bros., we empower talent and fuel fan engagement across platforms. We create entertainment content for a community passionate about video games, animation, and endless forms of pop culture. With a focus on scripted, topical and gamer programming, and a talent network of top-tier influencers, Machinima reaches over 144M viewers each month. 

Machinima is a division of the Warner Bros. Digital Networks Group.

Name: Geek & Sundry
Description: Geek & Sundry is a hub for community. We celebrate pop culture and fuel its connection both online and in real life. Geek & Sundry presents the best in internet television and online's foremost geek voices. Founded by the producers of the hit web series "The Guild", Geek & Sundry offers a diverse lineup of shows that create a hub for fans of comedy, gaming, comics, music, and literature around the world.

Name: Rimas Music
Description:
RIMAS was initially founded as a community of content creators and a Multi-Channel Network (MCN) that offered its members services of monetization, audio-visual production, audience growth, digital rights management, channel optimization, social media management, digital distribution, advertising, and many other services.

Gaining recognition as a solid company, it then joined the growing industry of Independent Distributors. 

Nowadays, RIMAS is considered one of the most relevant Music Labels in Latin Music.

Name: P&J Live
Description:
Opened in September 2019, P&J Live is the North East of Scotland’s brand news state of the art events venue comprising 48,000 square metres of multi-purpose event space, boasting a world-class arena, conference facilities, exhibition halls and turnkey meeting rooms.

Located at The Event Complex Aberdeen (TECA) which is also home to two on site hotels including the adjoining 4-star Hilton with 200 bedrooms and, the Aloft Hotel with 150 bedrooms with a further 2,200 rooms within a 5 minute drive or 15 minute walk from the venue.

With unrivalled public transport connections, P&J Live is located right next to Aberdeen International Airport - the UK's most connected regional airport, a few short minutes from the city's new western peripheral route, and in prime position for rail links between Aberdeen and the North of Scotland.

A short 15 minute drive or bus journey from the event complex will find you in the heart of Aberdeen’s city centre. Delegates and organisers will be met with a refreshing mix of cafes, restaurants and hotels, that all add to the city's vibrant and cosmopolitan appeal. You may even be lucky enough to hear words from the original Scots language – Doric – and feel its distinctive culture alive in its genial “couthie” people and its “affa fine” traditions. 

P&J Live is managed by Legends Global. Legends Global is the premier partner to the world's greatest live events, venues and brands, delivering a fully integrated solution of premium services.

The expertise and power of its network includes over 450 venues worldwide hosting 20,000 events and entertaining 165 million guests each year.

Name: SAZKA a.s.
Description:
Sázíme na to, že pracovat se má tvrdě, ale zároveň je potřeba mít dostatek času na rodinu a koníčky. Máme flexibilní pracovní dobu a home office. V kanceláři využíváme firemní restauraci i posilovnu. V zimě máme ovoce a na kávě nešetříme, stejně tak na benefitech. Sídlíme přímo na metru a tramvajové zastávce Bořislavka, ale dojet můžeš autem i na kole. 

Podívej se na aktuální volné pozice na https://allwyn.jobs.cz, ozvi se nám a potkejme se.

Jsme členem nadnárodní investiční skupiny KKCG, působící v 11 zemích na 4 kontinentech, a také mezinárodního loterního holdingu Allwyn, předního nadnárodního provozovatele loterií působícího v několika evropských zemích, včetně České republiky, Rakouska, Itálie, Řecka, Kypru a Spojených států.
Více na www.allwyn.cz a www.kkcg.eu.

Name: TBA. Group
Description:
We turn big ideas into brand experiences that stir emotions, change perceptions, fuel conversations and inspire action. 

TBA Group is a virtual and live experience business specialising in three core areas; Sports, Brands and Entertainment. In each line of business, we provide clients with the creative ideas, project management rigour and production expertise to deliver world class live events, brand experiences and music concerts across the globe. 

We have over 35 years’ experience producing some of the largest public fanzones, stadium events, brand experiences, hospitality programmes, and ceremonies staged globally. In the last year alone, we have delivered over 130 live events in over 22 cities globally for the likes of Diageo, Dr Martens, Carlsberg, W Series, JLR, World Rugby, The FA, F1, Formula E and Take That.

Within TBA Group are: TBA Brands, Velocity Experience, VHE, Optimum, LGA and Zest. 

Velocity is an agency specialising in motorsports, which launched in the Summer of 2017 with F1 Live - an event for 100,000 F1 fans in Trafalgar Square. 

VHE specialises in large-scale events and music events; from the MTV Music Awards to ELO at Wembley and all the Take That tours.

TBA Brands works with global brands creating extraordinary experiences. Within TBA Brands, Optimum is our production arm based in the Midlands, allowing us to efficiently produce and build in house. LGA are our specialist automotive experts.

Whether it's attracting a new generation of fans, inspiring your employees to engage with one another, or encouraging your customers to make your brand a part of their lives, we can support your ambitions in one way or another through bright ideas, brilliantly executed.

Name: Cinépolis Cinemas Indonesia
Description:
In the mission to bring global standard in cinema industry, Cinépolis Indonesia offers:

Cinépolis Junior – the very first cinema in Indonesia that is designed completely for children, combining two things that kids love – movies and play. The cinema hall in Cinépolis Junior will include a mini playground with activities such as play bridge, flying fox, giant trampoline, ball pit, climbing trees, mini hammocks, and much more. Families can enjoy films from a variety of seating options, such as bean bags, loungers, cinema seats, or sofa beds for two. 

Cinépolis Macro XE –  an ultimate immersive experience with gigantic wall to wall, floor to ceiling screen powered by high resolution dual digital projectors, breathtaking multi-dimensional Dolby Atmos surround sound, brightest 3D, and comfortable seating with customized geometry for best view.

Cinépolis VIP  – Offers the luxury of movie viewing experience, replete with lavish recliner chairs while savoring the delicacy of classy food and drinks –  served by attendants on call.

Cinépolis Luxe –  Comes as a a choice that provides a luxurious and classy viewing experience at an affordable price. The facilities offered are leather seating that is larger and more flexible, as well as backrest that can be adjusted for comfortable viewing.

Cinépolis JOMO –  The first inspired beanie seats where guests can sink in comfortably to watch the latest movie. It has perfect seat to release all the tension from daily work and enjoy JOMO "Joy-of-Missing-Out" experience with family and friends.

Cinépolis Regular -- State-of-the-art audiovisual experience with most advanced projection system and high fidelity digital audio experience while having the best view from every seat.

For further information about Cinépolis Indonesia please contact feedback@cinepolis.co.id.

#CinemaxxIsNowCinépolis

Name: Sally Dark Rides
Description:
Recognized as the worldwide leader of turn-key dark rides, Sally specializes in creating destination quality themed attractions for regional parks around the world. 

Founded in 1977, Sally began as an animatronic production company to help businesses market their brands in a unique and entertaining way.  Since then, Sally has expanded it’s services and evolved into the world’s leading designer and manufacturer of the most successful dark rides around the world.  

Based in Jacksonville, Florida, Sally is a full-service company providing turn-key dark ride packages.  Services include custom design, animatronics, soundtracks, special effects, electronics, fabrication, control systems, installation and project management.  

Sally has been successful at helping clients bring their licensed brands to life and has created mainstay attractions for major brands like Sesame Street, DC Comic's Justice League, and Warner Bros.' Scooby-Doo and Looney Toons, leaving parks around the world with marketable, long-running, and fun family attractions for years to come.

Name: AEG Presents UK
Description:
AEG Presents is one of the world's leading companies in live entertainment, promoting memorable sell out UK tours for the worlds biggest artists including Justin Bieber, Shawn Mendes, Katy Perry, The Who, Alice Cooper, Arcade Fire, Rod Stewart and many more. 

AEG Presents also promotes festivals and outdoor events including American Express Presents BST Hyde Park and All Points East.

Name: Vinik Sports Group
Description: Vinik Sports Group (VSG) is an entity established by Jeff Vinik to manage the three-time Stanley Cup Champion Tampa Bay Lightning (2004, 2020, 2021) of the National Hockey League and hold the leasehold rights to Benchmark International Arena, the 19,092-seat downtown Tampa home in which the team plays its games. The venue opened in 1996 and became Benchmark International Arena in August 2025 when the global mergers and acquisitions firm, Benchmark International, partnered with Vinik and the Lightning. Since 2010, Vinik has led a complete brand and business transformation of the Lightning and the arena, featuring a mostly private renovation of the publicly owned facility. Doug Ostrover and Marc Lipschultz joined the expanded ownership group of Vinik Sports Group in 2024, alongside Arctos, which initially joined in 2021. In addition to owning the Lightning and managing Benchmark International Arena, Vinik Sports Group, through TBSE, manages the Yuengling Center on the campus at the University of South Florida.

Name: Drive Shack
Description:
Drive Shack is a destination for fun, connection, and interactive golf entertainment. We deliver a refreshing alternative to traditional driving ranges by combining state of the art technology, full service dining, craft cocktails, and a lively social atmosphere.

Guests can enjoy interactive golf games, a chef inspired menu, and vibrant lounges perfect for group outings, date nights, and corporate events. Whether you are a seasoned golfer or a first time player, Drive Shack offers experiences for all ages and skill levels.

Drive Shack provides event spaces for everything from team building to family celebrations, all designed to create unforgettable memories.

Name: GMM Grammy PLC
Description:
Grammy Entertainment Co., Ltd. was established in 1983 by two legendary pioneers of Thai music industry: Mr. Paiboon Damrongchaitham and Mr. Rewat Buddhinan. The company was first set up to operate Music and Television business. Subsequently, the success led to the expansion into other entertainment related businesses such as radio, film, concerts, Education, publishing and retail stores, which clearly enable the Group to operate on a more complete scale in the entertainment sector. In 1994, the Group was listed on Stock Exchange of Thailand as Grammy Entertainment Public Company Limited and the name was later changed to "GMM Grammy Public Company Limited"

At present, becoming the “King of Content” is the Group's main endeavor. Under our philosophy of “Creative entertainment products and services through innovative vision and the most up-to-date technology, ensure highest of quality and social responsibilities”, we have no doubt in delivering products and services that render utmost satisfaction to customers.

WE AMPLIFY LIFE

GMM Grammy Place
50 Sukhumvit Soi 21 (Asoke)
Khlong Toei Nuea, Vadhana, Bangkok 10110
Thailand
T: 0-2669-9000

Name: Awesomeness
Description: A subsidiary of Paramount, Awesomeness is a media company focused on serving the global Gen Z audience through its digital publishing, film and television studio divisions. Awesomeness has become the destination for youth culture, cultivating a loyal audience with award-winning programming on the world’s biggest streaming services including Netflix (smash-hit film series “To All The Boys I’ve Loved Before,” Emmy winner “Trinkets”) and Hulu (Emmy winner “Zac & Mia”, Emmy nominee “Pen15”),  along with the company’s immensely popular short-form programs on YouTube (“Next Influencer,” Twin My Heart,” “Noah Beck Tries Things,” “My Dream Quinceañera”), that garner hundreds of millions of views. As a leading media brand, Awesomeness’ worldwide distribution footprint spans owned, social and premium SVOD platforms. Awesomeness is part of Paramount’s (Nasdaq: PARA, PARAA) global portfolio of multimedia entertainment brands and headquartered in Los Angeles, with additional offices in New York.

Name: LiveStyle, Inc.
Description: LiveStyle, Inc. (f/k/a SFX Entertainment, Inc.) is the largest global producer of live events and digital entertainment content focused on electronic music culture (EMC) and other world-class festivals. LiveStyle’s mission is to provide electronic music fans with the best possible live experiences, music discovery, media and digital connectivity. LiveStyle was borne out of the technology revolution and produces and promotes a growing portfolio of live events that includes leading brands such as Tomorrowland, TomorrowWorld, Mysteryland, Sensation, Electric Zoo, Disco Donnie Presents, Life in Color, Rock in Rio, Nature One, Mayday, Decibel, Q-Dance, Awakenings, and React Presents, as well as the innovative ticketing service Paylogic. LiveStyle also owns and operates Beatport, the trusted global home of electronic music where fans, DJs, and creators connect, discover, and participate in the evolution of dance music culture.

Name: NSN Never say never
Description:
We are NSN Never Say Never, a global Sports & Entertainment company. We are mavericks, disruptive. We create and develop what you are passionate about. We are lateral thinkers, brave. We transform your objectives into solutions and connect audiences around the world. We are insurgents. shameless. We are a global cross-cutting axis between Barcelona, Madrid, New York, Kobe, Mexico City, and Emirates.

We never take anything for impossible. We are restless and determined to make things happen, even if we have to use magic. We are Never Say Never.

Name: Studio Sol
Description:
Studio Sol is responsible for many successful music websites in Brazil, such as

Letras.mus.br @ http://letras.mus.br/
Cifra Club @ http://www.cifraclub.com.br/
Palco MP3 @ http://palcomp3.com/

More than 10 million unique visitors every month!

Name: Lemon Studios
Description:
Lemon Studios is a production company based in Mexico City. We produce original content for film and television as well as provide production services for third parties. 
We have produced over twenty films and four television series and our clients include HBO LA, Universal, Televisa, Univision and Warner.

Name: PopStroke Entertainment Group
Description: PopStroke is an experiential mini golf and casual dining concept merging a dynamic, technologically advanced, and friendly environment open to guests of all ages. Headquartered in Jupiter, Florida, and partnered with Tiger Woods and TaylorMade, PopStroke locations feature two 18-hole putting courses built entirely with synthetic turf, incorporating fairways, bunkers, and rough. PopStroke's unique amenities include multiple bars with various craft beers, cocktails and wine, on-course mobile app drink delivery, an ice cream parlor, a playground, and a full-service restaurant.  PopStroke delivers an unmatched guest experience through cutting-edge technology, providing an interactive and unique golf experience for guests of all skill levels. PopStroke offers various event packages for parties of all sizes and hosts competitive putting tournaments throughout the year, including weekly putting leagues. PopStroke has 13 locations across Florida, Texas, Arizona, Alabama, South Carolina, and Nevada, with 7 additional venues under development and expected to open by the end of 2024.

Name: Grupo Slots
Description: Grupo Slots es una empresa líder formada por más de 1500 colaboradores, de variados rubros y profesiones, que día a día hace realidad su misión: Brindar un excelente servicio de entretenimiento y esparcimiento. SISTER builds upon Featherstone’s Emmy and BAFTA Award-winning scripted indie, Sister Pictures, as a new independent global studio with offices in London, LA, and Manchester. It unites the expertise of the founders alongside a team of renowned creatives to make breakout stories across all forms of media. As well as producing hit shows including Chernobyl (Sky/HBO) and Giri/Haji (BBC/ Netflix), SISTER has made a series of bold investments in new creator-led businesses including Zando, an ambitious new publishing venture from Molly Stern, Campside Media, a podcast studio, and AWA Studios, a comic book and digital media publisher.

Name: Palace Entertainment
Description:
Palace Entertainment is a leading operator of amusement parks, water parks, family entertainment centers, and educational venues across the United States and Australia. 

We currently operate more than 20 entertainment destinations in 10 states including two of America's most historic and treasured amusement parks -- the world-famous Kennywood Park in Pennsylvania and Lake Compounce, America's First Amusement Park in Connecticut.

Name: Nerd Street
Description:
Nerd Street is a national network of esports facilities and events dedicated to powering competitive opportunities for gamers  at all levels including the youth, high school, collegiate, amateur and pro esports scenes. The company promotes greater access to the esports industry, laying a national framework for esports talent development and high-quality gaming tournaments. 

Through Localhost, its gaming and esports centers across the country, the company provides opportunities for gamers of all ages and skill levels to participate in esports tournaments, camps, team training, private events like birthday parties, and hourly play for a wide variety of video games. 

Nerd Street has received backing from Comcast Spectacor, Kevin Durant’s Thirty Five Ventures, SeventySix Capital, Elevate Ventures, Five Below, angel investor George Miller and Founders Fund among others.

Name: POPS
Description:
POPS is the leading digital entertainment company in Southeast Asia, providing millions of subscribers with access to the region's finest entertainment on all major App stores and top digital platforms. 

For over 15 years, POPS has excelled in building vibrant communities and connecting brands with viewers through meaningful digital content. 
Wherever you are, POPS affords you access to a friendly, safe, and heartwarming experience through a diverse content library ranging from music, general entertainment, kids' edutainment features, and more from top content creators in Southeast Asia and beyond.

With storytelling at its core, POPS brings new and exciting experiences to life and screens of all sizes every day. POPS delivers lasting impressions on audiences and high ROI for partner brands through live concerts and events, as well as digital content.

Through hard work and consistency in providing high-quality content, POPS has established itself at the forefront of the region’s entertainment industry and continues to grow.

Name: Roadshow Films

Roadshow Films is Australia’s leading independent film distributor; producing and distributing acclaimed film and television releases in Australia and New Zealand for over fifty years. Partners include Warner Bros., HBO, Lionsgate, FilmNation, ITV, Fremantle Media and more.

Passionate supporters of the local film and TV industry, Roadshow is at the forefront of Australian filmmaking, bringing the local industry roaring onto the global stage. Roadshow Films is a wholly owned subsidiary of Village Roadshow Pty Ltd; a leading international entertainment company with core businesses in Theme Parks, Cinema Exhibition and Film Distribution. 
www.roadshow.com.au

It is home to some of the most creative and well-respected sound artists in the entertainment industry today.  Formosa Group has five unique divisions – Features, Broadcast, Music, Interactive and Commercials – and multiple locations throughout Los Angeles, Seattle, New York, Toronto and the UK.

Name: NFL On Location Experiences
Description:
On Location Experiences is a leader in premium experiential hospitality business, establishing a new industry standard to serve iconic rights holders with extensive experience in ticketing, curated hospitality, live event production and travel management in the worlds of sports and entertainment. On Location is a partner to over 150 rights holders including the NFL, NCAA, the PGA of America and the United States Tennis Association, and provides unrivaled official access for both corporate clients and fans looking for immersive experiences at marquee events including the Super Bowl, Pro Bowl, NFL Draft, NCAA Final Four, PGA of America events, numerous College Football Bowl Games and the Tennis Majors. As a comprehensive event, brand, and marketing agency, we operate seamlessly across the worlds of culture, entertainment, and sports. Our mission is to build emotional connections between audiences and brands - driving action, inspiring engagement, and fostering long-term relationships.

We design, manage, and produce the strategies and activations that help brands form deeper, lasting bonds with their audiences.

With 50 collective years of senior management experience pioneering in audio, more than 400 million monthly impressions, and 90+ brand advertisers, PodcastOne delivers the best in content and advertiser results. Name: Molotov
Description: Molotov is a streaming platform that is revolutionizing access to television and content, available on all screens and connected devices (TechCrunch). Molotov offers an unprecedented experience combining, in a single interface, linear and non-linear programs from nearly 200 publishers and television channels. Founded by JeanDavid Blanc (tech veteran also founder of AlloCiné) and Pierre Lescure (co-founder of Canal+), Molotov is part of fuboTV, the world's leading sports-first live TV streaming platform, since December 2021. Selected in the French Tech 120 government index, among the 10 Top LinkedIn Start-ups 2020, and awarded four times "Best application of the year '' by users of the App Store (Apple), Google Play (Android) and by AppAnnie, Molotov has, after 5 years of existence, more than 19 million users, thus becoming the French leader in the distribution of streaming programs.

Name: Geena Davis Institute
Description:
Founded in 2004 by Academy Award Winning Actor Geena Davis, the Institute is the only global research-based organization working collaboratively within the entertainment industry to create gender balance, foster inclusion and reduce negative stereotyping in entertainment media. 

Our research is unique in its approach and methods. We are the only global public data institute to consistently analyze representations of the six major marginalized identities: women, people of color, LGBTQIA+, people with disabilities, older people (60+), and body type in advertising, film, television, and video gaming.
Our data-led research, drives our advocacy and empowers our content creators to systemically reimagine and measure their content in order to create inclusive content for our diverse society.

Name: Liverpool Film Office
Description:
The Liverpool Film Office has a strong track record in attracting film & TV production to Liverpool and driving the growth of a sustainable film and TV sector in the City.  Based within Culture Liverpool, it is the most established independent service in the UK operating since 1989. 

Its purpose is to promote the Liverpool City Region through the development of film, TV and digital content; acting as a liaison between the authority and the communities with production companies by educating , setting standards or professionalism, serving as a clearing house for production information and proportionally increasing economic impact of the industry locally.  It generates economic impact of approximately £11.5m per year, improves the perceptions of the city internationally and protects businesses and jobs in the creative, hospitality and retail sectors.

Name: New Zealand Film Commission
Description:
The New Zealand Film Commission (NZFC) champions our vibrant screen industry. As a Crown entity, we invest in original, culturally significant stories that reflect who we are and connect with audiences at home and around the world.

We support talented filmmakers to develop their careers, foster international partnerships, and grow global audiences for New Zealand films. Our work includes marketing New Zealand’s screen production industry internationally, attracting overseas productions, and providing expert advice as the first point of contact for incoming projects.

NZFC administers key incentives such as the New Zealand Screen Production Grant, the Post, Digital and Visual Effects Grant, and the 5% Uplift. We also negotiate co-production treaties and certify official co-productions and New Zealand films for tax purposes.

Our goal is to ensure New Zealand’s screen sector is sustainable, competitive, and celebrated worldwide.

Almost all of our wonderful event hosts would return to Optus Stadium to host their next event with us. That's a pretty good reason to investigate what we can do for your next event.

Are you ready to see what our amazing stadium can do for you? 

Visit our website for more detail.

Name: Legacy Entertainment
Description:
LEGACY ENTERTAINMENT is a globally-leading entertainment design firm based in California. 
 
LEGACY has designed and produced over 50 successful entertainment projects around the world, with a portfolio comprised of world-class Theme Parks, Aquariums, Integrated Resorts, Attractions, Live Entertainment, and much more.
 
Regarded for offering the best and boldest creative thinking in the industry, our track record of delivering commercially and artistically successful projects for our valued clients and partners is unparalleled. 
 
LEGACY is organized into six business units;
 
The THEME PARK DESIGN COMPANY: From the world’s largest Indoor Theme Park (Chimelong Spaceship) to the main competitor to Shanghai Disneyland (Shanghai Haichang Ocean Park), we are the industry’s trusted leader for the design and production of world-class Theme Parks. 
 
The WATER PARK DESIGN COMPANY: We made a splash with the debut of our ‘Next Generation Water Park’ designed in collaboration with Cirque du Soleil. Now we’re breaking new ground with Water Park destinations in the works for Vietnam, Indonesia, and China. 
 
The DARK RIDE COMPANY: From ‘The World’s First IMMERSIVE THEATER DARK RIDE’ to ‘The World’s First STUNT SHOW DARK RIDE’, we design and produce the most blazingly original and groundbreaking Dark Rides in the industry. 
 
The AQUARIUM DESIGN COMPANY: Our team of designers and animal husbandry specialists are uniquely qualified in the design and production of first-class Aquariums, including The Sea Shell at VinWonders Phu Quoc and the Chimelong Spaceship in Zhuhai, China. 
 
The RESORT DESIGN COMPANY: From multi-billion dollar Integrated Resorts to Theme Park Hotels one thing is certain- we are the creators of UNPARALLELED DESTINATIONS. 
 
The MALL DESIGN COMPANY: With a portfolio including ‘The World’s First OVERWATER MALL’ (Batavia) and ‘Asia’s First FOOD THEME PARK’ (DestinAsia) among many others, our team is at the forefront of a RETAIL REVOLUTION.

Name: Punchdrunk
Description:
Since 2000 Punchdrunk has pioneered a game-changing form of theatre in which roaming audiences experience epic storytelling inside unique sensory worlds. 

Blending classic texts, physical performance, award-winning design installation and unexpected sites, the company’s infectious format rejects the passive obedience usually expected of audiences. 

Punchdrunk has developed a worldwide reputation for transformative productions that focus as much on the audience and the performance space as on the performers and narrative. Inspired designers occupy deserted buildings and apply a cinematic level of detail to immerse the audience in the world of the show.

Punchdrunk productions are unique theatrical experiences, where the lines between space, performer and spectator are constantly shifting. Audiences are invited to rediscover the childlike excitement and anticipation of exploring the unknown and experience a real sense of adventure. Free to encounter the installed environment in an individual imaginative journey, the choice of what to watch and where to go is yours alone.

Led by Felix Barrett, the Chief Executive and the Punchdrunk creative team, the company produces a selection of its groundbreaking commercial projects internationally, forging partnerships with selected organisations. Sleep No More in New York has been playing to sell out audiences since 2011, and in Shanghai the show has been running since 2016 having become the longest running show in the city's history.

In 2020 Punchdrunk and writer Dennis Kelly created The Third Day, a TV series co-produced with HBO and Sky Studios in partnership with Plan B Entertainment. Designed to be the world’s first immersive TV series, the first transmission included an episode called The Third Day: Autumn recorded as-live in one continuous, 12-hour take. This innovative theatrical event received an RTS Award for Best Live Event, and was also nominated for a BAFTA in the Live Event category.

Description:
Buchwald emerged as an industry leader in 1977 when Don Buchwald founded the company with five associates. We have since grown into a bi-coastal force in the entertainment industry. In New York City, Buchwald is housed on six floors of our own office building in midtown, between Madison and Fifth Avenues. https://twitter.com/heartmachineHQ

Name: Nadiadwala Grandson Entertainment
Description:
Nadiadwala Grandson Entertainment Pvt. Ltd, is a Mumbai based Bollywood movie production house helmed by India’s leading Producer - Director Sajid Nadiadwala. The Company is a 3rd generation film production company which traces its foundation to a family celebrating over 60 years in the film industry.

The Nadiadwala’s, boasting of stalwarts like Abdul Karim Nadiadwala, Abdul Gaffar Nadiadwala, Farruk Nadiadwala, Habib Nadiadwala and Suleman Nadiadwala, have between them produced over 200 films from as early as 1955. 

The Nadiadwala family have been in film production since 1955, continuing this legacy Sajid Nadiadwala established the company in 2005.

The Nadiadwala’s have been in the film industry for three generations, starting with A.K. Nadiadwala followed by Sulieman Nadiadwala. Presently, they are celebrating 60 years of their existence. The first film to be produced under this banner was Inspector(1956) by Abdul Karim Nadiadwala himself. He further went on to produce movies like Taj Mahal (1963) and Chitralekha (1964).

Sajid Nadiadwala is responsible for continuing the Nadiadwala Grandson legacy and taking forward the banner by producing many new films. There have been many blockbusters produced under this banner. Recently the banner won many accolades for producing Kick featuring Salman Khan and Jacqueline Fernandez that turned out to be one of the highest grosser of Box Office for the year. Apart from Kick, the production house gained a lot of success with 2 States starring Alia Bhatt and Arjun Kapoor that entered the 100 Crore club. Highway, starring Alia and Randeep Hooda, directed by Imtiaz Ali.



Join Us:

Twitter: @NGEMovies
Instagram: @nadiadwalagrandson
YouTube: /NadiadwalaGrandson

Name: Italian Innovators
Description:
Italian Innovators is an academic platform, a piazza of intercultural conversation, and a YouTube channel. The project (in English and in Italian) aims to explore the impact of Italy's cultural heritage upon the development of a successful model of entrepreneurship and to present Italy’s contribution to contemporary arts, fashion, technology, business, and design.

The stories of Italian innovators (from the past to the present) aspire to bring light to a peculiar Italian way to originality, as well as to the impact of culture in the creation of new, meaningful business ideas.

Contents are organized in different categories and playlists:
#innovators (profiles in English)
#initaliano (profili in italiano)
#italianages (lessons on Italian cultural & industrial history)
#interviews (conversations with contemporary professionals)

The host & creator
Luca Cottini is a literary scholar & cultural historian. Educated in Italy (Università di Milano) and in the U.S. (Notre Dame, Harvard), he is associate professor of Italian Studies, author, business mentor, and storyteller.
