Name: Opus 3 Artists
Description:
Mission Statement:
Identify, develop, and advance talent across the performing arts, connecting artists and communities worldwide.

Opus 3 Artists is a leading company managing the careers and touring activities of many of the world’s greatest performing artists and ensembles. The company traces its roots to the pioneering role of the legendary Sol Hurok, the great 20th century impresario, whose dominant position in North America spanned half a century between the 1920s and 1970s. Its successor, ICM Artists, was formed in 1976 as a subdivision of International Creative Management and the company became independent again on November 1, 2006 as Opus 3 Artists LLC.

Opus 3 Artists’ talented and respected team includes a dedicated staff of artist managers, booking representatives, marketing and tour production specialists, all sharing a common passion for artistic excellence.

The focus of Opus 3 Artists’ roster includes instrumentalists, vocalists, conductors, composers, chamber music ensembles and touring chamber and symphony orchestras, as well as dance and theater companies, jazz, world and new music ensembles and artists.

True to the Hurok legacy, Opus 3 Artists continues to be a leader in discovering, nurturing and developing young artists by helping to establish the network and foundation for their art and performing careers. The company is proud of the many impressive examples of this long-term commitment to young artists who have become major figures in the international cultural scene.

Name: BMI Gaming
Description:
BMIGaming.com is a global arcade machine and amusement products supplier, specializing in turnkey arcade development, new FEC / Arcade consulting, design, floor planning, game selection, sales and installation.

BMIGaming.com is notable for offering the most comprehensive and most visited commercial amusement device and arcade game website, featuring over 1400 arcade products from video arcade games, pinball machines, sports games and redemption arcade games to motion theaters and simulator rides, virtual reality (VR) games / rides and more, from 75 + global amusement manufacturers. 

BMIGaming.com serves commercial and retail clients, ranging from Fortune 1000 firms to small businesses, and Location-Based Entertainment facilities (LBE's) such as Family Entertainment Centers (FEC's) amusement parks, arcades, movie theaters, bars, restaurants, shopping centers, malls, hotels, resorts, cruise ships, casinos, factories, developers and retail outlets, to non-profit organizations such as schools, colleges, churches, youth centers and local, state + federal government entities, to consumers ranging from homeowners, corporate executives, and many famous media, movie and sports celebrities, from over 120 countries worldwide.

BMIGaming.com proudly celebrated its 15th anniversary serving the amusement industry in 2017, and has been recognized for its success in the past by inclusion on the PriceWaterhouseCoopers (PwC) " Hot 100 " List of the fastest growing private companies, Inc. Magazine's prestigious " INC. 500 " List and Internet Retailer Magazine's " IRM Top 500 " List of the Largest e-Commerce Firms, among other business awards, and has been featured in many global publications, television and radio shows, including The New York Times, Forbes, Fortune, Newsweek, USA Today, El Pais, El Mundo, Wired, MSNBC, CNN, PBS and the BBC among others.

Name: Argus Event Staffing, LLC
Description:
Argus Event Staffing, LLC was founded in 2003 in Denver, Colorado. Throughout the years, Argus has grown to be a key player in the Colorado and Georgia event security industry, providing exceptional staffing services at some of the most prominent venues in each state. 

From ensuring customer-service-oriented point-of-entry procedures to strategically-executed event management, the list of services Argus provides is extensive as well as impressive. Argus staff is prepared to handle crowds of any size, ranging from small gatherings to large-scale productions - sometimes yielding over 75,000 fans. Our goal each and every day is to deliver a truly outstanding experience for the patrons that walk through all of these venue’s doors.

The bolstering growth and success of Argus can be attributed to the devoted management staff as well as the front-line team members that represent the backbone of every event. Each team member must have an exemplary attitude to work with Argus and exhibit an inherent enthusiasm to treat patrons as if they are guests in our own homes. Team members are responsible for making our customers feel safe, comfortable, and thrilled to be in attendance at their favorite events. Argus team members are tasked with creating the best first impression when fans arrive and to leave a positive lasting impression whenever the crowd leaves. 

Through comprehensive training and hands-on experience, team members build a strong repertoire of skills that develop them into high-quality security representatives. It’s easy to see our core values of Integrity, Teamwork, Accountability, Respect, and Fun shine through when attending any event that Argus is proud to be a part of. We invite you to learn more and see all the wonderful things Argus is capable of!

We also offer event staffing opportunities for non-profit groups and individuals too! Visit our website for additional information on how you can get involved.

Name: TMJ
Description:
Established in 2015, TMJ is a Global Athlete Management Agency exclusively dedicated to women soccer athletes looking to continuously push the boundaries of athlete management and representation to get to the root of effective culturalization. 

As a fully-remote agency, our staff members exist within different regions of the world including Spain, Mexico, Texas, California, Chicago and Arizona, providing a wide array of expertise and viewpoints that help drive our vision and our quest to level the playing field for women athletes. 

Throughout the years we have had the pleasure to work across multiple countries and with a diverse pool of partners, creating a powerful portfolio that benefits our players and staff members. 

Our team is also committed to providing a 360º management experience to every athlete that is part of our roster. We are constantly looking for opportunities and partnerships to provide our players with the best available resources to have a successful professional career on and off the field.  

We are proud to help revolutionize women's soccer.

Name: Breakpoint Booking
Description:
Breakpoint Booking (est 2018) is one of very few black-owned talent agencies offering comprehensive services across music, comedy, speaking, co-branding, and soon, sports. We provide full-spectrum support, from touring and booking to celebrity partnerships, talent acquisition for festivals, and expert consulting.

Our unique value lies in our "earlier-stage" talent development approach. We champion developing, breaking, and rising talent long before other agencies, all while providing a highly personalized, hands-on service with unmatched transparency. Our legacy includes being the pioneering agency for artists such as Tank & the Bangas, Benny The Butcher, Harry Mack, Lost Dog Street Band, and Nasser Al Reyess. We are where the next generation of stars is launched onto the global stage.

We operate as a client-first extension of your team, working collaboratively and transparently to elevate live careers and provide crucial industry education. We guide our clients in understanding and leveraging their box office history. Furthermore, our focus is not just on breaking new acts, we also work with established acts to help them get back to that breaking point. If a client is looking to reinvent, reestablish, perfect a signature talk, or grow on the ground from local to global, we have been deemed the right place.

In need of talent for your next event? Don't hesitate to get in touch!

We proudly serve a diverse range of venues worldwide, including clubs of all capacities, amphitheaters, comedy clubs, weddings, corporate and private events, cruise ships, performing arts centers (PACs), fairs, festivals, and casinos. We also specialize in partnering with venue owners and festivals for expert talent buying and strategic budgeting.

Contact us today to discover how we can help you maximize your event's potential!

In a world where DEI is under attack, we will continue to stand as a beacon of diversity in the entertainment industry.

Name: TicketKings
Description:
TicketKings is reshaping the live event landscape by treating tickets as a dynamic market understood through sophisticated data science and real-time analytics. We leverage proprietary technology to unlock value and efficiency in the secondary ticket market. 

Since 2019, our performance-driven team has combined financial strategy with operational speed. We utilize predictive pricing algorithms, demand forecasting models, and real-time data feeds to identify opportunities and provide fans seamless access to live events.

Our core mission is to connect people with the experiences they love. By bringing data-driven insights and technological innovation to the ticketing world, we make live events more accessible for fans while providing valuable tools and liquidity for businesses and partners.

We're also invested in the future of the industry through initiatives like our Student Broker Program, offering real-world experience in market analysis and pricing strategy  – turning passion for live events into practical business education.

Join TicketKings as we build a smarter, more transparent, and more exciting future for live entertainment.

Name: Words + Pictures
Description:
Words + Pictures, founded by Connor Schell and Chernin Entertainment in 2021, is a production studio with a mission to produce high-end, culturally relevant nonfiction content. The Words + Pictures team is led by the creators and producers of the groundbreaking “30 for 30” series, The Last Dance, and the 2017 Academy Award-winning O.J.: Made in America.

The films and series collectively produced by our team have premiered at the top film festivals in the world, from Sundance to Toronto to Cannes, and have earned the most prestigious honors in media and entertainment – Academy Awards, Peabodys, Emmys, BAFTAs, and more. Along the way, we’ve served as creative production partners and offered strategic guidance to some of the best nonfiction storytellers in the industry.

In a golden age of content, the possibilities that words and pictures on screen embody have never been more exciting, and never more impactful. We believe in those possibilities, and are passionate about bringing them to life across a wide swath of genres and formats.

Name: Kendal Mountain Events
Description:
Kendal Mountain Events is the organisation behind the internationally acclaimed 'Kendal Mountain FESTIVAL', UK & overseas TOURS and the new online digital PLAYER.

The Festival is one of the leading and is the most diverse event of its kind in the world. It attracts film premières from around the globe, including filmmakers, TV producers, adventurers, athletes, writers and who's who of the brands in the outdoor industry; all who gather to take part in four packed days of the very best films, talks, books and exhibitions covering all aspects of mountain and adventure sports culture. It is also the main social event for outdoor enthusiasts in the UK.

At the heart of Kendal’s programme is the mountain film competition, attracting film premières from around the world. Over 70 films are screened (from 300+ entries) with twelve coveted prizes up for grabs. 

Extra expenditure into the local economy generated by the Kendal Mountain Festival has been independently calculated to be in excess of £5m. KENDAL MOUNTAIN EVENTS is the holding company and has seen significant outreach and global growth since 2015 (China, India and North America).

The Festival has even been cited by the Sunday Times as one of the reasons young people are attracted to Kendal as a place to live!

Our vision is to inspire more people to explore, enjoy and represent mountains, wilderness and their cultures.

Name: Signal Festival
Description:
The biggest cultural event in the Czech Republic, making modern art and new technologies accessible to both the general public and specialists. Over the four evenings of the festival, prominent figures in lighting design from the Czech Republic and abroad will change the streets and public spaces of Prague, both its most famous historical landmarks and less well-known nooks and crannies, into objects d’art and spaces that use unconventional forms to capture the varied sides of contemporary and historical Prague. In the five years of its existence the festival has attracted over 2.5 millions visitors from both the Czech Republic and abroad, whose participation in interactive installations has shaped every edition.

Web: www.signalfestival.com
Facebook: www.facebook.com/SignalFestival/
Instagram: www.instagram.com/signalfestival/

Name: Samarcanda Intrattenimenti
Description:
Primo brand in Italia per servizi di intrattenimento turistico, Samarcanda sviluppa da oltre 30 anni prodotti, spettacoli e servizi di intrattenimento per le più prestigiose strutture turistiche italiane.
Innovazione e capacità di immaginare il futuro dell’intrattenimento sono i driver principali del successo di Samarcanda.

Ogni estate Samarcanda forma e organizza in equipe oltre 1000 ragazzi: i propri Joyner.
Joyner è il nome con cui Samarcanda, dopo un percorso di crescita e successo, ha ridefinito gli “animatori”. I Joyner sono professionisti formati per includere (“to join”) all’insegna della gioia (“joy”): i migliori talenti dell’intrattenimento turistico.

Innovazione, visione ma anche profilo etico: Samarcanda è l’azienda promotrice, grazie e assieme a Conflavoro PMI, del primo storico Contratto Collettivo Nazionale del lavoro, in vigore dal primo maggio 2019: una cornice di diritti e tutele che migliora il settore per tutti, lavoratori e strutture turistiche.

Il joynerism è un modo di interpretare questo lavoro, una filosofia alla base dell’industria della gioia ma anche un set etico di principi su cui basare questa professione e il rapporto con ospiti e clienti.

Nel tempo Samarcanda ha affiancato al suo primo core business altre tre linee di sviluppo.

Organizzazione e pianificazione eventi: l’expertise Samarcanda nell’intrattenimento turistico si declina nella capacità di concepire, produrre e realizzare format originali per grandi eventi. 

Servizi di formazione: Samarcanda gestisce annualmente 20.000 candidature e forma oltre 600 risorse con i propri coach e nelle proprie strutture, erogando moduli formativi per le proprie esigenze e per soggetti terzi che lo richiedano.

Servizi e strategie di comunicazione: Samarcanda attrae i migliori talenti con tecniche di marketing e comunicazione innovative e non convenzionali. Parte di queste tecniche sono offerte “as a service” per le realtà del settore turistico con specifiche esigenze di comunicazione.

Founded in 1994 and headquartered in Sunbury, Pennsylvania, USA, GCI has established a strong reputation for designing, building, and providing maintenance services for world-class wooden coasters worldwide. GCI's mission is focused on creating thrilling and immersive coaster experiences while emphasizing the preservation and enhancement of natural surroundings. Our company thrives on delivering intense, smooth, and dynamic rides that push the boundaries of wooden coaster technology. GCI's roller coasters feature stunning elements such as banked turns, airtime hills, inversions, and steep drops. Our wooden coasters often incorporate unique features like terrain integration, allowing the rides to perfectly blend in with their natural environment. This commitment to preserving the surrounding landscape is central to GCI's design philosophy. The company's commitment to quality is evident in the attention to detail and craftsmanship found in every coaster we produce. GCI meticulously constructs each ride, utilizing premium-grade lumber and steel connections to ensure the highest level of safety and durability. GCI has an extensive portfolio of successful projects worldwide, partnering with amusement parks and entertainment destinations to deliver unforgettable coaster experiences. Some of our notable creations include Mystic Timbers at Kings Island, Thunderhead at Dollywood, and Gold Striker at California's Great America. In addition to designing and building roller coasters, GCI also offers maintenance and refurbishment services. GCI works closely with park operators to ensure the longevity and smooth operation of their coasters, providing ongoing support and expertise. Great Coasters International Inc. continues to push the boundaries of wooden coaster engineering, delivering thrilling experiences.

Description:

Junk Kouture challenges students to design and create haute couture from everyday junk, promoting environmental consciousness and innovation. Beyond a competition, Junk Kouture supports its alumni through the Future Leaders Network, championing inclusivity, diversity, and equality while nurturing creative talent. The global community is connected through schools, events, social media, and content, uniting young innovators in a shared mission of sustainability.

Recognised as an SDG Champion by Ireland's Department of the Environment, Climate and Communications, Junk Kouture contributes to 6 of the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals. Description:

Od tego czasu wyznacza najwyższe standardy w budowie i prowadzeniu kin w Europie i na świecie. Obecnie pod szyldem Multikino działa 41 kin w 37 miastach Polski. 

Flagowe kino sieci zlokalizowane jest w centrum handlowym Złote Tarasy w Warszawie. Obiekt składa się z 8 sal, w tym Sali Premierowej na 788 osób. W marcu 2022r.  uruchomione zostało wyjątkowe kino w Galerii Gemini Park w Tychach. Obiekt składa się z 7 sal wyposażonych w projektory laserowe oraz skórzane, elektrycznie rozkładane fotele, dzięki którym widz ogląda filmy w pozycji półleżącej. W rozkładane fotele tego typu w pełni wyposażone są także warszawskie Multikino w Galerii Młociny, Multikino Koszalin, Multikino Radom oraz poznańskie Multikino Stary Browar. 

Multikino to zdecydowanie więcej niż kino. Oferuje zarówno największe i najbardziej oczekiwane premiery filmowe, jak i koncerty światowych gwiazd, nocne maratony filmowe, transmisje najważniejszych wydarzeń sportowych, transmisje oper, baletu oraz retransmisje spektakli z brytyjskiego National Theatre. 

Multikino za swoją działalność wielokrotnie było dostrzegane podczas prestiżowych konkursów. Jest zdobywcą nagród Superbrands oraz Superbrands Created in Poland. Od wielu lat zajmuje pozycję lidera w obszarze „Event Cinema” zarówno na rynku polskim, jak i europejskim (laureat europejskiej nagrody ECA Awards w 2014 roku).

Name: Cinema Technology Community (CTC)
Description:
Cinema Technology Community CIC (CTC), is an independent, not-for-profit membership organisation that aims to advance the use of technology to enhance all aspects of the movie-going experience.

With over 1,000 members in more than 85 countries, our members represent all facets of the film industry; from film distributors to cinema exhibitors, integrators, manufacturers, journalists and thought leaders. Our membership community is united by a shared passion for technology and the cinematic experience.

CTC provides various global initiatives aimed at educating and up-skilling our members in current and emerging cinema technologies. Such initiatives include hosting training courses and supporting professional certification, providing technical and educational resources such as handbooks, webinars and seminars, video content, podcasts and networking events. 

CTC is also the owner and publisher of Cinema Technology Magazine to motion picture industry's leading publication focussed on cinema technology and business-related topics.

Membership is open to individuals and organisations and starts from £10 a year.  As a not-for-profit, community organisation, all money raised from membership and sponsorship is directed into events and materials aimed at improving the industry.

Name: Bord Gáis Energy Theatre
Description:
Bord Gáis Energy Theatre endeavours to present a diverse programme of world-class entertainment and an unparalleled theatrical experience in an architecturally majestic setting. The theatre offers the best of Broadway and the West End alongside new, niche and local productions to as wide an audience as possible.

The curtain rose for its inaugural performance on March 18, 2010, with The Russian State Ballet featuring stars from the Bolshoi performing Swan Lake. Since then Bord Gáis Energy Theatre has welcomed almost five million audience members from across Ireland and the world. Over 500 productions have graced the stage, raising the curtain on an estimated 3,436 performances.

Bord Gáis Energy Theatre is owned by Crownway Investments - a private family investment company owned by John and Bernie Gallagher. The theatre commenced building in January 2007 and opened in March 2010. Located in the heart of Grand Canal Dock, Bord Gáis Energy Theatre is an iconic landmark designed by the world-renowned architect Daniel Libeskind.

Libeskind describes his vision:

“The theatre overlooks a public plaza.  Like a grand outdoor lobby, the plaza invites the public to view the soaring glass façade of the theatre much like a glass curtain, which tilts back in space in diagonal pleats. The public can gaze into its Piranesian interior of horizontal ramps and diagonal pilotes.

The design concept for the theatre is, in fact, stages—the theatre’s ‘real’ stage and the plaza as another, equally real but more provisional and changing stage.  At night, when the second floor lobby of the theatre is crowded with theatre-goers and the theatres tilting façade and plaza are illuminated, the latter ‘stage’ offers a particularly dramatic experience.”

The theatre is a striking cultural presence in Ireland. The drama of the architecture mirrors the spectacular performance art that takes place within.

Name: Orchestra Sinfonica di Milano
Description:

La sede dei primi concerti fu in origine la Sala Verdi del Conservatorio di Milano per poi passare al Teatro Lirico. Il 6 ottobre 1999 è stata inaugurata, con la Sinfonia n. 2 Resurrezione di Mahler diretta da Riccardo Chailly, la nuova sede stabile dell’Orchestra, l’Auditorium di Milano Fondazione Cariplo, che per le sue caratteristiche estetiche, tecnologiche e acustiche è considerata una della migliori sale da concerto italiane nonché un luogo storico della cultura milanese.

Parallelamente all’attività concertistica nazionale e internazionale, l’Orchestra Sinfonia di Milano è molto attiva nel campo sociale ed educativo.

Il Direttore Musicale a partire dalla Stagione 2024/2025 è Emmanuel Tjeknavorian.

Name: Stellwagen Ventures
Description:
Stellwagen Ventures is a strategic, global venture firm working across music, sports, media and entertainment. Our ethos is to promote a win/win model that supports shared success in everything we do. We are about winning -- winning together. The artist, the athlete, the buyer, the seller, the brand, the franchise, and the broker.

Now for some context on our name. Stellwagen Bank is a protected National Marine Sanctuary wedged between Cape Ann on Boston’s north shore, and the tip of New England’s Cape Cod. Renowned for its rich marine life, it's a place where people go to whale watch and where anglers go to catch large tuna and striped sea bass. The beauty is, most of the year it's protected fishing grounds, that is, catch and release. That's where our winning formula kicks in. The fish win. The fishermen win. Everybody wins.

Everybody's happy. That's our model at Stellwagen Ventures.

We also loved this definition of Stellwagen: You are spiritually intense and can sting or charm. Your name brings passion and new starts into life and attracts success. In business, you are creators and promoters of original ideas and typically enjoy considerable business success. You have an eventful, exciting life.

You are versatile and have the ability to adapt easily.

Name: PASSO
Description:
PASSO, 2014 yılından itibaren  Süper Lig ve 1. Lig’de yer alan 36 takımın bilet/kombine, 2019 yılından itibaren ise etkinlik dünyasına giriş yaparak  konser, tiyatro, basketbol, atölye vs. etkinliklerinin bilet satışlarını gerçekleştiren ve Türkiye’nin en çok bilet hasılatı yaratan biletleme platformudur. 

Süper Lig ve 1. Lig’de yer alan tüm takımların lig karşılaşmaları ile beraber UEFA Şampiyonlar Ligi, UEFA Avrupa Ligi, Ziraat Türkiye Kupası ve hazırlık karşılaşmalarının biletleri de, takımların tek resmi Bilet Satış Acentası olan PASSO üzerinden satılmaktadır.

Futbol takımlarının dışında Zorlu PSM, İstanbul Kültür Sanat Vakfı, Bayhan Prodüksiyon, 01 Burda PGM gibi sektörde yüksek hacimli bilet satışı yapan mekan/organizatörlerin ve Beşiktaş, Fenerbahçe Beko, Galatasaray basketbol takımlarının da tek resmi Biletleme firması PASSO’dur.
 
PASSO bilet satışlarını, Türkiye’nin en çok ziyaret edilen e-ticaret web sitelerinden biri olan www.passo.com.tr, 4 milyon üzerinde kullanıcısı olan PASSO Mobil Uygulaması (iOS & Android) ve ülkemizin tüm bölgelerinde yer alan PASSO Bilet Satış Gişeleri üzerinden yapmaktadır.
 
Sanat ve sporseverleri biletleme dünyasında, Bilet Transferi, Koltuğunu Kulübüne Devret, Cep Telefonu ile Maçlara/Etkinliklere Giriş, Koltuk Seçimi, Kampanya Modülleri gibi yeni teknolojiler ile buluşturan PASSO, kullanıcılar, spor kulüpleri, organizatörler ve mekan sahiplerinin ihtiyaçlarını gözeterek ve biletleme dünyasındaki gelişmeleri takip ederek biletleme yazılımını her geçen gün geliştirmeye devam etmektedir.

%100 yerli olan biletleme yazılımını hayata geçiren PASSO, bilet satışlarının yanında tamamen kendisine ait olan biletleme yazılımı altyapısını yurtiçi ve yurtdışında yer alan  organizatörlere, mekanlara ve biletleme şirketlerine de pazarlamaktadır.

Talk with a diver swimming the depths with eels and sharks. Look an albino alligator in the eye. Wonder at baby sea turtles. Go under the sea at free daily dive programs and animal encounters. Explore more with behind-the-scenes tours, outdoor adventures and kid friendly camps. 

The N. C. Aquarium at Fort Fisher is dedicated to animals in our care and those in the wild. We recognize the challenges threatening species locally and globally. Our team commits resources and time to learning more and taking action through research, fieldwork, education, and the daily efforts of our team members. 

The North Carolina Aquarium at Fort Fisher connects nearly 500,000 visitors a year with nature and animals.

Open Daily 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. year round
The Aquarium is closed Thanksgiving Day and Christmas Day. 
The Aquarium is wheelchair accessible.

Description:
MilSpouseFest, founded as MilitaryOneClick, in 2012 was developed when there was a great need for online resources, all in one spot. It has evolved into a content site with a thriving live event series and online community at a time when military spouses need resources at their fingertips and face to face connections in a digital world.

MilSpouseFest is proud to offer online resources, modern military spouse content, and a witty take on life through a newsletter delivered to you in the comfort of your own home, no matter where the military has sent you. 

MilSpouseFest, along with their presenting sponsor USAA, is in its 7th year of offering in-person interactive events across the country and now virtually.

MilSpouseFest is shaped, on a daily basis, by an all military spouse team. 

Just like the community they serve, the MilSpouseFest Team is made up of military spouses getting through another PCS, another deployment, setting up another house, and building new friendships along the way. Through free face to face events and digital content, they are creating connections and building a global community that feels like a neighborhood.

MilSpouseFest is dedicated to empowering military spouses and families by providing them with information, resources, and the community support they need in their daily lives.

Description:
GRUPO ANTROMEX es la principal entidad de entretenimiento en Latinoamérica, con una sólida presencia que abarca más de 80 establecimientos, que incluyen restaurantes y clubes nocturnos en todo México. Cada uno de nuestros establecimientos posee una identidad y concepto distintivos, y a la vez comparten una pasión inquebrantable por ofrecer un servicio excepcional y una calidad insuperable para brindar a nuestros clientes la experiencia de sus vidas.

Nuestra historia se remonta a 2007, cuando comenzamos como una modesta discoteca en Tepic. Desde entonces, hemos evolucionado para convertirnos en el principal generador de eventos y fiestas en México y América Latina.

Con una presencia destacada en las principales ciudades de México, cada uno de nuestros locales ofrece una experiencia de primera categoría. Esto es posible gracias a nuestra constante actualización en tendencias, diseño arquitectónico vanguardista, equipos de última generación, eventos inigualables y lo más destacado en entretenimiento y diversión.

Desde vibrantes fiestas temáticas y animadas pool parties hasta festivales de música con los artistas más destacados, tanto nacionales como internacionales, y eventos especiales como despedidas de solteros, bodas y espectaculares beach parties, GRUPO ANTROMEX es la garantía de celebraciones épicas.

Colaboramos con aliados comerciales, como agencias de viajes y grupos corporativos, con el objetivo de crear experiencias inolvidables y generar propuestas únicas que aseguran que cada noche sea verdaderamente inolvidable. Nuestra dedicación a la excelencia y la innovación nos posiciona como líderes indiscutibles en la industria del entretenimiento en toda América Latina.

The number of performers represented by the 41 member organisations of AEPO-ARTIS can be estimated at around 650-700 000. 

As the paramount voice of performers’ collective management organisations in Europe, AEPO-ARTIS strives to advance the collective management of rights and to protect, strengthen and develop performers’ neighbouring rights. Thereby, AEPO-ARTIS aspires to ensure all performers benefit from the exploitation of all their performances and thus contribute to creativity and cultural diversity.

FLY Entertainment - www.fly.com.sg 
FLY Entertainment is Singapore’s leading artiste management company founded by the effervescent, award-winning host and comedienne, Irene Ang, in 1999. Started with 2 staff, a fax machine and a burning passion and belief in the potential of local talents, it has grown by leaps and bounds to what it is today. Recognized as a market leader for its creative and gung-ho approach within the entertainment industry, and for its proven track record in grooming successful artistes, FLY has garnered wide-ranging support from the local media, broadcasters, production companies and corporate clients.
FLY has always been quick to adapt to the ever-changing media landscape and, combined with an international outlook, was the first of its kind to plant a flag beyond local soil and set up an office in Thailand. FLY is poised to continue its expansion into overseas markets and serve a niche – to represent talented English-speaking Asian artistes who are also effectively bilingual in their native languages.

Name: Bell Media, Inc.
Description:
Producers of online digital media, motion pictures, television and documentaries.

Eric Allen Bell, founder and CEO has produced, written and directed motion pictures.  He is also the founder of Global One TV, the world's first 24 hour online spiritual television network broadcasting globally and free of charge.

Bell's directorial debut, a comedy entitled "Missing Sock" made Film Threat's "Top 10 Short Films" list. From there he went on to produce, write and direct the full length feature film, "The Bondage" which premiered at the South By South West Film Festival and went on to multiple bidding for distribution.  It was picked up for theatrical distribution by the same people who distributed "Super Size Me".

Prior to that Bell has served as a consultant to major studios, a script doctor, screenwriter and investment consultant on entertainment-based media.

Name: Lumière Benelux
Description:
De Lumière Groep is een volledig ecosysteem waarin productie, filmfinanciering, distributie, 4 stadsbioscopen en een animatiestudio nauw samenwerken om de beste verhalen naar een breed publiek in de Benelux te brengen. Een sterke focus op arthouse films en kwalitatief TV drama én een geweldige neus voor Scandinavische succesverhalen zijn onze pijlers.  

Je kent ons van titels als Close & Girl (Lucas Dhont), Un Monde (Laura Wandel), The Square (Östlund), Loveless (Zvyagintsev), Boyhood (Linklater), Shaun The Sheep (Aardman), The Iron Lady (Lloyd), Millennium (Stieg Larsson-trilogie) en series zoals The Bridge, The Killing, Borgen, Trapped, The Team, Gomorra, De Dag, Top Of The Lake, My Brilliant Friend, La Meglio Gioventù, The Investigation, en nog zoveel meer…

De productietak van Lumière, Lunanime draait op volle toeren. Je kent Lunanime als producent van films zoals J'aime la vie (Mathias Sercu), Cleo (Eva Cools) en Le Ciel Flamand (Peter Monsaert) en als coproducent van Europese series (o.a.The Team, State Of Happiness en STHLM Requiem) en films (o.a. De Rouille et D’Os, Funan, en de Oscargenomineerde film Van De Kat Geen Kwaad). Ook heeft Lunanime verscheidene eigen projecten ontwikkeld, zoals de serie Grond voor Play4, en animatiereeks Ollie voor Ketnet.

Tot slot beheert Lumière ook 4 stadsbioscopen: Cinema Lumière Brugge, Cinema Cartoon’s Antwerpen, Cinema Lumière Antwerpen en Cinema Lumière Mechelen. Al onze bioscopen bieden een gevarieerde filmkeuze voor jong en oud, in het hartje van de stad.

Name: Ghostbot, Inc.
Description: Welcome to Ghostbot. Ghostbot specializes in traditional animation, Flash, storyboards, and design for feature film, television, commercials, internet, games, and toys. We strive to provide high quality industry services as well as compelling original content.

Name: Noisefloor
Description: We are a facility entrenched in the Film, Television, Advertising, Gaming and Viral entertainment world. We are here to help with technical and creative audio aspects of this ever changing industry. We have a staff of location mixers, Boom Operators, Sound Designers, Foley Artists, Mixers and Composers.

Name: Iowa Events Center
Description: The Iowa Events Center is the state’s premier convention center and arena, located in downtown Des Moines. The Iowa Events Center is an OVG360 Facility and owned by Polk County. We are a full-service venue management and hospitality company that helps client partners reimagine the sports, live entertainment, and convention industries for the betterment of the venue, employees, artists, athletes, and surrounding communities. Food Service is provided by OVG Hospitality.

Name: Please & Thank You
Description: We are a collective of individuals specializing in touring, experiential events, sponsorship, website development, subscription-based commerce, and logistics.

Name: k sera sera
Description: For the first time in India, K Sera Sera Productions Ltd is presenting a brand new concept, a complete new version of multiplex called " Miniplex”. The first Miniplex theatre was launched on 27th Jan 2010 by Bollywood Superstar Shahrukh Khan at Gallops Mall, Ahmedabad

Name: Cinépolis Gulf
Description: Cinépolis Cinemas is the third largest movie exhibitor bringing you the latest movies from Hollywood, Bollywood and beyond. The brand mixes affordable luxury, your favorite movie snacks and a cinematic unlike anything you have ever experienced!

Name: STRUUM
Description: Struum is a groundbreaking platform that lets viewers access 1000s of shows and movies from over 60+ services with 1 monthly subscription. Struum simplifies streaming by providing viewers access to many of their favorite brands where they can search, seamlessly discover and redeem new content across services using credits. Struum offers a wide variety of programming including renowned documentaries, indie films, lifestyle series, classic films, true crime, LGBTQ+ and multicultural programming, as well as other beloved TV shows and movies.

Name: Team Dhunn
Description:
Team Dhunn is the best in India for delivering high-energy musical experiences that spread joy and happiness.! It has engaged audiences in India, Bangkok, the United States of America, the Philippines, Singapore, Malaysia, and Italy both offline and online. They have delivered sessions for more than 1 lakh people at weddings, corporate events, and other occasions.

Team Dhunn is all about creating exceptional musical experiences for its clients. Whether it's a Drum Circle, Boomwhackers, Bucket Jam, or Human Percussion,  no matter the circumstance, Dhunn always provides the best.

From conducting small sessions in offices to going huge, literally conducting sessions for as many as 1000 people. Dhunn is a team made up of not just three people but everyone connected to it. Even if you have just been with us in one of our musical teamwork activities, we get you on our team!! Our goal is to awaken everyone to the power of music and the musician within every one of them.

Name: RocketJump
Description: RocketJump is a digital entertainment company that specializes in development, production, and distribution of original web video content, TV shows and feature films. Since the company’s humble beginnings in 2010 as the FreddieW YouTube channel, RocketJump has since rebranded itself as a pioneer in the digital direct to consumer new media landscape. Co-founded by Freddie Wong, Matthew Arnold, and Desmond Dolly, RocketJump has amassed a catalogue of hundreds of original action, comedy, and family oriented videos that have gained over 1 billion views across their 7.5 million subscribers on YouTube alone. In addition to Hollywood-quality VFX laden shorts and web series, RocketJump is expanding their business into new forms of media including comics, games, podcasts, and more feature length offerings.

Name: E-Kart
Description:
E-Kart is de eerste elektrische high-end indoorkarting in regio Gent en het eerste circuit in België dat zich op de tweede verdieping van een winkelcentrum bevindt.

Een uitdagend parcours en de laatste nieuwe generatie e-karts zorgen, voor zowel amateurs als ervaren piloten, voor de ultieme rijervaring! 28 elektrische karts, waarvan 6 speciaal voor kinderen, staan klaar om jong en oud, mannen en vrouwen te laten genieten van acceleratie, snelheid en vooral veel raceplezier!

Name: Atlas Cines Argentina
Description:
Viví el Cine en Atlas.

Buenos Aires
Argentina
Location: Palermo, Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Marathi Film Industry - मराठी चित्रपटसृष्टी
Description:
मराठी चित्रपटांचा इतिहास 
मराठी सिनेमा म्हणजे भारतातील महाराष्ट्र राज्यातील मराठी भाषेतून निर्माण केलेली एक चित्रकृती. हा भारतातील सर्वात जुना आणि अग्रेसर/पहिला चित्रपट उद्योग आहे. १८ मे १९१२ रोजी दादासाहेब तोरणे यांनी मुंबईतील कोरोनेशन सिनेमातोग्राफ येथे श्री पुंडलिक हा भारतातील   पहिला मराठी  चित्रपट प्रदर्शित केला. 
पहिला मराठी बोलपट 'अयोध्येचा राजा' १९३२ मध्ये प्रदर्शित झाला. विशेष म्हणजे 'आलम आरा हा हिंदी चित्रपट प्रदर्शित                 झाल्यानंतर केवळ एक वर्षात हा चित्रपट प्रदर्शित झाला. अलीकडच्या काळात मराठी चित्रपटाने फारच प्रगती केली आहे. चित्रपट उद्योगाचे मुंबई हे आरंभ स्थान आहे.
१९१३ मध्ये प्रदर्शित झालेला दादासाहेब फाळके यांनी दिग्दर्शित केलेला 'राजा हरिश्चंद्र' हा भारतातील पहिला फुल लेंग्थ फिचर असलेला मराठी चित्रपट. दरवर्षी भारत सरकारकडून चित्रपट सृष्टीतील व्यक्तींना दादासाहेब फाळके यांच्या आजीवन योगदानाबद्दल त्यांच्या स्मरणार्थ 'दादासाहेब फाळके पुरस्कार' दिला जातो.

Name: Genesis Gaming (CLOSE)
Description:
About Genesis: Gaming&Beyond:
Genesis, is a leading gaming provider in the gambling industry with more than 10 years of experience in providing over 200 engaging gaming titles. Genesis aims to lead the gaming landscape with innovative and market differentiating games which keep players highly entertained and captivated. All of Genesis products have been developed on a powerful backend platform (IntelliGen) which ensures a seamless player experience and a stable and secure integration.

About Radi8:
What differentiates Radi8 games are the in-game loyalty features which are designed to help extend game play across the suite of Radi8 games. This allows players to accumulate and cultivate Radcoins (Loyalty credits) which can then be used to improve their chances of winning during game play. The Radi8 portfolio of games are designed to attract a new breed of audience who are looking to not only win big but enjoy a highly immersive and entertaining gaming experience.

About Bunfox:
Bunfox games was born out of the realization that there is a new tribe of gamblers to entertain, and the current games that exist are not interesting to this younger, tech-savvy tribe. To this end, Bunfox Games combines hardened gambling mechanics with a modern and fresh approach in gameplay to create new kinds of games and new ways to play.

To learn more about Genesis: Gaming&Beyond, please visit www.genesis-games.com

Name: GamingMonk (acquired by MPL)
Description:
GamingMonk is online Esports community platform, based out of New Delhi, India. ESports or Competitive Gaming Tournaments are played across platforms such as PC, Console & Mobile. We currently have 3 verticals - Play, Watch & Discover.

Online eSports Portal was launched in Aug 2017 with an idea of bringing the tournaments experience online & with a vision to reach out to every gamer in India. With a passion and a commitment to the best gaming experience, we at GamingMonk, have strived to create a community for gamers.

A reader lives a thousand lives before he dies, and gamers always know where to find an extra life.

Name: Radio Star Sud
Description:
Radio STAR est une radio marseillaise, créée en mars 1982 par René Baldaccini (neveu de l'artiste marseillais, César Baldaccini connu pour ses célèbres compressions et notamment pour les trophées de la cérémonie des César).

C'est une radio musicale généraliste et indépendante affiliée au groupement Les Indés Radios, regroupant 128 radios indépendantes en France. 

Le slogan de la radio est "Premier dans le cœur des marseillais".

La grille des programmes est variée : musique, beaucoup d'infos locales et région, bons plans sorties, jeux (Starbank, Star Quizz...), Mon OM à moi, Journal des sports, Job News, Point circulation...

Radio STAR émet dans toute la Provence : dans les départements 13 Bouches-du-Rhône, 83 Var, 84 Vaucluse et 04 Alpes de Hautes Provence ; et donc sur plusieurs fréquences :
- Marseille : 92.3 FM
- Toulon : 90.2 FM
- Vaucluse : 87.8 FM
- Zone de Nice : 92.4 FM
- Manosque : 93.7 FM
- Digne-les-Bains : 100.3 FM
- Sisteron : 100.2 FM

Name: Lake Compounce Amusement Park
Description: Celebrating over 175 years, Lake Compounce is the official park of family fun and the oldest continuously operating amusement park in North America. What makes us the best amusement park in Connecticut for family-friendly fun and excitement? We're home to the top-rated wooden roller coaster in the world, Boulder Dash, as well Connecticut's largest water park, Crocodile Cove!

Name: Fantasee Integration
Description:
At Fantasee Integration, we're not just about lighting, we're about creating an emotional impact that takes space to a whole new level. We believe that our solutions are a new stage in architecture, offering stand-alone integration that can be controlled with the touch of a button, automatic sensors, or even without a complicated computer interface. 

We rent, sell, design and service theatrical lighting systems and special effects for performance, touring, corporate theater, exhibits, permanent installations and city skylines with unique applications for architecture. Combining creative design and first-rate equipment with unparalleled technical support to give you turn-key resources for realizing any size production.  

Our certified technicians are dedicated to delivering that special “wow” factor while ensuring safety compliance, we'll make sure you get it done right!

Name: Kevin VFX
Description:
Kevin is a  VFX company  founded in 2017 by Partners Sue Troyan, Tim Davies and Darcy Parsons.  
Privately owned and operated, Kevin is experienced in high-end VFX commercials and producing compelling imagery for any medium. We are committed to offering the very best talent in the industry. Currently located on Abbot Kinney in Venice.

Name: Fremont Street Experience
Description:
We are Fremont Street Experience (FSE) in downtown Las Vegas.

The Fremont Street Experience organization is the marketing umbrella for several Las Vegas casinos: The D, Four Queens, Fremont Hotel, Binion's, Golden Nugget, Golden Gate, The California and Main Street Station.

Fremont Street Experience is a pedestrian mall featuring Viva Vision, the world's largest video screen. Our nightly light shows are free and open to the public. Viva Vision is 1,386 feet long and 90 feet tall, with 12.5 million LEDs. FSE's visuals are supported by audio packing 550,000 watts of power. 

Our destination includes two thrill attractions, the SlotZilla zipline and Fear the Walking Dead Survival.

FSE and its partner casinos host a number of high profile events, including corporate gatherings. Our organization can assist with planning your corporate event, including catering and more. Use our resort relationships and local connections to make the most of your company's event. 

Fremont Street Experience provides over-the-top spectacle set against dazzling neon and the best people-watching in the world. There's truly something for everyone and millions of visitors a year enjoy the gambling, the drinking, the music and more to be found at our one-of-a-kind entertainment mecca.

Find out more about Fremont Street Experience at http://www.vegasexperience.com.

Name: Film Finances International
Description: FFI is the world leader in the provision of completion contracts to the entertainment industry for films, television, mini-series and streaming product. FFI was founded in London in 1950 and is now headquartered in Los Angeles, with 11 offices globally including in London, Stockholm, Toronto, New York, Cape Town, Cologne and Shanghai. Over the last 67 years, FFI has provided the financiers of film and television productions with contracts providing assurance that such productions will be completed on time, on budget and to a basic pre-agreed specification.

Name: Fresh Fiction
Description:
Fresh Fiction is a popular fiction web site for today's reader with new titles, bestseller lists, contests, current author profiles with backlists, and permanently archived reviews, plus all the industry buzz.

Fresh Fiction publishes several newsletters daily, weekly and monthly to more than 260,000 subscribers. Popular newsletters include: Fresh Pick, a reader-selected Book-of-the-Day; Fresh Press, a summary of all the books and authors featured on the top 65 television / radio news and entertainment programs; and Fresh Fiction News that goes out weekly with articles about authors and books. Our monthly ezines are Fresh Passion for spicier romance books and Fresh Intrigue for thrillers, mysteries and suspense fans. All subscriptions and the complete web site content is free to readers.

Name: Video Games Live
Description:
Video Games Live is an immersive concert event featuring music from the greatest video games of all time.  Created and produced by industry veterans and world famous video game composers Tommy Tallarico and Jack Wall; top orchestras and choirs around the world perform along with exclusive video footage and music arrangements, synchronized lighting, special fx, solo performers, electronic percussion, live action and unique interactive segments to create an explosive one-of-a-kind entertainment experience. 

Special events surround the show, including a pre- and post-show festival.  Guests will enjoy interactive game demos, prizes, a costume contest, game competitions and the very popular meet-and-greet with top game composers and designers.

The best way to describe Video Games Live?  Picture the excitement and energy of a rock concert mixed with the power and emotion of a symphony orchestra combined together by the technology, interactivity, stunning visuals and fun that only video games can provide.  Completely synchronized cutting-edge video screen visuals, state-of-the-art lighting and special on-stage interactive segments dazzle audiences of all ages – gamers and non-gamers alike.

Name: HopMotion Animation
Description:
HopMotion is a digital content creation studio focused on creating broadcast quality 2D and 3D animated and VFX oriented content for digital platforms catering to audiences across the board.

As a creatively driven boutique studio we are engaged in developing and creating original content from the idea stage through to final execution all under one roof. 

With an in-house team of creatively driven writers, artists, animators and voice-over talent, we provide the following services:

-Writing services: story & screenplay.
-Pre Production services: storyboard and animatics. 
-3D and 2D animation production services for web, TV and film.
-Dubbing and Voice acting.
-VFX supervision and execution.

Name: FOX SOUL
Description:
FOX SOUL is a live and interactive streaming channel dedicated to the black
culture, but consumable by all. The programs aim to celebrate black culture and deal with real topics that impact the everyday lives of the black community through unfiltered and insightful content.

Everyone wants to have a voice and we believe the culture is better served when
those voices can be heard and appreciated beyond the privacy of our homes. 
Our purpose for existing is to provide that platform with our LIVE AND INTERACTIVE network.

VISION
Everyone in the community has a story and our vision is to continue building a
network where more of those stories can be heard on a daily basis…unfiltered.

MISSION
Continue to build a network that entertains, educates and inspires the culture
through relatable stories where everyone’s voice is heard in real time through our interactive technology.

For more information on FOX SOUL, visit us on YouTube and FOXSOUL.TV.
Follow us on Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter.

Name: LSE by Laser System Europe
Description:
Founded in 1993, Laser System Europe is a leading company in the field of multimedia show design and production. Our creative crew teams up with technical experts to provide you with the latest technological features, allowing you reproduce you wildest dreams.

The company has two main activity poles: the sale and rental of laser systems and the creation of world class spectaculars, from one shot events to permanent installations.

Our strength lies in the combination of different event techniques. Among them, one can find laser effects, video projection and mapping, fountains and water effects, pyrotechnics, inflatable spheres, holograms and many others.

Our activity sectors are broad and varied: private parties, corporate events, product launches, tours, stadium spectaculars, theme parks installations, fashion shows, TV shows and wedding parties.

We have worked all over the world for several important projects such as Disneyland Paris 20th Anniversary spectacular, the 50th Anniversary of the Independency of Kuwait, the Shanghai Universal Exposition and the SEA games in Vietnam.

Name: ACE (Anomaly Content & Entertainment)
Description: ACE Content is an integrated entertainment company that develops, produces and distributes award winning premium content across media, including television, film, live events, publishing, digital, social media and experiential. Based in NY and LA, ACE Content combines the brand sensibility of world-class communication agency talent with experienced entertainment executives to deliver captivating content platforms.

Name: Mixtape Madness
Description: We showcase the best of British urban music by presenting Music videos, Mixtape premieres, Audios & freestyle shows such as 'Mad About Bars' & 'Next Up', We are proud to have featured many great artists such as Digga D, K.O, Kilo Jugg, J Hus, Abra Cadabra, Potter Payper, M Huncho, Jay Silva and many more.

Name: Bollywood Life
Description: Your one stop shop for Bollywood and South gossip, news and more!

Name: Hale Centre Theatre
Description:
Hale Centre Theatre has been operating in Utah since 1985 with tremendous support from local audiences.  The Theatre was located on South Main Street from 1985 until 1998 when it became a 501(c)(3) nonprofit community theatre and moved to a facility in West Valley City. 

Hale Centre Theatre has most recently opened a two-stage, world-class facility at The Mountain America Performing Arts Centre in Sandy, Utah, in Nov 2017. Now serving over 500,000 patrons each year over at least eight productions.

The Theatre sees over 250,000 patrons through its doors each year and has a dedicated season ticket base of more than 22,000.  Each season it produces seven productions including dramas, comedies, and musicals.  The productions are cast entirely from within the community using local artists who share their talents as a pastime rather than a profession.

The Theatre’s productions and programs are supported by many generous individuals, corporations, and foundations throughout the community.

Name: Eventori
Description:
Berangkat dari perjalanan pendirinya yang berasal dari latar belakang yang berbeda - EO, brand, advertising, public relations, TV production, artis management - muncul satu visi untuk menyediakan solusi bagi pelaku bisnis hiburan dan MICE yang sering terkendala oleh keterbatasan informasi. Pada saat yang sama, kami melihat banyaknya talenta berkilau di berbagai daerah yang tidak mendapat peluang untuk tumbuh dan menjadi bintang.

Eventori adalah platform yang memfasilitasi bertumbuhnya ekosistem dunia hiburan Indonesia. Melalui Eventori, seluruh pelaku bisnis hiburan dapat bertemu, bertukar informasi, dan melakukan kerja sama bisnis untuk terus menumbuhkan ekonomi kreatif nasional.

Eventori adalah entertainment e-commerce pertama dan terbesar di Indonesia.

Eventori menangkap peluang kolaborasi dari pesatnya pertumbuhan industri hiburan yang bertemu dengan perkembangan teknologi digital. Melalui sebuah platform aplikasi (apps), kendala komunikasi dan keterbatasan informasi yang sering ditemui baik oleh talenta, EO, maupun brand dapat diatasi. Kolaborasi lintas-profesi dan lintas-daerah menjadi lebih mudah dan nyaman dalam apps yang aman dan dapat diandalkan.

Eventori juga ingin menjembatani majunya para talenta dari berbagai daerah menjadi bintang  di bidangnya masing-masing. Selama ini, talenta dengan kemampuan luar bisa tidak terjembatani untuk melompat ke panggung yang lebih besar. Dengan informasi yang terbuka, terbuka pula peluang untuk mengasah diri dan naik kelas. Inilah salah satu nilai penting kolaborasi di Eventori yang akan memajukan dunia hiburan.

Melalu Eventori, kita bisa bertemu
- Talenta : penyanyi, pemusik, band, seniman tradisi, MC, stand up comedian, pesulap, pelawak, akrobat, dll.
- Profesional : penata lampu, penata suara, show director, koreografer, dll.
- Produksi : kontraktor, workshop, sound system, lighting, dll.
- MICE provider : venue, transportasi, logistik, akomodasi, tenaga kerja, dll. 
- User : EO, promotor musik, TV station, brand

Name: Ezhomz Solutions
Description: Ezhomz offers home entertainment spaces and home technologies. We provide services and solution that covers every aspect of home automation and entertainment.

Name: Kia Forum
Description: The Kia Forum is a multi-purpose indoor arena adjacent to Los Angeles. The Kia Forum has served over five decades as one of the biggest venues in the world for music, sports, and amazing events. It is run by talented and passionate music industry leaders who have created a world-class live entertainment venue and a culture that prioritizes the artist, their fans, and their music. The Kia Forum is the only arena-sized venue in the country dedicated to music and entertainment. With the Kia Forum hosting almost 100 events yearly, some of these events include some of the most iconic names in music, as well as several special events such as award shows, mixed martial arts, and boxing. Follow them on social media @TheKiaForum (https://twitter.com/TheKiaForum)

Name: HH Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum Horseracing Excellence Awards
Description: HH Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum Horseracing Excellence Awards is a management consulting company based out of Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

Name: Next Step Talent
Description:
Next Step Talent is a full service talent management company home to talent ranging from acting, to social media to music. 

Next Step Talent works to grow our clients in whichever areas of the industry they desire. We focus on long-term growth strategy and captivating organic relationships with each individual talent. Next Step Talent is passionate about empowering talent to connect with their audience on an individualized basis, use their platform for good and emphasize growth and expression while staying true to their roots.  In this new digital age, we focus on being a step ahead in implementing diversity, inclusion, and combating mental health in Entertainment.

Name: Loma Vista Recordings
Description: Loma Vista is an independent recording company with offices in Los Angeles, New York and London.  We value creativity and collaboration in record-making, presentation and promotion of our artists which currently include Denzel Curry, Ghost, HEALTH, Iggy Pop, KORN, Local Natives, Manchester Orchestra, Margo Price, Meechy Darko, Robert Glasper, Sampa The Great, Soccer Mommy, St. Vincent, and Sylvan Esso.

Name: TOONSTAR
Description: Toonstar is a tech-driven animation studio building entertainment franchises with world-class storytellers.

Name: FICUNAM - Festival Internacional de Cine UNAM
Description:
El Festival Internacional de Cine UNAM es un evento cinematográfico organizado por la Universidad Nacional Autónoma de México.

El Festival Internacional de Cine UNAM se ha consolidado, desde su primera edición, como un espacio de exhibición capaz de integrar las diferentes direcciones del cine contemporáneo y de juntarlas en un espacio no sólo de muestra, sino también de discusión, de formación, de estudio y de encuentro profesional, de fiesta y celebración.

El circuito de exhibición FICUNAM se compone de las salas del Centro Cultural Universitario en C.U. además el Centro Cultural Tlatelolco, Cinematógrafo del Chopo, FES Acatlán, FES Aragón, Cineteca Nacional, así como las Fábricas de Artes y Oficios (FARO) Indios Verdes, Milpa Alta, Oriente y Tláhuac.
Location: Ciudad de México, Ciudad de México

Name: BoldMove Nation
Description:
BoldMove Nation designs and engineers family dark rides and coasters for regional theme parks and leisure venues. By integrating proven technologies with bold creative concepts, the team creates happy worlds with engaging experiences. Products include the award-winning Smash & Reload interactive family dark ride, the Rogue Rides trackless ride system, custom media dark rides and the Spinfinity Coaster. 
 
Headquartered in Brussels, Belgium, BoldMove is founded and led by Industry Icon Benoit Cornet and PR Strategist Anja D’Hondt. The multilingual team is driven by a profound passion for the industry and a strong community engagement. BoldMove’s innovation and creativity have been recognized with prestigious industry awards, including IAAPA Brass Ring Awards and Park World Excellence Awards.

Name: Red Dot Entertainment
Description:
Its a one stop for media related solutions.

From Av's To TV...From events to Multi City promotion....

To make it simple its Tv,Events,AV's and more....

With Services offered across the globe for national and international market....


Contact us to know more and for any kind of assistance

Name: Commune Image
Description:
Fabrique de Cinéma et haut lieu du cinéma indépendant doté d’un parc complet de postproduction, Commune Image animé une communauté de 40 créateurs (auteurs, réalisateurs, producteurs, entrepreneurs, techniciens, distributeurs et diffuseurs). De l’idée à la première projection nous créons les conditions pour que les projets les plus ambitieux deviennent réalité. 
Référente sur la création indépendante sur son territoire de la Seine-Saint-Denis, Commune Image est un symbole d’une génération qui a grandi dans les quartiers populaires : créative, connectée, audacieuse. Avec plus de 600 films soutenus à son actif, Commune Image a accompagné dans et hors ses murs plus de 450 entrepreneurs du secteur audiovisuel qui ont généré 150 emplois directs sur plus de 30 métiers distincts.
Depuis 2021, nous avons mis en place "Dar et d'Essai" - une offre gratuite en direction des publics, soutenue par le Département de Seine-Saint-Denis ainsi que "Les Séances du Turfu" - une programmation proposée en exclusivités à notre communauté de jeunes influenceurs du 93. 
Commune Image fait partie du Groupe SOS, groupe associatif, leader de l’entrepreneuriat social en Europe, et acteur majeur de l’économie sociale et solidaire. Il regroupe 650 associations, entreprises sociales, établissements et services, qui combattent, agissent et innovent au profit des personnes en situation de vulnérabilité, des générations futures et des territoires. Depuis sa création en 1984, lors des années sida, le Groupe SOS : combat toutes les exclusions ; agit pour l’accès de toutes et tous à l’essentiel, en venant notamment en aide à des associations et entreprises pour sauvegarder leurs emplois et activités ; et innove face aux enjeux sociaux, sociétaux et environnementaux. Non-lucratif, sans actionnaire, le Groupe SOS et ses 22.000 personnes employées agissent en France et dans plus de 40 pays dans le monde.

Description:
Socceroof is a lifestyle and sports destination redefining how people connect, celebrate, and play.

Born from the belief that soccer is more than a game, we create vibrant spaces where passion meets community: where every match, every cheer, and every connection count.

Across our East Coast US and Canada locations, Socceroof offers more than just world-class indoor soccer fields. Our venues feature courts for pickleball, basketball, and other recreational sports, alongside bar and lounge areas designed for gatherings, watch events, and celebrations. It’s where athletes and fans alike come together, to play, to unwind, and to be part of something bigger.

With our unique combination of sport, hospitality, and atmosphere, Socceroof provides the perfect setting for federations, partners, and communities to host watch events, fan hubs, and branded activations. From friendly matches to large-scale experiences, we bring the global game, and the energy around it, to life.

Our mission is simple: MAKE IT COUNT.
Whether you’re scoring goals, sharing a match with friends, or discovering a new sport, Socceroof turns free time into unforgettable time.

Name: 310 Studios
Description:
310 Studios is a boutique production company focused on creating solutions for every budget.  

The studio was founded in 2001 by three friends with big plans.  Billy Jones, Craig Russo and John Pankratz had all been key players in film, television and multimedia productions for companies like Universal, Sony, Disney, Warner Brothers, Fox, Microsoft, GT Interactive, and KTLA among countless others.  They decided to utilize their 35 years of combined experience to open their own production company.  With their take-charge intiative, it didn’t take long for 310 Studios to officially open its doors for business.

To this day, 310 Studios’ founders are always actively seeking new and creative solutions to help keep clients on the cutting edge of technology and design without breaking their budget. Our extensive pool of talented freelance artists allows us the freedom to assign the best artist for each project. We consider our talent pool to be one of best tools for developing new, creative ideas and bringing them to the screen.

At 310 Studios, we treat each new client as though we are establishing a long-term relationship. Whether it’s for the long haul or just a short trip, we go the extra mile to make sure our clients are content with the work delivered and the steps it took to get there.

Description:

Due to popular demand, we have developed a corporate events offering for businesses. We love to craft unforgettable, high-energy corporate events and team-building experiences for employees and their families.

Our mission is simple: to find the fun in everything.

Since 2007, we’ve organised a wide range of events, from awesome children’s parties to dynamic and competitive corporate team-building activities, all designed to inspire creativity, collaboration, and a sense of adventure. Whether it’s a bespoke international treasure hunt, children’s Christmas party or an engaging family friendly company-wide celebration, we tailor each experience to a business’s unique goals and audience.

Name: Particle6
Description:
Particle6 is redefining the future of video, film and TV production. As Europe’s leading up-and-coming AI production studio, we are pioneering new ways to create compelling content—seamlessly blending AI innovation with traditional filmmaking to push the boundaries of what’s possible. With the best AI experts and technicians in the industry, we produce everything from high-impact adverts to groundbreaking narrative films.

Our AI-driven approach spans the entire production process, delivering an aggregation of minor gains that result in up to 90% cost reduction without sacrificing creativity or quality. We use AI ethically and strategically, ensuring efficiency while amplifying storytelling. Whether it’s commercial, branded, or traditional TV content, our work is designed to resonate across platforms, drive engagement, and go viral.

Founded by Eline van der Velden in 2015, Particle6 has produced award-winning content across genres, from Miss Holland (BBC Three) to True Crime Secrets (Hearst Networks) and Look See Wow! (Sky Kids). As an industry pathfinder, we also help other production companies integrate AI into their workflows, keeping costs low and creative output high.

With over 20 awards, including a Gold Telly Award and a Best Online Comedy Lovie, we are Albert-certified for sustainability and recipients of funding from BFI, Channel 4, and Creative UK. We are Particle6—where storytelling meets AI innovation.

La grille des programmes est variée : musique, beaucoup d'infos locales et région, bons plans sorties, jeux (Starbank, Star Quizz...), Mon OM à moi, Journal des sports, Job News, Point circulation...

Radio STAR émet dans toute la Provence : dans les départements 13 Bouches-du-Rhône, 83 Var, 84 Vaucluse et 04 Alpes de Hautes Provence ; et donc sur plusieurs fréquences :
- Marseille : 92.3 FM

Name: Biplob World
Description:
The brainchild of Ritika and Abhishek Talwar, Biplob World Pvt. Ltd. is an organization dedicated to the creation and promotion of content that educates & informs young children through the medium of engaging and captivating stories.

We believe that stories are the best engagement format for children to learn something new. Not only do stories make the learning and discovering process more accessible to young minds, it also firmly anchors the lesson in easily recognizable situations. A lesson learnt through stories is a lesson that remains with you for life!
Our first title, ‘Adventures of Biplob the Bumblebee – Volume 1’ has been published by Penguin Random House India. 5 more volumes of this series are slated for launch in 2020.

Biplob the Bumblebee – the Eco Warrior

Biplob is the first ever eco – friendly superhero. He lives in the countryside with his friends farmer Balram, the various flowers, Spot the Leopard, Karini the elephant and others.

In each rollicking adventure, Biplob uses his wits to come up with an eco – friendly solution to help his friends and garden and avert disaster! Not only do these tales teach basic science to children in an engaging format, they also bring out important lessons and life – skills for children. 

Biplob believes that every problem has a natural, eco – friendly and sustainable solution!

These stories aim to bring home to children the importance of protecting nature, our environment and the eco – system and are suitable for children of ages from 4 to 10 years.

Elektronik sektörünün içinden gelen bir ekip olarak, bu işe büyük bir motivasyonla başladık. Müşterilerimize dünyada benzer sektörde kullanılan en son teknoloji donanım ve yazılımları tanıtıp deneyimleme imkânı sunuyoruz. Çözümleri hızlı ve sorunsuz bir şekilde kapılarına kadar getirmenin yanı sıra bu cihazların kullanımı ile ilgili know-how’ı da aktararak uçtan uca bir deneyim sağlıyoruz. 

Sektörün gelişimine katkı sağlamak bizim için çok önemli. Sektörle beraber büyüyeceğimize inanıyoruz. Bu sebeple üniversitelerde demo uygulamaları, Motion Capture Teknolojileri Konferansı ve Hareket Analizi Konferansı ile son teknoloji hareket yakalama çözümlerinin bilinilirliğini artırmak için büyük bir çaba sarf ediyoruz.

We are Nashville's premier regional theatre company, founded in 1985 by Martha Rivers Ingram and Mac Pirkle, celebrating 35 years of presenting musicals, hot new plays, and reimagined classics to Nashville. Every year, over 20,000 members of the local community get to experience a Nashville Rep production, special event, or outreach program. 

Nashville Rep boasts an ambitious season every year, featuring spectacular main stage productions, the Ingram New Works Project, The Nashville Rep Conservatory, professional development and educational programs, outreach activities, and several special events, plus our props and costume rentals program! We love our home here in Nashville and are proud to be leaders in the Nashville arts community. Employing over 200 actors, playwrights, designers, directors, musicians, technicians, and educators each year, Nashville Rep is the leading employer of theatrical artists in middle Tennessee!

Nashville Rep is honored to have been recognized across Tennessee as a theatrical company of the highest quality. We have been named Best Professional Theatre by the Nashville Scene, the Best Local Theatre by The Tennesseean, and were formally recognized for thirty years of service to the community by the Metropolitan Government of Nashville and Davidson County. Our shows, actors, directors, and designers have been honored with awards from Nfocus, the First Night Awards, Nashville Scene, The Tennessean, and more. Thank you, Tennessee, for supporting the work we love to do!

Name: No Agenda Show
Description:
No Agenda is a podcast hosted by Adam Curry and John C. Dvorak and takes place twice a week on Thursday and Sunday at 9 a.m. Pacific Time. The show is primarily focused on mainstream media deconstruction.

The show has no advertisers, instead relying on its listeners to voluntarily donate in either lump sums or a voluntary recurring plan (referred to by the hosts as the "Value for Value" model). The show also relies on their listeners (known as "Producers") to provide artwork  and audio clips.

In July 2016, the show won the Podcast Award for Best Podcast in the category "News & Politics." In September 2013, the show was nominated for Podcast Awards in two categories, "People's Choice" and "Politics / News".

In December 2009, the show announced they had reached 450,000 listeners.

Talkers Magazine featured the podcast in their "Frontier Fifty", an alphabetically sorted list containing a "Selection of Outstanding Talk Media Webcasters."

A primer has been produced for newer listeners, both as an introduction and a discussion of the show.[

Name: AntiFragile Music
Description:
AntiFragile’s name is inspired by the brilliant book by Nassem Nicholas Taleb “Antifragile: Things That Gain From Disorder”.    AntiFragile offers a definitive solution: how to gain from disorder and chaos while being protected from fragilities and adverse events.   The “antifragile” is actually beyond strong, because it actually benefits from shocks, uncertainty, and stressors, just as human bones get stronger when subjected to stress and tension. The antifragile needs disorder in order to survive and flourish.  (buy the book – Antifragile: Things That Gain from Disorder (Incerto))
We at AntiFragile Music aim to help artists benefit from the disorder and chaos they face in the music marketplace today.

To that end, AntiFragile Music has only three goals.

Work tirelessly to nurture, expose and grow the music of exceptional and transcendent artists (mostly musical).

Educate the musical community and the public on the shameful lack of transparency and the imbalance (in various ways) in payments to artists on both the sides of the equation–the major labels and the DSP’s, with the hope of impacting a positive change in policy on both sides, a change which is fair and which is long overdue for artists who work with these entities.

Enlighten musicians on how their business works, how their money is earned through intellectual property rights, at least in the most rudimentary way, so as to help them survive and thrive.  Musical artists are not stupid, in fact quite the opposite, and while many artists have team members who are able to help them through understand the complicated world of music money flow (publishing, recording, merch, sponsorships), there are many artists who don’t have the wherewithal and thus even the basic knowledge of what money they are earning.  Can you imagine even someone working at a fast food joint not knowing what their pay rate is?  If we can help musicians on this, it will have all been worthwhile.

inquiries:  tommy@antifragilemusic.com

Description:
Malthouse Theatre collaborates with local and international artists to create inventive performances that cut to the core of the human experience. Our work explores the world, personally, socially and politically to provoke a dialogue with and within audiences.

Our dedicated venue, The Malthouse in Melbourne’s Arts Precinct is a hub for entertaining and memorable live experiences. We stand as a counterpoint to the mainstream, championing artistic ambition and cultural diversity.

Name: Matmut ATLANTIQUE
Description:
Conceptualisé par le cabinet d’architecture Jacques Herzog et Pierre De Meuron, le Matmut ATLANTIQUE est une enceinte multifonctionnelle de nouvelle génération dédiée au sport et à la culture. Conçu pour accueillir une programmation riche et diversifiée, sa capacité modulable de 42 115 spectateurs en fait la plus grande scène de l’Atlantique. 

Au delà des matchs et des concerts, le stade accueille également tout au long de l’année des événements d’entreprise. 
Séminaires, salons, réunions d’entreprise… sont organisés dans les nombreux espaces réceptifs du stade :   
- 60 loges (d'une capacité de 12 à 93 places)
- 7 salons modulables (d'une capacité de 300 à 1000 places) 
- 1 auditorium de 252 places
- et bien d'autres espaces... 

Inauguré en mai 2015, le stade a déjà accueilli depuis des événements sportifs d’envergure : les demi-finales du TOP 14 à deux reprises, un match de l’équipe de France, 5 matchs de l’EURO 2016 ou plus récemment la Finale de Coupe de la Ligue… Le stade a eu la chance de recevoir Céline Dion, les Vieilles Canailles, Ed Sheeran ou encore Muse.

Name: TM Ventures
Description:
TM Ventures is a close-knit family of businesses that has earned its reputation as a trusted marketplace for popular entertainment and talent in India. Its transparent and authentic approach has helped create and sustain lasting bonds between talent and clientele. TM Ventures sees entertainment as a unifying force in the world and thus offers 360-degree solutions across the entertainment industry that leave deep impressions in people’s hearts and minds.

TM Ventures is steered by a team of passionate and driven individuals. They relay their expertise across TM entities such as its artiste management arm TM Talent Management, full-service consultancy outpost Entertainment Consultant, the artiste-first, non-film music label TM Music, award-winning Influencer Marketing hub Barcode Entertainment, as well as the multi-faceted IP-churner Create & Collab.

Description: Cinereach is a storytelling studio offering narrative intelligence and creative sanctuary that amplifies stories when and where they matter most. For two decades, we've been mapping how narratives shift what people believe is possible. Now we’re developing deeper cultural intelligence and exploring the incubation process of breakthrough work. We want to build stories that reverberate, deeply. Beyond creative partnership, we equip artists with tools, insights, and infrastructure that enable transformative storytelling of all mediums.
