Description:
Rolling Stone Culture Council is a vetted professional organization for business founders, senior executives, industry leaders, and influencers who are passionate about building businesses that impact culture. 

We provide exclusive networking, professional development, and publishing opportunities to members who want to share their expertise and ideas.

Members get exclusive opportunities to build relationships with successful leaders, grow professionally and personally through live virtual events, and publish bylined articles and expertise on RollingStone.com

Our diverse community brings together people from the worlds of art, music, media, entertainment, film, television, theater, fashion, gaming, sports, hospitality, food, beverage and cannabis. 

The close connections and vibrant energy in Rolling Stone Culture Council make it an essential tool for influencers across industries.

Rolling Stone Culture Council was created in partnership with Rolling Stone magazine (rollingstone.com) by the expert community builders who founded Young Entrepreneur Council (YEC). Our mission is to connect exceptional business owners and senior executives with people and resources to help them thrive. 

Expand your influence and be part of a strong community of support. To learn more, go to council.rollingstone.com

Name: Gregori Fiorini Production
Description:
Gregori Fiorini Production é uma produtora audiovisual dedicada a criar narrativas que emocionam, informam e transformam. Entre 2023 e 2025, entregamos projetos de alta qualidade técnica, artística e institucional para órgãos públicos, universidades, conselhos profissionais e instituições culturais em todo o Brasil.

Nossa missão é transformar ideias em narrativas visuais impactantes, que inspirem, engajem e ampliem o acesso à informação, cultura e conhecimento. Atuamos com foco em excelência, inovação, ética e inclusão, valores que orientam cada etapa do nosso trabalho.

Produzimos vídeos institucionais e educativos para o Conselho Federal de Biologia (CFBio), celebrando seus 45 anos, e para o Instituto do Patrimônio Histórico e Artístico Nacional (IPHAN) e Museu da Inconfidência / Instituto Brasileiro de Museus (IBRAM), com audiodescrição para ampliar o acesso ao patrimônio cultural.

Desenvolvemos projetos para a Universidade Federal do Pampa (UNIPAMPA) e Universidade Federal da Bahia (UFBA), focados em educação pública e difusão científica.

No setor público, produzimos vídeos acessíveis para o Ministério Público do Ceará (PGJ-CE), o CRECI-PE e a Corregedoria-Geral do Distrito Federal (CGDF), reforçando ética, transparência e cidadania.

Em 2025, prestamos tradução simultânea bilíngue (português/inglês) para o Ministério do Desenvolvimento e Assistência Social (MDS), ampliando o diálogo em eventos internacionais.

Firmamos parceria com a Fundação Padre Anchieta (TV Cultura) para legendagem acessível, garantindo o acesso de pessoas com deficiência auditiva a conteúdos televisivos.

Na área ambiental, colaboramos com o Instituto Chico Mendes (ICMBio) e as Secretarias de Meio Ambiente do Mato Grosso (SEMA-MT) e Goiás (SEMAD-GO), produzindo vídeos educativos sobre conservação e sustentabilidade.

Gregori Fiorini Production está pronta para colaborar com instituições que compartilham o compromisso de transformar, comunicar e incluir.

Description:
Productions J est une entreprise de production télévisuelle, de production de spectacles, de disques musicaux et de gérance d’artistes de la chanson fondée en 1997 par Julie Snyder.

Name: BAM Karaoke Box
Description:
The story behind BAM Karaoke Box starts with Arnaud Studer, the company’s Founder & CEO, when he goes on a trip to Tokyo in 2011. Much to his surprise, he discovers karaoke in private rooms, enjoying it so much that he goes back nearly every night during his trip, despite being a terrible singer. 
Back in Paris where karaoke rooms are nonexistent, Arnaud decides to launch a high-end karaoke box concept to deliver an upscale experience. In April 2014, Arnaud opens the first BAM venue at 30 rue Richer and the rest is history.

Year on year, BAM never ceases to innovate and surprise clients, from the expansion of its karaoke boxes in France and Spain, and the launch of Europe’s largest karaoke venue in London Victoria, to the creation of its subsidiary company. 

In a decade, BAM has successfully gone from being a single karaoke box venue in Paris to becoming a top European entertainment group.

Carla embraces her Caribbean roots, culture and foundation entwined with her North American experiences to cultivate a new sense of fashion. Carla has long been setting trends in fashion on the Caribbean Island of Dominica, with the advantage of a seamstress grandmother, known as Iona DeFoe.

FOF is managed by a team of very skilled and qualified professionals with over 50 collective years of experience in all aspects of business. Carla is a Fordham University Alumni and under her direction, finance meets fashion with over 20 years experience in Financial Accounting, Business Management, Fashion Modeling and Fashion Design. Carla is taking the new faces of fashion to higher heights affiliating with organizations like "The Fashion International Group (FGI) "as an Executive Member. Our youthful and talented management team can relate to the needs of young models and their families, through their honesty and integrity. They possess a wealth of talent drawn from diverse cultural backgrounds, degrees in business and fashion, and vast entrepreneurial experience.

Description:
At Futureplay, we're a bunch of free-spirited individuals who get our kicks out of creating great mobile games loved by players the world over. We stand for low hierarchy, ownership and autonomy, respect and trust, and openness and transparency.

Futureplay was founded in 2015 by a team of five Finnish game industry veterans who shared a vision to transform the way mobile games are played around the world. Name: Jakarta Aquarium
Description:
Celebrating the 30th anniversary Taman Safari Indonesia Group proudly presents Jakarta Aquarium, a next generation family recreational and edutainment center from Indonesia’s leading conservation institute and family recreation. Jakarta Aquarium located in the newest Agung Podomoro Land leisure district, Neo Soho, in West Jakarta will be open for public on December 2016. The ultimate boutique aquarium is a result of extensive collaboration of world class artists and designers, delivering an extraordinary journey to Indonesia’s mega biodiversity.

Providing escapism from the urban lifestyle, Jakarta Aquarium will provide an integrated family leisure of education and entertainment. Explore the beauty of Indonesian nature through the exotic leopard whipray, giant pacific octopus, blacktip reef shark, and coconut crab. Not to mention the cute living exhibition of Humboldt penguin in the penguin themed restaurant. Have fun by experiencing dive in the giant tank and seatrekking with professional guide while kids could enjoy the interactive multimedia activity in the kids’ zone.

Jakarta Aquarium uniquely presents a theatrical underwater performance inspired by Indonesian folklore directed by Peter Wilson. The underwater show is a must-see for all ages. 

Visit and be mesmerize by Jakarta Aquarium coming soon at LG and LGM floor in Neo Soho Jakarta.

Name: Jupiter Entertainment
Description:
Jupiter Entertainment has an enviable track record of creating successful, highly formatted series with outstanding ratings and strong renewals. From critically- acclaimed series like the explosive docusoap Sons of Guns and true crime powerhouse Snapped to established series like Biography and Modern Marvels, Jupiter has been successful in producing a wide variety of genres and formats by focusing on the timeless ingredients of great storytelling, compelling characters and high production values.

Over the past 26 years, Jupiter has produced hit prime-time series and specials for A&E, Discovery, History, Investigation Discovery, Oxygen, TruTV, Fuse, and Animal Planet. Members of Jupiter’s creative team have also produced kid’s programming for Nickelodeon, daytime how-to shows for HGTV, a music-based series for TNN and even a sports entertainment property for CBS Cable – the re-launch of the American classic, Roller Derby.

The company’s strong foundation, combined with its ability to craft stories that connect to their target audience, has Jupiter Entertainment poised to continue its success within the television industry as it explores alternate distribution platforms beyond.

Name: MAJOR LABEL SCOUT
Description:
MajorLabelScout.com is a one of a kind talent-scouting network. Our mission is to find dedicated young people who are passionate about mainstream music, teach them the fundamentals of artist discovery and development, and empower them to find the superstars of tomorrow. 

The top-tier artists we discover through our community are signed for management or publishing through our venture with EMI Music Publishing; or else shopped to our major label contacts for record deals. Scouts are compensated through a unique learning experience and monetarily in the event one of their artists is signed. 

We have approximately 200 Scouts across the U.S., Canada and U.K. We are highly selective and recruiting a few more dedicated young people who are exceptionally driven and hoping to pursue careers in the music business

Name: Xandar
Description:
Xandar is a next-generation Metaverse ecosystem that redefines interactive gaming through cutting-edge technology and immersive experiences. At its core, Xandar integrates Artificial Intelligence (AI), Machine Learning (ML), and the revolutionary concept of Inter-Metaverse Operability, offering players a seamless connection between different metaverse realms. The platform enables players to explore vast digital landscapes, engage in competitive arena battles, and own in-game assets as Non-Fungible Tokens (NFTs), a step towards true digital ownership and financial freedom.

Players can collect rare and unique NFT artifacts within Xandar’s multiverse. These NFTs represent valuable in-game assets that players fully own, trade, or utilize, ensuring blockchain-backed security and transparency. By integrating blockchain technology, Xandar supports a play-to-earn model, allowing players to monetize their time and skills in the game. This reflects the growing trend of decentralized gaming economies, where ownership and control shift to the users.

Xandar leverages AI-driven adaptive systems to create a personalized and dynamic gaming experience. The game's AI learns from player behavior, preferences, and strategies, providing tailored challenges, recommendations, and gameplay scenarios. With ML algorithms, Xandar’s virtual environments evolve over time, ensuring that no two gameplay experiences are identical. These technologies align with the industry's latest advancements in predictive analytics, procedural content generation, and natural language processing.

Name: Star Games
Description: Star games is the ultimate destination for those who like to challenge and conquer. Whether you like arcade or action, we have it all.

Name: Cards Against Humanity, LLC
Description:
Cards Against Humanity, LLC is a Chicago-based game design firm.

Following a successful Kickstarter project, their first product, Cards Against Humanity, became the top-selling game on Amazon.com and has sold out three printings.

Cards Against Humanity LLC is owned and operated by Max Temkin, Josh Dillon, Ben Hantoot, David Munk, Daniel Dranove, Eli Halpern, Eliot Weinstein, and David Pinsof.

Name: 44 Blue Productions
Description:
Founded by Rasha Drachkovitch and Stephanie Noonan Drachkovitch, unscripted powerhouse 44 Blue Productions is an award-winning producer of non-fiction and unscripted content whose series have aired on more than 20 domestic television networks and in more than 120 countries worldwide. As influencers of this storied generation of unscripted programming, 44 Blue’s creativity and sensibilities have made their mark on the nonfiction television landscape for decades.
Currently, the company has more than 20 projects in active production, including the industry’s deepest slate of celeb-reality programming, from successful series with Mark Wahlberg, Donnie Wahlberg and Jenny McCarthy (A&E’s twice Emmy-nominated “Wahlburgers”  and “Donnie Loves Jenny”), to upcoming projects with Whoopi Goldberg (Oxygen’s “Strut” and Amazon’s “Sugarplum Ballerinas”), Dwayne “The Rock” Johnson and Dany Garcia’s Seven Bucks Productions (“Rock and a Hard Place”).
44 Blue’s impressive slate of groundbreaking series also includes A&E’s top-rated “Nightwatch,” the “TD Jakes Talk Show” for first-run syndication, MSNBC’S critically acclaimed “Lockup” and its trio of spinoff series “Lockup: Raw,” “Lockup: World Tour” and “Life After Lockup;” Animal Planet’s long-running “Pit Bulls & Parolees,” BET/Centric’s “According to Alex,” Style’s Emmy nominated “Split Ends,” Spike’s “Deadliest Warrior,”  OWN’s Gracie Award winning “Married to the Army: Alaska,” and Emmy-nominated “Family Court with Judge Penny.”
44 Blue’s rich history of innovative storytelling crosses multiple broadcast, cable, first-run syndication and digital platforms.  In 2015 44 Blue launched Ovrture, a virtual reality content studio that is breaking new ground in immersive fiction and nonfiction storytelling.   44 Blue is represented by the William Morris Endeavor Agency.

We made our name at the height of the civil rights movement, providing a platform for voices that might otherwise not be heard, including Dr. Martin Luther King, Malcolm X, Dick Gregory and others. Today, our creativity and industry knowledge give our clients unique advantages. Our agents are content experts in specific markets: corporate, healthcare, college, K-12 education, and community /nonprofit, providing invaluable recommendations. We also offer an unparalleled level of customer service, including negotiating expertise, complete logistical planning, and 24/7 travel support. With APB, you’re never on your own. If a speaker cancels at the last minute, we will work diligently to find a replacement or facilitate a remote solution. 

Contact us today to find your perfect speaker. With more than 50 years of experience, we know what it takes to make your event unforgettable—and make you look like a star.

Hailed as "the coolest new movie theater in the world" by GQ, Metrograph is home to New York's most exclusive premieres, screening over 800 different films per year, and is a favorite of the world's greatest filmmakers and actors who regularly appear in person to present their work and watch their peers' work. Metrograph NYC is also home to the Michelin Guide recommended Metrograph Commissary Restaurant, The Metrograph Bookstore, and The Metrograph Candy Store (described by The Financial Times as "a cross between a Swedish Candy Store and a Damien Hirst installation"). The company's growth includes Metrograph Digital, launched 2020, a rapidly growing membership/subscription film watching and editorial platform which will continue scaling up after the theater reopens in October, a film distribution division Metrograph Pictures, and new content creation initiatives.

Description:
En este mundo ajetreado, es súper normal sentir que los días se van como agua entre los dedos, ¿verdad? 

Nos enfrentamos a una paradoja: Todos conectados, pero solemos sentirnos más alejados que nunca.

La presión del tiempo y las responsabilidades diarias nos hace descuidar lo realmente importante: La familia, nuestros amigos y personas que queremos.

Sabemos lo que se siente. 

Por eso, nosotros en Happyland hemos creado un lugar donde puedes dejar atrás el estrés y la desconexión, y vivir momentos increíbles con los que amas.

Ahora bien. Te proponemos lo siguiente: 

Deja atrás la rutina agotadora y únete a nosotros. 
No solo te ofrecemos diversión, sino una oportunidad invaluable para fortalecer tus vínculos con los que quieres y crear con ellos recuerdos de por vida. 

La felicidad no es un lujo, es un derecho. Y mereces experimentarlo a lo grande.

¿Qué esperas? 

Juega, gana y celebra a lo grande! 
Te esperamos en Happyland.

Name: Attachment
Description:
Attachment is a culture & entertainment marketing agency that connects brands with the people defining culture.

We help brands stay relevant by working with the talent, creators and rights holders who influence how audiences think, behave and buy.

Our belief is simple: culture is people powered.

Creators, artists, athletes and thinkers drive attention and shape consumer behaviour more than traditional brand messaging ever has.

We partner with global brands to design, negotiate and deliver talent led work that is both culturally credible and commercially disciplined. Our work spans A-list partnerships, creator ecosystems, live moments, cultural strategy and the sourcing and licensing of music and IP.

Our role is to make talent and creator partnerships seamless. That means independent casting, rigorous negotiation, watertight contracting, rights management and on the ground delivery. We are talent agnostic and never represent talent, ensuring all recommendations are unbiased and built around brand needs.

Our services include:

• Cultural insight and strategy
• Talent and creator casting
• Negotiation, contracting and business affairs
• Music and IP rights procurement
• Campaign, content and live event delivery
• Global governance and commercial frameworks

With teams in London, Dubai and New York, we help brands navigate culture with confidence, pace and precision.

Description:
Family Entertainment Group (FEG) is a premier provider of arcade and family entertainment solutions, specializing in game room operations, arcade management, attraction design, and development. Since 2004, we’ve owned, operated, and managed high-performing game rooms and attractions across the U.S., partnering with resorts, hotels, casinos, waterparks, family entertainment centers (FECs), amusement parks, movie theaters, restaurants, retail destinations, and more.

We combine hands-on operating experience with integrated management systems, data-driven decision making, and best-in-class equipment to maximize revenue, optimize game mix, and keep guest experiences fresh. Our teams handle everything from concept and layout to daily arcade operations, guest service, prize merchandising, and reporting—so our partners can stay focused on their core business.

As a recognized leader in the amusement and entertainment industry, top manufacturers and distributors rely on FEG as a test bed for new games and technology, giving our partners early access to exclusive equipment and unique first-to-market attractions.

FEG is also the creator of the Human Crane Experience—a giant live-action crane game where guests step inside the machine and become the claw—showcasing our commitment to immersive, one-of-a-kind attractions that drive guest engagement and repeat visits.

Description:

Experimentarium er et science center i verdensklasse, og i 2018 blev Experimentarium kåret som et af verdens 100 mest innovative steder af Time Magazine. 

Experimentarium tilbyder børnefamilier, skoler og institutioner masser af muligheder for at gå på opdagelse og lege med naturvidenskaben, og tilbyder dermed læring som ingen andre steder. 

Experimentarium tilbyder også teambuilding og events for virksomheder og Danmarks måske mest inspirerende finurlige og innovative mødefaciliteter. 

Vi har en af Danmarks sjoveste butikker med sjove science-produkter, bøger, gadgets og lækkert design for nysgerrige og legesyge kvalitetsbevidste i alle aldre. Tjek også vores velassorterede, ehandels-mærkede webshop på https://shop.experimentarium.dk. 

Experimentarium har gratis skabsplads, et hyggeligt spisested og i vores madpakkeområder kan du indtage din medbragte mad.

Description: People Media Factory is a production company that specializes in film production, distribution, and technology.

Name: Orange Vélodrome
Description:
L'Orange Vélodrome est la deuxième enceinte la plus importante de France en terme de capacité d'accueil, avec 67 394 places dont 6000 places VIP.

Stade officiel de l'Olympique de Marseille, ce lieu mythique se distingue aussi par la volonté d'organiser des manifestations grand public :
-Evénements sportifs nationaux et internationaux (Euro 2016, Matchs du RCT, Demi-finales du TOP14)
-Concerts et événements musicaux (Paul McCartney, AC/DC, Summer Stadium Festival...)

C'est également, la commercialisation de produits d'hospitalité avec:
-73 loges privatives (67 loges de 16 personnes et 6 loges de 30 personnes)
-Des business Seats situés au centre des tribunes Jean-Bouin et Ganay (Accueil VIP avec accès direct aux tribunes, terrasses privatives, prestations cocktail ou repas gastronomique, parking VIP...)

Enfin, L'Orange Vélodrome, c'est offrir un cadre privilégié pour accueillir des événements d'entreprise (conventions, séminaires, comités de direction, lancements de produits...) 
A cet effet, l'enceinte met à disposition:
-8500 m2 d'espaces événementiels répartis sur 8 salons.
-1 auditorium
-73 loges

Cette configuration permet donc d'organiser tout type d'événement, avec une capacité d'accueil de 10 à 1500 personnes.

L'Orange Vélodrome est aujourd'hui une arène évènementielle phare tant au niveau national qu'européen.

Name: Assembly Atlanta
Description: A pioneering and ambitious development is emerging at Atlanta’s intersection of transit and culture. One that brings together an impressive array of attractions from a spectacular scene of film and tv studios to distinctive retail, residential, and entertainment. All of it set within an imaginative and eclectic mixed-use development and culminating in a community that delights with each discovery. It’s a destination intentionally designed to gather greatly.

Name: Haut.Monde India
Description:
Haut.Monde India is a well-known Group based out of New Delhi, India making its mark in the Entertainment and Hospitality industry since its inception. 
The various verticals at Haut Monde include: 

*Hospitality 
*Beauty Pageant 
*Digital Media 
*Hospitality Consultancy 

Haut Monde Mrs. India Worldwide is one of the leading Beauty Pageants in India that presents a beautiful platform for women across the globe who can participate and showcase their beauty regardless of their age.

After conducting the event for more than a decade across the globe and celebrating Indian women in countries like Greece, United Arab Emirates, Myanmar, Vietnam, Haut Monde Mrs. India Worldwide has already been awarded as Best Beauty Pageant Organizer at an event held at Mumbai 2019. We have also represented India in Thessaloniki International Film Festival  - 2019 which was held in Greece.  
 
Over the years, we have also worked and collaborated with some of the many notable brands from various industries including Dabur,  TTK Prestige, VLCC, Radico Khaitan, BMW, Da Milano, Bharti Taneja’s ALPS, Blossom Kocchar, Hindustan Times, Catch, Bacardi, etc. 

Our associations have also been acknowledged and appreciated by some of the notable names from the industry who have been associated with us in our beauty pageant competitions. A few notable names are, Hema Malini, Rahul Roy, Soha Ali Khan, and Zeenat Aman. 

Over the years, we have also been featured on Jio TV, Awarded by the Tourism of Greece, 
The United Arab Emirates, Myanmar, and Vietnam. 

Haut Monde Hill Stream Wellness Resort is also a part of the Haut Monde India group and introduces itself as a Wellness Retreat. It is a peaceful sanctuary for those seeking an escape from the monotony of a busy, urban existence.

Haut Monde TV is one of the leading digital media platforms of India that focuses on lifestyle and entertainment happenings. We have an average impression of more than 10 lac on our social media platforms.

Name: XYZ Technologies
Description:
XYZ Technologies is a company specializing in audiovisual and experiential design that offers a full range of technological and artistic solutions. Our integrated service offering leverages leading technological innovations to create truly one-of-a-kind experiences. Since 2004, our teams have had the privilege of collaborating with numerous organizations around the world.

We steer projects of varying size and scope, including large-scale endeavors that present the highest degree of technical complexity. Our experience covers international ground, with productions spanning from Canada and the United States to Mexico, the Caribbean, South America, Europe, Asia and the Middle East. 

Our approach is based on close collaboration with our clients to bring their ideas to life by simplifying the use of technology.

Name: Somethin' Else
Description:
We are an audience business

Somethin’ Else is part of Sony Music Entertainment.

Somethin’ Else’s audio team is in the SME Global Podcast Division based in New York, London and Los Angeles. We create hit podcasts and radio shows for audiences around the world and have production teams in the US and UK.

Name: Happy Madison Productions
Description: Happy Madison Productions is an American film and television production company founded in 1999 by Adam Sandler which is best known for its comedy films. In association with Happy Madison which takes its name from the films Happy Gilmore and Billy Madison, two box office successes starring Sandler himself, both produced by Robert Simonds. The elderly man depicted in the production logo is Sandler's late father, Stanley, who also says the accompanying audio, "Terrific."

Name: Movie
Description:

Movie es un referente en la categoría entretenimiento de calidad. Según el último estudio de mercado realizado (CIM & Asociados), ir a Movie es visto como: “mucho más que ir al cine”.

Name: 101 Studios
Description:
101 Studios is a global entertainment company dedicated to the acquisition, financing, development, production and distribution of high-caliber, creator-driven storytelling. Formed by veteran film and television executives David Glasser and David Hutkin in 2019, the studio empowers content creators through first-class collaboration and innovation. 

Inaugural releases include Alfonso Gomez-Rejon’s The Current War, featuring Benedict Cumberbatch and Michael Shannon, Burden featuring Forest Whitaker and Garrett Hedlund and Taylor Sheridan’s modern-day western series for Paramount Network Yellowstone, starring Kevin Costner.

Name: THX Ltd.
Description: Founded by filmmaker George Lucas, THX is at the intersection of media and entertainment, collaborating with filmmakers, video game developers, consumer electronics manufacturers, automakers, movie studios and theatres to develop THX Certified products and next-gen entertainment technologies that deliver immersive entertainment experiences. Products featuring THX are of the highest quality in their class, whether in the cinema, in the home, or on the go.

Name: Blazing Griffin
Description: Blazing Griffin is a BAFTA-winning Glasgow-based digital entertainment company which specialises in storytelling across a wide range of platforms and mediums with a specific focus on video game development, film and TV production and high-end post production services.

Name: DigixArt Studio
Description:
DigixArt is the video game studio behind Road 96, Lost in Harmony and 11-11: Memories Retold. 
The studio is located in South of France in the beautiful city of Montpellier, near the sea.
For all job applications use jobs@digixart.com
Follow us to follow our daily studio life on instagram : digixart_studio

Name: Paramount France
Description: Paramount Global (NASDAQ: PARA, PARAA) est un groupe mondial leader des médias et du divertissement, proposant des contenus et des expériences de qualité aux publics du monde entier. Fort de ses studios, de ses chaînes de télévision et de ses services de streaming, Paramount Global regroupe des marques grand public emblématiques telles que CBS, Showtime Networks, Paramount Pictures, Nickelodeon, MTV, Comedy Central, BET, Paramount+, Pluto TV et Simon & Schuster. Le groupe bénéficie de la plus grande part de l’audience TV aux US et détient l’un des plus importants catalogues TV et cinéma du secteur. En plus d'offrir des services de streaming et des produits vidéo innovants, Paramount Global dispose de solides capacités de production, de distribution et de solutions publicitaires.

Name: Television Academy Foundation
Description:
The Television Academy Foundation inspires tomorrow’s Emmy winners today. We’re shaping the future of television by leading important industry conversations through thought-provoking panels, hands-on internships, and real opportunities for the next wave of professionals to grow. 

Established in 1959 as the charitable arm of the Television Academy, the Foundation has nurtured thousands of talented students, providing essential resources that help them discover their voices, refine their skills and forge rewarding careers in every sector of the television industry. Foundation alumni include prominent writers, producers, documentarians, creative executives, network presidents, and more.


The Foundation prepares leaders and storytellers through our preeminent programs:

Our Internship Program annually provides 50 students from across the nation with hands-on work experience, mentorships, and opportunities for accelerated career development in more than 30 categories.

The Media Educators Conference brings 100+ college educators from across the country to Los Angeles for a multi-day immersive event that provides invaluable information on how professors can connect the classroom with the television industry.

The College Television Awards recognize and reward excellence in student-produced television from colleges and universities across the country, providing both recognition and professional development opportunities for winners and nominees.

The Interviews: An Oral History of Television preserves the history of television through oral histories and provides an invaluable research platform to students, professionals, teachers, and the public at large.

The Power of TV inspires both industry professionals and the public with panel discussions that celebrate the power of television to inspire social change.

Access: Behind the Screens is the Television Academy Foundation's free master class offering behind-the-scenes access to the television industry.

Name: LIFT Aircraft
Description: WE BELIEVE IN A FUTURE WHERE EVERYONE CAN FLY...   and that future is starting right now. You may not believe it yet - but you will. Personal flight is one of humanity's most enduring aspirations, but has historically only been available to a privileged few with the money, time, and skill to fly traditional aircraft. We're making the joy and utility of personal, vertical flight accessible to everyone.

Name: WTorre Entretenimento
Description: WTorre Entretenimento is one of the newest companies of the WTorre Group, conglomerate with more than 40 years of experience in the construction market, responsible for building more than 8 million square feet in Brazil and abroad, with some iconic works like: JK Iguatemi, Allianz Parque and the restoration of the Parque do Povo. The new business is focused on venues/multipurpose arenas management and live entertainment content creation.

Name: NIVA - National Independent Venue Association
Description:
National Independent Venue Association (NIVA) is securing financial support to preserve the national ecosystem of independent venues and promoters. 

These entertainment hubs are critical to their local economies and tax bases as employers, tourism destinations, and revenue generators for neighboring businesses such as restaurants, hotels, and retail. Independent venues exist in every state across the country; they were the first to be closed, they will be the last to open. The economic recovery process will extend past just reopening the front doors, requiring solutions unique to the industry.

Name: Gravity Well

Name: Recorcholis Grupo Diniz
Description: RECORCHOLIS is the biggest LATAM Family Entertainment Center chain with 51 locations, with over 50,000m2 of space and over 24 million visitors per year.

Name: Fanfix
Description: Fanfix is an exclusive content platform empowering creators to do what they love while earning from it. Fostering a safe and brand-friendly environment for creators and fans to engage together is the central point of what we do. We are the home of over 7 million fans worldwide who interact daily with their favorite creators via engaging with their posts, messaging them directly, tipping, and more. Fanfix strives to improve creator & fan experiences by pioneering a new medium for fan and creator interactions.

Name: PopArt Music
Description:
PopArt Music es un grupo empresarial líder formado por profesionales con más de 25 años de experiencia en la industria de la música, que ha trabajado con varios de los artistas más importantes del mundo. 
Desarrolla integralmente conciertos, festivales, espectáculos teatrales y eventos en toda América Latina. Además, PopArt ha desarrollado junto a sus clientes nuevos conceptos y estrategias para sus marcas, generando un vínculo fuerte y relaciones a largo plazo.
Location: Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires, CABA

Name: Ultra Digital Studio Pvt.Ltd.
Description:
Ultra Studio & Digital Lab is a division of the parent company Ultra Media & Entertainment Pvt. Ltd. which offers world-class Post Production services for the entertainment industry not just in India, but also all over the world. From Scanning, Digitization and Restoration to 3D Conversion and VFX, we provide everything under the sun for your Post-Production & Film Preservation needs.

What makes us different from other studios is our attitude for achieving quality output in every project we undertake. Backed by several years of experience, world-class technology and a professional team, we have become one of the most trusted post production studios with several happy clients.

Over the years, Ultra has mastered the techniques of film restoration and colorisation like nobody else. Catching the pulse of modern trends and technologies in the Entertainment industry has been our trump card. There is no stopping us as we move along with what's now and trending.

Learning is a continual process which we believe in. We keep in mind all the specifications and requirements of our clients and aim at delivering nothing less than the best, be it aesthetically or technically. Our team consists of highly qualified professionals and are always ready to understand what the project needs.

Name: Untitled Entertainment
Description: Untitled Entertainment is a management company with offices in New York and Los Angeles that represents top tier talent working in all areas of the industry including film, TV, theater, digital media, and music.

Name: WOLF
Description:
WOLF Qanawat is the leading social entertainment app, serving the Arabic-speaking market. We have 17 years' experience creating world-class apps, and we lead the way in building virtual world communities, with core skills in community engagement, gamification and monetisation.

What We Make
WOLF Qanawat is a live interaction platform for the Arab world, full of audio entertainment communities called Channels.

How It Works
Users explore the Channels to take part in entertaining shows, enjoy engaging in communities with shared interests, build friendships and find a role.

The Results
Over 4 million Arabs have used the platform, with the community producing 8,000+ hours per month of original programmes, with a business model based on users buying a range of virtual items and levelling up their social status.

Position In The Market
WOLF Qanawat brings the power of community to Arabic audio. Uniquely combining 3 powerful market sectors – audio broadcast, live chat & entertaining communities.

What We Offer
We are home to the largest real-time interactive online communities in the MENA region, giving users the chance to perform live to 1,000s, getting live interaction and gifting. This generates incredible loyalty and feeling of belonging.

Totally Unique
Users entertain and engage with each other live on virtual stages purpose-built for the Arab world. They can even share their best moments across the Internet with 3D Metaverse videos of their events.

Strategic Partners
We use our world-leading expertise in online community platforms to create digital experiences for Strategic Partners in our core region.

We are WOLF
The tech company shaping the future of rewards-based social community interaction. Follow us on LinkedIn and keep in touch.

Name: Blanc!
Description:
Blanc! es mucho más que un festival de diseño.
Es un punto de encuentro para profesionales del diseño, la creatividad y la innovación que sienten que evolucionar es mejor hacerlo acompañados.

Nacido en 2009 y creado por diseñadores y para diseñadores, Blanc! ayuda a reconectar con la profesión desde lo humano: compartiendo procesos reales, referentes honestos y conversaciones que van más allá del portfolio perfecto. Aquí se viene a salir del bloqueo, a contrastar ideas, a ganar perspectiva y a recordar por qué empezaste en esto.

Blanc! combate la soledad creativa, el síndrome del impostor y la sensación de estancamiento profesional creando comunidad, inspiración colectiva y energía compartida. No ofrece recetas mágicas, sino experiencias que te empujan a mirar distinto, a cuestionarte y a dar el siguiente paso con más claridad y confianza.

Con ediciones en Barcelona (octubre) y Madrid (mayo), Blanc! reúne a estudios, freelancers, agencias y mentes inquietas que buscan diseño con alma, conexiones reales y evolución profesional.

Name: Dev Entertainment Ventures
Description:
“We don’t make movies, we tell stories” – This is the vision with what we started out as a feature film production company. This is our dream. Our goal. We work to our fullest every day to make this into reality. We strive to bring forth the most entertaining films into the world of Bengali cinema.
Started by actor Dev, his dream was put forth into motion by us and it still goes strong. “Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower” – is a famous quote by icon Steve Jobs which we take to our hearts to create modern cinema unlike anyone else. This is what everyone expects in a new film. And that is exactly what we serve. Action? Check. Drama? Just about enough. Comedy? Plentiful. Romance? Of course we love that. Is it entertaining? You bet.
We started our journey with our debut feature Chaamp, an inspiring movie about boxing. We followed it by Cockpit, a thrilling movie unlike anything before which is based on a true airplane incident. Soon came Kabir, a thought provoking insight into terrorism, war, and peaceful coexistence. Our latest outing Hoichoi Unlimited, is a laugh out riot featuring an ensemble cast and lots of love. Our upcoming project Subhashini Mistry is a biographical film based on the brave story of Subhashini Mistry, a Padma Shri receiver, who is considered as an “Unsung and Unknown Heroine” of India.
Dev Entertainment Ventures is a pioneer at promoting its content in the social and digital media. Be it an array of graphic posters or out of the box promotional videos, the social media pages of Dev Entertainment Ventures are the hottest and hippest in the industry today. Add to that our ground breaking promotional events which constantly creates buzz among the cine-goers.

Name: Toei Animation Europe
Description:
Toei Animation Europe (TAEU) is the European subsidiary of Toei Animation Co Ltd - leading japanese animation studio created in 1956 in Tokyo.
The company is in charge of distributing the complete titles portfolio on TV, DVD and Merchandising in EMEA. Since 2012 TAEU has also expanded its activities as TV and Merchanisng rigths representative for 3rd party producer and licensor.

Name: Museu de Arte do Rio
Description:
O Museu de Arte do Rio promove uma leitura transversal da história da cidade, seu tecido social, sua vida simbólica, conflitos, contradições, desafios e expectativas sociais. Suas exposições unem dimensões históricas e contemporâneas da arte por meio de mostras de longa e curta duração, de âmbito nacional e internacional. O museu surge também com a missão de inscrever a arte no ensino público, por meio da Escola do Olhar.

O MAR está instalado na Praça Mauá, em dois prédios de perfis heterogêneos e interligados: o Palacete Dom João VI, tombado e eclético, e o edifício vizinho, de estilo modernista – originalmente um terminal rodoviário. O antigo palacete abriga as salas de exposição do museu. O prédio vizinho é o espaço da Escola do Olhar, que é um ambiente para produção e provocação de experiências, coletivas e pessoais, com foco principal na formação de educadores da rede pública de ensino.

Como recomenda a UNESCO, o MAR tem atividades que envolvem coleta, registro, pesquisa, preservação e devolução à comunidade de bens culturais – sob a forma de exposições, catálogos, programas em multimeios e educacionais. Com sua própria coleção – já em processo de formação por meio de aquisições e doações correspondentes à sua agenda – o MAR conta também com empréstimos de obras de algumas das melhores coleções públicas e privadas do Brasil para a execução de seu programa.

O MAR, inaugurado em março de 2013, funciona como um espaço proativo de apoio à educação e trabalha em parceria com a Secretaria Municipal de Educação do Rio de Janeiro e outras secretarias de Educação. A Escola do Olhar desenvolve um programa acadêmico, construído em colaboração com universidades, para discutir arte, cultura da imagem, educação e práticas curatoriais.

Name: MEGALIS
Description: Megalis is a global VFX studio that was founded in 2017 in Tokyo and quickly became the premiere VFX studio in Japan.   We also have an office in Avignon, close to our roots in Animation.

Name: CANAL+ Polska
Description:
Grupa CANAL+ Polska jest wiodącym wydawcą oraz nadawcą kanałów telewizyjnych segmentu premium jak również agregatorem oraz drugim największym dystrybutorem pakietów płatnej telewizji w Polsce obsługującym około 2,7 mln klientów (dane na 31 grudnia 2019 r.). CANAL+ Polska jest także nadawcą własnych kanałów tematycznych.

CANAL+ Polska jest operatorem Platformy CANAL+, oferującej pakiety telewizji, które obejmują zarówno własne kanały telewizyjne jak i kanały podmiotów trzecich, ze szczególnym uwzględnieniem segmentu premium. Dzięki swoim własnym dwunastu kanałom telewizyjnym premium pod marką CANAL+ oraz starannie wyselekcjonowanym kanałom premium podmiotów trzecich Platforma CANAL+ oferuje swoim klientom najbogatsze doświadczenia związane z telewizją premium na polskim rynku płatnej telewizji. Flagowe programy telewizyjne CANAL+ Polska są oferowane pod marką CANAL+ i zapewniają dostęp do szerokiego zakresu produkcji telewizyjnych, w tym transmisji sportowych, filmów fabularnych i dokumentalnych oraz seriali.

Za pośrednictwem Kino Świat, CANL+ Polska jest również zaangażowana w dystrybucję filmów do kin. Z udziałem w rynku wynoszącym około 20% Kino Świat jest jedną z wiodących spółek dystrybuujących filmy w Polsce. Kino Świat posiada bogaty katalog treści programowych obejmujący 2.400 produkcji, co przekłada się na ponad 5.000 godzin treści filmowych i telewizyjnych, w tym w dużej mierze produkcji polskich.

W maju 2020 r. CANAL+ Polska uruchomiła CANAL+ (OTT), innowacyjną usługę stworzoną w odpowiedzi na rosnące zapotrzebowanie na nielinearne treści programowe. Usługa ta oferuje dostęp do kanałów linearnych i treści programowych na żądanie, takich jak filmy, seriale, wydarzenia sportowe, lifestyle, treści programowe skierowane do dzieci.

Name: Ridley Scott Creative Group

We are part of OverActive Media Corporation, recognised as one of the 12 biggest esports organisations worldwide by Forbes, a Canadian Esports and Entertainment group.

Description:
Unlimited Productions is a full service production company offering technical-, creative concepts, high-end designs and quality event productions. With a diverse client portfolio consisting of event organizations, multinationals and event promoters the company is active on an international scale within the field of live communication, such as; corporate events, public events, sports and artists-/ tour management. 

A service company for audiovisual related solutions such as sound, light, video, rigging, staging, structures, professional crew and site equipment. Following the four fase blueprint with a key focus on event- and production management, Unlimited Productions accompanies her clients from definition to concept, into pre-production and technical Production. With an extensive network of high quality suppliers, operators and designers, Unlimited Productions can offer the best technical solutions for the budget available.

By uniting diverse expertise, we push boundaries, amplify impact, and bring visionary ideas to life, transforming the way audiences connect, engage, and remember.

Name: GRUPO EDITORIAL PLANETA
Description: Editorial

Name: Random Golf Club
Description: We all know the best part of golf isn't always the score, it's the places you go and the people you meet along the way. From our events to our stories, everything we do is built around making the game more open, a lot more fun, and something that sticks with you long after the final putt.

Name: The Sunshine Company
Description:
Sunshine is a strategic consultancy, design studio, and creative agency specialised in the convergence of brand and entertainment.

The diverse and growing team has been the creative force behind some of the most groundbreaking interactive narrative titles to date.

BVE offers an unparalleled scope of services that include the production of some of the country's most popular TV programming and feature films, the marketing and distribution of a rich entertainment library and access to state-of-the-art design and post production facilities staffed by the industry's most creative visual and sound designers and technicians.

Name: Winner Group S.A. - CIRSA Colombia
Description:
Somos WINNER GROUP S.A. una organización sólida, en permanente expansión, dedicada al entretenimiento, filial en Colombia de la multinacional española CIRSA. Superamos las expectativas de nuestros clientes a través de la innovación, la calidad de nuestros servicios y un equipo humano con alta capacidad de gestión. Trabajamos con compromiso para el beneficio de nuestros colaboradores, accionistas y la sociedad.

En WINNER GROUP S.A.  nos comprometemos a suministrar servicios en las mejores condiciones de calidad para satisfacer oportunamente las necesidades de entretenimiento de nuestros clientes, soportado en un talento humano motivado y calificado con procesos ágiles y uniformes, manteniendo buenas relaciones con el entorno, en un marco de Responsabilidad Social Empresarial; y dentro de la filosofía de mejoramiento continuo.

Name: Jigsaw Productions
Description:
Jigsaw Productions is helmed by Academy Award-winning filmmaker Alex Gibney, considered one of the most prolific and thought-provoking documentary filmmakers of our generation.

Jigsaw has produced some of the most acclaimed documentary films in recent years, including the explosive and highly popularized "Going Clear: Scientology and the Prison of Belief," one of the most watched documentaries in HBO’s history; the Academy and Emmy Award-winning "Taxi to the Dark Side"; the Oscar-nominated "Enron: The Smartest Guys in the Room"; the multiple Emmy Award-winning "Mea Maxima Culpa: Silence in the House of God"; Showtime’s Emmy-winning "History of the Eagles," the controversial "We Steal Secrets: The Story of Wikileaks"; and the provocative film about Lance Armstrong’s fall from grace, "The Armstrong Lie."

Description:
Established in 2003, eclipse Staging Services is a leading, multi-disciplined supplier of technical production services to the live events industry. 

Based in Dubai and active throughout the entire GCC, eclipse Staging Services has built an extensive inventory of high quality equipment over the years, comprising of a variety of lighting, audio, video, laser, interactive and power distribution equipment; enabling us to continuously develop our expertise in project management, equipment rental and technical services.

eclipse Staging Services has a well-earned reputation for creativity, commitment and client satisfaction.

Part of the PSAV Family of Companies

Name: Mars Cinema Group
Description:
Mars Cinema Group is by far the largest operator of movie theaters in Turkey operating 74 multiplexes in 28 provinces under the Cinemaximum brand. The company has a box office market share of 50%, a cinema advertising market share of over 90% and is the leading distributor of movies in the country. 

In June 2016, the company was sold to the CJ Group of Korea for a total consideration of US$800 million, making it one of the largest private equity exits to-date in Turkey and one of the most sizeable transactions in the cinema space globally.

Name: The Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre
Description: The Upright Citizens Brigade (UCB) is the comedy powerhouse founded by Amy Poehler, Matt Besser, Ian Roberts and Matt Walsh. We run two theatres in New York and two in LA, where we feature improv, sketch and standup seven nights a week. We also operate one of the largest improv training centers in the country, with classroom facilities on both coasts. In addition to our classes and live comedy performances, we work with brands, ad agencies, media companies and universities. We run a branded content unit/TV production studio, plus a touring company that performs at theatres and colleges. And our improv workshops are the de facto standard for corporate training. For more information, go to www.UCBindustries.com.

Name: Crypto.com Arena
Description:
Crypto.com Arena has undoubtedly developed an unrivaled reputation for excellence having established itself as one of the world’s busiest and most successful venues in the world. Since opening on October 17, 1999, with Bruce Springsteen and the E Street, millions of guests have come to the AEG-owned and operated Crypto.com Arena to attend a schedule of prestigious concerts, sporting events, award shows, family shows and other major attractions unmatched by any arena.

As the home of three professional sports franchises, the NBA’s Los Angeles Lakers, the NHL’s Los Angeles Kings, and the WNBA’s Los Angeles Sparks, Crypto.com Arena has proven to be a home court advantage for the local teams with the Lakers capturing six NBA Championships and the Kings winning two Stanley Cup titles since 1999, while the Sparks captured back-to-back WNBA Championships in their first two Crypto.com Arena campaigns and brought home their third WNBA Championship in 2016. 

Crypto.com Arena continues to distinguish itself as the host of major, high-profile events of national and international distinction including the 2004, 2011 & 2018 NBA All-Star Weekends, the 2002 & 2017 NHL All-Star Games and 2010 NHL Draft, 2002 U.S. Figure Skating Championships, the 2000 Democratic National Convention, 2009 ISU World Figure Skating Championships, dozens of GRAMMY Award shows, 11 X Games competitions, 4 WTA Tour Championships, 12 Pac 12 Men’s Basketball Championship tournaments,  2013 & 2018 NCAA Division I Men's Basketball Championship West Regional, the Michael Jackson Public Memorial Service on July 7, 2009, Nipsey Hussle’s Celebration of Life on April 11, 2019 and Celebration of Life for Kobe and Gianna Bryant on February 24, 2020.

Name: MyMusicTaste
Description: MyMusicTaste (MMT) is a pioneering platform dedicated to fulfilling the wishes of K-pop fans around the globe. As an all-rounder in the music industry, MMT empowers fans by transforming their voices into action. By leveraging fan-initiated campaigns, MMT brings top-tier K-pop artists to cities worldwide, bridging the gap between artists and their global audiences. MMT's mission extends beyond concert planning; with the newly-launched MMT App, MMT aims to create immersive, fan-centric experiences, and exclusive content that resonate deeply with the K-pop community. Additionally, MMT also offers a wide range of K-pop albums and exclusive merchandise, providing fans with unique and memorable collectibles. Through innovative technology and a passion for music, MMT is committed to reshaping the landscape of fan engagement and setting new standards in the entertainment industry.

Name: Huevocartoon
Description:
Huevocartoon and its characters hold proudly a privilege position among the spanish speaking web surfers around the world. 

Our audience from 5 to 40+ years recognize us perfectly and enjoys our creativity, innovation and the personality of our characters.

The brand Huevocartoon its considered in the classics segment, meaning that even when it has some popularity peaks (E.g. the movie), during the rest of the time it doesn’t disappears and maintains an optimum recognition level, and for that we’ve counted with several promotions and products with important brands Frito Lay, Pepsi, Blockbuster, Renault, Oxy, BFGoodrich, Telcel, Kellogg´s, Mattel, Bic, Kimberly Clark and Pronosticos in addition to more than 40 licensed products throughout the market.

In 2006, Comunidad Huevo releases it’s first feature film “Una película de Huevos” which became the most successful “family rated” film in Mexico’s movie history, and the 2nd among all with more that 4 million people and more that 14º million in the box office. This release extended the age range of our audience to the 3 year olds that since, have our characters in their favorites, and let us bring licensed products that dads buy for then because of their innocent, fun and attractive characteristics.

In 2009, the sequel for the movie was released, entitled “Otra Película de Huevos y un Pollo” in national theaters these days and after 10 weeks of success, it has surpassed some of the records settled by the first film. This film is already licensed by several international brands that have product and promotional campaigns with its characters like Hasbro, KFC, Jumex, Kellogg’s y Mattel among others.

This year, additionally, we launch and promote a new brand, named “HuevoKids” attending in a permanent way the children community (below 5 years) with new and attractive characters which we are sure that  a lot of them will relate with.

Name: AAE Speakers Bureau
Description:
AAE Speakers Bureau is a full-service speakers bureau and talent agency that exclusively represents the interests of meeting and event professionals to select, book and execute events with keynote speakers and entertainment to leave a lasting impact on their audiences. We work tirelessly for event professionals as their centralized, trusted, and impartial partner in the talent booking process.

With our expansive industry experience and exceptional customer support, AAE has connected nearly 20,000 events with their perfect speaker, host, celebrity, or performer since 2002. We have booked over $450M of celebrity talent on behalf of thousands of the most respected companies and organizations in the world.

For more information about AAE Speakers Bureau, please visit allamericanspeakers.com or call 1-800-698-2536.

Name: Live Performance Australia
Description:
LPA is the peak body for Australia’s live performance industry. Established 100 years ago in 1917 and registered as an employers’ organisation under the Fair Work (Registered Organisations) Act 2009, LPA has over 400 Members nationally. We represent commercial producers, music promoters, major performing arts companies, small to medium companies, independent producers, major performing arts centres, metropolitan and regional venues, commercial theatres, stadiums and arenas, arts festivals, music festivals, and service providers such as ticketing companies and technical suppliers. Our membership spans from small-medium and not-for-profit organisations to large commercial entities.

LPA has a clear mandate to advocate for and support policy decisions that benefit the sustainability and growth of the live performance industry in Australia.

Name: Fast Travel Games
Description:
Fast Travel Games is a game developer & publisher located in Stockholm, Sweden, building virtual reality games. Founded by game development veterans with years behind us at studios like EA DICE, Rovio and Avalanche, we want to change the way you play. We're gamers by heart, and believe VR is the ultimate platform for deep, engrossing game universes.

Our mission is to build games where players are free to explore their surroundings, where they will experience rich narratives and interact with others in new and interesting ways.

Name: Ellation (now Crunchyroll)
Description:
Crunchyroll connects anime and manga fans across 200+ countries and territories with the content and experiences they love. In addition to free ad-supported and subscription premium content, Crunchyroll serves the anime community across events, theatrical, games, consumer products, collectibles and manga publishing.
 
Anime fans have access to one of the largest collections of licensed anime through Crunchyroll and translated in multiple languages for viewers worldwide. Viewers can also access simulcasts — top series available immediately after Japanese broadcast. 

The Crunchyroll app is available on over 15 platforms, including all gaming consoles.

Crunchyroll, LLC is an independently operated joint venture between US-based Sony Pictures Entertainment, and Japan’s Aniplex, a subsidiary of Sony Music Entertainment (Japan) Inc., both subsidiaries of Tokyo-based Sony Group Corporation.

Name: Drishyam Films
Description:
Drishyam Films is a motion picture studio headquartered in Mumbai, India. Founded by Manish Mundra, Drishyam Films is a company that aims to build a platform for unique voices of Indian independent cinema and create global content with rich Indian flavours.

Their first film was the award-winning Ankhon Dekhi directed by Rajat Kapoor. The success of Ankhon Dekhi was followed by Umrika directed by Prashant Nair which premiered at the Sundance Film Festival 2015 and won the Audience Choice Award in the World Dramatic Competition section. [1] Soon after, Dhanak directed by Nagesh Kukunoor not only premiered in the Generation Kplus at the Berlinal International Film Festival 2015, but also won the Grand Jury prize, as well as a Special Mention from the Children’s Jury. [2] Dhanak released across India on 10 June 2016. The success at Sundance and Berlin was followed by Masaan directed by Neeraj Ghaywan, that premiered in the Un Certain Regard section at Cannes 2015 and brought home laurels by winning the Un Certain Regard Promising Future Prize and FIPRESCI Award. [3] The film had a great theatrical run of six weeks in India and picked up a bunch of critics and audience choice awards, including Filmfare Award and National Award for Best Debut. Waiting directed by Anu Menon, premiered in the 'Cinema of the World' program at the prestigious Dubai International Film Festival 2015 [4] released across India on 27 May 2016. 
In 2017 their films included Newton, Rukh and Kadvi Hawa.
Newton starring Rajkumar Rao in the titular role premiered at the Berlin International Film Festival 2017 where it won the CICAE Art Cinema Award. It released in India on September 22, 2017 to critical acclaim and went on to become a breakout box-office success, as well as India’s official Foreign Language entry to the Academy Awards 2018.

Name: MDS - Marina del Sol
Description:
Somos MDS, una de las cadenas de Hoteles y Casinos más grandes de Chile, distribuidos en las ciudades de Calama, Chillán, Talcahuano y Osorno. Queremos que te diviertas y puedas disfrutar de la mejor gastronomía, conciertos, teatro, discotheque y mucho más. En casinos encontrarás espectáculos y diversión, miles de máquinas de juego. 
En nuestros hoteles buscamos generar experiencias positivas para lograr tu preferencia, entregando un servicio ágil y fresco, y así garantizar que nos vuelvas a visitar.

Trabaja con nosotros! Te invitamos a ser parte de una experiencia única, positiva y memorable.

Name: Plural Entertainment España
Description:
Nacida en el seno del Grupo Prisa en 2001, Plural Entertainment es actualmente una de las productoras audiovisuales más importantes del mercado español. La compañía dispone de oficinas en España (Madrid, Zaragoza, Canarias y Asturias), Estados Unidos (Miami), Portugal (Lisboa), Argentina (Buenos Aires), Brasil (São Paulo) y Angola (Luanda).

Plural Entertainment produce programas de todos los géneros audiovisuales: entretenimiento, ficción, documentales. Nuestros proyectos se distinguen por la originalidad de los guiones, el moderno tratamiento de la imagen y una cuidada realización. Con un criterio de trabajo basado en la calidad y la audiencia, Plural Entertainment cuenta entre sus clientes a las principales televisiones españolas nacionales y autonómicas. Desde nuestras oficinas en Miami proveemos de contenidos a las televisiones hispanas de Estados Unidos y todo el mercado Latinoamericano. Nuestra estructura, moderna, dinámica y flexible, se adapta a los costes, los plazos y las necesidades de producción de nuestros clientes. El departamento de Distribución Internacional de Plural Entertainment comercializa nuestros contenidos por todo el mundo y está presente en los principales mercados audiovisuales internacionales.

Name: Funarte
Description:
Em 1975, com a finalidade de promover, estimular, desenvolver atividades culturais em todo o Brasil criou-se a Fundação Nacional de Arte – Funarte. Nesta época suas atividades englobavam música (popular e erudita) e artes plásticas e visuais. Convivia com o Instituto Nacional de Folclore – INF, Fundação Nacional de Artes Cênicas – Fundacen e a Fundação do Cinema Brasileiro – FCB, todas ligadas ao Ministério da Educação e Cultura, posteriormente transformado em Ministério da Cultura.

Em Março de 1990, ao assumir a presidência, Collor extinguiu todas as instituições culturais. Em Dezembro criou o Instituto Brasileiro de Arte e Cultura – IBAC – ligado diretamente à Secretaria de Cultura da Presidência da República (que depois voltou a ser, novamente, Ministério). O IBAC englobava a Funarte, Fundacen, e FCB. Em 1994 a sigla Funarte substituiu a sigla IBAC.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: D-BOX Technologies
Description:
About D-BOX
D-BOX redefines and creates hyper-realistic, immersive entertainment experiences by moving the body and sparking the imagination through motion. This expertise is one of the reasons why D-BOX has collaborated with some of the best companies in the world to deliver new ways to enhance great stories. Whether it’s movies, video games, virtual reality applications, themed entertainment or professional simulation, D-BOX will make sure, you feel it all. 
D-BOX Technologies Inc. is a publicly traded Canadian company listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: DBO).  The head office is located in Montreal and offices are based in Los Angeles, USA and Beijing, China. www.d-box.com.

Name: Pirate Land
Description:
What Is Pirate Land?
Pirate Land is a profitable NFT multiplayer role-playing game built on Binance Smart Chain. Inspired by the Pirate culture, the team concentrates on creating a combination of NFT gaming and Metaverse, where users can have fun and earn simultaneously. The upcoming Pirate Metaverse consists of a pirate-themed multiplayer role-playing game with highly skill-required gameplay, an NFT marketplace, and NFT collectibles. Immersing into the Pirate World, players will be able to sail a pirate ship, battle other Pirates, claim rewards, own Metalands, and trade NFT pirate ships on Pirate Land’s Marketplace. The game will offer a variety of game modes such as daily missions, PvP, Treasure Hunter. Players can experience all of these different modes in the game. Weekly and monthly events will also be held to provide players with a more diverse experience in the Pirate Metaverse.
Building sophisticated Pirate ships represented in three-dimensional and AR technology graphics, Pirate Land’s creators aim to provide players unforgettable experiences and an opportunity to have fun and make a profit simultaneously.
Pirate Land’s roadmap target is to hold Ship NFT sale, IDO event, release Marketplace and Staking function in December of 2021. There will be a game release event with many prizes in the first quarter of 2022.

What Makes Pirate Land Unique?
Pirate Land is developed with three-dimensional graphics and skill-focused gameplay, providing players a playground to compete with each other internationally and earn rewards.
Pirate Land is created by an experienced team on technology and video games. Pirate Land sets the goal to become a Decentralized Automated Organization where the community plays a central government role.
Renting is one of the exciting and vital functions in the game, making the game accessible to many people as well as one of the ways to help players make a profit in the game.

Name: DCI Events & Entertainment
Description:
DCI Events & Entertainment was founded under the idea of putting on the best concerts the island has ever seen. Bringing down the best artists in the world to Sri Lanka and putting our little country in the Entertainment map. 

Inquiries: info@dci.lk

Name: Stade Atlantique Bordeaux Métropole
Description:
Inauguré en 2015, le Stade Atlantique accueille de grands événements sportifs et culturels.
D’une capacité de 42 000 places, il a accueilli l’EURO 2016, le XV de France, le Top 14, la Coupe du Monde de Rugby 2023, Céline Dion, Ed Sheeran, Muse…
Il est aujourd’hui géré en direct par Bordeaux Métropole.
Au delà des matchs et des concerts, le stade accueille également tout au long de l’année des événements d’entreprise. 
Séminaires, salons, réunions d’entreprise… sont organisés dans les nombreux espaces réceptifs du stade :

- 7 salons modulables (d'une capacité de 300 à 1000 places) 
- 1 auditorium de 252 places
- et bien d'autres espaces...

Name: Gröna Lunds Tivoli AB
Description: Gröna Lund is the oldest amusement park in Sweden and part of the Parks & Resorts Scandinavia theme park Group, together with Kolmården, Furuvik and Skara Sommarland. Gröna Lund offers 30 attractions, six restaurants, numerous lottery and pentathlon stalls, plus food and snack stands. Gröna Lund also offers a wide range of entertainment including concerts, dance evenings and children’s entertainment. The amusement park employs approx. 1,400 employees during the course of a season, receives around 1.4 million guests per year and generates a turnover of approximately SEK 500 million, making Gröna Lund one of Sweden’s leading tourist attractions.

Name: Brunswick Bowling Products LLC
Description: For more than a century, Brunswick has been the world leader in bowling center equipment and new bowling center development. Brunswick is known throughout the world for the quality and reputation of its products and services. No other equipment manufacturer has contributed so much ingenuity to the game for so long. And that tradition of game-changing innovation continues to this day. Brunswick is the only full-line resource that offers a complete and comprehensive package of products and services to support your new business development project from day one and continue through day-to-day operations. With Brunswick, you’ll have everything you need to make your new center competitive, successful, and innovative. Brunswick offers today’s new center investors various opportunities to achieve their goals. No other single-source provider comes close to Brunswick’s record for supporting successful new center development projects. Today, over half of all new bowling centers in more than 100 countries are supported by Brunswick’s full line of comprehensive products, services, technology, and expertise.

Name: COMICAVE
Description:
COMICAVE TOYS AND GAMES TRADING (“COMICAVE”) is the World’s largest pop culture superstore involved in the retail and distribution of high-end collectibles, pop-culture merchandise, apparels, novelty items and likes. With 17,000 sq. ft. of retail space initially planned, we have turned a basic retail store into a more elaborate concept destination designed to attract crowds of varying age and interest, bringing them to a whole new world previously not available here in the region.

The company addresses the increasing demand for entertainment and pop-culture needs of the people. Inside, we carry a variety of names, brands and items that will cater to the popular arts, one of which will have to be the collectibles category.

High end collectibles pertains to statues, sculptures, action figures, prop replicas and memorabilia of the most recognized intellectual properties from notable studios around the world. These items are released globally on extremely limited quantities authenticated with certificates issued by the manufacturers. Due to its inherent scarcity, value of these items go up in time similar to works of art.

The shop per se is also being designed to have a dedicated space for gamers to get together and play at the store. Nicknamed “THE VAULT”, COMICAVE will soon introduce a number of events including cosplay, gaming tournaments, model kits competitions, screenings, workshops, lectures etc. In addition, on-going designs are being made to facilitate the café’/lounge area to be situated near the shop’s entrance.

Name: Big Fish Entertainment
Description:
THE FISH...
Big Fish Entertainment is a full service production company that creates multi-platform, visually driven content that compels and entertains audiences with the “unexpected.” Founded in 2006 by President Dan Cesareo, Big Fish has since produced hundreds of hours of award-winning and top-rated programming in the unscripted reality, lifestyle and documentary space. Current Big Fish series include groundbreaking docu-series Live PD for A&E, offering viewers unfiltered live access inside policing in America; bold dating series Date Night Live for Lifetime; mega-hit franchise Black Ink Crew New York and Chicago for VH1;Tattoo Girls for TLC and culinary docu-series Hustle & Soul for WE tv. With other credits including Bomb Patrol: Afghanistan and the Gates Foundation Reality PD public schools project, Big Fish captures and relates extraordinary worlds, characters and stories for such networks as Lifetime, A&E, VH1, WE tv, Discovery, TLC, MTV, E!, National Geographic, Oxygen, Travel Channel and Spike. Name: The Film India Directory - Indian Film and Music Industry Contact Directory
Description:
Updated Information is one of the key ingredients in the success of Film India Directory. It consists of 337 Categories which includes the Names, Addresses, Contact Numbers, Email-Ids and Websites of all the people connected with the Indian Film & Music Industry in a Book & CD format.

Description: Wayfarer Studios, forged by a partnership between Justin Baldoni (Jane The Virgin, Five Feet Apart) and Steve Sarowitz (4S Bay/Paylocity), is a creative and financial engine that produces radically sincere film and television content that is platform and genre agnostic. Outside its success in the domestic content marketplace, A. Smith & Co. has been very successful in exporting its programming internationally, with formats sold to well over 120 territories. In 2011, A. In 2016, A. Smith & Co. Productions launched three divisions: A. Smith & Co. Dox, the company’s documentary and factual programming arm; A. Smith & Co. Entertainment, which houses the company’s wide variety of entertainment programming; and A. Smith & Co. Sports, its sports entertainment arm. 

The vast lineup of A. Smith & Co. programming includes some of the most innovative, well known, and highly rated series in the reality, documentary, and non-fiction spaces. Current programming includes “Hell's Kitchen” (Fox) -- currently in its 18th season of production – Emmy-nominated “American Ninja Warrior,” “The Titan Games” (NBC), “Unsung (TV One), “Ninja Vs Ninja” (USA), “NFL Pro Bowl Skills Showdown” (ESPN), “SciJinks” (Discovery), “Death By Magic” (Netflix), “Last State Standing” (Facebook),“24/B4,” and “Crashing the Course” (NBC Digital), “Oh My Josh!” (Freeform) and “Mr. Impossible” (Uninterrupted.com).

Name: EISKO
Description:
EISKO is a 3D scanning company specialized in the 3D capture and reconstruction of Digital Humans and Digital Doubles. 

Known for the hyper-realism of our characters, we create 3D Digital Humans from A to Z for every scenario whose wish is to bring realism into the digital world. EISKO also provides lifelike Digital Doubles for film productions (movies, commercials, events) and interactive applications (videogames, mobiles, V-R/A-R).

Thanks to the combination of photogrammetry and photometry, we deliver high fidelity 3D reconstruction allowing us to work for various industries, from video gaming to fashion and even cosmetics. 

Features adaptable to your production requirements:

• High-quality capture:
Thanks to a custom technology of data analysis, EISKO outperforms the usual 3D scan quality – in comparison to standard photogrammetry, structured light, lasers, etc.

• Accurate reconstruction:
EISKO process removes the need for any sculpting, painting, or manual tasks like retopology, protecting the data accuracy from manual work interpretation.

• Ready-to-use integration:
EISKO  provides options for every need! We offer static, ready-to-animate, or animated 3D characters with highly detailed, clean geometry and physically-based textures, in any standard format. 
The delivered mesh and expressions fit the requested constraints or preferred topology. Easy integration in all pipelines is guaranteed.

Whether you wish to create your next virtual influencer, a secondary character for your video games, or a digital double of a famous singer, we'll happily help! 

Try out EISKO's Digital Humans quality by downloading the free sample of Louise, our virtual influencer: https://eisko.com/louise

To get in touch with us, send us an email at contact@eisko.com!

See you soon

The Wiggles have entertained millions of families across the globe for over 30 years. The band has sold over 30 million albums and DVDs, 8 million books, as well as accumulating over 2 billion music streams and 5

More than 100 album and DVD releases later, The Wiggles have earned 18 gold, 13 platinum, 3 double platinum and 10 multi-platinum awards, and have been awarded 15 ARIA Awards for Best Children’s Album (making ARIA history as the most awarded ARIA winner in the one category), received the ARIA ward for Best Australian Live Act, and been inducted into the ARIA Hall of Fame.

Kinepolis Group derives from a fusion of two family cinema groups in 1997 and became listed on the stock market in 1998. The focus of Kinepolis lies on the creation of ‘the ultimate movie experience’; a cinema concept wherein the total experience of the visitor is key. In 2014, Kinepolis saw her efforts rewarded with the acknowledgement of best cinema operation in the world.

The Talent Group is Pennsylvania and Ohio’s premier full-service agency for models, actors, voices and live promotional talent. With offices in both Pittsburgh and Cleveland, as well as affiliates in Toronto, San Francisco, New York and Los Angeles, The Talent Group offers the best and largest selection of experienced professional talent in the region. 

The Talent Group represents both Union and Non-Union talent, and most importantly for our clients, since we are a talent agency there is no casting fee. Just call us, e-mail or fax us your script and we’ll audition people for you at no charge. You’ll find that not only do we have the best actors, models and voice talent in the Tri-State area, but equally important, we represent a lot of people you don’t already know. That means a fresh and ever-expanding talent pool for you and your clients to choose from.

As well as having the top print, on-camera and voice talent in the region, The Talent Group represents an incredibly strong roster of models and national voice performers in Los Angeles, New York, Toronto and across the country. As such, our clients include some of the top advertising agencies, recording studios and production companies nationally and internationally, as well as the best photographers, studios and agencies locally.

Description:
We are Masters of Themed Ride Design

We are industry leaders in Show Set Design

We are training a new generation of Attraction Designers




American Scenic Design Inc. is a creative design studio made up of a multi-disciplinary team of industry leaders and up-and-comers. No matter the project, our specialty is working with creative directors to develop and realize their vision for the guest experience. With locations in Los Angeles and Orlando, we are your behind-the- scenes team whose goal is to take the ideas of our clients and produce functional, buildable designs.

We are design and experiential storytellers, and we seamlessly support and streamline the creative process to bring innovative concepts to life. Our team works on a wide range of projects from small-scale museum exhibits all the way up to major theme park attractions with complex ride systems. Guided by our leadership of veterans, we produce traditional, integrated show set packages. We coordinate our packages with all relevant disciplines including facility, scenic, media, and lighting, making your project ready for its next phase.

Together, with creatives from around the world, we deliver today’s greatest themed experiences.

Name: Controllux
Description:
Founded in 1968, Controllux is a leading trading company for professional lighting equipment with offices in the Netherlands and Belgium. By merging with companies like Ultrex, Taintronix and Barndoor, Controllux grew to a company with over 40 employees.

As a result of these fusions, Controllux is now distributor of a large range of brands known and well accepted by the industry. These brands combined with over 30 experienced employees, ensures customers get the best service, support and solutions. This also explains our business philosophy: Your ideas, our solutions.

Roughly, Controllux is operating in six areas:
-	Theatre
-	Television, Broadcast & Film
-	Entertainment
-	Architectural
-	Rigging
-	Consumables

Since every area is supported by its own set of brands and dedicated employees, we are able to fulfill our customers’ needs in the right way. We can simply deliver single articles or a complicated turnkey project. In addition to our own renowned service department offering 24-hour phone support, Controllux has 8 permanent employees available in the field to support you on-site.

The Controllux branches in the Netherlands and Belgium both have a large stock of products for fast delivery and feature a showroom for demonstrations and training.

Interested in what we can do for you? Please, contact our sales department on info@controllux.com or +31(0)88 444 6 444
