Description:
Future Now Media Foundation, Inc. is an educational nonprofit whose mission is to engage, mentor, train and connect college and graduate students to become future leaders in every area of the media industry, including in business, tech, content creation, journalism, and the creative arts.   We are a leadership incubator in media and entertainment, and our goal is to raise up the best and brightest future leaders in media. 

FUTURE NOW hosts a three day annual conference designed to bring together college and graduate students who are serious about pursuing careers in the media and entertainment field with today's top executives, thought leaders and professionals.   The conference is designed to give students the opportunity to hear directly from leaders in the industry, connect, network and be mentored by them.  

In addition to the annual conference, throughout the year, FUTURE NOW produces quarterly and monthly meet-ups, educational talks and events.

Otherworld is a 32,000 square foot immersive art installation opening early 2019 in Columbus. Mysteries unfold as you explore over 50 scenes filled with large-scale interactive art, tech, playgrounds, puzzles and secret passageways. It’s an all new kind of art and storytelling experience where visitors are encouraged to freely explore and interact with a surreal world of science fiction and fantasy.

We are a team of over 30 creatives who have worked on projects including museum exhibits, art installations, haunted attractions, theme parks and escape rooms. Name: Grand Cinemas
Description:
We’re the cinema that says dare to challenge!

Whether you’re a cinephile, occasional movie goer or looking for quality family entertainment, we offer an incredible selection of the latest regional and international blockbusters and art-house films that will delight all ages and tastes. Every Grand Cinemas experience ensures a Cineplex in a prime location with ample parking; our customers will always be privy to high quality audio visual experiences, incredibly clean, safe and comfortable seats, as well as a large, delicious and exclusive concession stand. 

At Grand Cinemas we don’t just entertain, we design experiences and are no strangers to setting industry standards through innovation. Since 2007, we have invested over USD75 million in enhancing the cinematic experience for our customers throughout the Middle East. 

Our founder, Selim Ramia, paved the way for what cinema in the GCC looks like today, and we have taken this pioneering spirit through the region. The Grand Cinemas brand has become synonymous with quality entertainment in Lebanon, Jordan, Kuwait and Bahrain. 

Over the last decade, we have introduced the most advanced cinema services including IMAX, MX4D , DOLBY ATMOS Experience and Grand Class, the premium signature experience. Our bi-monthly in-house magazine is the only movie focused magazine published in the region. We have also introduced a slew of region firsts including the first e-ticket online booking service, the first PDA service, and the first E-Kiosk.  

Grand Cinemas encompasses 97 movie screens across 11 Cineplex’s throughout the region as direct ownership and/or partnership.

Name: Phantom Peak
Description:
Welcome to Phantom Peak: a fully immersive, open world experience - a living, breathing town where mystery lurks around every corner.

Once you arrive in Phantom Peak, you’ll instantly lose sense of where you are: you’re stepping into a fully fledged other reality, full of fascinating technology, man-made canals and a vast, split level old town. But you’re not just anyone at Phantom Peak: you’re an explorer, a detective, an adventurer. You’re playing carnival games, you’re haggling with locals, you’re fishing for platypuses. You're eating. You're drinking! 

Whoever you want to be, whatever you want to do - and whatever you want to find out, that’s up to you.

Name: Det Ny Teater
Description:
Det Ny Teater har siden 1994 produceret store musicals på internationalt niveau med kunstnerisk og publikumsmæssig succes.

Det Ny Teater er Danmarks eneste privatdrevne teater, og landets mest besøgte teater. Det Ny Teater modtager via finansloven et husleje- og billetformidlingstilskud.

Det Ny Teater er opført i 1908. Med sine 12.000 m2 og mere end 1000 pladser er teatret et af landets største teatre. Teaterbygningen fremstår i dag som en af Europas smukkeste og mest gennemførte klassiske teaterbygninger.

Det Ny Teater har produceret en række musicals, der med Det Ny Teaters produktion fik danmarks- eller skandinavienspremiere, samt en række store klassiske musicals:

Flagermusen (1994), Jesus Christ Superstar (1995), La Cage aux Folles (1996), Den Glade Enke (1997), Crazy for You (1998), West Side Story (1998), My Fair Lady (1999), Don Quixote (1999), Peter Pan (2000), The Phantom of the Opera (2000, 2003, 2009), Cats (2002), The Sound of Music (2004), Beauty and the Beast (2005), The Producers (2006), Chicago (2007), The King and I (2008), Les Misérables (2009), Mary Poppins (2010),  Wicked (2011), Annie (2011), Singin' in the Rain (2012), Love Never Dies (2012-13), Crazy For You (2013), Evita (2014), Beauty and the Beast (2014), Billy Elliot The Musical (2015) og The Sound of Music (2015).

Description:
iStream is an online video service showcasing premium content across multiple genres like News, TV shows and Movies. Our goal is to help Indians around the globe discover and enjoy their favorite programs, at their convenience on multiple devices – that too in over eight languages.

The company founded in 2007, entered into a tie-up with YouTube three years back and grew to become one of their largest partners in the country, clocking close to a billion video views since then.

We are earnestly trying to build an eco system that will help content owners and advertisers derive maximum value.

To begin with, we are offering News across all major Indian languages, both Live and On Demand. In a month or so we will be ready with our other offerings.

If you would like to partner with us, please email us at contact@istream.com

Name: Grup Balaña
Description:
Grup Balañá, cines y teatros de Barcelona desde 1943, somos la empresa cultural de referencia en la ciudad condal gracias a nuestra amplia oferta cinematográfica y teatral a lo largo de todos estos años.

Una de nuestras principales características ha sido siempre nuestra constante capacidad de renovación y adaptación a las nuevas tendencias del mercado, sin olvidar el arraigo de locales tan emblemáticos como el Aribau Cinema, el Teatro Coliseum o el Teatro Tívoli, que han pasado a formar parte del patrimonio urbano.

Todas estas características y la dilatada experiencia en el sector nos han aportado las condiciones necesarias para poder adaptar nuestros locales a los cambios del entorno, a las nuevas tecnologías y a las modificaciones de las tendencias de los consumidores, como por ejemplo: la inauguración de Balmes Multicines con 12 salas nuevas en versión original o la reciente renovación y ampliación de Glòries Multicines, el que fue el primer multicine de la ciudad Barcelona.

En Grup Balaña armonizamos las diferentes tipologías de locales, apostando por un nuevo concepto de multicines próximos y por la exclusividad de nuestros teatros.

Name: Disney India - Interns alumni
Description: From classic animated features and exhilarating theme park attractions to cutting edge sports coverage, and the hottest shows on television, The Walt Disney Company has been making magic since 1923, creating unforgettable stories that connect with audiences around the world. And we’re just getting started! The key to our success…. The Cast, Crew, Imagineers and Employees who honor Disney’s rich legacy by stretching the bounds of imagination to create the never-before-seen, bringing unparalleled entertainment experiences to people of all ages. Begin a career that delivers unparalleled creative content and experiences to audiences around the world and just imagine the stories you could be part of… What is #LifeAtDisney like? It’s a series of magical moments with cast members and employees developing and telling our stories in the most innovative ways. Whether it’s a day spent as a Disney VoluntEAR, or celebrating the release of a new interactive experience, retail product or movie, our days are filled with the knowledge that we are creating entertainment experiences the whole family can enjoy. Follow @DisneyCareers on Facebook, Twitter and Instagram for a peek behind-the-curtain, and discover how you could connect to a world of stories with Disney!

Name: Vialand
Description:
Dünyada ve Türkiye’de bir Tema Park’ı, AVM ve gösteri merkeziyle birleştiren ilk alışveriş, eğlence ve yaşam kompleksi olan Vialand, 650 milyon dolar değerindeki yatırım bedeliyle 26 Mayıs 2013’te ziyaretçilerine kapılarını açtı.  Gürsoy Grup bünyesinde faaliyet gösteren ve 600.000m2 bir alana yayılmış olan Vialand, açık ve kapalı alışveriş caddeleri içerisindeki geniş marka yelpazesiyle her yaş ve zevk grubuna uygun alternatifler sunuyor. Vialand Tema Park’ın girişinde tüm görkemiyle yükselen Vialand Şato’su ziyaretçilerine masal dünyasının kapılarını aralarken, gösteri merkezi ise konser alanı, geniş yeşil alanı, göleti ve büyük ölçekli kitlelere hitap edecek daha birçok aktivite alanını içinde barındırıyor. Farklı mimarisi ile dikkat çeken, içinden tramvay geçen Vialand Alışveriş Caddeleri ise 200’ün üzerinde mağazası, yeme-içme noktaları ve aktivite alanlarıyla açık havada alışveriş zevki ve eğlenceyi bir arada sunuyor.

Name: MONOM
Description:
MONOM is a collective of artists, technologists, studios, and venues exploring spatial sound as an artistic and experiential medium. From sound art and music to theater, opera, dance, and the immersive realms of virtual and augmented realities, our mission is to provide space and time for anyone who wants to expand the dimensions of their creative practice and to enrich communal and individual experiences of sound and art. 

Founded in 2017, MONOM is home to the original 4DSOUND system, this technology, is an intuitive instrument for composing virtual sonic realities. These new worlds of sound are designed not only to be heard, but to be felt with the whole body. 

Collaborating with over 150 artists we have become the leading studio in the world producing and presenting works utilising this innovative technology. Our partnerships span a wide spectrum of festivals, institutions and collectives, enabling us to share these pioneering experiences, both within Berlin and abroad. 

Through our various partnerships, we aim to foster a multicultural and cross-disciplinary movement centered around spatial sound and listening-based practices. We believe in the potential of this art form to transcend cultural divides through a common language of sound and space. Our network serves as a conduit for the exchange of ideas and collaborations worldwide, forging a tightly-knit community founded on the profound act of embodied listening—a practice we hold to be increasingly vital for our collective well-being.

Name: Filmzie
Description:
Filmzie is a free movie streaming service, built by industry professionals and film enthusiasts for true movie lovers. We believe that movies are for everyone and by democratizing them, all users gain access to high-quality content without the need to pay a premium. Whether it’s an independent production, an Oscar winner, a docu-series or a short film from a lesser-known director, our users have access to them all for free.

As an Advertising-based Video On Demand (AVOD) streaming platform, we are replacing the current TV broadcast ad system by serving personalized, data-driven ads to our users as opposed to a blanket ad model. This allows for much higher efficiency of OTT ads in comparison to current broadcasters. Based on this innovative approach, we’re able to cut down the content to ads ratio from roughly 50:50 (e.g. 30 minutes of ads to 30 minutes of content per hour) to only 10 min of highly targeted ads per hour, without compromising ad efficiency.

Typically, independent films don’t have the marketing machine to drive a large audience. Especially since premium services tend to restrict content to their platform only, this greatly opposes the democratization of the movie industry. We give the opportunity for newcomers or niche filmmakers that might not be of interest to premium or linear broadcasters, to have their movies reach our large film community and get the viewership they deserve.

Unlike paid services, who tend to push their own productions, we treat all content equally and provide recommendations based on viewer preferences. Even niche film lovers can find more of the content they like and generally the movies recommended to our users are curated by their taste, making the overall experience more enjoyable.

Name: Αθηναϊκά Θέατρα

Διαχειρίζεται 8 θέατρα στο κέντρο της Αθήνας, το Αλίκη, το Μικρό Παλλάς, το Δημήτρης Χορν, το Μικρό Χορν, το Λαμπέτη, το Αποθήκη, το Εμπορικόν και το Πειραιώς 131.
 
Με ένα ευρύ φάσμα συνεργατών, τεχνογνωσία και άποψη, τα Αθηναϊκά Θέατρα προσφέρουν καλλιτεχνικές ευκαιρίες σε δημιουργούς και καλλιτέχνες παρουσιάζοντας θεάματα που διακρίνονται για το γούστο και την επιμέλεια της παραγωγής τους.

Την καλοκαιρινή σεζόν η εταιρία οργανώνει περιοδείες με επιλεγμένες παραστάσεις σε όλη την Ελλάδα, ενώ έργα της έχουν παρουσιαστεί στο Λονδίνο και στην Κύπρο. Σκοπός της εταιρίας είναι η αναβαθμισμένη εικόνα του θεάτρου στην Ελλάδα τόσο με την προσεκτική επιλογή ρεπερτορίου, όσο και με τη καλύτερη εξυπηρέτηση του κοινού.

Name: Lej-en-DJ.dk og BartenderBar.dk
Description:
Lej en DJ er en landsdækkende DJ virksomhed, som årligt leverer det musikalske indslag til mere end 1000 arrangementer i hele Danmark. Virksomheden blev stiftet i 2013 og har siden begyndelsen oplevet konstant fremgang og stigende efterspørgsel fra både private, det offentlige og virksomheder, der mangler musik til deres kommende arrangement.

Vi har siden begyndelsen haft stort fokus på at skabe tryghed i en branche, som til tider kan virke meget uoverskuelig som kunde. Ved at kombinere sublim kundeservice med fantastisk dygtige og kvalitetsstemplede DJ’s, har vi formået at skabe en virksomhed, der sikrer en pålidelig leverance af musik med høj kundetilfredshed. En af vores vigtigste opgaver er at fjerne tilfældigheder og sørge for at skabe de optimale rammer inden arrangementet, så afviklingen af festen foregår nøjagtigt som planlagt og i din ånd.

BartenderBar leverer mobile barløsninger til små og store arrangementer overalt i Danmark. Vi kommer med den komplette bar, hvor vi serverer lækre high-end cocktails. Lej en bartender og undgå planlægning, indkøb og servering – i stedet kan du nyde din fest og overlade alt det praktiske til os. Vi skræddersyer din cocktailløsning og skaber de perfekte rammer til din kommende fest.

Vores hovedkontor ligger i Søborg og vores mange dygtige DJ’s og bartendere er bosiddende i hele landet. På hovedkontoret er vi 6 erfarne medarbejdere, som dagligt sidder klar til at bearbejde alle henvendelser og kunderelaterede spørgsmål.

Name: Hound Comics, Inc. (Hound Entertainment Group)
Description:
Hound Comics, Inc. (Hound Entertainment Group) is a privately owned publishing and multi-media company encompassing all aspects of the entertainment industry.  Hound is dedicated to providing top-notch entertainment including projects ranging from comic books to film and many things in between.  The flagship brand, “Brimstone and The Borderhounds” has grown in leaps and bounds since its inception in 2005 to its eventual launch on October 31st, 2010 in Borders Book stores across the United States.

Re-launched on January 11, 2011 in limited Barnes & Noble retail locations, Hound Comics made history as the only independently owned and operated comic book company to be distributed in a big box retailer alongside other iconic companies such as Marvel and DC. Over time, Brimstone and The Borderhounds quickly garnered popularity and was cherry-picked by Barnes & Noble to be sold and distributed in more than over 700 of their nationwide retail locations; as well as in their affiliate retail outlets network of B. Dalton.

Hound now boasts over 40 different comic book titles, kids books and novels, a line of award winning sauces & seasonings, a backpack line featured on The Big Bang Theory and sold in Wal-Mart's, fragrances, toys and much more. As a brand, they are affiliated with companies including POW! Entertainment, The Stan Lee Foundation, Loot Crate, Eastsport, Demeter Fragrance, Humble Bundle, CaJohn's Fiery Foods, Butterwinks, etc.; and currently represents celebrity clients seeking licensing and partnership deals. 

Hound Entertainment supports its products by touring across the country with stops at just about every major pop culture and comic book convention from Wizard World to New York Comic Con. Hound prides itself on their one-on-one relationship with fans. Other events include private appearances, public speaking events at schools, colleges, libraries, philanthropic ventures and festivals.

Name: Sing'theatre
Description:
Our Missions - Performing for a better society

Our mission is to be a creative platform that uses music and theatre to help shape an inspiring future:
- by producing musical revues and shows that open social dialogues in the Singaporean community and promote multicultural interaction
- by making music and theatre universally accessible, especially in hospitals, reaching out in particular to the most isolated and underprivileged patients
- by empowering youth and the community as a whole by sharing our passion for performing and providing top-level musical theatre training

----
What we do

Shows
Sing’theatre is recognized on the Singapore scene as a musical theatre specialist. We use primarily the musical theatre genre and French cabaret style to bring social conversations and personal struggles to the stage. We take current issues in society, give them a unique perspective and make them resonate with Singaporeans.
Sing’theatre has produced A Singaporean in Paris, A French Kiss in Singapore, 8 Women, La Vie En Rose and Jaques Brel is Alive and Well and Living in Paris.

Community Outreach
Beyond the traditional stage, Sing’Theatre is committed to bringing music to everyone thanks to its various community outreach programmes with hospitals, namely MusicalRendezVous@NUH and MusicFest@SGH. We feel it is vital to provide cultural exposure to all, stimulating creativity, active citizenship and societal cohesion.

The Academy

Name: Kalmenson & Kalmenson Voice Casting
Description:
We service the buyers of voices, the broadcast/production community, by understanding their creative specs, and based upon our intimate knowledge of the voice over talent pool, casting exactly the right voices to fit their visions.

We can also provide them with such useful information as the names of actors who they may have heard, but can't identify (whether or not we cast the spot), contact numbers for talent, recording studios, etc.

Producers know that our auditions will be precisely cast, masterfully directed, recorded on state-of-the-art equipment, and delivered on time. Many of our auditions have been lifted directly to air for broadcast, saving producers (and their clients) time and money.

We service the sellers of voices, the actors and talent agents, by maintaining an extensive, detailed talent database (25,000 & counting) listing each actor's strengths and specialties, so that we can precisely meet the producer's specs with exactly the right talent for each project. 

We are also known to the actors and agents as a premiere training facility for those seriously committed to a successful career in voice over. Our daily contact with the producers keeps our finger on the pulse of the industry, keeping us current with trends and attitudes that are in demand. 

The pros know -- when you're talking about top quality voice casting and training, you're talking about Kalmenson & Kalmenson.

Just ask them.

Name: Attila Glatz Concert Productions
Description:
Founded in 1987, Attila Glatz Concert Productions produces, promotes, and manages classical, jazz, folk, country, film and video game music performances worldwide.

The company’s signature presentation is the beloved New Year’s Concert, Salute to Vienna. Presented annually in more than 20 major concert halls from the Lincoln Center to Roy Thomson Hall, this concert series celebrated its 20th anniversary in 2015. Salute to Vienna returned to the city of its inspiration in 2014 with over 100 intimate Operetta in Concert performances at Vienna's prestigious Wiener Konzerthaus. The company’s largest Salute to Vienna production, filmed at the Konzerthaus for public television in 2013 has aired over 1000 times. Co-hosted by Academy Award-winner Maximilian Schell, and mezzo-soprano Frederica von Stade, this televised performance featured the Vienna Boys Choir and world-renowned singers including British tenor, Russell Watson. For their tireless dedication and passion in cultivating and promoting Viennese musical traditions, co-founders Marion and Attila Glatz were awarded the Austrian Government’s Decoration of Merit in Gold. 

Other Attila Glatz Concert Productions highlights have included an exclusive Toronto engagement of Plácido Domingo, a Strauss/Gershwin Gala in Vienna featuring the late Gregory Peck, Distant Worlds: music from FINAL FANTASY (Berlin, London, Vienna, Montreal, Toronto and other cities), Lord of the Rings Symphony, Natalie Dessay Sings Michel Legrand, Bravissimo! Opera’s Greatest Hits, and several live in concert feature films played full-length on HD screen while a full orchestra perform the score note-for-note. These blockbuster and award-winning films include: Gladiator Live, The Godfather Live, Back to the Future Live in Concert and Amadeus Live. In late 2016 and 2017, E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial In Concert, Harry Potter and The Philosopher's Stone and Harry Potter and The Chamber of Secrets will be added to this list of well-loved films.

Name: Moviehouse & Eatery
Description:
“Moviehouse is to theaters as the Beatles were to music. Revolutionary!” 
— Crockett

That’s how our staff describe the Moviehouse & Eatery. We are a group of homegrown Texas movie lovers, taking on the latest film releases one recliner at a time. Do you want to make the movies better? Great! So, do we!! 218,289. That’s the number of ICEES our staff delivered this year. 335,116 orders of bottomless popcorn and 163,343 pics snapped at our Social Flash photo booths kept our guests coming back for more! 

The Moviehouse & Eatery is a unique movie-going experience including plush recliners, a full service bar, an extensive menu from our chef prepared scratch kitchen, and seat-side service from our high quality staff. Everyone on our team is invested in our company values and crazy about film, ensuring not only exceptional service for guests, but a rewarding environment for the team. 

Guests not sure what to order? Well, you can make a great recommendation because our staff get to try every new item we add to the menu! Not sure which movie they should see next? Our employees see movies for free, so you can be ready to help them reserve their next recliner! On-site conveniences like online schedule management, a large support staff, cutting-edge ordering devices, and recliner technology provide employees with the resources for success. The fun continues outside of work with team-centered events to strengthen the friendships that easily evolve within Moviehouse & Eatery. Fast friends, free movies, discounts on food, flexible hours, and a fun and fast-paced atmosphere are among the other great perks Moviehouse team members enjoy!

Moviehouse & Eatery is always looking to expand the team. Apply online or at the box office to join in Making the Movies Better.

They take these industry-leading, award-winning shows around the country and beyond, in theatres and online, attracting new audiences of all ages and backgrounds. They engage as deeply as they can with these communities, which helps them become better at what they do. 

In 2020 and 2021, during an unparalleled period of global uncertainty, Headlong partnered with Century Films and BBC Arts to present Unprecedented, a series of critically acclaimed digital plays responding to the radical way that the world changed when the first lockdown was announced on the 23 March 2020. 
Previous Headlong productions include After Life, People Places and Things, Junkyard, The Nether, Pygmalion, This House, Richard III and Labour of Love.

Description:
The Bishop Arts Theatre Center (BATC) is an award-winning, multicultural theatre company with IRS 501 (c)(3) tax-exempt status. BATC was chartered in September 1993 in Atlanta, Georgia and founded by Teresa Coleman Wash. At that time, the theatre was producing dinner theatre performances at the Lakewood Playhouse and partnering with community groups such as Luke’s Place, a neighborhood organization that provided social services for men & women recovering from substance abuse. The specific objectives and purposes of this corporation are to:

- provide cultural and artistic opportunities to individuals who have been marginalized and children who live in at-risk communities,
-use theater as a platform for social change and to raise awareness about issues that are important to our community,
-provide instruction in theatre, acting, dance and other art forms,
-sponsor special events involving public performances of plays, musicals, dances, and other art forms with various community performing art groups in order to broaden the cultural experience to a more diverse group, and
-directly engage and to facilitate others to engage in the promotion of the arts, generally.

Our mission is to cultivate a diverse and vibrant arts community committed to social impact while creating opportunities for local and emerging artists to develop new, contemporary, and lasting works that celebrate the diversity and resiliency of our community. Today, we offer a full season of in-person and virtual theater performances, jazz concerts, speaker series events, and year-round arts education programs.

Name: TEDxBalneárioBarraDoSul
Description:
Somos inconformistas por natureza.
Desde os primórdios da humanidade buscamos outras formas de nos comunicar, nos locomover, de aprender e ensinar.
A cada novo anseio, uma nova descoberta e um novo conhecimento.
Nosso inconformismo motivou transformações, impulsionou invenções e fez com que pessoas comuns se tornassem indivíduos memoráveis.
Pequenos atos podem se tornar grandes feitos. Basta uma dose de inconformismo e outra de inspiração.
Somos capazes de criar e revolucionar. De sonhar e realizar.
Assim como Dumont conquistou os céus,
Assim como Armstrong chegou à lua,
Queremos conhecer os novos memoráveis, dar voz a quem observa sua rua, seu bairro, sua cidade e o mundo com olhos inconformistas e transformadores. Quem busca construir uma nova realidade com pequenos e poderosos atos.
O TEDxBalneárioBarraDoSul é sobre as pessoas. Sobre provocar mudanças, ocupar espaços, promover rupturas, sobre realizar.
O que faz de alguém memorável hoje?

Name: Bellevue Productions
Description:
Bellevue Productions has quickly emerged as a leading literary management company with a focus on discovering and breaking new writers and writer-directors, working in both the feature film and television spaces. Bellevue has had 23 scripts on the last four Black Lists, the annual list of the best unproduced feature film scripts, and had BLONDE AMBITION by Elyse Hollander top the 2016 Black List.

Bellevue clients have written and/or directed such films as HEAVY TRIP, BODY CAM, SUMMER OF ’84, SPLINTER, ELI, OFFICE UPRISING, CHEAP THRILLS, BAD MATCH, A CROOKED SOMEBODY, and BETTER WATCH OUT. They also have set up projects at Warner Bros, Paramount, Fox, Lionsgate, New Line, Focus Features, Fox 2000, Sony, Universal, New Republic Pictures, and Screen Gems.

Bellevue clients have written on TV shows such as MR ROBOT, CLOAK AND DAGGER, TRAINING DAY, TINY PRETTY THINGS, LIGHT AS FEATHER, HAWAII FIVE-O, THE MAN IN THE HIGH CASTLE, HAND OF GOD, NCIS: NEW ORLEANS, GOOD GIRLS, LEGACIES, WARRIOR NUN, BLACK LIGHTNING, ROBOT CHICKEN, THE X-FILES, THE KINGKILLER CHRONICLES, SCHOOLED, DALLAS & ROBO, A.P.B., GHOST BRIDE, THE BIRCH, PREACHER, ASH VS EVIL DEAD, ARMY WIVES, Z-NATION, and JUST ADD MAGIC.

Bellevue has produced the films ALWAYS WATCHING, PARALLEL, and has ELI being released by Netflix on October 18, 2019.  Bellevue is producing INFINITE, with Antoine Fuqua directing and Mark Wahlberg, Dylan O’Brien and Chiwetel Ejiofor starring, set to be released by Paramount on August 7, 2020.

Name: Airun Serveis Culturals, S.L.
Description:
Ja fa 20 anys que la nostra empresa va començar i durant el camí que hem recorregut he  anat evolucionant i adaptant-nos a les necessitats dels nostres clients. Avui Airun Serveis Culturals, S.L. és una empresa consolidada en constant evolució i amb moltes ganes d’aprendre i compartir amb els nostres clients tots aquells projectes que en entusiasmen. 
El nostre és un equip amb experiència, compromès i molt dinàmic. Treballem en equip, amb una organització flexible que s’adapta als diferents projectes que tenim amb una clara simplificació de processos.
Persones joves i dinàmiques amb un bagatge professional i personal avalat per les feines realitzades permeten encarar cada projecte com un nou repte de tot l’equip d’Airun Serveis Culturals. És a partir d’aquest repte comú que apareix el major valor de la nostra companyia, la implicació completa de tot l’equip en els projectes.

Name: Theatre Royal Windsor
Description:
This beautiful Edwardian theatre nestles between the Windsor Castle and the River Thames and is the only unsubsidised producing theatre to operate all year round in Britain. 

Our repertoire is wide, ranging from the classics and traditional pantomimes to first productions of new work. This intimate 631 seat theatre, boasts Bill Kenwright as its producer and audiences are treated to new productions before they transfer to West End or go off on tour around the country.

Theatre Royal Windsor has gained a reputation for the quality of its productions and is currently one of Britain's leading theatres. Its traditional pantomime is considered one of the best in the country.

Evening shows start at 8pm, Saturday matinees at 4.45pm and Thursday matinees at 2.30pm unless otherwise stated. Sunday concerts are often running. For more information on our upcoming productions, ticket prices and special group rates, please call our Box Office on 01753 853888 or visit our website www.theatreroyalwindsor.co.uk

Description:

Nous avons développé 3 offres :
- Une box "culture et aventure" pour les jeunes retraités
- Des cycles d'ateliers, de conférences et des sorties pour les CCAS et les caisses de retraite
- Des kits d'animation pour les résidences senior, service et autonomie ainsi que pour les EHPAD

Nos offres ont pour objectif de favoriser la stimulation intellectuelle et physique et de lutter contre l'isolement.

 La Malle d'Aventure est soutenue par l'Assurance Retraite IDF, Malakoff Humanis, AG2R LA MONDIALE, la région Occitanie (Ad'Occ), Crealia Occitanie et Initiative Haute-Garonne

Name: Dancing Atoms
Description:
Dancing Atoms is a boutique animation development studio. We focus on powerful storytelling told through the authentic voices of a diverse team of creatives.  Our unique ability to bring together quality talent allows us to create relatable stories with unforgettable characters for audiences worldwide.

Our creative team comprises Writers, Directors, Emmy award-winning producers and Showrunners, Editors, 3D Animators, and Unreal Artists. We are actively working to bridge the gap between Asian and North American storytellers to help bring their stories to the world.

Creative IP:
Our studio is primarily focused on developing and producing original preschool animated TV series and animated feature films. Our team is experienced in all stages of the process, from polishing the original nugget of a story, to designing the characters and the worlds, to creating storyboards, writing the scripts, and assembling the pitch decks. 

Services:
We aid clients with a wide range of services including helping guide their projects with VFX consultation, 2d Animation, 3d Animation, Unreal Engine real time productions.

Name: Honey Head Films
Description:
Full-service production. Boundless imagination. 

At Honey Head we believe great stories do more than entertain, they connect, inspire, and transform. We’re a female-led company built by filmmakers who love both the art and the business of storytelling. Our work spans two worlds:

Narrative Film Productions
Our heartbeat is original storytelling. We're actively scaling a proven creative brand into a profitable film studio. With a slate of market-ready feature films, the latest (locally financed and produced) streaming on Prime, we combine efficient production models with bold films that push boundaries, elevate new voices, and create lasting cultural impact.

Our leadership team has built award-winning projects that attract top-tier talent and distributors, positioning Honey Head Head as a high-growth opportunity at the intersection of creative vision and commercial viability.

Client-Facing Productions
From global brands to local businesses, musicians to mission-driven organizations, we create cinematic content that humanizes brands and sparks connection. Whether it’s a campaign, corporate film, live event, or music video, we bring authentic imagery and a collaborative, problem-solving spirit to every frame.


What sets us apart:
A team fluent in both cinematic craft and brand strategy.
Scalable production: nimble enough for startups, robust enough for feature films.
A refreshingly collaborative approach: demystifying the process, keeping it honest, and always putting story first.

Whether you need a trusted production service partner or a creative team to dream up what’s next, we’re here to make it happen (minus the ego, plus a whole lot of passion.)

Every Time Mission Base has 25-30 Portals , with each Portal featuring immersive challenges for all players in your group.

Climb castles , crack codes , dodge lasers , cross lava , find tunnels , play music , fire cannons ,.. Make History  Save Time ! Customize your experience by playing in any order, or infinitely replay your favorites. Time Mission is the ultimate social gaming adventure!

Name: PMP Eventos Paulo Magalhães Produções
Description:
A PMP EVENTOS foi fundada em 2002 por Paulo Magalhães, figura ímpar de múltiplos talentos e uma mente criativa. Ao longo destes 22 anos, a PMPEVENTOS tem vindo a ser reconhecida como pioneira e inovadora na forma como organiza os seus espetáculos e eventos, elevando-os a um nível superior. Do sector corporativo, à cultura, passando pelo entretenimento, em Portugal e em mais de 25 países, o seu trabalho procura realizar o sonho de cada cliente e espectador, fornecendo soluções fora da caixa.

A nossa oferta é diversificada abrangendo todo o tipo de eventos e nos mais variados sectores, sendo o principal os eventos corporativos, mas também com forte presença em eventos televisivos dos quais se destacam; Festival RTP da Canção, Globos de Ouro, The Voice, Ídolos, A Mascara, 7 Maravilhas de Portugal, Ambição Olímpica, Got Talent entre muitos outros.

Gostaríamos assim de agendar  uma reunião para apresentação detalhada das nossas soluções.

 

Não há limites para a criatividade, com uma equipa que procura incrementar valor em todas as suas áreas de atuação, almejando novos desafios e deixando sempre uma pergunta no ar: Vamos sonhar juntos?

Nous réunissons les enfants d'un même quartier par petits groupes, leur "CLUB", pour qu'ils découvrent ensemble de manière ludique le patrimoine culturel, historique, scientifique de Paris et ses alentours. 

Nous nous occupons de tout l'aspect logistique : réservation des intervenants ; transports aller-retour ; encadrement ; animation ; goûter.

Vous n'avez qu'à choisir les sorties qui vous intéressent, y inscrire vos enfants et les amener le jour J, au point de Rendez-vous de votre Club.

Description:

Birmingham Ceremonies Limited is a new joint venture, formed by GBA (Gary Beestone Associates) and Done+Dusted. 

The Birmingham Commonwealth Games will be the largest multi-sport event to be held in England in the last 10 years, with the Opening Ceremony being held on Thursday 28 July 2022 and the Closing Ceremony on Monday 8 August 2022, both at the Alexander Stadium in Birmingham.

The company is thrilled to be based in Birmingham and creating amazing opportunities across the West Midlands; including new jobs, mass casting, supply chain contracts and more as we work to deliver these two exciting productions.

Follow us for updates on workforce vacancies and tender opportunities.

AzCorp's vision is a relatable universe of heroes and villains that come alive through thought-provoking stories, that prompt dialogue, instill critical thinking, evoke social consciousness, and compel positive local action by its readers. Description:
We are a proudly Indonesian music, creative and digital company, built with a passion for music, storytelling, and empowering talents since 2008.

Today, we stand strong on two core business pillars:
(1) Music Label & Artist Management, and
(2) Multi-Channel Network (MCN).

Through these pillars, we collaborate with a wide range of talents—composers, musicians, actors, creators, and storytellers—to craft emotionally resonant works with lasting impact across platforms.

In our Music Label & Artist Management, we proudly represent a roster of talented individuals including Last Child, Virgoun, Budi Doremi, Caitlin Halderman, Nayla Purnama, Jordy Riz, and Aquene. From composers and performers to digital-era personalities, each brings a unique voice and influence to Indonesia’s creative landscape and fans.

We are also the creative force behind some of Indonesia’s most iconic digital projects. From the pioneering web-series "Seluruh Nafas Ini" to the viral success of "Surat Cinta Untuk Starla" and its sequel "Bukti", we’ve built a reputation for merging music with powerful storytelling. Projects like "Aku & Mesin Waktu" and the emotional "Meski Lewat Luka" series further show our dedication to narrative-driven content. We’ve also contributed to the music scene with timeless hits like Diary Depresiku, Pedih, Duka, Tolong, Melukis Senja, Mesin Waktu, Saat Kau Telah Mengerti, Orang Yang Sama, and more.

Since 2012, our MCN has supported hundreds of creators across Indonesia—helping them protect digital assets, grow audiences, and maximize revenue. From short films like Karena Karina—a collaboration-based narrative—to our educational movement Creatours; and more, we empower creators to thrive.

With a clear mission to uplift talent, culture, and society, we continue to innovate through music, motion pictures, creators partnership and stories—as a proudly Indonesian company with global standards, grounded in purpose, and committed to making a lasting positive impact.

Name: Wooden Horse
Description:
Wooden Horse is a dynamic partnership between Australian entertainment industry executives Jude Troy & Richard Finlayson.

Combining their extensive international networks & working with the best creative talent, Wooden Horse is focussed on distinctive, provocative & bold storytelling for global audiences.

The company was created in 2018 by Jude following a successful 17-year career at global media group Entertainment One & iconic Australian company, Hopscotch Films, where she was a partner. 

Working in acquisitions across film & TV, she built a catalogue of titles that included the Oscar winning documentary Amy, & TV series Peaky Blinders, Catastrophe, The Inbetweeners & The Slap. Jude was also an Executive Producer on AACTA Award-winning feature documentary All This Mayhem. 

In launching eOne’s Australian TV production arm, she co-produced The Other Guy Season 1 in partnership with Aquarius Films for Stan. Under the Wooden Horse banner, she co-produced with Aquarius, Season 2. Both seasons have sold to Hulu (US) & Super Channel (Canada).

Having collaborated on several projects, Richard Finlayson joined Wooden Horse as a producing partner in 2019, merging his company, Headland Media, into the business. At Headland, Richard consulted on content strategy to global media companies, created & produced the Ben Law series Waltzing the Dragon for the ABC (with WildBear) & shepherded a number of projects into funded development.

As the Director of Television at ABC, he was responsible for commissioning hundreds of hours of ground-breaking content and pioneering a raft of successful international co-productions including Cleverman (AMC Sundance), Glitch (NBC, Netflix), The Code (Sony) & Monkey Magic (Netflix). Prior to that he was COO at SBS.

Wooden Horse is developing an exciting slate of shows with Australia’s leading creatives for partners including Stan & ABC.

Name: VIBES & BEATS
Description:
A VIBES & BEATS assume-se como uma das maiores produtoras e promotoras Portuguesas.

Artistas como BUSH, Bastille, Franz Ferdinand, Emir Kusturica, Caetano Veloso, The Prodigy, Guano Apes, Gogol Bordello, Skunk Anansie, Natiruts, Erick Morillo, Gal Costa, Gilberto Gil, Zélia Duncan, Simone, Zeca Baleiro, Djavan, GNR, Moonspell, entre outros, encheram algumas das mais emblemáticas salas do nosso país, como a Altice Arena, Campo Pequeno, Coliseu de Lisboa, Coliseu do Porto, Multiusos de Guimarães. 

A VIBES & BEATS foi também pioneira na introdução do conceito Back to School em Portugal, com um grande evento realizado no Campo Pequeno. Outro dos conceitos inovadores é o Music Trail, através do Penha Music Trail, realizado em Guimarães, conceito esse até agora inexistente na Europa.

Positividade, verticalidade e descobrir novos caminhos e áreas de negócio serão sempre as palavras de ordem em toda a nossa atuação. 
Para nós não há limites, queremos sentir as Vibrações e os Batimentos… e no fim os aplausos.

Não pensamos na experiência de mais de 22 anos de elementos que compõem a nossa equipa, nomeadamente em Música e espetáculo em movimento. O nosso desafio é outro: trilhar novos caminhos, descobrir outros timbres e desvendar novos sorrisos. 

A VIBES & BEATS já tem a sua marca e identidade… e afinal a sua história ainda agora começou.

Name: Festival Internacional de Teatro Clásico de Mérida
Description:
El Festival Internacional de Teatro Clásico de Mérida es el festival de teatro clásico más antiguo de España y está considerado como el más importante en su género. 
Las representaciones de las obras del festival se llevan a cabo anualmente, durante los meses de julio y agosto en el Teatro Romano de Mérida, considerado como uno de los edificios en el mundo que mejor representan los sólidos modos y las formas armónicas de la arquitectura romana en época del emperador Augusto. Asimismo, es el teatro más antiguo del mundo aún en uso. 
También se llevan a cabo representaciones en las extensiones de Medellín, Regina y Cáparra, así como en distintos enclaves urbanos de la ciudad de Mérida. 
El Festival inició su andadura en el año 1933 con la puesta en escena de la Medea de Séneca, en versión de Miguel de Unamuno con la actriz Margarita Xirgu como protagonista. 
Sobre su arena, los más prestigiosos profesionales del teatro –actores, actrices, músicos, directores, autores, iluminadores, figurinistas– nacionales e internacionales han desfilado a lo largo de sus 71 ediciones, pasando a formar parte de la historia.

Name: Indian Film Festival of Los Angeles
Description:
The Indian Film Festival of Los Angeles (IFFLA) is a nonprofit organization devoted to a greater appreciation of Indian cinema and culture by showcasing films, supporting emerging filmmakers, and promoting the diverse perspectives of the Indian diaspora.

Each year the festival features a rich mix of film programs designed to build and support the growing interest in the Indian entertainment industry. This includes programming that cultivates an audience for Indian films while supporting filmmakers of Indian descent in career development as they navigate the larger studio system in Hollywood. IFFLA’s industry programs include the One-on-One program where film industry professionals from major and independent production and distribution companies are invited to participate in meetings with the IFFLA filmmakers; and panel discussions with speakers from the film industry.

PROGRAMMING
IFFLA showcases a combination of features, shorts and documentaries. The festival provides programming and activities that no other film festival in Los Angeles offers and serves a community of Indian and international filmmakers that has the potential of reaching a crossover audience. IFFLA offers the Los Angeles community a unique opportunity to learn about India’s multi-faceted culture and long history of filmmaking.

AWARDS
IFFLA offers jury awards for Best Feature and Best Short as well as Audience Choice Awards in the same categories.

ONE-ON-ONE
Industry professionals from major and independent production and distribution companies are invited to participate in one-on-one 10-minute meetings with the participating filmmakers. The objective of this program is to offer a new generation of talented filmmakers the opportunity to meet with players of the North American film industry and provide them with a unique opportunity to advance their careers.

Name: Blue Note Milano
Description:
Blue Note Milano è un jazz club e ristorante aperto dal 19 Marzo 2003 in via Borsieri 37, nel quartiere Isola, a Milano. 

Una delle realtà di punta nel panorama dell’entertainment in Italia ed unica emanazione europea del network internazionale Blue Note, il locale milanese offre nella sua elegante e confortevole struttura oltre 300 spettacoli l’anno, che rappresentano per fatturato circa il 25% dei concerti jazz prodotti in Italia. 

Blue Note Milano è anche un ristorante di alto livello, dove vivere al meglio il binomio musica e cibo, come nei migliori club internazionali; produce festival estivi ed eventi per i propri partners e clienti; aggrega, grazie anche alla partnership con Radio Monte Carlo che trasmette ogni settimana in diretta dal Blue Note, una community di oltre 60.000 utenti di target medio-alto e ramificata in tutto il Nord Italia. 

Molti fra i più importanti artisti di musica jazz, blues, soul, italiana e latina si sono esibiti e si esibiscono sul palco del Blue Note di Milano.Tra gli altri, The Blues Brothers, Stefano Bollani, Dee Dee Bridgewater, Billy Cobham, Chick Corea, Eugenio Finardi, Paolo Fresu, Pino Daniele, Malika Ayane, Al Di Meola, Incognito, Ahmad Jamal, Raphael Gualazzi, Level 42, Manhattan Transfer, Wynton Marsalis, Brad Mehldau, Marcus Miller, Maceo Parker, Gino Paoli, Enrico Rava, Joshua Redman, Antonella Ruggiero, John Scofield, McCoy Tyner, Chucho Valdes, Ornella Vanoni e The Angels in Harlem Gospel Choir che si esibisce regolarmente durante il periodo natalizio.

Per le aziende, Blue Note Milano organizza ed ospita gli eventi più diversi: convention, road show, meeting, serate di gala, presentazioni di prodotto e istituzionali. Per l’organizzazione di un evento, Blue Note non è solo una location di grande comfort, fascino e prestigio, ma anche un partner “chiavi in mano”, in grado di offrire audio e service tecnici di standard elevato, ristorazione di grande qualità, proposte artistiche di livello internazionale.

Name: Tollywood Actress
Description:
Tollywood: A Journey through the Telugu Film Industry

Introduction:

Tollywood, the vibrant and dynamic film industry of Telugu cinema, has made an indelible mark on the world of Indian cinema. With a rich history spanning over several decades, Tollywood has evolved into a powerhouse of creativity, captivating audiences with its unique storytelling, mesmerizing performances, and grandeur. This article takes you on a journey through the fascinating world of Tollywood, exploring its origins, milestones, notable personalities, and the significant contributions it has made to the Indian film industry.

Historical Background:

The roots of Tollywood can be traced back to the early 20th century when the first Telugu silent film, "Bhishma Pratigna," was released in 1921. This marked the beginning of Telugu cinema, which later gained momentum with the advent of sound technology. In the following years, notable pioneers like H.M. Reddy and B.N. Reddy contributed to the growth of the industry, introducing techniques from Hollywood and other regional cinemas.

Golden Era of Tollywood:

The 1950s and 1960s are often regarded as the golden era of Tollywood, with the emergence of legendary actors, directors, and musicians who shaped the industry's identity. Iconic actors like N.T. Rama Rao, Akkineni Nageswara Rao, and Savitri, among others, ruled the silver screen with their impeccable performances and immense talent. Directors such as V. Madhusudhan Rao, Kadiri Venkata Reddy, and L.V. Prasad brought innovation and artistic excellence to Telugu cinema, producing timeless classics that are still revered today.

The Rise of Commercial Cinema:

In the 1970s and 1980s, Tollywood witnessed a significant shift towards commercial cinema, with a focus on mass appeal and entertainment. Filmmakers like Dasari Narayana Rao and K. Raghavendra Rao brought a new wave of masala films, blending action, drama, romance, and comedy, which struck a chord with the audience.

Üstlendiği lokomotif rolü kusursuzluk anlayışıyla gerçekleştiren BVS Group bünyesinde yer alan markalar; gazino kültürünün son mirasçısı Günay Restaurant... BVS Group, her biri alanında trend kabul edilen prestijli markaları ve inovatif projeler geliştirmeye odaklı proaktif yapısı sayesinde, vizyon ve deneyimini daha geniş kitlelere ulaştırma hedefini, istikrar ve güvenle gerçekleştirmeye devam etmektedir.

Name: Follow-Me Tracking Solutions
Description:
Follow-Me BV manufacturers remote follow-spot and performer tracking solutions. Follow-Me 3D gives you full independence and creative flexibility with the remote follow-spot and performer tracking operation. The Follow-Me product range allows for growth within the scope of manual tracking right through to full auto tracking. Follow-Me 3D is fixture independent: it can control any manufacturers type of moving light via Art-Net, sACN & PSN to integrate with motion control.

The Follow-Me 3D TWO & SIX systems are scalable, allowing remote manual tracking from 1 performer up to 6 performers; from 12 fixtures to unlimited fixtures within one modular system. Further to this performer and fixture scalability, Follow-Me 3D SIX systems are extensible: designed to allow the addition of the Follow-Me auto tracking module with its range of capabilities and functionality. 

Adding Follow-Me Track-iT allows operators to switch seamlessly between manual and auto tracking. Enabling both the manual and auto tracking methods to be used autonomously, simultaneously and as redundancy, with a live video feed of the performance area through the Follow-Me system’s camera. The auto tracking extension is also a scalable system. For multiple performers just add more tags, to extend the performance area just add more anchors.  The performance area can be increased in size with no real limit to the trackable performance area.

The position information for both manual and auto tracking is used to keep artists in the spotlight using the Follow-Me 3D software. In addition to follow-spot tracking, this positioning information can be sent to 3rd party systems over PSN and OSC.  

Recent applications include international tours e.g. Genesis, TV shows like The Masked Singer, theatrical productions, theme parks and much more!

Name: Madrid Startup Bar
Description:
Es un evento GRATUITO y sin ánimo de lucro.

En el Madrid Startup Bar nos gusta la sencillez. Tras una entrevista a una figura con recorrido en el ecosistema emprendedor, 3 startups presentarán su proyecto durante 5 minutos. Después de cada presentación el jurado y los asistentes les hacemos preguntas y damos sugerencias e ideas para su propuesta. Cada edición termina con la votación de la mejor startup por parte del público y la selección del ganador final entre el jurado.

Cuando terminan las presentaciones y se selecciona el ganador, arranca el networking y nos quedamos para terminar de compartir los últimos detalles y comentarios.

Aquí las startups encontrarán consejos, inversión, sinergias y guías para establecer y lanzar sus proyectos emprendedores. Y tú como asistente vivirás un evento marcado por el talento y las nuevas oportunidades.

Cirkus Cirkör is an idea of how to use the arts to influence, develop and change the world. With curiosity, humour and courage, we explore the diversity and limits of the circus arts. Cirkus Cirkör is a platform where different artistic practices flourish and surprise. We collaborate with many and use the circus as a method to lift and inspire humans.

Description:

Wij zijn er trots op om leverancier te mogen zijn van oa. de musea in Nederland zoals het Rijksmuseum, Van Gogh Museum, Museum voor Beeld en Geluid en het Drents Museum.
Voor een aantal gemeenten in Nederland levert en onderhoudt Lichtpunt de verlichting voor kunstwerken in de openbare ruimte.

Ook buiten Nederland heeft Lichtpunt ervaring met het leveren en installeren van verlichting. Het Toulouse Art Festival en Bread and Butter Berlijn zijn vaste klanten. Daarnaast verzorgde Lichtpunt de afstelling en programmering van “Galleria” (Seoul) en Sheikh Zayed Bridge (Abu Dhabi).

De medewerkers van Lichtpunt hebben ieder een eigen specialiteit. Alle medewerkers van Lichtpunt zijn VCA-gecertificeerd. Daarnaast stellen wij hoge eisen aan het gereedschap dat wij gebruiken, maar ook aan de apparatuur die wij toepassen. Veiligheid én betrouwbaarheid staan bij ons voorop!

Description:
PatchXR is developing the first "no code" and "in-situ" world-builder for music in the metaverse to enable creators or different skill sets and levels to create their own immersive music worlds with the ease of a game but the depth of a complete studio. This is the metaverse as your own playground - entirely yours, totally playful, with all the emotional power of music. Production has begun and release date is set for Summer 2022.

PatchXR is a multinational studio blending deep experience in art, engineering, and sound and music for VR. The team has some of the world’s top talent in the emerging medium of immersive, generative, interactive music for full-sensory virtual reality. That lineage starts with co-founders Melodie Mousset and Eduardo Fouilloux, building on Melodie’s award-winning achievements in VR art and Eduardo’s pioneering work at Animation Studio Denmark and creating the music game prototype MuX.
Now, PatchXR has assembled a global team and a powerful, complete, ground-up engine for VR music, sound, and play. We’ve tested our tools with diverse artists from around the world in closed beta and our Patchathon collaborative experience at top festivals. With that bespoke foundation and world-class experience in multiplayer experience and tech, we’re envisioning new, futuristic ways to play together with music, engaging the full body with vision and sound.

Name: TROPFEST
Description:
Tropfest is the largest short film festival in the world. Truly an innovative concept and platform for filmmakers of diverse backgrounds to gain exposure and experience, Tropfest has become one of the world's best springboards for emerging film talent. 

Since it began in a cafe in Sydney, Australia in the early 1990s, 25 years young, Tropfest has become a global phenomenon. 

The Tropfest mission is to continue to develop the most exciting forum in the world for audiences to come together and celebrate premium short films; and to continue to offer filmmakers a bigger and better stage from which to launch their professional careers. 

Tropfest distinguishes itself from other events by being a 'content generation' platform, rather than merely an exhibition platform. Filmmakers are required to create new works for the festival which must include an item, known as the "Tropfest Signature Item" (TSI) and which changes each year. Films must be less than 7 minutes (including titles and credits) and be world premieres at the Tropfest event.

Tropfest is a not-for-profit organisation.

B17 was founded by principals Rhett Bachner and Brien Meagher.  After partnering with CORE Media Group in 2013, Bachner and Meagher have since created and launched the comedic format Broke A$$ Game Show, for MTV, Fluffy Breaks Even, the FUSE series featuring global funny man Gabriel “Fluffy” Iglesias, as well as several other shows currently in various stages of production. Bachner and Meagher served as producers on ABC’s Emmy-nominated Shark Tank. They also executive produced The Pitch for AMC, Be The Boss for A&E, Real Deal for History, and Supermarket Superstar for Lifetime. In addition, they have developed projects with Snapchat, MTV, Spike, GSN, A&E, Discovery Channel, TNT, Nat Geo Wild, Animal Planet, E! and VH-1.

Prior to B17 Entertainment, Bachner served as Executive Producer on The Henry Rollins Show on IFC, Man Caves on DIY and Co-Executive Producer on Losing It With Jillian Michaels on NBC. Meagher worked as a Development Executive for Mark Burnett Productions, where he was Co-Executive Producer on Shark Tank and Expedition Impossible and also worked on The Apprentice. Bachner and Meagher are represented by CAA.

Description:

We have represented multiple New York Times Bestsellers and many global bestsellers. Currently, the company has over two-dozen film and television projects in active development, based on Clients and/or properties that PMA manages.

We exclusively manage a select group of authors and screenwriters who create commercial fiction, non-fiction, original screenplays and film properties. These writers develop projects with strong potential beyond the book publishing industry—projects with immediate, high-impact value in the film and television industries, as well as the global publishing market. PMA also handles Subsidiary Rights for three publishing houses.

PMA’s sister corporation, Millennium Lion, Inc., is also headed by Peter Miller. Millennium Lion, Inc. is a production entity that coordinates the submission of all potential film properties to television networks, studios and film production companies. This company actively seeks production arrangements for projects to be produced in partnership or in association with Peter Miller, who functions primarily as an Executive Producer.

Name: Wolverhampton Racecourse and Conference Centre
Description:
Set within 22 acres of beautiful parkland, Wolverhampton Racecourse and Conference Centre is one of Britain’s busiest racecourses hosting over 80 horse racing fixtures across the year. Located just under two miles away from Wolverhampton City Centre and 15 miles away from Birmingham, the racecourse comes complete with an onsite Holiday Inn Hotel, parking for up to 2000 vehicles and a helipad for those travelling from far and wide. 
The venue is extremely popular for individuals of all ages and has increasingly become an entertainment destination for guests far and wide. With highly anticipated events including music live, Wolverhampton Racecourse is an all-year round venue that provides a great day and night out for all. 
The venue has a fantastic customer base for both racing and conferencing, and its large outdoor space and vast amount of room options make it the perfect venue for a wide range of events including product launches, exhibitions, weddings, award dinners, outdoor space, carpark hire and centre course hire. 
In addition to a busy racing and events calendar, we also offer a range of live music entertainment. After hosting UB40, The Human league, Ocean Colour Scene, Kaiser Chiefs, Madness and Jess Glynne in recent years the racecourse is playing host to two more incredible artists this summer. Following a fabulous day of racing, on Friday 21st August, The Pussycat Dolls will perform live after racing, and International superstar Liam Payne takes centre stage on Ladies Day the following day, Saturday 22nd August.

Name: CINESTATE
Description:
Founded in 2016 by Dallas Sonnier, CINESTATE is a Dallas-based entertainment studio, specializing in movie production, movie distribution and book publishing. 

With several movies produced, including RUN HIDE FIGHT, BONE TOMAHAWK, BRAWL IN CELL BLOCK 99, DRAGGED ACROSS CONCRETE, VFW, TILL DEATH, and THE STANDOFF AT SPARROW CREEK, CINESTATE is a bastion of independent cinema, separate both geographically and ideologically from the studios of the coasts.

In 2017, the company acquired the iconic FANGORIA magazine, additionally developing it into a brand for producing movies and podcasts, as well as publishing horror novels and books.  Three years later, CINESTATE sold FANGORIA to a new operator who plans to continue publishing the magazine.

Name: The Cast List by OnVogue Management I Casting & Talent Management Platform
Description:
We are the revolutionary casting calls & jobs platform where talent meets industry!
We connect talents with filmmakers, directors, producers, photographers, casting directors, studios, advertising, PR & marketing agencies or anyone who wants to hire talents in real-time, online!
The entire casting & recruiting ecosystem is now more simplified and done in record time!
  Are you a Talent, searching for a job? Want to make (additional) money with your image, skills, abilities or hobbies?   APPLY TO JOBS
  Need Talent?   POST A JOB on TheCastList.com. Make your project public & visible to all possible talents interested in applying! You'll receive suitable submissions instantly, in record time! Find the perfect talent with minimal effort! 

OnVogue Management started in 2005 as a BTL agency, providing hostesses, promoters, models and talents for advertising campaigns, fairs, exhibitions, and events. 
In 2013 we started to focus more on actors and talents, providing casting services and becoming one of the leading casting & talent management agencies in Romania. 
Since then, we have focused on raising the casting process in Romania and Eastern Europe to international professional standards and promoting local talent worldwide. 
For added value we have started to develop a casting system that has helped us to streamline the entire casting process, making it fast, easy, efficient and simple for us, as well as for our clients and talents. 
We have proven experience in organizing the casting process for long and short movies, commercials, music videos and television. Our portfolio includes casting for such names as Universal Studios, HBO, Netflix, for over 500 productions for major film studios and production companies.  
In 2019 we decided that it was time for the entire film industry to benefit from our integrated online “Click & Cast” system! The platform, which we baptised “The Cast List”, was unveiled @ TIFF 2019.  
And that is how The Cast List was born!

Description:
WE VALUE OUR RELATIONSHIPS.
Since 1997, Ghost Atomic Pictures has worked with a variety of clients and industries spanning the globe, and continue to build ongoing relationships that account for the majority of our business. Our clients keep coming back to us knowing they will receive the attention to detail, strong service and outstanding work that only we can provide.

STRATEGY MEETS CREATIVITY.
To be successful in video production, we know that everything we create must be the most visually appealing it can be. We also know that everything must be planned out in great detail from pre-production to post-production. We understand that without strategy behind the creation, the end product won’t be as awesome, so we pour ourselves into both aspects 100%.

SMALL ON PURPOSE.
We operate as a family and treat our clients as part of the team. That’s the way we’ve always been, and we prefer it this way. We find that our clients enjoy it this way too, knowing they will always deal with the same group of people from day one until the project is complete. No gatekeepers here!

WE’RE ON A MISSION.
Since day one, Ghost Atomic Pictures has been on a serious mission to create the most innovative stories for the best clients and industries in the world, and we’re not stopping until we reach the sun.

SERVICES

Ghost Atomic is a full-service production company offering services and facilities worldwide. We provide final assets in a variety of formats for use in multiple mediums.

Name: Ticketmaster Polska
Description:
Ticketmaster, a proud division of Live Nation Entertainment, is the world's leading live event ticketing company selling over 465 million tickets each year and supporting more than 12,500 clients in 22 countries worldwide.  At Ticketmaster, we power the people who create culture through live events, connecting more passionate fans to those experiences than anyone else.  We are innovators that embrace change and work hard to help others succeed.  We believe in open communication and stress accountability, because fans and clients count on us every day.  We strive for ease of use for our clients and fans while seeking out those who have a bias for action versus a desire for directives. 
   
Live Nation Entertainment (NYSE: LYV) is the world’s leading live entertainment company comprised of global market leaders Ticketmaster, Live Nation and House of Blues Concerts, LN Media and Artist Nation Management.

Apply online at lnejobs.com to join the Ticketmaster team today!

Name: ACTV8me
Description:
Actv8me is a FinTech & Marketing Tech provider offering a "transactional media" advertising technology platform. Actv8me adds a “transactional layer” to any media source, allowing advertisers to reach their audiences better, and enabling consumers to receive digital offers that are relevant to them.

Actv8me is a B2B (SaaS) ad activation, consumer engagement and brand advertiser attribution platform that ingests embedded audio and geo-location signals, and pushes customized digital advertisements to users' mobile devices.

Target customers are global media networks, production companies, retailers, the point of sale providers and sports/entertainment event and venue owners.

Actv8me technology enables Chief Marketing Officers to gain a complete view of their campaign performance in real-time and adjust their marketing spend to drive enhanced sales outcomes.

Actv8me's platform makes any broadcast, in-store,and event venue ad instantly actionable, shoppable and trackable.

We are at the intersection of media, commerce, and data.

Name: Creative Zero
Description:
Creative Zero CIC is a collaborative sustainability consultancy supporting organisations across the creative industries. 

We provide practical, hands-on sustainability support across the supply chains of the film, music, events, immersive, photography, and advertising sectors, with additional experience in beauty and the arts.

We work in three key ways:

Driving systemic change by supporting industry and trade associations to set sector-wide standards and strategies.

Empowering creative and production teams with the tools, knowledge, and mindset to work more sustainably day-to-day.

Strengthening supply chain action by helping suppliers take ownership of their emissions and meet growing client ESG demands.

Our goal is to support organisations and the wider industry holistically: enhancing how they benefit both people and planet, while positioning them as leaders in sustainable growth and innovation.

Name: Web3.fm
Description:

It will cover many topics, such as web3 technologies & products, blockchain, DeFi (decentralized finance), cryptocurrencies, DAOs (decentralized autonomous organizations), NFTs, Zero-Knowledge, as well as cultural, political, economic, and social aspects of web3 phenomenon.

Web3.fm's ultimate goal is to demystify web3 and explain complex concepts, ideas, and terms to encourage people from web2 world to start thinking about their career switch to web3.

Hosted by humans from @mvpworkshop

Name: Jinglebell Localization
Description:
Jinglebell Localization is a specialist provider of game localization and audio production services. A spinoff of renowned advertising and audio firm Jinglebell Communication, the company has pioneered game localization services since the early ‘90s, helping developers and publishers worldwide to release high quality localized versions of their titles and partnering on celebrated IPs like Battlefield, Sonic, Skylanders, Warcraft and Half-Life, to name a few. Knowledge and experience accrued on hundreds of multilingual projects are the distinctive features of the Jinglebell Localization family, each member of the team having worked, on average, over 15 years in the field, with stints at companies like EA and Sony Interactive Entertainment.

Jinglebell Localization’s pool of translators is trained on state-of-the-art tools. Each member of the team is an expert on platform terminologies and multiple game genres, and translations are performed under the watchful eye of our experienced Project Managers. Audio quality is ensured through a talented team of dubbing directors and engineers who are fully dedicated to the nuances and demands of game localization. Recordings are solely realized at selected in-country recording facilities, always performed by native speaking voice talents, with all the final audio post-production work, as well as all quality assurance tests, handled at our headquarters in Milan, Italy.

With a growing number of local talents in Saudi who couldn’t reach the right audience, as well as the growing demands for international talents to be hosted in KSA, the market pushed TIME International Holding Co. to establish TIME Events in early 2013, towards filling that gap in the entertainment industry and to offer more than what people expect.

During 2013 TIME Events has developed and organized “Laffat Al Bisht Comedy Tour”, the first Saudi comedy act to tour the US & UK, a public and private workshop given by the world renowned author and advisor “Deepak Chopra” in UAE and the “Polish Humanitarian Action Art Auction” in Riyadh that raised more than SAR 200,000 for the Syrian Refugees.

The company is devoted in providing the public with diverse event content, giving them a long lasting positive experience that they can share with their friends and families, whereby TIME Events goal is to build a sustainable entertainment industry that fuels economy growth.

Name: Follow Fox Events
Description:
Follow Fox events is the new brand identity of VEMS, a company set up in 2014 that has brought the Irish public some of the most exciting and imaginative events the country has ever seen. 

While our name has changed to reflect our family focus, our team's commitment to excellence is unwavering. We offer extraordinary, year-round, immersive events with a trusted reputation for storytelling and memory making. The new whimsical and imaginative branding unveiled in March 2021 speaks to that completely, embodying the mesmerising family-friendly experiences that we create.

We are ambitious always, striving to constantly reach new standards both at home and abroad with events such as Santa’s House Express, Wonderlights and Safari Quest.

Step into our worlds of make-believe where limits do not exist and dreams are made real. Stand in awe at our giant, 12 ft woodland creations. Stare in wonder at our captivating light shows. Become mesmerized by our energetic and inclusive shows. 

We create community both through our dedicated, passionate workforce and our loyal customers who we are humbled to say, have enveloped our work into their annual family traditions. While no two seasons are ever the same, always expect the unexpected while reliving the memories from favourite scenes of years gone by. 

From concept development to event production, event management, promotion and customer service - we oversee all aspects of our events.

We look forward to showing you what’s in store. Sign up to the Fox Club for 
priority ticket access, exclusive discounts and competitions.

Feel free to reach out to see if we could be a good fit: hello@followfoxevents.ie

Name: Formula Bula
Description:
Il n'y a pas si longtemps, dans une charmante petite ville pas très loin d'ici, s'est déroulée une expérience étrange et rare, un événement hors norme. Son nom: Formula Bula, un ovni s’il en est dans la longue liste des festivals dédiés à la bande dessinée et aux arts graphiques.
Ce festival fut une invitation de la Ville de Saint-Ouen et de l'association Ferraille, à découvrir des artistes qui bousculent les règles pour projeter un peu plus en avant ou sur le côté, les arts plastiques, les expressions graphiques, les expérimentations sonores et la bande dessinée, dynamitant ainsi bon nombre de préjugés à la cuirasse solide.

L'association Ferraille qui pilote le festival est déclarée d'interêt général et possède l'agrément Jeunesse et Éducation Populaire.
Elle possède également l'agrément académique Éducation à Paris.
Organisme de formation professionnelle certifié Qualiopi.

Name: Women in Film & Television - Florida (WIFT-FL)
Description:
Mission Statement: Women in Film & Television-Florida (WIFT-FL) is charged with building positive images of media-makers (both women and men), empowering them to achieve their highest professional/creative potential, and helping create more job opportunities throughout the State of Florida. As an organization, we will continue to search for and retain members who have a minimum of two years experience working in the film, television and digital media industries.

Membership levels include: full members/professionals (2+ years experience), "friends" (less than 2 years experience) & students (must have a current student ID).

As a member of WIFT-FL, you become a member of Women in Film & Television Internation (@WIFTI_ ) a global network consisting of 10,000+ members from 44 chapters around the world. There is also an opportunity to become a dual member with NYWIFT.

The Florida Chapter is currently headquartered in Orlando with branches in Tampa Bay, Miami/South Florida, Jacksonville, and Daytona Beach. We are a 501c3.

Please visit our website for more information: www.womeninfilmfl.org

With a roster of high profile clients such as The Walt Disney Company, ESPN and Kalahari Resorts, founder Dan Fontana has assembled a professional team of audio engineers, sound designers and composers who cater to their clients every need from conception to fruition. With over 30 years of experience, Ty Fy has become a one-stop shop for all things music and sound, from small-scale projects to the largest, Ty Fy Studios gets it done.

Insgesamt vertritt LMP Lichttechnik über 18 internationale Marken, die meisten davon exklusiv in Deutschland und weiteren Ländern. Die Lieferanten- und Kundenbeziehungen sind dabei stets auf eine langfristige Kooperation ausgelegt.

Name: Phare Performing Social Enterprise សហគ្រាសសង្គមហ្វារ
Description:
Uniquely Cambodian. Daringly Modern. More than just a circus, Phare, the Cambodian Circus performers use theater, music, dance and modern circus arts to tell uniquely Cambodian stories; historical, folk and modern. The young circus artists will astonish you with their energy, emotion, enthusiasm and talent.
 
Phare artists are graduates of the Phare Ponleu Selpak Circus School in Battambang, Cambodia. The school was founded in 1994 by nine young men returning home from a refugee camp after the fall of the Khmer Rouge regime. They had taken art therapy courses at the camp and wanted to share the power of art to heal among the poor, socially deprived and troubled youth in Battambang. They started with drawing classes taught to a handful of students. Soon they opened a public school, then a music school, theatre school and circus school. Today more than 1,200 pupils attend the public school daily and 500 attend the vocational arts training programs. 
 
In 2013, the school created Phare, The Cambodian Circus as a social enterprise based in Siem Reap, Cambodia, home to Angkor Wat and one of the fastest growing tourist destinations in the world. The mission was to create job opportunities for graduates of the circus school and give back almost 75% of its profits to support the school’s programming. Phare, The Cambodian Circus performs nightly under a big top in Siem Reap and has been seen by over one hundred thousand people. Their productions have also toured extensively across Europe, Asia and the USA.
 
For more information about Phare, The Cambodian Circus and Phare Ponleu Selpak, visit pharecircus.org and phareps.org.

Name: Fox in a Box
Description:
About Fox in a Box 

Fox in a Box is an international franchise network of room escape games, led by a group of enthusiastic people. The company was founded back in 2013. Today we successfully operate on 4 continents (Europe, United States of America, Asia and Australia), with 25 locations.

So, what is Room Escape? 

Fox in a Box Room Escape is a real-life escape game designed for small groups of 2 to 6 people. The courses consist of rooms with a specific theme and objective. The players have to work together using their skill and logic to reach the end goal of the room within a 60 minute time limit. 

We have 9 different escape room games and one more that is under construction. Fox in a Box also offers unique products related to puzzle games. 
What makes our concept so unique is the fact that every single one of our rooms has a great theme and story. Each and every group of players gets the chance to experience the adventure first hand and become the hero of their own story. We have 8 unique themed rooms at the moment - The Bunker, Life Sentence, Zombie Lab, Tesla’s Mystery, The Other Side, Zodiac Killer, Golden Nugget Saloon, Mastermind: A Heist Story and a portable puzzle game chest - Coming Home. All of our games are uniquely designed by our in-house development team. The rooms are tested in the R&D center and on location, as well. Before they are distributed to franchisees, we make sure that every single one of our products is something that the public will surely enjoy. 

To learn more about our room escape, visit website: www.foxinabox.re

The Wharf boasts a setting unlike any other in South Florida. The 30,000 sq ft open-air pop-up welcomes patrons looking to please their palates with some of the most delectable libations and culinary creations in town. We feature a rotation of highly acclaimed chefs curated to please the foodie community and a fish market & raw bar by local seafood favorite Garcia’s.

The Wharf features 8 food vendors, several bars, lounge seating on a wooden deck as well as conversation and dining areas along the river for those looking to enjoy a great atmosphere with friends. The Wharf also offers an impressive amount of dockage space for those arriving by boat.
