Description:
Holissence est un lieu d’échange, de découverte et de bonheur pour toutes les femmes, comme nous qui ont une énorme envie de prendre du temps, de voyager, de méditer, de prendre conscience des choses, de faire du sport, de bien manger et de se faire belle pour elles, pas forcément pour les autres. 

À l’heure où tout est sous contrôle et où tout va trop vite, il est parfois nécessaire de se recentrer sur les choses simples de la vie. S’ouvrir aux autres, faire le point sur soi et se rendre compte de sa force interne pour relever des défis. La femme Holissence s’arrête, respire et admire. 
Elle prend soin d’elle, se fait plaisir, assume pleinement sa féminité et se construit dans l’air du temps. La femme Holissence est curieuse, elle s’interroge beaucoup sur son corps et son esprit. 
Elle recherche une certaine ataraxie en somme. Puiser dans la beauté, ses gestes et rituels ou encore dans la nature pour se sentir mieux, tel est le quotidien de la femme Holissence.

N’hésitez pas à nos contacter : hey@holissence.com

Name: University of Florida Homecoming and Gator Growl
Description:
Gator Growl is the flagship event of the University of Florida and a tradition that has continued to be a prominent for over 90 years.  It is a University of Florida tradition that marks the culmination of Homecoming Week. The pep rally is rooted in the tradition of Dad’s Day when fathers of the then all-male students would visit their sons on campus. In 1924, Dad’s Day was replaced with a Friday night pep rally, which was then accompanied by the addition of comedy skits in 1932. Thus, Gator Growl was born. The massive production consists of musical and comedic entertainers, Gator athletics and performances by UF’s Cheerleaders, Dazzlers and Pride of the Sunshine Marching Band. Hundreds of students work endless hours to create the annual spectacle. The amount of student participation that goes into an event like this has given Gator Growl the right to call itself the largest student-run pep rally in the nation.

Name: Calgary Comic & Entertainment Expo
Description:
The Calgary Comic & Entertainment Expo (AKA: Calgary Expo) is a four-day pop-culture convention held annually in Calgary, Alberta each April. Established in 2006, it has consistently grown in attendance, exhibition and guest list size to welcome over 103,000 attendees in 2016!

Attendees can shop hundreds of vendors and exhibitors, check out panels and workshops, meet their favorite stars and creators, and celebrate what makes them geeky with thousands of other fans in cosplay. 

Calgary Expo has become a homegrown success story, and a cultural phenomenon in Western Canada. The buzz and energy of Calgary Expo reverberates throughout the city. Each year, Downtown Calgary partners with Calgary Expo to present the POW! Parade of Wonders, a public cosplay parade and official opening ceremonies led by Parade Marshall Mayor Naheed Nenshi featuring thousands of costumed fans and Calgary Expo special guests on the streets of beautiful downtown Calgary. After the POW! Parade, fans head to the Calgary Stampede Park to celebrate the first day of the four-day Calgary Expo.

The Calgary Expo is only outreached by super-events like the Calgary Stampede and the Global Petroleum Show. 

To request a media kit and/or enquire about sponsorship availability please email sponsorship@calgaryexpo.com or visit our website.

Name: Shaw Organisation Group of Companies Pte Ltd
Description:
Founded in 1924 by Sir Run Run Shaw and Tan Sri Runme Shaw, the Shaw Organisation Group of Companies is engaged in the businesses of motion picture entertainment, real estate development and management services.

It also manages one of the largest private philanthropic organisations in the world - The Shaw Foundation. Founded in 1957, the Foundation supports initiatives in education, welfare, medicine, arts and heritage.

With an uninterrupted 92 year history in the entertainment business, stretching through the silent film era to the digital age, the Shaw Organisation story is arguably the story of the Asian film industry itself. 

For the better part of the 20th Century, the company pioneered and operated the largest private studios in Asia, first in Singapore, Malaysia and then in Hong Kong, producing over 1000 feature films including Hollywood co-productions like "Blade Runner". 

Iconic Asian directors like John Woo and actors like Chow Yun Fatt began their careers at the Shaw Studios in Hong Kong. Malay entertainer P Ramlee became a cinematic legend in South East Asia when he acted, sang, directed and produced for the Shaw Studios in Singapore.

Today, the "Shaw Brothers" branding is still synonymous with entertainment for millions throughout Asia and beyond.

In Singapore, the Shaw Organisation is the largest distributor of films from all over the world as well as the major movie exhibitor with an exclusive digital IMAX partnership and a network of screens featuring the latest in cinematic technology like Dolby 7.1 Surround, RealD 3D systems and 4K (HFR) projection.

The company also develops, manage and lease commercial and residential properties all over Singapore and Malaysia. The most prominent real estate in its extensive portfolio is the Shaw House and Shaw Centre department store, retail and commerical offices on Orchard Road in Singapore.

Name: Ludus Magnus Studio
Description:
Ludus Magnus Studio was born in 2014 from the experiences and skills of the partners, combined with their passion for the world of entertainment, from board games to modeling, from video games to comics, from books to cinema.
Boardgames with miniatures it’s the segment where the team best enhances their characteristics: the ability to develop exciting stories,
innovative game design mechanics, beautiful 40mm miniatures became the winning features of Ludus Magnus Studio.

Our Mission: Create top quality boardgames, top in miniatures, components, mechanics, to become market leader, growing our brand and selling globally.

Boardgames are what we do and what we want to keep doing. We want to produce only the best, selecting talented artists and collaborators,
challenging ourselves to always go further, with a continuous review and improvement of all processes.

Miniatures are one of our main focuses, often the first business card for our products, recognizable for the attention to detail and the
dynamism, they are already a reference in the boardgame industry.

After the initial design and processing phase, we engage in close collaborations with leading manufacturing companies, choosing topof-
the-range materials and technologies with them, applying with them continuous quality controls.

The design of the game is what will thrill and entertain our fans for years, so it deserves a special attention. Researching and experimenting original mechanics is for us a constant stimulus and a continuous opportunity for innovation and distinction.

We want to continue to create and spread top quality boardgames, taking on ambitious challenges and innovations, to do so for the
next foreseeable future it’s therefore essential to guarantee a fair profit, for us and for our partners.

Initially, it was our goal to conquer all areas of this industry. We worked on feature films with such powerhouses as New Line Cinema, supplied talent for music videos for Aerosmith and Prince, discovered supermodels that ended up on the covers of Vogue and in major campaigns, produced fashion shows and supplied all of the models for a national home shopping channel. The owners of Agency have worked in the modeling and acting industry in the Twin Cities since the 80's and feel that we have grown and adapted with the market as it changes. Name: Digital Rise
Description: Digital Rise is an awarded studio that designs and produces engaging storyliving experiences, bringing collective immersive entertainment to a general audience. Our creative process starts with building a narrative universe, a universe strong enough to transcend formats and dimensions of reality.

Name: Tampa Theatre
Description:
The historic Tampa Theatre is a passionately protected landmark and one of America’s best-preserved movie palaces. The majestic building is owned by the City of Tampa and operated as a dynamic film and cultural center by the not-for-profit Tampa Theatre Foundation. Recently named one of  "the world's 10 most beautiful cinemas" by the BBC, Tampa Theatre is one of the nation's most utilized historic theaters, hosting more than 600 show times each year, including first-run contemporary film, classic movies, live concerts, tours, field trips and rental events.

Tampa Theatre is a proud member of the League of Historic American Theatres and the Art House Convergence.

Name: Bolshoi Theatre, Moscow
Description: Bolshoi Theatre, Moscow is an entertainment company based out of Moscow City, Russia.

Name: VAG Productions
Description:
VAG Productions is comprised of three incredible women dedicated to creating actionable, real world change & intersectional gender equality through scripted and unscripted television.  



V for Victoria Elena Nones



A for Ana Bretón



G for Genevieve Thiers



Put it together and what have you got? VAG productions! Because well, they thought it was hilarious. (When else do the first letters of your three names make the best acronym ever?)

Name: Cheyenne Frontier Days
Description: Since 1897, the Daddy of ‘em All has been kicking up dust with the world’s largest outdoor rodeo and western celebration. Cheyenne Frontier Days draws top professional rodeo cowboys and cowgirls who compete for more than $1 million in cash and prizes. Complementing the daily rodeo action are behind-the-chutes tours, trick riding and a wild-horse race. A Native American Village, an old frontier town, a saloon, dancing, a chuck wagon cook-off, pancake breakfasts and an art show carry through the frontier theme. Rounding out the program are a carnival midway, an air show, top-name entertainment, professional bull riding shows and several parades that include antique carriages and automobiles. Cheyenne Frontier Days takes place each summer during the last full week in July.

Name: Box Puppet
Description: At Box Puppet Entertainment is professionally conceptualized and managed venture which helps you achieve your objectives within your budget and on time. We are full fledged Events and Production Company keen to create Audio Visual content of every sort and have done lot of Media Promotions corporate events and production work for your clients.  Customer relationship and loyalty are the key pillars for our growth !!

Name: Vasanth TV
Description:
VASANTH TV is a wholesome family Entertainment, News & Current Affairs Satellite Television channel, primarily a Tamil Channel with mix of other Indian languages and English, promoted by Mr. H Vasanthakumar of Vasanth & Co. Group . It is set to create a new dimension in TV viewing, keeping in mind the taste, preferences and expectations of the people of all ages not only in India but globally too.

VASANTH TV is committed and dedicated to providing un-blased and meaningful contents with a unique programme mix consisting of regular news bulletins, news headlines, current affairs, tele-serials, feature films, film based comedies, reality shows, historic and heroic events and lives of valorous men and women of the pre and post Indian independence era accurately documented tele-films and many more.

Name: Lucas Talent Inc.
Description:
Lucas Talent Inc was established in 1986.

Founder Richard Lucas has a BFA Acting from the University of Alberta and later studied at UBC in their MFA Directing program. He subsequently worked as a professional actor, director and producer. When his contract was finished for Vancouver’s world’s fair EXPO 86 he opened Lucas Talent Inc. Since then the company has grown into a thriving literary and talent agency that represents actors, writers and directors and other “above the line” personnel.

Lucas Talent Inc. is proud to represent many of Canada’s leading talents in the film and television industry. We believe that the most important asset that we have in our industry is our reputation.

Name: Set Decorators Society Of America
Description: A social and networking organization of working set decorators in film, television, commercials and other media with emphasis on education and preservation of the art of set decoration.

Name: Giftit Cards
Description:
Why Giftit Gift Card?
- You can never go wrong with your gift
- Avoid any unwanted gifts
- Instant & Personalised cards
- Covers all Budgets & Occasions 
- In group or individually 

Celebrant can redeem it via mall gift cards, store vouchers, 1500+ products or cash refund.

Name: IMC Cinema Group
Description:
IMC Cinema Group is a diverse leisure and entertainment company primarily consisting of cinema operations. 
Our IMC cinemas range from 5 - 14 screens and are located in most major cities and towns in both Ireland and Northern Ireland.

Highest levels of customer service, consistency and diverse scheduling in a friendly, clean and welcoming environment is at the core of IMC operating goals.
For queries please do not hesitate to contact us via the 'contact us' section on our website www.imc.ie

Name: Cinemoz Group
Description: Cinemoz Group owns and operates a group of mass media companies focused on Film & TV entertainment, digital distribution, and media advertising sales across Middle East & North Africa (MENA) markets.

Name: Nova Australia
Description: We are a dedicated entertainment company, using drones as our medium to tell stories and entertain crowds.

Name: Digital TV Group DTVG
Description:
DTVG is a leading international company specialized in the production, development and distribution of audiovisual services for customers worldwide. Markets and distributes media and multi-screen content for the international market.

A major audiovisual producer who’s portfolio includes its owned companies, partnerships and subcontractors creating the largest network of Hispanic and Portuguese speaking production companies with the aim to always offer its customers the best value in the region, in line with their requirements, needs and budgets.

"Our philosophy is to prioritize customer satisfaction and above all, thanks to our experienced and dedicated team, we achieved stable relationships over time."

Name: Oranum
Description: For over 10 years, Oranum has provided clarity to millions of people through our diverse array of Psychics, Astrologers, and spiritual experts. Our live specialists are dedicated to fulfilling our mission to "provide spiritual help to people in need." Come join us and experience the magic!

Name: Lucid Trails Entertainment Pvt. Ltd.
Description: Online Travel Channel that promotes services, products; offers first-hand information on destinations & news on global tourism industry.

Name: Tull Stories
Description:
With a long and established history of ‘connecting people with stuff’, we release films in cinemas and online, and help cinemas find – and understand – their audiences.

In distribution, Tull Stories is both an all-rights distributor and servicing partner. We work with a rich palette of documentaries, world cinema, experimenta, outdoor/adventure and independent film.

In exhibition, we provide experience and specialist support for cinemas across film booking and programming, audience research and development, staff development and fundraising.

Recent clients and partners include Doc Society, the British Film Institute, Indigo, Oska Bright Film Festival, Encounters Film Festival, Met Film Distribution, Guerilla Films, Park the Bus and many more. 

Founded by John Brabourne Awardee Jonny Tull in 2017, Tull Stories is built on a foundation of almost 30 years of experience and success in the UK cinema sector. 

If you’d like to have a chat about working together in any capacity, please get in touch.

- UK film distribution (theatrical and VOD).
- audience development and strategy for cinemas and arts
venues including sector-wide market research.
- film programming and programme strategy for cinemas.
- film booking for cinemas.
- marketing, PR and grassroots community impact for film
releases and cinemas.
- fundraising for film production, release or audience
development.
- film production support.
- mentoring, skills development and workshops.

Name: Fantasy Kingdom
Description:
Fantasy Kingdom has become a favourite destination for group outings, picnics, company or family day out. Attractive packages [including food, gifts, shows and travel to and from the park] are available. Facilities for arranging conference, annual general meeting or any corporate event, birthday, wedding or any family party, photo session or video shooting are also available here. Prince Ashu, Princess Lia and their animal friends Zuzu, Bobo, Zipper and Bangasaur are always at the park welcoming everyone with a smile. Oh and they have many games for you. 

Come discover Fantasy Kingdom. Legend has it that this mysterious Kingdom was lost many years ago because the people in Prince Ashu's land had forgotten how to smile. Then many years later it magically reappeared in Ashulia. 

Fantasy Kingdom is FUN, LOUD & OUT OF THIS WORLD. Ashu & Lia and their wacky buddies Zuzu, Bobo, Zipper and Bangasaur [that's a Bangladeshi dinosaur!] will rock your world.

Name: Planètes
Description:
Planètes est la première association de communication et d'audiovisuel étudiante de France (Classement Aneo 2018). 

De la vidéo à la photo en passant par le graphisme, nos 50 membres sont formés à l'utilisation de logiciels et de matériel professionnel afin de répondre au mieux aux besoins de nos partenaires associatifs, qu'ils soient internes ou externes à notre école, et à différentes entreprises telles que Henkel, Panzani, Lydia, Xbox, HP... 

Besoin de tourner une interview ou une vidéo d'annonce ? De couvrir un événement ? De créer des affiches, un site web ou de réaliser un shooting photo de qualité professionnelle ? Nous serons ravis de vous accompagner dans ces missions.  

Notre adresse mail : 
planetes.ressources@gmail.com

Retrouvez nous sur : 
http://www.planetes-gem.fr/ 
flickr.com/photos/130396854@N06/albums

Name: iNK Stories
Description:
We create exceptional stories across platforms. With a distinctive and award winning pedigree in games, film and immersive, iNK Stories is creating and collaborating in the new wave of original storytelling from traditional to cutting edge formats.

Lauded by Fast Company as “Innovation Agents” iNK Stories groundbreaking original titles inspire audiences while earning critical success from institutions such as BAFTA, United Nations, Sundance Film Festival, Academy of Interactive Sciences, DICE, GDC, IGF, FoST, SXSW, New York Film Festival, The Game Awards and have been awarded Facebook’s Game of the Year, Tribeca Film Festival Storyscapes Award, International Mobile Game Awards Winner, Indiecade Jury Prize, IGN’s Best of E3, PAX 10 and more

Name: Um Nome Produção e Comunicação
Description:
Born in Brasília (Brazil's capital) in 2011, Um Nome Produção e Comunicação is a content and communication agency focused on creative market, culture, entertainment and social impact projects. We operate in integrated strategic planning, digital marketing, data analysis and processing, visual identity development, web development, multi-platform content production, events production and crisis management.

The company was at the forefront of the largest projects due to Brasília's creative sector in recent years and, among the projects in which it stood out are Cena Contemporânea - Brasília's International Theater Festival, Faces project, Festival de Brasília do Cinema Brasileiro, Na Praia project, Porão do Rock festival, Latinidades Festival, Bienal Brasil do Livro e da Leitura, Banco do Brasil Cultural Center, Caixa Cultural, Brasília International Film Festival, Samba Brasília project, University of Brasília, Espaço Cena and countless others.

The agency focuses on integrated communication processes for this sector, presenting solutions in multiple languages and processes to clients' communicational demands. In addition to the festivals, Um Nome develops communication processes for sports, gastronomy, beauty and well-being, consumption, entrepreneurship, technology and tourism sectors. Um Nome provides artistic careers for national and international music groups and is a producer of social impact events and projects. One of them is the international festival Favela Sounds, which projects artists from Brazilian slums around the world and works on training and capacity building in high social vulnerability territories.

Name: MEB Rotterdam
Description:
MEB Rotterdam is een vooruitstrevende onderneming, gespecialiseerd in entertainment en evenemententechniek. MEB verhuurt en verkoopt geluid-, licht-, beeld-, podiumtechniek en complete DJ Shows. Daarnaast bemiddeld MEB in nationale en internationale artiesten. Daarmee is MEB een full-service entertainment en AV techniek leverancier voor evenementen. MEB is gevestigd in Rotterdam.

Wij kenmerken ons door iedere opdracht af te stemmen op onze opdrachtgever en het bezoekersprofiel. Dit betekent dat op het evenement de techniek en het entertainment altijd goed aansluit bij de wensen en budgetten waardoor de perfecte sfeer wordt neergezet om de boodschap van onze opdrachtgever, de organisator van het evenement, over te brengen op de bezoekers van het evenement. Of het nu gaat om een business presentation, congress of zakelijke of persoonlijke feestavond; MEB zorgt voor de beste beleving. Altijd.

Name: The Late Late Show with Craig Ferguson
Description: With the number one show in late night, Craig Ferguson is easily one of the funniest and smartest people working on television. His humor is hilarious and unpredictable, and he does the best, most entertaining interviews anywhere.

Name: Jands Production Services
Description: Jands have been in business since 1970, so we know what people who work in live entertainment really want: the best possible sound at the best possible price. Jands delivers this, everytime, and why? Because we’re dedicated to what we do, and we’re good at it. Whether you’re a sound engineer, a production manager, an event organiser or a promoter, Jands can provide everything you need to give your audience and your artists the best possible live production experience.

Name: Rogue Creative Agency
Description: Rogue Planet, Inc. is a creative advertising agency aimed at providing the best creative AV marketing campaigns in the business. We specialize in one on one client relationships and a full scale personalized experience.

Name: Flying Fish
Description:
We are more than just filmmakers. We are storytellers, visionaries, innovators, collaborators, visual content creators. For any screen, any format, every channel. We represent directors from New Zealand, Australia and Europe and work with some of the best creative agencies around the world.

Founded in 1986, Fish continues to create a wide range of high level, entertaining and engaging moving footage across all platforms. We are a fully fledged production company and a one stop shop, with our Post facility 'MANDY VFX' and 200m2, 3-Wall Cyc Studio all in-house, ensuring the process from start to finish is seamless. 

People enjoy working with the Fish family which we're very proud of, it is a testament to the top-notch work we produce.

Name: Reel Tribe
Description: Reel Tribe is a community of creative professionals aiming to produce content that is funny, socially relevant, and sustainable. We aim at entertaining the audience and at the same time making sure we don’t end up creating content just for the likes and views. We intend to give food for thought in every content that we put across, which makes it stand out. From Instagram posts to YouTube videos to podcasts to Instagram magazine, we have it all which makes Reel Tribe a whole package. Reel Tribe is for everyone, let it be Gen-Z or millennials and even for boomers who might need help changing false perceptions they might have. Reel Tribe thus, entertains and educates.

Name: Rewind
Description: Offrez une expérience fluide à vos visiteurs, avant, pendant et après leur visite. Créez plus vite, moins cher. Diffusez où vous voulez.

Name: Brain Racers
Description:
Brain Racers is a first of a kind massive multiplayer cognitive race, available on iOS devices with Android coming soon.

Our goal is to build an epic eSports platform that celebrates brain athletes, like we do physical athletes in the world. We want to allow superstars to emerge based on their brain performance, essentially creating the 'Michael Jordan' of mind sports. Superstars become idols, inspiring millions of people. And in this case inspire everyone to get behind continuously learning and having a sharp mind.

Lumosity meets Jeopardy meets Are you Smarter than a Fifth Grader!

The best part about it, anyone can train and win.. any age, gender, race, location. Absolute equal opportunity!

Name: Sugar Studios LA
Description:
We are the premier headquarters for Independent Film Post Production from Los Angeles to London.

Our unique model allows us to offer full premium post packages for clients seeking an affordable, seamless workflow with for Theatrical, Streaming Platform and Festival deliveries.

Sugar Studios provides Dailies, Editorial, HDR/SDR/P3 Dolby Vision Color Correction, DI, CG VFX, Grfx/Titles, Full Post Production Sound packages including Dolby Atmos, 5.1 and Stereo deliverables ..And with our Screening Theater and Edit Bays all under one roof, we are truly the destination for Independent Film!

Sugar Studios spans 3 full floors in the prestigious Wiltern Theater Tower with additional studio facilities in London, UK.

FEATURE FILMS / DOCUSERIES / SCRIPTED SERIES / TRAILERS

Name: Polin Aquariums
Description: Polin Aquariums designs and builds public aquariums, taking them from initial concept and architecture to construction, business plan, procurement of living creatures, and development of brand identity. It aims to achieve excellence with its team of experienced architects, engineers, biologists, veterinarians, and technical experts. The secret to the success of these attraction centers comes from this integrated setup developed through experience.

Name: H-E-B Center at Cedar Park
Description:
H-E-B Center at Cedar Park (formerly Cedar Park Center) is a multi-use, city-owned, entertainment facility managed by Texas Stars, LP that holds 6,863 seats for hockey, 7,200 for basketball and up to 8,700 for concerts and other events. The state-of-the-art arena has 24 suites (including four party suites) and 545 club seats with a private club lounge. The Center opened in September 2009 with George Strait and has gone on to host numerous events including Carrie Underwood, The Killers, Eric Church, Def Leppard, Ellie Goulding, Motley Crue, Tool, Disney on Ice, Cirque du Soleil, Ben Hur Shrine Circus, and many more. 

H-E-B Center is located at the intersection of New Hope Drive and Toll Road 183-A in Cedar Park, Texas and is home of the AHL’s Texas Stars since the 2019-10 season, affiliate of the Dallas Stars. H-E-B Center has hosted the AHL Calder Cup Finals in 2010, 2014 and 2018, with the Stars winning the Calder Cup in 2014. The venue is also home to 2017-18 NBA G League Champion Austin Spurs, affiliate team of the NBA’s San Antonio Spurs. H-E-B Center hosted the 2012 NBA D-League Finals as well, with the Spurs capturing the 2012 D-League Championship. For more information, please visit www.HEBCenter.com or follow @HEBCenter on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram.

Name: Audio Acoustics
Description: Audio Acoustics is geluidsleverancier en distributeur van Adamson Systems,  AuviTran, Heil Sound en Teqsas en dealer van Shure en FrenchFlair Audio.

Name: Watermelon Productions
Description:
We are an entertainment content production company ready to create and develop projects from initial concept to finished product. Or, as we often say, “from a single seed to a whole watermelon”.

Our experience lies in areas like Content Creation (Story Concept, Script Writing, Storytelling and Production of Animation, Music, Video and Advertisement) & Content Development (Gamification, Apps, Transmedia Narratives & Brand Content). We apply our talent to partners around the world and to our own productions, keeping our focus on the chosen audience. And, whenever we can, connecting every project to a cause.

After all, why not help the world while doing what we love? 

We are creators, producers and packagers passionate about what we do, who realize that a good slice of watermelon can perform wonders!

Name: PROSOUND SHPK
Description: PROSOUND e filloi aktivitetin e saj në vitin 2006, nxitur nga dashuria dhe pasioni për botën audio-vizuale. Që nga ai moment kompania është rritur gradualisht duke siguruar jo vetëm produktet dhe përvojën më të mirë në treg, por duke sjellë gjithashtu ide dhe risi inovative. Në këtë mënyrë PROSOUND vendosi standarte të reja në tregun audio-vizual në Shqipëri. Ne ecim me moton që për të ofruar shërbime cilësore duhet të zgjedhësh njerëzit e duhur, të investosh tek produktet cilësore dhe të punosh me pasion!

Name: COCAY STUDIO
Description:
Somos un estudio especializado en tecnologías multimedia y de interacción, ubicado en la Ciudad de México dedicado a generar experiencias multi-sensoriales. Creamos proyecciones, instalaciones, espectáculos e interactivos innovadores, ofreciendo una conexión entre las marcas y sus consumidores, destacando la experiencia visual.

Concentramos tecnología, arte y diseño en una sola comunicación, la comunicación toma otro rumbo hacia genuinas experiencias, generando una nueva percepción del espacio y envolviendo al usuario desde la sorpresa.

Name: This Morning Live
Description:
This Morning Live brings the award winning This Morning TV show to life!

The event is a shopping festival with hundreds of well-known brands, small boutiques and unique retailers across a wide range of products including fashion, beauty, home, food & drink and more.

You can learn the tricks of the trade from top beauty experts, watch live catwalk shows, sample delicious food and drink and so much more, all in the company of your favourite This Morning family members. It's the ultimate lifestyle event and a fabulous day out.

Name: Megalectrics Ltd (Operators of Classic FM 97.3 & The Beat 99.9FM)
Description:
MEGALECTRICS LIMITED is a reputable and wholly owned indigenous company with its headquarters in Lagos. The company was registered with the Corporate Affairs Commission in July of 2001.

Megalectrics has been a consistent player in the broadcasting and telecommunications industry with various landmark projects that have been the envy of our competitors; our unique and proprietary approach to projects ensures that we continue to remain the number one choice for clients when it comes to broadcasting and telecommunication projects.

Megalectrics has since 2005, managed and operated the radio arm of the Delta State Broadcasting Services, in all aspects of Radio Broadcasting. This includes programming, training and day-to-day management.

Megalectrics was in 2007, granted a Radio Broadcast Licence for Lagos. Under this licence, the company is presently operating a youth-targeted Radio Station called “The Beat 99.9FM, from 26, Keffi Street in Lagos.

The company also operates Classic FM 97.3, a radio station targeted at the over 35 demographes, from the same address.
This is done under a management contract with the licensees – M/S Pinklet Limited.

Both stations cover the Lagos region, with potential listenership of over 15 million inhabitants.

Megalectrics strives to build relationships with its clients and its unparalleled understanding of the environment helps it to provide unique and tailored solutions to meet the requests of its various clients. 

The company has in the course of its operations, collaborated with and developed affiliations with market leaders in digital broadcast technology, not only in Nigeria, but also worldwide. 

These partners are available on a project specific basis, to second their staff to our offices, not only for a successful contract implementation, but also to transfer technology and train our and the client’s staff.

Name: Splash e Spa Tamaro
Description:
Aperto 365 giorni all’anno, Splash e Spa Tamaro è situato tra Lugano e Bellinzona, ai piedi del Monte Tamaro nel paese di Rivera (Canton Ticino, Svizzera).
È un parco acquatico con centro benessere di oltre 9000 metri quadrati.

Si compone di tre cupole:
- Cupola dello Svago, dove si trovano: la Vasca Onde, la Vasca Poolbar dove sorseggiare ottimi drink senza neppure uscire dall’acqua, Vasca Esterna Panoramica riscaldata con docce a fontana, idromassaggi, geyser e lettini ergonomici immersi nell’acqua ed infine, la piazza dei compleanni ed in fine, l’area bimbi, con scivoli e spruzzi d’acqua in cui i più piccini possono giocare in sicurezza.

- Cupola del Divertimento, composta da adrenalinici 5 scivoli: Wash Machine, Mania, Tunnel of Horror, Black Night e Gravity Killer (ogni scivolo ha diversi limiti d’accesso in base a età ed altezza, consultabili su splashespa.ch). 

- Cupola del Benessere, che ospita l’ampia e moderna SPA con 4 saune tematiche (sale, argilla, castagno ed esterna), percorso hammam con 3 bagni turchi, Vasca Musicale, Vasca Salina Iodata riscaldata, percorso Kneipp e cabine per massaggi e trattamenti estetici. Inoltre, l’innovativa Grotta della Neve e la Vasca di Contrasto esterna, per rinfrescarsi dopo una calda sauna.
Inoltre, il moderno Fit-Center appena rinnovato con attrezzi isotonici di ultima generazione e la Virtual Tv, un’ampia sala corsi e il Triform, per allenamenti funzionali all’aria aperta.

L’accesso all’area benessere è consentito a partire dai 14 anni se accompagnati da un adulto e dai 16 anni da soli.
Nella struttura, è presente un ristorante uno self-service nell’area delle piscine.
Struttura accessibile ai disabili. 
Accesso non consentito con animali.

Come arrivare:
- Auto: percorrendo strade cantonali e autostrada, uscita Rivera
Parcheggio gratuito fino alle ore 12:00; nel pomeriggio CHF 1.-/ora fino a max. CHF 5.-
- Treno: fermata Rivera-Bironico a soli 300 metri.

Maggiori informazioni e orari: www.splashespa.ch

Name: The Anime Network
Description:
Founded in 2002, Anime Network is the largest anime on demand cable network in North America. In 2009, Anime Network launched an independent online streaming service to meet the growing demand for instant, on-the-go viewing 24/7.
 
With thousands of hours of top-quality content across a broad array of genres, Anime Network’s fresh programming blocks and original content keep our viewers up to date with the latest anime straight from Japan. We've kept true to our name by bringing fans the hottest new titles as well as the enduring classics that made anime in North America a household word. Anime Network’s programming portfolio includes genres such as action, adventure, comedy, drama, mystery, science fiction/fantasy, romance, thrillers and horror.
 
Anime Network offers viewers instant access on an increasingly wide array of devices, including their computer, gaming console, TV, tablet and mobile device. Viewers can also find Anime Network on many other affiliates such as Amazon, iTunes, Hulu, Google Play, PlayStation and Xbox.

Name: Classic Hall
Description:
Projetado para ser a maior e mais moderna casa de shows da América Latina, o Chevrolet Hall é palco dos principais espetáculos artísticos nacionais e internacionais realizados no Brasil desde 2001, ano de sua inauguração.

Uma de suas marcas é a localização privilegiada, na divisa entre os dois principais municípios pernambucanos: Recife, capital do Estado, e Olinda, cidade patrimônio histórico da humanidade. A poucos quilômetros estão alguns pontos estratégicos como o Aeroporto Internacional dos Guararapes Gilberto Freire, hotéis, praias, shoppings, hospitais e o centro comercial e histórico das duas cidades.

O Chevrolet Hall está localizado em uma posição medial do litoral nordestino, região do Brasil conhecida pela beleza natural exuberante e por contar com sol e clima quente durante a maior parte do ano. Do Recife, chega-se em poucas horas a outras capitais nordestinas, como João Pessoa, Maceió e Natal. Outras duas metrópoles, Fortaleza, ao Norte, e Salvador, ao Sul, estão distantes cerca de 800 km da capital pernambucana.

Name: Escape the City
Description:
Una actividad totalmente diferente: planteamos la idea de superar el mítico "Escape Room", pero en la calle. Por lo que en realidad, no habrá que salir de ninguna sala, pero tendréis que realizar diferentes actividades en equipo para resolver el enigma que os envuelve.  
Todo ello mediante una ruta secreta por diferentes ciudades y sus rincones únicos. Buscando potenciar el trabajo en equipo, dar un verdadero valor a todo lo que nos rodea y, sobre todo, acercar a todo el mundo la verdadera esencia de la ciudad mientras pasáis un buen rato.

Name: Slug Disco
Description:
Slug Disco is a UK-based indie game developer and publisher with a focus on nature-inspired titles.
Founded by a trio of friends, Slug Disco developed Empires of the Undergrowth, an RTS of ant colonies and insect warfare. Name: A Lady Macbeth Initiative
Description:
Shakespeare’s Lady Macbeth has always been given a bad rap. Ambitious (the negative kind), devious, manipulative, instead of ambitious (the positive kind), intelligent and strategic! What is often overlooked in Macbeth is that Lady Macbeth, not her husband, drives the story. She channels all of who she is into the advancement of her husband’s career. It was the only option open to her. Not anymore. Today, Lady Macbeth would have been able to wield her considerable talents for her own advancement. It’s time to rehabilitate Lady Macbeth’s reputation.

Inspired by organizations focused on providing financing for women-made feature films, A Lady Macbeth Initiative was created to facilitate a toehold in the film industry for women who have the talent but may not have the access or opportunities to achieve their goals. This Initiative provides mentorship, connections and resources for funding to produce short films with behind-the-camera teams composed primarily of women. Why short films, you may ask? Festival exposure for short films is one of the best ways to get noticed by the industry. 

OUR INAUGURAL PROJECT

MAXINE

After choosing motherhood over her career, a spitfire radio producer suffers a tragic loss and sets out to conquer the patriarchal world of the 1930s.  Maxine imagines one woman’s struggle to find her place in the world, when the conventional pathway has been closed to her.

Why Maxine needs to be made: Generations of women have fought against inequality in the workplace and the culture at large. Without the setbacks and successes of the women who came before, there would be no #MeToo. The fight for equality does not end or begin with the movement of the day. Maxine reminds us that as far as we’ve come, we still have a long way to go.

For more information visit: https://ladymac.org or https://maxinefilm.com

Name: Dignity Health Sports Park
Description:
Dignity Health Sports Park, home of the LA Galaxy and Los Angeles Chargers, is southern California’s home of world-class competition and training facilities for amateur, Olympic, collegiate and professional athletes. Managed by AEG Facilities, the $150 million, privately financed facility was developed by AEG on a 125-acre site on the campus of California State University, Dominguez Hills (CSUDH) in Carson, California. Dignity Health Sports Park features an 8,000-seat tennis stadium, a 30,000-seat stadium for soccer, football and other athletic competitions and outdoor concerts; a 2,000-seat facility for track & eld and a 2,450-seat indoor Velodrome – the VELO Sports Center – for track cycling. Dignity Health Sports Park is home to Major League Soccer’s LA Galaxy, the five-time MLS Cup Champions. Dignity Health Sports Park is also home to the United States Tennis Association’s (USTA) High-Performance Training Center, the national team training headquarters for the U.S. Soccer Federation (USSF) and EXOS, an international training center for elite and professional athletes. 

For additional information please visit www.dignityhealthsportspark.com.

Name: Gdański Teatr Szekspirowski
Description:
Gdański Teatr Szekspirowski jest instytucją artystyczną założoną wspólnie przez Województwo Pomorskie, Gminę Miasta Gdańska i Fundację Theatrum Gedanense. Prowadzi szeroko zakrojoną działalność kulturalną i edukacyjną.
Celem działalności Gdańskiego Teatru Szekspirowskiego jest prezentacja i upowszechnianie kultury teatralnej, edukacja teatralna dzieci, młodzieży i nauczycieli oraz kreacja działań artystycznych. Co roku GTS wspólnie z Fundacją organizuje międzynarodowy Festiwal Szekspirowski w Gdańsku.
Festiwal prezentuje dzieła Williama Szekspira w wykonaniu zarówno polskich jak i światowych wykonawców. Historia Festiwalu Szekspirowskiego sięga roku 1993, kiedy to Fundacja Theatrum Gedanense zorganizowała pierwsze Gdańskie Dni Szekspirowskie.

Po czterech latach i czterech edycjach, w 1997 roku, z okazji obchodów Tysiąclecia Miasta Gdańska, Dni zostały przekształcone w Festiwal Szekspirowski. Do 2019 roku włącznie odbyły się 23 edycje Festiwalu, podczas których na wszystkich scenach Trójmiasta zaprezentowano ponad 300 spektakli z teatrów z Polski, Europy i innych zakątków świata. Od 12. edycji Festiwal organizują wspólnie Gdański Teatr Szekspirowski i Fundacja Theatrum Gedanense.

Gdański Teatr Szekspirowski edukuje teatralnie dzieci, młodzież oraz nauczycieli, promuje młodych artystów, wspiera rozwój twórczości i talentów teatralnych. Na bogaty program edukacyjny GTS składają się: lekcje szekspirowskie, cykle wykładów, spotkań, warsztatów teatralnych i artystycznych oraz zajęć praktycznych. Dział Edukacji GTS realizuje również międzynarodowe projekty edukacyjne. Oferta działań edukacyjnych skierowana jest przede wszystkim do osób z Trójmiasta i województwa pomorskiego, ale również do zainteresowanych z całej Polski.

Name: Nantucket Film Festival
Description:
The Nantucket Film Festival was founded by brother and sister team Jill and Jonathan Burkhart in 1996. The Burkhart's lived on the island year round, and with their love of movies and the community, they knew it was the perfect place to begin a film festival. In 1997, Mystelle Brabbée joined the team and today serves as the Executive Director. NFF continues to thrive, always remaining true to its mission to promote the cultural awareness and appreciation fo the art of screenwriting in the world of cinema.

These days, NFF has become one of the premiere destination film festivals in the world. Visitors come from all over to experience our preview screenings, signature programs, and stand out hospitality on a magical island rich with history, a friendly atmosphere, and beautiful sandy beaches.

Join us for the 27th edition of the Nantucket Film Festival, June 22-27, 2022!

Name: Beverly Hills Film Festival
Description:
Hosted in one of the most renowned cities in the world since 2001, the International Beverly Hills Film Festival is considered among the most exclusive and influential film festivals in the world. Through linking the groundbreaking talent of emerging filmmakers and exposing the community to the latest innovations in the cinema field, the Beverly Hills Film Festival (BHFF) exists as a cinematic, cultural patron. The Beverly Hills Film Festival’s objective is to merge today’s filmmaking pioneers with the wealth of cinematic heritage by edifying and developing the cinematic community and enhancing the impact of the arts and humanities.

By bringing the entire community together, the Beverly Hills Film Festival welcomes over 44,000 attendees annually, providing them the platform to congregate and network for 5 days. The BHFF creates opportunities for the attendees to appear at the exciting red carpet publicity events, world premiers, and screenings of numerous exceptional films and be a part of educational panel discussions, workshops, and seminars, along with special events, and VIP after parties and priceless networking opportunities.

The BHFF aims to involve and serve the next generation of entrepreneurs, investors, leaders, and advocates in its community to provide cause work opportunities; to partner with authors and educators who wish to inspire and enlighten the public in the field of arts and humanities; to create and host innovative, educational conferences, panel discussions, digital productions through partnerships with renowned institutions and organizations; to compile archival data and produce innovative material dedicated to cinematic history and theory; to recognize and reward the unique skills of emerging filmmakers; and to fulfill the philanthropic vision of its sponsors in order to preserve and enhance the culture of the arts in return.

Name: Divertiss’Mans
Description:
Vous avez deux passions : les escape games et l'apéro ? Ce jeu est pour vous !

Le 1er escape game mobile qui peut se jouer à la maison ou en extérieur, en famille ou entre amis, le midi ou le soir !

Il s'agit d'une grande glacière avec, à l'intérieur, tout ce dont vous avez besoin pour un apéritif réussi avec des produits de qualité (boissons*, nourriture* et ustensiles).
Mais attention, votre apéro est emprisonné dans différents mécanismes ou boites à clé / à code.
Pour y accéder, vous devez jouer une partie d'escape game au scénario drôle et actuel.
Plus vous avancez dans le jeu, plus vous libérez de l'apéro !
*Vin, bière artisanale, jus, saucisson, fromage, terrine, chips, bonbons, ... vous avez des préférences, des allergies ? je m'adapte, consultez moi.
Le jeu suit tous les codes d'un escape game classique : scénario, immersion, manipulation, réflexion, fouille, coopération.
Les énigmes sont variées, elles font appel à différents mécanismes.
Le jeu se joue en autonomie : un onglet d'indices et de solutions vous est remis avec le jeu.
Les indices permettent d'adapter le jeu pour tous les niveaux (le niveau de difficulté du jeu sans indices est de 4 sur 5), ils vous permettent aussi de gérer votre temps de jeu (il n'y a pas de temps limite pour jouer, le jeu dure entre 1h et 3h selon la motivation de l'équipe et le recours ou non aux indices).

Tarifs** :

 4 personnes : 28€ / personne
 5 personnes : 26€ / personne
 6 personnes et + : 24€ / personne

**En option : la garantie d'avoir 100% de produits circuit court - supplément 5€ / joueur).

 Possibilité de chèques cadeaux !

Les + :

 Un super scénario et des énigmes innovantes
 Le prix d'un escape classique mais avec un apéro de qualité en plus
 Pas de limite de temps
 Possibilité de jouer chez soi (pratique pour gérer les enfants et pas besoin de prendre le volant après l'apéro) 
 Adapté pour tous
 Ne nécessite pas de pass sanitaire

Name: Canal Megapix
Description:
Desde 2008, o Megapix leva para a TV os grandes sucessos do cinema mundial e hoje é o canal de filmes mais assistido da Pay TV*, além de ser considerado como o melhor dos pacotes básicos voltado para o gênero filmes, de acordo com a pesquisa PMV 2015, realizada com os profissionais de agências de publicidade e anunciantes.

Um dos canais Globosat – maior programadora da América Latina –, tem em sua grade produções de diversos gêneros dos maiores estúdios de Hollywood, campeões de bilheteria, além de longas premiados em festivais e destaques do mercado independente.

Com intervalos curtos e um dos menores índices de repetição, é o canal com o maior acervo de filmes da TV por assinatura, composto por aproximadamente 500 títulos dublados em português ou com opção de áudio original e legendas eletrônicas.

Para atender a todos os perfis de assinantes, o canal tem seis faixas fixas de programação. Um dos destaques é a Sessão Megapix,  que exibe os maiores e mais recentes sucessos de bilheterias toda sexta-feira, às 22h35.  

•	Sessão Powerpix: campeões de público e bilheteria e filmes de ação consagrados. Programação: Quarta-feira, às 22h. 

•	Sessão Megakids: nas manhãs de sábado, o canal dedica duas faixas de sua programação ao público infantil. 

•	Sessão Retrô: sempre nas manhãs de domingo, são exibidos clássicos do cinema. 

•	Sessão Interativa: o espectador escolhe ao que deseja assistir. Dois filmes disputam o voto do assinante na página do canal no Facebook (www.facebook.com/canalmegapix) e o vencedor é exibido às quintas-feiras, na faixa das 20h.

•	Sessão Megateen: Os principais filmes para o público teen. Sempre sábados, às 16h.



Fonte:
* Ibope MW PNT 15 Mercados – Faixa Horária (19h00 às 25h00) – Audiência – indivíduos c/ Pay TV – Janeiro à Julho/2015
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Métropole Films Distribution
Description:
Metropole Films launched in January 2006 with the objective to bring the best of international and national cinema to Quebec cinephiles. 

Since our inception, Metropole Films has had the privilege of distributing six Palme d'or winners: 4 Months, 3 Weeks and 2 Days (2007), The Class (2008), The White Ribbon (2009), Amour (2012), Blue is the Warmest Color (2013), Winter Sleep (2014); seven Academy Award winners: The Lives of Others (2006), The Counterfeiters (2007), The Secret in Their Eyes (2009), In a Better World (2010), A Separation (2011), Amour (2012), The Great Beauty (2014); and many other award winning films from around the world, such as Blue Jasmine, Midnight in Paris, Pina, Of Gods and Men and War Witch.

Name: Black Podcasting Awards
Description:
Black Podcasting Awards (BPAwards) celebrates, spotlights, and bolsters Black podcasts for more wins and successes. 

It achieves this primarily by producing an annual awards program and ceremony. It also produces three newsletters: BPAwards Opportunities, BPAwards Observer, and New Podcast Releases (distributed by BlkPodNews).

BPAwards Opportunities shares podcast(-friendly) award program, grant, and speaking gig applications.

BPAwards Observer tracks all Black podcast/er wins and majority Black hosted podcast headlines.

New Podcast Releases (distributed by BlkPodNews) spotlights seven new podcasts each Wednesday in collaboration with BlkPodNews 



So far, BPAwards has given out 126 award wins, and 350 award nominations.

It emerged from a February 2020 Twitterstorm eager to see #podcasting steer clear of its version of #OscarsSoWhite  
It is a community-founded, volunteer-fueled annual awards program & ceremony. 

It is 501c3 incorporated. 

BPAwards appreciate referrals of applicants, volunteer judges, gifts, sponsors, and support otherwise.

Description:

Through the development of distinctive concepts, Enviseam combines art with global talent that differentiates artists, galleries, museums and auction houses with their existing audiences, extending their reach and awareness by introducing art to new cultural consumers in unique ways.

Enviseam’s fusion of culturally-relevant key opinion leaders, entertainers and artists creates a new space transcending the boundaries of fine art and entertainment. The skillful and harmonious integration of the power of popular culture icons and new media is galvanising sophisticated collectors while opening the ivory towers of art to the mainstream.

The art world becomes an entertainment destination achieving both exceptional commercial results and a profound cultural impact.

Enviseam – transcending the boundaries of fine art and entertainment.

Name: Source International ETS
Description:
Problem
Large mining and oil extraction activities are some of the biggest environmental problems in the world. The US Environmental Protection Agency recognizes mining waste as the major environmental concern in the US. Remote areas are especially affected by the lack of environmental controls. In some areas, mining water waste can present concentrations of pollutants up to a thousand times the legal limit. In some cases the median age at death of affected communities is less than half of the national average and some pollution-related illnesses can have an incidence rate approaching 90%. Moreover, human rights, as well as the impact on traditional ways of life of Indigenous populations, are often insufficiently accounted for. 

Solution
We support local communities that are dealing with environmental pollution and health problems primarily caused by extractive industries. Our goal is to bring local communities and extractive corporations together to develop sustainable solutions. We do this by providing high-level technical and scientific support to local communities, helping them assess the damages caused to local resources and building their capacity to safeguard their capacity and their human rights. 

Impact to date
Based on our studies, the Honduran Supreme Court ruled that the country’s mining law was unconstitutional because it adversely affected public health. Parliament subsequently passed a new law that was more critical of these practices. 
In Peru we published a study on the pollution caused by an oil company in the Amazon forest. As a result, the regional government and the company are now working together with the community in order to clean the area. Illnesses have since decreased by 50%. 
In Mexico, thanks to our work, the community of Carrizalillo obtained approximately $10 million a year for five years in infrastructure compensation.

The charming presenter reads aloud questions displayed on the screen and turns on the timer. 15-20 seconds are usually quite enough for the team to brainstorm and give a correct answer.

The game platform we use checks the answers instantly and automatically. As well as it displays summarized game results in real time in the screens, so after each question, each team can track their progress and see their ranking, making the game process even hotter and more exciting!

We have it all: puzzles, riddles, anagrams, questions on logic and even a fight in the mud between Charlize Theron and Scarlett Johansson;) Sometimes we’ll even cross the lines and push people of their emotional comfort zone, but all in all, It’s a very unique, engaging, entertaining, and unforgettable experience that will left no bored people in the room!

Description:
Bernhard Paul’s Circus-Theater Roncalli ist ein poetisches Schauspiel für Jung und Alt. Bereits zu den Anfangszeiten Roncallis gelang es dem Direktor und Gründer, nicht nur preisgekrönte und lang für die Manege verloren geglaubte Stars, sondern auch außergewöhnliche Vertreter anderer Kunstformen in seinen Circus zu holen und so seinem Publikum immer wieder ganz neue Geschichten zu erzählen. 80 historische Wagen, historische Foodtrucks, 120 Artisten, Musiker, Künstler und Mitarbeiter - was mit einem Traum begann, hat sich bis heute zu einem der größten Circus-Unternehmen entwickelt. Millionen Menschen hat Roncalli in den vergangenen Jahrzehnten in ganz Europa –
von Moskau bis Sevilla über Berlin, Amsterdam, Köln und Wien – mit seiner unverwechselbaren Poesie, Akrobatik und Clownerie verführt und dabei Menschen zu Circus-Fans gemacht, die es vorher nicht waren.

Name: STAGES St. Louis
Description:
STAGES St. Louis (STAGES) is a professional, not-for-profit organization with two primary focuses – Professional Live Musical Theatre and Musical Theatre Arts Education. STAGES is committed to preserving and advancing the art form of Musical Theatre through excellence in performance and education. The mission of the STAGES Performing Arts Academy (SPAA) is to inspire passion, creativity, and curiosity in students of all ages.  

STAGES St. Louis opened in 1986 with a $50,000 budget and part-time seasonal staff of eight. Today the company employs a full-time staff of 17 overseeing an annual budget of $5.1 million. Seasonally 150 additional actors, designers, and crew members bring the Mainstage productions to life. STAGES’ shows are of the highest quality and recognized as among the finest in the region.

Annually STAGES productions reach nearly 50,000 patrons from a wide variety of backgrounds. STAGES’ audience includes a spectrum of ages and socio-economic levels from 238 cities in 30 states including 160+ Missouri zip codes. STAGES provides hundreds of complimentary tickets to underserved populations, including low-income students, enhancing arts availability in St. Louis. 

The level of excellence in STAGES Artistic programs is matched in caliber by the highly respected SPAA. Regionally renowned for its innovative educational opportunities, the SPAA is the only local performing arts academy connected to a professional theatre company. The SPAA will not turn a student away due to financial need, providing more than $70,000 in scholarship assistance and underwriting annually.

Subtle Insight Entertainment, a new, full-service entertainment company specializing in video production, script writing, and artist management for a variety of artists in the industry today, this week announced their company will be officially open for business starting May 15, 2017.

Born from a passion for producing meaningful and memorable content that tells compelling stories and provides high quality area talent with local representation, Subtle Insight Entertainment is expertly positioned to rise above the competition after just a few short months in operation.

“After spending years cultivating important relationships in the ever changing entertainment industry, I’m ready to take my affiliations to the next level by launching an entertainment company that connects all of our clients with the important figures they need to be successful,” said Henry Jones III, president of Subtle Insight Entertainment.

Jones presently represents award-winning photographer Marlon Tyler as a client. Jones was recently commissioned to manage social media content for Richard T. Jones of The Wood, Why Did I Get Married, and The Sarah Connor Chronicles. Additionally, both Henry and Richard are working on various projects for upcoming releases.

Subtle Insight Entertainment stated they are also in the planning stages for shooting their first short film, The Roommate, later this year.

“The entertainment industry is a highly elusive, competitive, and hard-to-crack entity in the world today,” said Jones. “It’s all about connections, and I’ve been working very hard for years to build up a reputable network base from which I can benefit all of my clients. Plus, with our teams expertise in media shooting and cultivation, we are ready to start accepting clients this May 15.”

For more information, or to follow the entertainment company on Instagram, Twitter, or Facebook.

Name: The California Copyright Conference
Description:
The California Copyright Conference was established in 1953 for the discussion of copyright-related areas pertaining to music and entertainment. There were seven founding members. The CCC expanded during the next two years, taking its present form in 1955 under the presidency of famed songwriter Harold Spina.

Today, the scope of the CCC has broadened to cover all matters pertaining to music industry issues. The organization has grown to over 300 members from all areas of the music and entertainment industry, including publishers, songwriters/composers, attorneys, music supervisors, representatives from trade publications, performing rights societies, music libraries, motion pictures, television, multimedia, Internet, and record companies.

The California Copyright conference hosts dinner panels, webinars, and mixers aimed at connecting and educating music industry professionals. Our season runs from September to May, with our annual holiday party taking the place of the December meeting. The monthly meetings feature a guest speaker or panel on a broad range of subjects of interest to the members, as well as a “Legal Update” on current litigation and legislation that affects our industry. In addition, we hold joint meetings with other organizations such as The Society of Composers & Lyricists, the Production Music Association, the Guild of Music Supervisors, ASCAP, BMI, and SESAC.

The general membership of the CCC elects the Officers and Board of Directors of the organization. Members are encouraged to participate as fully as possible in all meetings and activities of the organization. Panel fees, event fees and membership fees may be tax deductible as business expenses as permitted by law. MCLE credit is available for attorneys. The CCC is a non-profit corporation.

We invite you to join the members of the California Copyright Conference as we continue to serve the music and entertainment industry by promoting dialogue about the issues of concern to all of us.

Name: neci
Description:
Neci est la première plateforme française de vidéo à la demande collaborative et sans abonnement, qui vous envoie au cinéma !

Qui dit cinéma, dit plateforme proposant uniquement des films.

Comme c’est gratuit, vous vous dites que forcément il y a de la pub ? Eh bien non, pas à proprement parler !

Neci, c’est un nouveau concept, qui n’existe sur aucune plateforme VOD, mais qui existe depuis toujours au cinéma…
Comme au cinéma, avant que votre film commence, vous aurez les bandes annonces des prochaines sorties en salles, pour être au courant des nouveautés ciné et ainsi aller voir les films qui vous intéressent.
Ce sont donc ces bandes annonces qui vont financer la plateforme et ainsi vous permettre de visionner tous nos films gratuitement !

Nous mettrons aussi en place un système de fidélisation de nos utilisateurs, en leur offrant des places de cinéma à partir d’un certain nombre de films visionnés sur la plateforme.

Nous sommes les premiers à proposer ce concept de plateforme VOD gratuite, qui va envoyer ses utilisateurs au cinéma, et nous espérons que ce concept innovant vous plaise autant qu’à nous !

Vous êtes distributeur de films, exploitant, investisseur, vous travaillez dans le monde du cinéma ou tout simplement notre projet vous inspire, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter !

Name: TEDxNeomaBSParis
Description:
Qu’est-ce qu’un TEDx ? 

 Les premières conférences TED ont vu le jour en Californie en 1984 et se présentent sous forme de speech de 18 minutes environ. Organisme à but non lucratif, sa mission se résume au concept « Ideas Worth Spreading ». TED a ainsi pour vocation de vulgariser des idées novatrices et permet une ouverture d’esprit sur des points de vue différents. Les exposés couvrent un large éventail de sujets, tels que les sciences, les arts, la politique, les questions mondiales, la musique et plusieurs autres sphères de compétences. Connues ou moins connues, tous les intervenants véhiculent des ambitions ou des projets à la fois novateurs et humanistes.

 Dans l'esprit des idées qui méritent d'être diffusées, TEDx est un programme d'événements locaux auto-organisés qui rassemblent les gens pour partager une expérience similaire à celle de TED. Lors d'un événement TEDx, la vidéo TEDTalk et les orateurs en direct se combinent pour susciter une discussion approfondie et une connexion au sein d'un petit groupe. Ces événements locaux auto-organisés sont appelés TEDx, où x = événement TED organisé de manière indépendante. La conférence TED fournit des orientations générales pour le programme TEDx, mais les événements TEDx individuels sont auto-organisés (sous réserve de certaines règles et réglementations)
