Designed by John Storyk of Walters-Storyk Design Group/New York, Studio Trilogy features Northern California’s only 80-channel SSL 9000K mix console with Ultimation. Our tracking suite is outfitted with a 32 Channel API 1608 and our post-production suite features a Digidesign ICON D-Control.  We offer ISDN, Video link and monitoring for scoring to picture, overdubbing, voice-over, sound design, a large collection of microphones and a full complement of vintage and modern instruments and gear for every session from any studio.

Name: ACTIVISION BLIZZARD ITALIA SRL
Description: ACTIVISION BLIZZARD ITALIA SRL is an entertainment company based out of CORSO SEMPIONE 221, LEGNANO, Milano, Italy.

Name: Metalworks Studios
Description: Established in 1978, Metalworks Studios was originally a creative workspace for the legendary Canadian supergroup Triumph. Since then, Metalworks expanded over a 40-year time span into a six studio powerhouse that today ranks as Canada’s consummate world-class studio facility. Recognized for an unprecedented 17 times as the "RECORDING STUDIO OF THE YEAR"  at the CMW Canadian Music Industry Awards, Metalworks has become the undisputed leader in the recording studio business in Canada. It is little wonder that Gold & Platinum records line the corridors at Metalworks.

Name: CopyBet
Description:
Established in 2016, CopyBet is an innovative Sportsbook that encompasses a broad spectrum of services for successful betting with over 140K pre-match events monthly.

Every day, thousands of players enjoy placing bets with our Sportsbook.

We base our service on the latest technologies and gather all the latest information regarding betting onto one platform, resulting in high recognition among the betting community.

Name: Theatre Royal Brighton
Description:
Established in 1807, Theatre Royal Brighton has entertained audiences for over 216 years. This Grade II* listed building is one of the oldest theatres in the country and continues to delight audiences with pre and post West End shows.
Theatre Royal Brighton has a capacity of 952 seats split across four level (Stalls, Royal Circle, Second Circle & Gallery).

TRB is owned by the Ambassador Theatre Group, the global leader in live entertainment.  ATG owns and operates 46 venues, is an internationally recognised and award-winning producer and operates a market leading theatre ticketing business.

Name: BLAM! Edition
Description: BLAM ! est un éditeur haut-savoyard qui, depuis 2015, s’est forgé une solide réputation dans le milieu des jeux de société familiaux. Avec plus d’une dizaine de jeux édités (dont les grands succès Celestia, Chakra et Cartaventura), la marque française est désormais reconnue pour la qualité de l’expérience offerte aux joueurs, tant au niveau des illustrations que par sa capacité à créer de véritables aventures immersives.

Name: The REV Theatre Company
Description:
The REV Theatre Company showcases "Broadway in the Finger Lakes," at three venues in "History's Hometown" of Auburn, N.Y.

You can experience a diverse offering from "On, Off, and Beyond Broadway" annually from May through October. First and foremost, fans of Broadway's biggest and most celebrated shows can get all the glitz and glamour of the Big Apple at the Merry-Go-Round Playhouse in Emerson Park on the banks of Cayuga Lake.

Musicals in development get a kickstart at The Carriage House Theater in The PiTCH series' open forum where creative teams and fans interact to try to create the next great musical.

Finally, The Rev operates out of the West End Theater, to rent out to community members and offer unique, often educational or special occasion shows and events.

Auburn is already home to a thriving theatrical community, and the region boasts internationally-renowned wineries, luxury spas, crystal blue lakes, and historical treasures.

Altogether, The Rev will offer you the best of everything that contemporary musical theatre has to offer. So start planning your trip now. Your seats are waiting.

Name: Showcenter Complex
Description: Showcenter Complex es un  magnífico espacio de entretenimiento, diseñado para ser una de las mejores referencias culturales y de espectáculos, integrándose perfectamente al diseño arquitectónico exclusivo de San Pedro.

Name: SLUSHY.com
Description: SLUSHY is a secure mobile web based platform for content creators to find, grow, & monetize their audiences. A creator first, tech-driven tool, designed with key discoverability features and audience insights. In a market where existing solutions (OnlyFans, Patreon) fall short of their creators' demands, SLUSHY provides an alternative solution for professional content creators that prioritizes their monetization, support and management needs. SLUSHY incorporates a powerful legal framework, with robust compliance tools including simplified consent, ID verification, and content moderation. The new home of unrestricted content, SLUSHY is here.

Name: The Zoom Studios
Description:
Everything in life is about a story. A story of love, friendship, heartbreak, betrayal and above all Life. The Zoom Studios brings your stories to life.


Follow us here for updates on our work, the entertainment industry and branded content.

Name: Deutscher Podcast Preis
Description: Gesprochene Worte lassen Tag für Tag ganze Welten in unseren Köpfen entstehen. Mit dem Deutschen Podcast Preis möchten wir den Menschen hinter diesen Worten eine entsprechend große Bühne geben und die besten Formate, Ideen und Momente jährlich auszeichnen.

Name: Ellis Park Racing & Gaming
Description:
Here in Henderson, Kentucky, Ellis Park Racing & Gaming has a reputation for offering our guests a much-needed oasis from the ordinary, a gateway into the world of American horse racing and a gaming floor with 300 incredible Historical Horse Racing (HHR) machines. We pride ourselves on being a destination where our guests can meet, unwind and create great memories.

Our history goes all the way back to the 1920s. While we started as a modest racetrack, we’ve had the unique opportunity to grow with the times, alongside our community. We are where we are today because of the incredible communal support we have been shown over the past century of our business. To pay that support forward, we created The Players Club rewards program to keep you gaming and winning every day. 

Our card members receive exclusive deals and bonus prizes all month long. The best part is that our sister property Owensboro Racing & Gaming is less than 40 miles away and accepts our rewards card and honors all our promotions for gaming, dining, live entertainment and more. Essentially, one card grants you access to two outstanding racing and gaming facilities. 

At Ellis Park, the race is never over. That’s precisely why we implemented simulcast wagering, which enables you to watch and bet on racing, nationwide. However, racing and betting is not all we offer. Our venue also hosts 300 HHR machines that combine aspects of traditional slot machines with pari-mutuel betting. It is truly a one-of-a-kind gaming experience that can easily be enjoyed by new and seasoned players, alike.  

Additionally, if you get hungry while gaming, our Dade Park Grill will be sure to satisfy whatever cravings you have. At Ellis Park, “ordinary” is checked at the door. Great memories start here!

Name: Penrith Performing & Visual Arts
Description:
Penrith Performing & Visual Arts (PP&VA) brings together The Joan, Penrith Regional Gallery (Lewers), Q Theatre and Penrith Conservatorium to grow cultural access and creative opportunity across Greater Western Sydney.

We present performances, exhibitions, music education and new work that reflect our region and support artists and audiences at every stage of their journey.

PP&VA is entering a period of growth. We are deepening partnerships, expanding commissioning and preparing for key programming milestones toward 2026 as demand for culture continues to rise.

Our theatres, gallery spaces and studios are platforms where ideas, creativity and community connect. With a growing audience base, PP&VA provides access to a region undergoing rapid cultural and social transformation.

We exist to help shape Greater Western Sydney’s cultural identity and future by connecting people, creativity and opportunity.

Name: laronde
Description: La Ronde un parc d'attraction sur une île entre Longueuil et Montréal

Name: Sound Nightclub
Description:
Sound Nightclub brings a unique and innovative twist to the Los Angeles nightlife scene, located in the heart of Hollywood. Blending modern décor with raw, industrial touches, Sound presents modern creative concepts, such as an expansive sunken dance floor, elevated DJ booth, spacious private tables with unparalleled sight lines to the stage, and cutting edge audiovisual and lighting designs throughout.

Sound boasts weekly events with the top names in the international dance scene, specializing in house, deep house, tech house, and techno, with monthly events in bass music and related genres. It is known for introducing Ibiza's most famous labels and recognized parties to the West Coast. Recognized year after year in DJ Mag's Top 100 Clubs, it was also ranked 5th in Top Nightclubs in the US (Rolling Stone, 2014) and was nominated for Best Club in the World in the EMAF Awards, 2016.

Name: Group Line
Description:
Group Line is responsible for selling 750,000 West End theatre tickets per year and is probably best known for creating the 'Book Now Pay Later' facility, a facility that allows customers to hold tickets without commitment, allowing time for final numbers to be confirmed prior to payment. If you don't need the tickets, you don't pay for the tickets!

Since 1999 Group Line has been voted 'Best Ticketing Agency' a record-breaking 11 times at the annual Group Travel Organiser Awards, was awarded the 2008 'Best Website Award' at the same awards, secured the 2006 and 2011 Coach Tourism 'Ticket Supplier of the Year' Award and was also the proud recipient of the prestigious Group Leisure Award for 'Best Ticketing Agency' in 2006, 2008, 2009, 2010 and 2011. This is an achievement the Company is very proud of.

We offer competitive group rates for all West End shows as well as UK attractions, London restaurants and hotels. When booking a group theatre visit through Group Line you will be assigned a dedicated Account Executive who will guide you through the whole booking process. Regular information is sent out to our group organisers, via brochures, newsletters, mailings and emails, keeping you up-to-date with the latest London theatre news.

We are an ATG Entertainment Company.

Name: The TV of Tomorrow Show
Description:
Interactive TV Today (ITVT) and The TV of Tomorrow Show (TVOT) are pleased to announce The TV of Tomorrow Show (TVOT SF 2023), a 2-day in-person conference in San Francisco's at the beautiful General's Residence mansion at Fort Mason.

Taking place May 24-25, TVOT SF 2023 will bring together hundreds of industry leaders who are driving innovation in such areas as advanced advertising, audience measurement and research, attribution, broadcast/local TV, FAST, AVOD, SVOD, interactive programming, social video and beyond, to share unique insider-insights into their work and the strategic thinking that guides it, and to explain and debate their respective visions for television’s future. The event will provide an unparalleled opportunity not only to hear from—but to interact with—the women and men who are leading our industry into tomorrow.

Name: Kooky
Description:
Step off the beaten track and go Kooky! Let your passion grow your artists!

“Kpop fans are often told their passion is craziness, however Kooky is a space where you can find a community of like-minded fans, and let your passion lead the way. Step off the beaten track and go Kooky! Embrace the passion inside you, and let that flame become the fuel to help your artists grow!”

Kooky is a platform for fans to turn their passion into active support that helps to grow their favourite artists, both new and old. They can support artists by actively participating in the album creation of small rookie/indie artists, voting for their favourite artists as a community to win awards that help boost their artists recognition, and earn their own personal rewards. 

Kooky also provides unique content and support opportunities for fans and artists alike. Kooky has exclusive Kooky Magazine & Kooky TV content for fans to enjoy, as well as lots of projects that fans can actively participate such as birthday and anniversary banner events. Whereas artists both big and small can grow their audience by creating exclusive content and connecting directly with their fans.

Name: Clubbing TV
Description:
Clubbing TV is available worldwide in native HD and in English. It is the brand of the millennial generation and the first global Lifestyle TV channel exclusively dedicated to live & coverage of DJs events, international dance music, club culture, clubbing destinations, festivals and concerts from around the world. Our 24/7 channel brings the best live events, DJs, music videos, lifestyle programs and party reports from the hottest dance floors and electro festivals worldwide. 

Clubbing TV makes dance music available in more than 120 million households in over 90 countries with 20 exclusive shows representing all electronic music styles and flavors. Clubbing TV broadcasts every week more than 2 hours of live shows & concerts and 4 weekly exclusive shows with full social media interaction. Our « Clubbing Experience » show, live from concerts and festivals, our Live DJ Sets, our TOP Charts and our insane talk show "The Big Bad Bass" are just a small preview of Clubbing TV’s exclusive premium content.

Also available on demand, Clubbing TV's VOD portfolio includes more than 1500 titles with 700 hours of HD and 300 hours of 4K content.

Can’t wait to see? Watch our show reel https://pro.clubbingtv.com/showreel

Name: Psychopathic Records, Inc.
Description: "The label that runs beneath the streets".  Current artists are: Insane Clown Posse, Twiztid, Blaze, Boondox and ABK.  JCW (Juggalo Championship Wrestling) is Psychopathic Records' wrestling company, Psychopathic Radio is the internet radio station, and Hatchet Gear is the online merchandise store.

Name: KulturCenter Limfjord
Description:
KulturCenter Limfjord (KCL) create great experiences for the whole family and is visited annually by more than 500,000 guests.

You can experience everything from concerts, stand-up, talks, theater and much more with artists from home and abroad. The concert hall seats 1,200 people, who sit in comfortable seats with perfect view to the stage and excellent sound and acoustics.

KulturCenter Limfjord has three sport halls. In the largest of the halls, Interfjord Arena, Skives united Handball Club has home. The three halls are all newly renovated and very suitable for accommodate large events such as parties, meetings, exhibitions, etc. You can also let yourself inspire by the modernized rooms, which can accommodate everything from wedding parties, general meetings, conferences or other assemblies. Over the years, KCL has hosted many festive events, and is always available to meet your needs, such as special decorations, catering and other facilities. Only the imagination sets the limits of your event.

In the same house we also have a large subtropical water park where something is offered for the whole family. From the water park you can see our modern and newly renovated gym, which also offers various fitness teams.

You can also enjoy a good movie in the cinema, Cinema3, which has three halls with luxury chairs with motorized neck and footrests. On certain occasions such as world premieres, the house's concert hall is transformed into Jutland's largest cinema hall, CinemaXL, with a screen of over 100 m2.

Find more information about which events KulturCenter Limfjord offers on the website: www.kclimfjord.dk.

Name: The Teacher Think-Aloud Podcast
Description: A podcast for teachers of English around the world

Name: Markant Theater Maashorst
Description:
Markant Theater Maashorst is hét gastvrije cultuurpodium voor lokale, nationale én internationale theaterproducties en evenementen voor Maashorst en omgeving. Al meer dan 25 jaar lang weten we onze bezoekers te raken met verrassend theater, vrolijke familievoorstellingen, hartveroverend cabaret, daverende theaterconcerten en overweldigende evenementen.

Of het nu gaat om een voorstelling, een evenement, of een heerlijk diner in ons Zuid-Amerikaanse a-la-carte Restaurant Cusco, gasten voelen zich bij ons direct thuis. Dankzij onze brede aanbod en onze Brabantse gastvrijheid. Daar hebben niet alleen de bezoekers plezier van, maar ook onze zakelijke partners. Dankzij onze schaalbare en multifunctionele zalen en de inzet van de top of the bill techniek kunnen we (bijna) alles realiseren. We denken graag mee over bijzondere ideeën en laten onze creatieve geest dan de vrije loop. Kom langs in Maashorst (Markt 32, Uden), of bezoek ons online voor het theaterprogramma, tickets en alle eventmogelijkheden.

Laat je raken in Markant Theater Maashorst.

Name: FRAMEWORX
Description:
Frameworx is a company focused on creating lasting connections between people and the artists and brands they love through one of a kind experiences.

We provide bespoke creative solutions for both live and broadcast events and performances. From Design and Direction, to multiple aspects of Creative Production, including: Screens Content, Lighting and Video Programming and Operation, technical drawings, and Pre-visualization. Our solutions range from fully vertical to a la carte. 

Past and present clients include: Peso Pluma, Kendrick Lamar, Bad Bunny, Nike, Honda, Microsoft, Rosalia, Mora, Karol G, Lil Baby, Eladio Carrion, Meaghan Trainor, Big Sean, and more.

Name: Business Careers in Entertainment Club (BCEC) - Berkeley Chapter
Description:
The UC Berkeley chapter of the Business Careers in Entertainment Club (BCEC) was established in the Fall of 2008 under the national organization, the Business Careers in Entertainment Association. BCEC was formed with the goal of helping students prepare for careers in the entertainment industry.

"Our mission is to provide all undergraduate, graduate, and doctoral students, regardless of academic degree, with the essential career development mind-set and hands-on experience vital to obtain professional entertainment networking connections, internships, and job opportunities within both the creative and business ends of the entertainment industry."

We serve students of all majors, providing them with the professional development, experience, and network to successfully pursue a career in entertainment. Whether you are interested in business development, corporate finance, accounting, marketing, engineering, creative roles, or any other roles in entertainment, or are simply looking for a community here at Cal, we hope to see you at our many events throughout the semester.

Name: White Oak Music Hall
Description: White Oak Music Hall (“WOMH”) is a five-acre, three-stage indoor/outdoor live music complex and private event venue, located just north of downtown Houston at 2915 N. Main St.  WOMH hosts over 400 live music and private events per year. WOMH features both local and nationally touring artists. Come see us, we can’t wait to share a show or event with you!

Name: Queens Gaming Collective
Description: We are creators, streamers, and competitors leveling the playing field for women in gaming.

Name: Brainstorm Media
Description:
Founded in 1995, Brainstorm Media is a full service US film distribution company.  The company is a boutique with a strong base of strategic partners.

While it has handled thousands of movies, the company focuses more on quality than on volume. Widely recognized for its expertise in TV and VOD, it continues to push the threshold by integrating digital, TV, and theatrical strategies.

The company has produced dozens of movies and series and has a full slate of projects in development. In an effort to maximize quality, it works closely with networks and Internet platforms to develop alternate financing and marketing strategies.

Name: The Millennial Entrepreneur
Description:
Leading entrepreneurship podcast following the most inspirational young entrepreneurs and how they started their journeys, along with how they overcame challenges and rejections to get to where they are now.



The show is hosted by Sina Sadrzadeh, co-founder of Wing, Great British Entrepreneur Awards: Young Entrepreneur of the Year 2020 Finalist and the TargetJobs One to Watch Undergraduate of the Year 2019.

Name: D'GROUPE
Description:
Fundada en el año 2011 en Medellín, Colombia, impulsados por el arte y la ciencia de la imaginación, ofrecemos servicios integrados de entretenimiento por medio de diferentes unidades de negocio:
-Eventos: D'GROUPE se caracteriza por la producción de eventos de alto impacto, complejidad y contenido creativo.  Contamos con amplia trayectoria en eventos deportivos, culturales, gubernamentales en el país. Nuestra versatilidad nos ha permitido producir eventos en la mitad del mar, a bordo de un avión a 30.000 pies de altura, en ríos, ciénagas con las condiciones hostiles, manteniendo su impacto y calidad.

-La Macarena: Dueños mayoritarios y operadores de una de las locaciones más importantes y reconocidas para la presentación de eventos nacionales e internacionales de la ciudad. Cuenta con una capacidad de hasta 15.000 personas según el formato.

D´Way: Nuestro sistema integrado de valor, se caracteriza por ofrecer un servicio end to end a sus clientes que requieren diferentes servicios de creatividad, estrategias de marketing y BTL. Actualmente contamos con servicios in house como; diseño gráfico, BTL, estrategias digitales (redes sociales, pauta, integración de herramientas de tecnología, producción audiovisual, booking de influenciadores, validadores y celebrities), e inteligencia de datos. Actualmente operamos para más de 200 marcas de diferentes sectores y acompañando su estrategia e implementación.

-Hotel Park 10: Cuenta con 55 suites, auditorios, restaurante, zona de wellness, bar y está ubicado en el Poblado, una de las zonas más exclusivas y céntricas de la ciudad.

D'Eye: Es una división impulsada por la data de alto valor, la ciencia de datos y la inteligencia artificial, con productos que impulsan y permiten la toma de decisiones informada de actores públicos y privados, maximizando y aportando a la continuidad del negocio.

Otros servicios y marcas: Iconique, Lussac, D'Tactical, Catering para eventos, La Manuela.

Name: moovicart

moovicart.com is an online marketplace (b2b ecommerce) where users can sell their entertainment contents to worldwide distributors/buyers.

Entertainment Types: Films, TV Dramas, Music, Live Events, etc

Problems:

Name: Partylovers
Description:
PARTYLOVERS S.A. es una empresa ecuatoriana especializada en la comercialización de artículos para fiestas, eventos y celebraciones, con una oferta diversa que abarca desde productos clásicos hasta tendencias actuales de decoración. Con sede principal en Guayaquil y presencia en varias ciudades del país, nuestra misión es ayudar a clientes, organizadores de eventos y emprendimientos creativos a transformar momentos especiales en experiencias memorables.

Desde globos y accesorios temáticos, pasando por vajilla, adornos y decoraciones de temporada, hasta detalles personalizados para cumpleaños, graduaciones, despedidas de soltero(a), festividades navideñas y cualquier tipo de celebración, ofrecemos productos que inspiran y complementan cada idea festiva. Nuestra tienda en línea y espacios físicos permiten a los clientes acceder a soluciones completas para hacer realidad sus proyectos de decoración con estilo, calidad y variedad.

Además de servir al público general, PARTYLOVERS S.A. es proveedor de artículos y materiales para organizadores de eventos, negocios de decoración y otros emprendimientos relacionados, brindando opciones tanto para compras al por menor como abastecimiento para negocios.

Comprometidos con la innovación, la satisfacción del cliente y el aporte al desarrollo del sector festivo, seguimos ampliando nuestras colecciones de productos para acompañar cada celebración con creatividad y buen gusto.

 Visítanos en nuestro sitio web para explorar nuestra amplia gama de productos y conocer todas las formas de celebrar con estilo.

Name: Fort Arena
Description: Fort Arena presents a new entertainment format for all people over 8 years old, equipped with power and intellectual games. Fort Arena games can be attended by groups of more than 14 participants who pass tests and earn keys to open the treasury and receive the gold.

Name: Blue Moon Egypt
Description: Blue Moon Egypt was launched in 2015 and is Egypt’s event management company specializing in luxury Event Management. Blue Moon Egypt Chairman Walid Khalil founded the company after spending 7 years as tour Coordinator and event Manager with one of the world’ s most prestigious tour operators (A&K), dealing with international VIPs and organizing Events and conferences. • At Blue Moon Egypt we are determined to fill the gaps left by other events management companies and provide a high quality service for discerning clients. We concentrate on quality rather than quantity and our highly trained professional staff are fully focused on providing a unique experience.

Name: Intro Pictures
Description:
A INTRO Pictures, produtora audiovisual sediada no Brasil, com braços de atuação na Argentina e Uruguai, produz conteúdo de ficção e não-ficção para a TV, cinema e plataformas de streaming.
Com foco em realizar conteúdos relevantes e inovadores, conquistou prêmios, no Brasil e no exterior, e adquiriu larga experiência em desenvolver, produzir e comercializar obras audiovisuais. Entre os parceiros estão Disney/Star+, Netflix, GNT, TV Globo, Warner, CineBrasilTV, Sony e TV Cultura.

Entre as suas mais recentes produções estão o longa-metragem "Passagrana" (2023), com previsão de lançamento em 2024; as séries "A História Delas (2023)", "Últimas Férias (2023) ""A Superfantástica História do Balão (2023); "Santo Maldito"(2022); e "Insânia" (2021).

Name: La MaMa Experimental Theatre Club
Description: La MaMa is dedicated to the artist and all aspects of the theatre. Ever since Ellen Stewart founded La MaMa in 1961, our interest has been in the people who make art, and it is to them that we give our support with free theater and rehearsal space, lights, sound, props, platforms, and whatever else we have that they can use to create their work. We want them to feel free to explore their ideas, and translate them into a theatrical language that can communicate to any person in any part of the world. La MaMa is the place where emerging artists learn from established artists and where artists from around the globe share work and ideas. To date, La MaMa has presented artists from over 70 nations. Each season, over 100 productions with over 400 performances are staged in our three theaters. Audiences from all backgrounds attend our shows.

Name: Idea Crate
Description:
IdeaCrate Edutainment Company is a multi-faceted company with a vision to create a niche in both Children’s Education & Family Entertainment industry. We aim at operating paramount schools, nurseries, indoor/outdoor play areas, and amusement centres, which will be a hub for the entire family in the region and across the globe.

Our brands currently in operation:

Name: James Maciver Costumes Ltd
Description:
From page to stage, we create costumes for the most prestigious theatrical productions worldwide.

James Maciver Costumes was established in 2010 and has become world-renowned for designing and creating bespoke costumes for the entertainment industry and private clients. 

Having worked with several production companies around the world, we deliver entire production shows from budgets and costume build, through to rehearsals and opening night. 

Costume Design Specialists

Based in our studio in Buckinghamshire, UK, we're a small but busy team of 15 experts specialising in costume making, textiles, sculptings, sewing machinery and model-making. We use our extensive knowledge to ensure all of our clients' requirements are not just met, but exceeded.


Theatre, Pantomimes, TV and Cruise Entertainment

Founder James Maciver has been involved in the costume industry for over 15 years and has worked on top theatrical and TV productions including Strictly Come Dancing The Professionals, Hairspray and Disney’s High School Musical UK tour. After more than a decade in business, the team’s experience spans musical theatre, pantomimes, TV shows and cruise entertainment.

IKIN delivers innovative visual technology solutions which enable its customers and partners to create and market products with high-resolution 3D volumetric imaging, advanced visual processing, and bandwidth-aware transport. IKIN offers comprehensive SDK and API elements which empower designers to create and enhance applications for the next level of immersive reality, content creation, and distribution solutions.

Name: Optimisten.dk

Name: Safe Slide Restoration
Description:
Our Mission

Safe Slide’s philosophy is Strong Foundations First. We don’t believe in shoddy work or temporary fixes. Our technicians inspect equipment with a ten-point checklist and our years of experience ensure that any issues will be addressed upfront. This minimizes the chances for any costly surprises down the road, usually saving tens of thousands of dollars in ongoing water park maintenance costs. Before coating a slide, we seek to address problems like blisters, cracks, delamination, coring, voids, and fractured fiberglass. We don’t like partial solutions; we know our customers don’t either. Every year Safe Slide repairs water slides with failed, unproven coatings. We refuse to experiment on your slide, and we are committed to utilizing the industry’s best resins and coatings in our work for you. Our high-caliber employees and high-quality products result in safe, gorgeous slides… and happy customers!
We offer competitive pricing and seek to minimize the downtime of your slide or operation. Safe Slide values customer safety as highly as it does customer satisfaction. We are committed to a drug-free work environment, and insist on safety training for our technicians. Your peace of mind and bodily safety is our goal and the Safe Slide team is committed to quality work to make those goals a reality.

Nie boimy się kreatywnego podejścia, a staroświeckie metody zostawiamy innym. Nasi pracownicy mogą liczyć na liczne benefity takie jak imprezy integracyjne, wyjazdy oraz szeroki pakiet socjalny.

A triptych/ TRIP-tik; a picture or carving that is divided into three side by side sections or panels that are hinged together and can also be folded - a work of art.

Our founders come from three different visual effects disciplines - CG, Compositing, and Production Management. After years of growing, evolving, and mastering their craft together, they have decided to fold their skills into one.

Similarly, to the three hinged panels of a triptych that form a work of art, TRYPTYC provides three individually, specialized and experienced creative heads for your project. Our goal is to create beautiful imagery together with you, imagery that effectively tells your story, and that brings enjoyment to all those watching.

Be passionate in what you do, show pride in your work, appreciate those you work with, take nothing for granted, and success will follow.

Let’s make some works of art together.

Name: Fenomenologia
Description:
Il progetto di questo lavoro nasce dalla curiosità del sottoscritto verso il fenomenico “mondo” della PAROLA che tutto attorno a sé costruisce e distrugge attraverso il complesso meccanismo del linguaggio.
Ho scelto il nome “Fenomenologia della Lingua” poiché convinto che esso possa rendere al meglio le ambivalenze intrinseche nell’uso quotidiano delle parole.
La fenomenologia è una disciplina filosofica fondata da Edmund Husserl (1859-1938), che designa altresì lo studio dei fenomeni in ambito filosofico per come questi si manifestano, nella loro apparenza, alla coscienza intenzionale del soggetto, indipendentemente dalla realtà fisica esterna, il cui valore di esistenza viene messo per così dire «tra parentesi». (Carlo Sini – La Fenomenologia)
Il termine fenomeno (dal greco antico: φαινόμενον, fainòmenon, «che appare») è riferito a tutto quello che si presenta come oggettivamente costituito all’osservatore che quindi lo può cogliere attraverso l’apparato sensibile e per questo non necessariamente veritiero.
Ed ecco allora un tentativo di consegnare la chiave giusta al mio interlocutore per “aprire” con poco sforzo la porta rinforzata di qualsiasi comunicazione.

L’importanza delle parole
Il primo pensiero di Dio fu un angelo. La prima parola di Dio fu un uomo.
(K.Gibran)
Una parola muore appena detta: dice qualcuno. Io dico che solo in quel momento comincia a vivere.
(E.Dickinson)

La scelta del termine corretto è faccenda da ardito pensatore.

Le parole, e meglio ancora il modo in cui “escono” dalla nostra bocca (para-verbale), riescono ad esplicitare il nostro stato d’animo: si capiscono moltissime cose dell’umore di una persona solamente ascoltando come vengono dette le parole. E se più amiamo (coinvolgimento emotivo) tanto meno sappiamo raccontare.
Le parole sono più importanti di quello che pensiamo: esse evocano immagini, proiettano scenari, attivano i nostri neuroni specchio! Se dici “ho un problema” attivi in te anche l’umore conseguente…

Name: Lava Show
Description:
We recreate a volcano eruption by superheating real lava up to 1100°C (2000°F) and then pouring it into a showroom full of people! 

Now with two locations, at Grandi Harbour District in Reykjavik, and in the beautiful little town of Vík in South Iceland, the Lava Show is an experience unlike anything else, a sensory-loaded journey where the audience, in the safety of their seat, hear, see, smell and feel the intense heat of the flowing lava and learn everything there is to know about Icelandic volcanism. 

It is the first and only show of its kind in the world, and an activity that is perfect for people of all ages. As can be seen by the incredible reviews, it is a truly unique experience, educational, intimate, and thrilling, and a one of a kind opportunity to experience real molten lava.

More info at lavashow.com

Description:
Dad's Garage offers comedy shows, improv workshops, private shows, and awesome event entertainment in and around the Atlanta area. 

Improv workshops are about more than learning to tell jokes; our classes teach self-confidence, teamwork, listening skills, and more. Our clients include law firms, media corporations, healthcare providers, nonprofits, and a variety of other organizations that seek a more cohesive team. If you want to increase collaboration, improve communication, and build trust amongst employees, then our improv workshops are a great idea for your business. To learn more about our offerings, visit our new corporate website: 

https://www.dadsgarageworks.com/

Founded in 1995, Dad's Garage Theatre has grown from a small volunteer led organization to a thriving mid-size theatre led by professional artistic and administrative staff. We now entertain more than 30,000 people per year at a two-theatre facility in Little Five Points, public events across the state, and at improv festivals across the continent.

In addition to our regularly scheduled improv and scripted shows, the Dad's Garage cast regularly performs at private events. Whether you want to add some much-needed laughter to your annual board meeting, or you have a birthday bash full of comedy lovers, we perform wherever you need us. We tailor our shows to fit any audience, and we are just as good producing PG material as we are with late-night comedy. We have options that fit all types of events and budgets.  
 
Our work has been recognized and supported by the Atlanta Foundation, Andrew W. Mellon Foundation, Doris Duke Charitable Trust, The Arthur M. Blank Family Foundation, and The Community Foundation for Greater Atlanta. Now a fixture in the Atlanta arts scene, Dad's Garage has won Best Theatre and Best Improv Troupe in Creative Loafing ten years in a row, as well as similar awards in almost every major publication in the city.

Description:
Central to local cultural life for over 120 years, Perth Theatre and Concert Hall create life affirming, shared experiences in the performing arts that ignite the imagination and make living more meaningful. Our world-class venues, award-winning programming and inclusive learning and engagement projects play an essential role in stimulating positive wellbeing within the communities we serve, benefitting the local economy and raising the profile of the area.

The transformed venue houses a traditional Edwardian auditorium, new studio theatre, dedicated community rooms, café, and spacious and welcoming public areas. On top of its successful programme of own-produced and touring theatre, it supports the country’s theatre ecology by providing talent development opportunities for early career artists, as well as research, development, rehearsal, and performance space for non-building-based companies.

Devised as part of the city’s millennium celebrations, and opened in 2005, Perth Concert Hall is a modern and elegant space that houses a similarly diverse programme of concerts, performances, talks, competitions, and events. Boasting an acoustically acclaimed auditorium, plus elegant studio space and flexible meeting rooms, it has established itself as a go-to venue for major music and comedy tours; is an exclusive, second home for Scotland’s national orchestras, and a firm favourite on the conference circuit.

Located within 90-minutes'drivetime of 90% of Scotland’s population, Perth Theatre and Concert Hall are a lynchpin inthe country’sarts infrastructure, and we are recognised as a sector leader, influencer, and innovator.

Name: TS3
Description:
Thierry Suc produit depuis une trentaine d’années les tournées des plus grands artistes de la scène française: Mylène Farmer, Calogero, Zazie, Etienne Daho, Yannick Noah, Juliette Gréco, Axelle Red, Louis Chedid…

Depuis 2000, il ouvre sa société aux spectacles musicaux, théâtraux et one man shows : Valérie Lemercier, Florence Foresti, Muriel Robin, Eric Antoine, Jonathan Lambert, Les Choristes, Le Soldat Rose, Balé de Rua, Swan Lake…

Thierry Suc ne cesse de s’investir dans des projets toujours plus passionnants. C’est ainsi qu’il a pris des parts dans la production de l’adaptation sur scène du film culte Priscilla folle du désert (plus de 450.000 spectateurs). Cette comédie musicale a été jouée à Sydney, Toronto, Londres, Milan, Sao Paulo, Broadway…

En 2015 c’est une nouvelle aventure pour Thierry Suc et ses sociétés qui intègrent le groupe Trois-S, spécialisé dans l’Entertainment, qui compte aujourd’hui parmi les acteurs de tout premier plan de ce domaine. En effet le Groupe 3S Entertainment, pôle divertissement de Fimalac, intervient depuis de nombreuses années auprès de l’ensemble des acteurs français dans le secteur du divertissement. 3S Entertainment est devenu un acteur majeur de l’Entertainment dans la création, la production et la diffusion d’événements. Le groupe accompagne plus de 200 artistes et projets. Gestionnaire d’une centaine d’équipements, le Groupe produit des spectacles partout en France dans de nombreux domaines (musique, théâtre, humour, festival, danse).

Name: Gubsø Garage
Description:
Gubsø Garage er et konference-, event- og oplevelsescenter, der åbnede i Søhøjlandet i foråret 2021. Kom og oplev en spektakulær samling af klassiske biler – eller hold møde, konference, messe, bryllup eller andre arrangementer, der kræver særlige rammer i vores eksklusive konference- og selskabsfaciliteter. Der venter også en arkitektonisk oplevelse. 

Bygningerne er inspireret af tegningerne til den første Bugatti-fabrik og danner de perfekte rammer for både vores unikke biludstilling – og dit kommende event. 

Du finder os i naturskønne omgivelser, tæt på Silkeborgs gågade og øvrige kulturtilbud – og tæt på motorvejen. 
Hos Gubsø Garage findes der ingen parkerings-stres. Vi har masser ar parkeringspladser og de er ganske gratis. På parkeringspladsen findes der en ladestander med to udtag.

Assignments can be completed in-house or downloaded anywhere from our web site with password protection. Open 24 hours, we offer service nationwide with offices in New York, California, and London.

Name: Nicely Entertainment
Description: Nicely Entertainment was launched in January 2020 to bring quality TV series and movies to global audiences and markets around the world with a slate focusing on romance, thriller and holiday movies.  The company is founded and helmed by Vanessa Shapiro, who previously served as President of Worldwide TV Distribution & Co-Productions at Gaumont. Nicely brings to the global market an average of 15 new movies a year in addition to YA television series.

Name: The Canna Mom Show
Description: Joyce Gerber is an attorney, advocate and writer. She brings her exceptional organizational skills, patience and compassion to the emerging cannabis industry. She is the creator and host of The Canna Mom Show. When not advocating for cannabis normalization, Joyce is active with many community and civic organizations in Cambridge, Massachusetts, where she lives with her husband, children, pets and several students from the Berklee School of Music. In her spare time she has managed a rock band, ran for a local political office, and likes to create beautiful quilts for friends and family. Joyce has degrees from Northeastern University, Tufts University and Connecticut College. When asked to describe his mom, her son Josh said, “she’s a force to be reckoned with.”

Name: Nonconventional Show
Description:
Welcome to Nonconventional Show - your weekly shot of inspiration. Discover our latest episodes on YouTube or any podcast platform.

Hosted by Ela Crain, Nonconventional reveals the makings of extraordinary people. We explore our guests’ life journeys through open and honest conversations. This means:

— No pep talks
— No pointed fingers
— And no buzz-words

Remember: we are the safe space where we celebrate and nurture difference.

#differenceissafe


WHAT WE STAND FOR

At Nonconventional, we’re not interested in pitches, politics or product sales. Instead, we are here to decipher extraordinary minds. We want to discover unusual paths and take you on journeys seldom walked.

We represent a place that nurtures difference. Our only goal is to inspire and empower you until you reach the best version of yourself. 

#ownyourdifference


ABOUT THE HOST

Ela is the previous host of the Peaceful Ease podcast. Her life’s journey has led her into many successful roles, including:

— Founded and managed a London-based video production 
— Started a Berlin-based Webby-nominee non-profit organization
— Worked as a Los Angeles-based Life Coach
— And has published two books in Turkey and half a dozen dystopian stories in the UK

As well as producing Nonconventional, she produces a YouTube series for a Buddhist Master, Ringu Tulku Rinpoche. Ela’s other interests include Blockchain technologies, P2B lending platforms, and psychedelic research.

Description:
Established by industry veteran Laura Siegel, CEC is a talent management agency that represents above and below-the-line artists to the film and television industry. CEC’s talent pool includes Directors, 1st ADs, Producers, Line Producers, UPMs, Writers/Literary, Cinematographers, Steadicam Operators, Casting Directors, Location Managers, Production Designers, Costume Designers, Hair & Make-up Artists, Editors, Script Supervisors, Music Supervisors & Composers, Special Effects Team, Stunt Coordinators, Visual effects, Animation, Motion Graphics, Storyboard artists, Sound Mixer/Boom Operators.

We welcome you to utilize our resources as a value-added benefit to streamline and enhance your productivity. We are your premier talent source for all Film/TV/Commercial production companies. 

As a licensed agency, you can be assured that CEC adheres to the highest standards by law. Those who work with us will experience the level of integrity and honesty that we are known for in dealing with our clients.

We pledge to utilize our connections to serve and support our clients and associates using our unique and creative alliances. We work hard to forge strong relationships that will serve your needs and bring you back every time.

Description:
Screen Canberra is a not-for-profit organisation that supports the development and growth of the screen industry in the Australian Capital Territory (ACT).

We assist local and visiting productions in realising their creative visions through funding and initiatives, by connecting them with the most advantageous locations and by providing high-quality production support from the local industry.

Our aim is to build a stronger ACT screen industry that contributes to a diverse local economy and creative industry through the production of local, interstate and international film, television and digital media projects.

Recent productions supported by Screen Canberra include 6 FESTIVALS (2022), SISSY (2022), TOTAL CONTROL (2019-2023) and AUSTIN (in production).

Name: Majestic Circus
Description:
Welcome to Majestic Circus, the one-stop-shop for all your entertainment needs!

At Majestic Circus, we are all about creating engaging and fun experiences for everyone. We started as an online entertainment company that brought live experiences straight to your workplace. We quickly became one of the leading virtual employment engagement solutions in the industry, providing virtual entertainment to keep your employees excited and engaged. But that was just the beginning of our journey!

In our second year of business, we pivoted and began producing games and game shows for resorts and cruise lines. With our founders' extensive cruise experience, we knew we had what it takes to make waves in the entertainment industry. And boy, did we!

We produced three exciting games for Celebrity Cruises, which are now featured on their flagship CELEBRITY BEYOND, as well as the Celebrity Apex and the Celebrity Reflection. Our games and game shows have helped Celebrity Cruises win the USA TODAY'S award for the best Cruise Ship Entertainment, and we are incredibly proud to have been a part of that.

At Majestic Circus, we don't believe in boring or mundane entertainment. We know that adding some fun and excitement to your workplace is essential for boosting team productivity and overall performance. That's why we've made it our mission to create unique trivia packages and custom entertainment events that are guaranteed to leave a lasting impression on your guests.

Our team of experts will work with you to craft the perfect entertainment experience that meets your needs and exceeds your expectations.
We’re also a leading virtual employment engagement solution. We provide virtual entertainment to keep your employees excited and engaged. 

Our vision is to help industry leaders increase team productivity and overall performance through our unique games matrix. We want to bring the fun and excitement back into your workplace, let me know if you’re down for the ride!

Creators can engage with their community in a way that gives fans a chance to get off the sidelines and get in the game, while creating new revenue generating opportunities and more high-quality, shareable content.

Shotcall provides a convenient way to organize deeply engaging community events, giving the streamer end to end control over session length, lobby size, and price.

For business inquiries please email us at admin@shotcall.gg.
For PR inquiries email us at shotcall@astrskpr.com.

PEG artists have broken into all areas of mainstream entertainment including television, film, commercial, music, publishing and more. Description: FishBowl Worldwide Media is an independent production company founded in 2010 by entertainment industry veteran Vin Di Bona, with the creative team led by Beth Greenwald. This next generation studio is developing properties for film, television, digital platforms and ad agencies in addition to the Hollywood creative community. Currently, FishBowl is in production on several unscripted television series including Season 2 of “Upload with Shaquille O’Neal on truTV, “I’m Married To A…” on VH1, and “Toned Up” that will be airing on Bravo in 2014. FishBowl also has unscripted projects in development at CW, Bravo, E!, VH1, GSN, Logo, Food Network, Animal Planet and Nick Mom. On the scripted side, projects have been sold to NBC, Fox, ABC, CW, Comedy Central, MTV, and Adult Swim.

Name: iPlayCO
Description:
iPlayCO, a leading manufacturer of safe, fun play structures enjoyed by children and teens of all ages.  Founded in 1999 in Langley, British Columbia, Canada. iPlayCO has installed play structures in over 70 countries. 

iPlayCO now has offices and manufacturing locations in North America, Europe and Asia.  Our North American operations will continue to supply customers in the Americas and worldwide, our Asian operations IREC Corporation will focus on supplying customers in the Asia-Pacific region.  Customers in Europe will also benefit from our manufacturing and distribution operations. Iplayco’s market has always been global, and now we will have the capabilities to supply our customers from three different continents.

Established in 1999  iPlayCO has years of experience in the design, manufacturing and installation of indoor and outdoor play structures. Our play structures are built to the highest quality for design, structural integrity, product safety, and installation requirements. We build play structures that are safe for all children, so that you don’t have to worry about any child’s safety.

Our products are sold and installed worldwide. Our customer base includes family entertainment centers, theme parks, shopping malls, daycare centers, fitness clubs, municipalities, and other not-for-profit organizations.

We are very pleased to have been awarded the prestigious BC Export Award for Manufactured Products in 2014. This award is presented to the company that has built an innovative system or value-added components, machinery, or equipment for industrial and commercial use.

Name: Ms Rachel - Songs For Littles
Description:
Toddler learning videos that help children learn gestures, baby sign language, and develop their speech and language! These education toddler videos also teach music education, singing, how to play pretend and how to treat others with kindness and compassion!

We also have a new preschool program, "Preschool for Littles." Our preschool learning videos include circle time, phonics, music, art, math, science, sensory learning, and preschool movement songs!

Songs for Littles is developed by music educators to help children become tiny musicians! This isn't just any baby music class —tiny musicians will learn dynamics, tempo, music notation, steady beat/rhythm, solfege and more! We’ll sing a variety of musical styles while exploring instruments and moving to music. Baby sign language is included throughout! 

Rachel Griffin Accurso is a passionate music educator, professional vocalist and award-winning songwriter.  She has a master' in music education from New York University.

Name: habeshaview
Description:
habeshaview, established in 2015 is headquartered in Virginia, United States of America, with offices in London, UK and Addis Ababa, Ethiopia and has a data centre and technology development office in The Netherlands. 

habeshaview is a multi-faceted media, entertainment and advanced technology company has developed a user-friendly OTT platform and apps to provide a premium viewing experience that includes live news channels, entertainment channels, Video On Demand, games, audio channels with a catch up service of original content sourced from a wide variety of studios worldwide with multiple language options at accessible and affordable prices. 

Building on its experience habeshaview is now offering its white label OTT solution with mobile and TV apps to mid- and large-size users, broadcasters, telcos, who can customise and create branding using their own logos, and colours. They also have a choice of offers regarding monetisation, subscription, AVOD, pay-per-view, bundles, day or life time access and free trials before making it available for viewers around the world with options to geo-block some territories.

habeshaview is also an international film distributor currently for Ethiopian made content, taking selected films to international festivals and theatrical release in Europe and North America to promote high quality and original films worldwide. In the long term habeshaview plans to distribute content from the rest of the African continent fulfilling its vision to become a leader in the Pan African entertainment and streaming industry. 

To access habeshaview’s platform go to: www.habehsaview.tv

Founded by CEO Alexis Fisher, named one of Variety's top Dealmakers, Timeline is one of the premiere talent management firms in Los Angeles working with powerhouse Young Hollywood and influencer talent. Timeline has become one of the most competitive full service management/branding firms taking a 360 approach across music, endorsements, social media strategy, live touring, personal appearances and consumer products.

Name: The Culver Studios
Description:
Located in Culver City, California, The Culver Studios is one of the entertainment industry’s most treasured independent film and television studios. Originally built in 1918 by silent movie pioneer Thomas Ince, The Culver Studios has been home to some of the most famous productions in Hollywood history, including Gone with the Wind, Citizen Kane and E.T.

Hackman Capital Partners, which purchased the studio in 2014, embraced the studio’s star-studded legacy with an Innovation Plan to completely modernize the lot—more than doubling its size—for next-generation entertainment. All while preserving the site’s historic structures.

The now 720,850-square-foot campus includes the iconic Mansion and bungalows, five brand new buildings, totaling 554,000 square feet, and two parking structures with 1930 spaces. All in all, the campus offers 619,850 square feet of creative office and state-of-the-art production support space, six stages totaling 92,000 square feet and 7,000 square feet of stage support space.

The premier global organization for casting directors and associate casting directors in film, television, theatre, and new media, the Casting Society seeks to uphold and honor the highest standards of professionalism in the casting field; to advocate and promote the role of the casting director generally and within the entertainment industry while supporting its members to further their goals and protect their common interests.

We support equal employment opportunities regardless of race, religion, age, gender, sexual orientation, disability or national origin. Casting Directors and Associate Casting Directors affiliated with the Casting Society of America are committed to maintaining the highest levels of professionalism and ethical responsibility.

The company plans, produces, and sells musical content, including sound sources and images; publishes and distributes music; and plans, produces, and manages live concerts, special events, stage performances/musicals, and various featuring artists. It also manages artists, celebrities, creators, athletes, intellectuals, and others; operates fan clubs; and sells tickets. In addition, the company is involved in building an integrated framework for discovering, fostering, and developing of talent. Further, it plans, produces, and sells animated shows in various forms, merchandising goods, special events, games, and movies; and designs and manages digital platforms dTV and AWA. The company was formerly known as Avex Group Holdings Inc. and changed its name to Avex Inc. in November 2017. Avex Inc. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Name: Euramco Pictures
Description:
Euramco Pictures is a seasoned film production and international distribution company with offices in Los Angeles and New York.

We bring films, documentaries, TV shows and animation to a global audience. We are a forward thinking company that provides both national and international films a stage to shine on. Working together with domestic and international companies will allow all of us to enjoy the meaning of self-expression through media. Together, with our partners we believe that generations to come will continue to benefit from these stories and continue to be educated.

Euramco Pictures is committed to preserving the environment and creating a better global world through education. Education is a national security. Our Company is deeply dedicated to sustain our environment through films and new technologies.

VISION
We are bringing a new generation of filmmakers together. One where they can create new commercially viable products that enhances democracy and a global understanding.

MISSION
We foster creative talent from independent productions, to cable and feature films. Embracing new technologies, Euramco Media also harnesses online distribution capabilities to provide new products to Microsoft, Intel and Google.

T-Bull S.A. is one of the largest companies producing mobile games in Poland. Founded by Damian Fijałkowski and Grzegorz Zwoliński in 2010, the studio based in Wrocław, has grown from a five-person team working out of a home office to 60 individuals headquartered in the most famous skyscraper in the country. 

T-Bull adjusts its strategy to market conditions and consistently implements it by focusing on the production of mobile games with high production values. In 2017, the company broke another milestone - their games were downloaded more than 250 million times. The most popular T-Bull's game - Moto Rider GO has already been downloaded by almost 40 million players worldwide.  

If you love games and are passionate about playing and making them, you’re in the right place. Do you want to challenge yourself and have fun? Send us your application: careers@t-bull.com

Name: Mobilet
Description:
Mobilet, sunduğu pek çok inovatif özellikle bilet alma deneyimini yeniden tanımlayan, yeni nesil bir dijital bilet platformudur.

Web sitesi üzerinden ve mobil uygulamalarıyla 2017 yılının Mayıs ayında hizmet vermeye başlayan Mobilet, kullanıcılarına birden fazla etkinliğe aynı anda bilet alma, arkadaşın için koltuk ayırma, bilet transferi gibi yenilikleri sunan Türkiye’deki ilk bilet satın alma ve sosyal planlama platformu oldu.

Mobilet, etkinlik yaratıcılarına, mekan sahiplerine ve deneyim sağlayıcılarına da yenilikçi ve kullanışlı iletişim, pazarlama ve CRM altyapısı ile raporlama araçları sunuyor. 

Kısa sürede yüzbinler düzeyinde bir kullanıcı kitlesine ulaşan Mobilet’in bilet satış hizmeti sunduğu iş ortakları arasında Volkswagen Arena, Babylon, bomontiada, Fenerbahçe Beko, Anadolu Efes, Darüşşafaka Tekfen basketbol takımları, d.ream Akademi gibi bir çok önemli etkinlik sahibi yer alıyor. 


Mobilet was launched in 2016, with many innovative features which redefines the ticket-buying experience.

Going online in May 2017 with a web site and a mobile application, Mobilet is the first ticketing and social planning platform that enables to buy tickets for multiple events, make reservation and ticket transferring.

Mobilet offers innovative and useful communication, marketing, targeted campaigning opportunities for creators, event and space owners and all experience providers with its CRM infrastructure and reporting tools.

In very short time, number of Mobilet users reached hundreds of thousands. Mobilet has partnerships with many promoters such as Volkswagen Arena, Babylon, bomontiada, Fenerbahçe Beko, Anadolu Efes and Darüşşafaka Tekfen basketball teams, d.ream Akademi.

Description: Entertainment Consultant has helped ideate and execute in excess of 200 activities with more than 1000 artistes across all genres and categories of entertainment. From content licensing to effective coordination with talent to managing partnerships, negotiating the correct deals and integrating organically with brands, Entertainment Consultant is a one-stop-shop for those who want to bring quality entertainment to the platform of their choice.

Name: TKO Studios
Description:
TKO Studios was co-founded in 2017 by entrepreneur Salvatore Simeone and writer/director Tze Chun; we have rapidly become one of the fastest growing independent graphic novel publishers in the world.

TKO Studios was nominated for Publisher of the Year by Tripwire Magazine and we earned a 2020 Eisner Award nomination for our bestselling series SENTIENT. We work with some of the most talented writers and creators in the business, a roster that the Hollywood Reporter called "some of the most buzzed-about names in the industry.” And we're still growing!

TKO Studios recently announced a partnership with production company MACRO, whose films have garnered nine Oscar nominations and one Oscar win for Viola Davis in Fences, to produce a film adaptation of TKO’s graphic novel THE BANKS, written by New York Times bestselling author Roxane Gay and artist Ming Doyle. 

We're also thrilled that our co-founder Sal Simeone's recent collaboration with Steve Niles, LONESOME DAYS, SAVAGE NIGHTS, has been nominated for 2020 Bram Stoker Award.

Somos un conjunto de empresas enfocadas en el entretenimiento, la cultura y las experiencias 360.

Name: CineAspirant
Description:
www.cineaspirant.com is Mumbai based Entertainment company, runs India 1st portal for Cinema aspirants, a talent hunt website, for aspiring actors, singers, music - directors , dancers , directors , story / song writers, cameraman , film-editors , production , technicians and many more. The site will have aggressive branding in coming months, will be constantly viewed by movie producers, casting directors, television commercial makers, independent programme makers who are looking for talent worldwide, so, it would be easy for the aspirant to attract the attention of the giants without much effort. Now directors, producers of cinema, television and modeling field can select new faces for their projects from their desktop and there is no need to go around places.

CineAspirant.com is the India's first site for cinema aspirants where Aspirant gets the opportunity to upload their talent online which is viewed by various production houses, movie producers, casting directors, television commercial makers, independent programme makers The site is a leading hub of talent/aspirants. The site is aimed at bridging the gap of the talents hunters and talent pool available to cinema and television. In coming times the site is also planned at online business promotion for cinema industry.

In the country like India whose output is the largest in the world in terms of number of films produced and in number of tickets sold. Bollywood popularly known as Indian Cinema is a strong part of popular culture of not only India, but also of the rest of South Asia, the Middle East, parts of Africa, parts of Southeast Asia, and among the South Asian diaspora worldwide. Bollywood has its largest diasporic audiences in the UK, Canada, Australia and the U.S, all of which have large Indian immigrant populations.

Bollywood employs people from all parts of India. It attracts thousands of aspiring actors and actresses, all hoping for a break in the industry. Models and beauty contestants, television actors, theatre actors, professionals in varied fields like direction, choreography, stunt directions, music direction, playback singing with the hope and dream of becoming a star.

In the era of Internet which is revolutionizing the way we live, work, learn, play, CineAspirant dot com is creating revolution amongst the aspiring bollywood stars of future. It is the only easiest and fastest medium available today for aspirants to grab their dream opportunity it is also the consistent medium available for Indian Cinema.

Name: Kontor New Media

Olydri Studio a popularisé le crowdfunding en France en battant le record d’Europe en 2013 (3e mondial pour un projet vidéo au moment de sa clôture), puis a battu à nouveau ce record en 2017 en passant pour la première fois la barre symbolique du million d’euros récoltés. 

Le jeu vidéo Noob a été 1er sur Steam et est sorti sur Playstation 4, Playstation 5, Nintendo Switch, Xbox séries S et X, Xbox One en physique et en dématérialisé dans 5 langues différentes.

La web-série Noob a remporté un Streamy Awards international à Hollywood en 2014.

Noob a rempli 3 fois le Grand Rex de Paris (2700 places) lors d’avant-premières.

Olydri Studio possède une boutique officielle : pgm-stuff.com

Olydri Studio a géré la logistique de nombreux crowdfundings pour aider les porteurs de projet à se concentrer sur l’aspect créatif (Maliki, Gastronogeek, Yatuu, Padg, Reflets d’Acide, Flander’s Company, Xaxaxa, Noob, etc…) Vous pouvez nous contacter pour faire appel à ce service.

Olydri Studio crée ses propres produits dérivés et crée des produits dérivés pour d’autres structures (Resident Evil, Street Fighter, Monster Hunter pour Capcom, l’armée Française, le RCT, etc…) N’hésitez pas à nous contacter à ce propos.

Description:
Melbourne's home of quality arthouse and upscale movies, filmmaker Q&As, film festivals, CineTrivia, curated repertory programming, The Room, Cinema Fiasco and the Cinema Nova Bar. With 16 screens, Nova offers the best new release movies and classics, in an intimate environment and unique architecture. Enjoy the New York Metropolitan Opera, London’s National Theatre Live, Art On Screen, film exclusives, our famous house-made choctops and handpicked wines. 

380 Lygon Street, Carlton, VIC 3053
admin@cinemanova.com.au
(03) 9347 5331

ABOUT CINEMA NOVA

Cinema Nova was established in August 1992 as a collaboration between two landmark Australian independent cinemas – the Longford Cinema in South Yarra and the Valhalla Cinema in Richmond and Westgarth, and opened as a twin theatre.

Since that time we’ve grown to become one of the biggest independent cinemas in the southern hemisphere, with 16 theatres showing the best in quality indie, Australian and arthouse film. An essential part of the Lygon Street scene, Cinema Nova is a part of Carlton’s cultural fabric.

With our exclusive seasons we’ve brought Melbournians their only chance to see on the big screen films such as Ex Machina, Snowpiercer, Mud, Cabin in the Woods, Margaret, Weekend, Citizenfour, Winter Sleep, Under the Skin, The Bling Ring, I Am Eleven, and of course Lygon Street: Si Parlo Italiano.

Cinema Nova was among the first cinemas in the country to start screening stage productions from around the world, and we now draw thousands to see the Met Opera and London’s National Theatre from the comfort of our theatres.

Our Meet the Filmmaker and curated events programs allow our audience to experience film up close and personally, while also making going to the cinema an exciting event.

Our Distinction (Our “Why”)

Name: The Baxter Theatre
Description:
The Baxter Theatre Centre is a vibrant, multicultural entertainment hub in the Southern Suburbs of Cape Town. Nestled under the striking Devil’s Peak mountain and at the foot of the University of Cape Town, the Baxter boasts a world-class theatre and concert hall, as well as a studio stage, rehearsal rooms, offices, a restaurant and bars and an impressive spacious foyer.

Built in 1976, the Baxter was a pillar of hope during the apartheid era. By leveraging its strong relationship with UCT, the theatre was able to present multiracial, progressive work at a time when all other non-racial interactivity was banned or censored. The first interracial kiss ever on a South African stage took place during the Baxter’s first production of Miss Julie in 1985, while today our version of Mies Julie storms theatres all around the world.

The Centre is within walking distance of the vibrant student shopping centre of Rondebosch. Coffee shops, gyms, restaurants are easily accessible and the railway station is only minutes away.

Follow the Baxter on Facebook (BaxterTheatre) and on Twitter (@BaxterTheatre)

Name: Writer's Assistant's Network
Description:
The Writers Assistants Network is for up and coming writers, executive assistants, and literary assistants that are focused on pursuing careers in primetime television.

A few years back I was challenged by one of my mentors that’s currently a Co-EP on NCIS: LA to find and network with other support staffers. Like many others, I had no clue where to start. While I was in grad school at Loyola Marymount University, I interned at KO Paper Products and knowing how many shows they had, I reached out to a PA on Sleepy Hallow. We met up for drinks and discussed an idea that I had to have an event for support staffers that were currently working in Primetime TV. We both sent out a bunch of emails to our networks and within 48 hours, we had a guest list of over 250 people. At that moment, we outgrew our space, so I had to find a way to reserve the entire bar for the night, which would be fairly expensive if we didn’t reach our bar guarantee. Luckily a friend from Justified saved the day and was able to get us sponsored by Santa Clarita Studios.

The night was a total success; we had over 300 people come out. We gave away swag from The Walking Dead, Ted, Sleepy Hallow, and other shows and companies. Today we are sponsored by a software startup called SoCreate, which is developing new screenwriting software that can seriously change the way we write.

The true purpose of this group is to give back to the people that keep Hollywood running. It’s not just our bosses that are important, we’re important too because without us the ship really would sink.

POST PRODUCTION
Choosing to work with us means choosing absolute quality. Whatever the project, we make a point of going to the extent of our capacities. We don't make room for compromise. Name: Chilsag Entertainment Network
Description:
Founded in 2003 by Natya Bhushan awardee Sachin Gupta, Chilsag Network has emerged as one of India’s most distinguished film production and distribution companies. With a legacy spanning 22 years, the company is renowned for delivering meaningful, compelling stories across genres, seamlessly blending creative vision with commercial viability.

Chilsag has produced five critically acclaimed Bollywood films, establishing a reputation for cinematic excellence and social relevance. The company is especially celebrated for its commitment to nurturing fresh talent, both in front of and behind the camera, becoming a launchpad for many promising artists in Indian cinema.

Beyond feature films, Chilsag is a trailblazer in short filmmaking, curating narratives that showcase the finest talent from the Indian film industry. Its growing library of short films continues to garner international attention and accolades.

A vertically integrated powerhouse, Chilsag is not just a production studio but also a robust film distribution company. It boasts a fully equipped in-house post-production facility, ensuring creative control from scripting to final delivery. The company also operates a talent management agency, further reinforcing its holistic approach to the entertainment ecosystem.

Chilsag’s footprint extends beyond the silver screen. Its Off-Broadway theatre division has performed over 250 acclaimed productions in major cities including New York, Toronto, London, Mumbai, Boston, and West Virginia, showcasing its global appeal and commitment to theatrical arts.

Complementing its cinematic ventures, Chilsag owns a diverse music label that spans genres, producing chart-topping songs that resonate with audiences across India and abroad. Its content is widely available across top OTT platforms such as Amazon Prime, Zee5, and others, making it a staple for digital streaming audiences

Name: National Geographic Encounter
Description:
Dive into a virtual ocean where high tech meets the deep sea. National Geographic Encounter is an interactive entertainment attraction in Times Square that journeys through the Pacific Ocean over one incredible night, where guests see, hear and feel what it’s like to be under the sea and encounter its greatest wonders. Only in New York City can visitors escape the jaws of a 50-foot humpback whale, laugh through a kelp forest maze, play with mischievous sea lions, and encounter a luminous coral reef, sharks, dolphins, and a battle between vicious squid – all without getting wet.

National Geographic Encounter opened in New York City’s Times Square on October 6, 2017. Encounter is produced and developed by Times Square Attractions Live, LLC, which engaged a world-class global team of Academy, GRAMMY, and Emmy Award-winning artists, including the design firm Falcon’s Creative Group and Pixomondo, the visual effects team behind “Game of Thrones,” to produce this first-of-its-kind experience that is changing the landscape of entertainment and cinema.

Name: Paragon Theaters

Whalen, Jr. and Mike Wilson own Paragon, which includes a growing portfolio of movie theaters in many states, as well as the creation of various restaurant concepts, including My Pi Custom Pizza & Craft Beer, The Lot Bar & Lounge, Neo Kitchen + Bar, and Cask + Shaker Craft Bar and Kitchen.

Paragon’s strategy is two-fold:  (1) Retrofitting existing theaters, as well as existing retail space that has become available as a result of high vacancy rates; (2) Identifying new build opportunities to create entertainment venues that include movies, dining, and other forms of entertainment, such as bowling. Paragon has significant strategic relationships with companies and investment funds in the media and entertainment industries to create value for its partners and clients and continued growth of the Paragon brand. These relationships include major investor and brand partners such as Start Media, iStar Financial, Starwood Group, Pepsi Co. and Sony Electronics.

Highly regarded, The Royalty Network has been profiled in leading magazines such as Billboard and The Hollywood Reporter for their invaluable knowledge and dedication to protecting client's rights. They've been the recipient of numerous awards, including ASCAP Pop Award, ASCAP Rhythm & Soul Award, BMI Urban Award, BMI Pop Award, and Inc 500 Fastest Growing Company award winner.

Name: Metropolis Films
Description:
Founded in 1991, Metropolis Films grew from a small local production company into an international audiovisual production network. In the year 2000 Metropolis Films Corp. of Puerto Rico was founded serving the local advertising community, the Caribbean and the United States. In 2003 Metropolis Films started its division of international production services, focusing on Europe, Australia, Canada and the United States, and in 2006 opened its own company in Buenos Aires serving the international and local market.

Diversifying its services, Metropolis Films included production of episodes for The Amazing Race / CBS TV and services for feature films such as Miami Vice for Universal Pictures / Michael Mann, Zoop for Endemol / NL Film and Am Kap der Liebe for Phoenix Film, as well as documentaries production for HBO, National Geographic, The History Channel and Discovery Channel. In 2007, and along with all the other services, the company started to develop and co-produce feature films, documentaries and TV content for theatrical and network distribution. Further expanding its presence in the region, Metropolis Films opened production companies in Colombia, Mexico and Barcelona and has production partnerships in Chile and Costa Rica. Today Metropolis Films complements production services with state-of-the-art facilities, covering all Latin America and the Caribbean.

Name: M3F Fest
Description:
Rooted in a deep love of music, the arts, and the community around us, M3F was founded with a mission to give back. The idea was simple; two thousand fans, hundreds of lawn chairs, one stage, and 100% of proceeds directly to charity. 

Eighteen years later we still operate under the same guiding principles, but we have surely grown! In 2020, we hosted 25,000 people over three days, donated $600,000 (over 3.2M since our inception), and continue to host an eclectic lineup of world class artists.

Join us March7-85, 2025 at Steele Indian School Park, Phoenix, Arizona.

Name: HollyShorts Film Festival
Description: HollyShorts (HSFF) is an Oscar-Qualifying festival that showcases the world’s best short films while advancing filmmakers' careers through screenings, panels, and networking events. Founded in 2005, HollyShorts has grown from a small gathering to a prestigious festival at iconic venues like the TCL Chinese Theatres. Qualifying for the Academy Awards in four categories, the festival celebrates its 20th anniversary in 2024, continuing to champion emerging talent, cinematic innovation, and global collaboration.
