As a boutique distributor,  Be-Entertainment is able to offer fast and personal service to its clients. And because Be-Entertainment is part of DPG Media, Belgium’s largest media company, it has ready access to the group’s content, creators and producers. The group, eager to put fresh and unique new formats to the test, annually launches some 20 new titles, produced in-house as well as by third party producers. This provides an ideal breeding ground to test-drive content. Be-Entertainment only selects the titles with the most international potential to introduce to the international market.

Name: Southend Theatres
Description:
Southend Theatres is part of Trafalgar Entertainment. Together, the Cliffs Pavilion, the Palace Theatre and the Dixon Studio are managed by an experienced team of over 250.

The Cliffs is the largest purpose-built performing arts venue in Essex and presents over 300 performances each year across a wide range of live entertainment from ballet, opera and classical music, through to top-name comedians and singers, to West End musicals, stand-up concerts and the largest pantomime in the South East.

The Palace Theatre opened in 1912, this delightful Edwardian Theatre retains all of the charm of its music hall origins including the sweeping grand staircase to the Circle, alongside many original features such as the regency-style domes on the boxes and the ornately-decorated billboard frames on the proscenium arch. Within the Palace, the Dixon Studio was a 1980s addition and is a busy black-box space with 100 seats.

Name: Immersive Planet
Description:
Immersive Planet is a leading design company for entertainment concepts such as theme parks, amusement parks, Family Entertainment Centers, resorts, water parks, and much more. Our talented in-house team of Imagineers, architects, artists, scriptwriters, and operations experts specialize in bringing your conceptual dreams into profitable reality. 

Beyond our creativity, state-of-the-art technology, and more than 30 years of expertise designing creative projects all over the world, there is one thing that stands out and defines us: our passion for creating immersive experiences that turn fantasy into reality.

Name: Laguna Playhouse
Description:
Laguna Playhouse is an historic Equity theatre located in the charming arts colony of Laguna Beach, California. Steps away from the Pacific Ocean, Laguna Playhouse is known for its year-round season of captivating comedies, dramas, musicals, stand-up comedy and family fare.

Named "Best in OC" in Live Theatre in 2019, 2018, 2017, 2016 and 2015 by the OC Register, Laguna Playhouse was founded as a community theatre in 1920, Laguna Playhouse is one of the oldest continuously operating, not-for-profit theatres on the West Coast. 

A member of the League of Resident Theatres, Laguna Playhouse often features stage and screen stars who come to Laguna Beach for its upscale lifestyle, pristine beaches, fine dining, and numerous artistic offerings, all within minutes of the theatre. In addition to its theatrical offerings, Laguna Playhouse hosts a wide variety of performing artists on its Moulton Stage throughout the year. Laguna Playhouse invites children as well as adults to attend special productions designed for young audiences. Actors of all ages share their talents through Laguna Playhouse Youth Theatre. Laguna Playhouse actors also visit local schools with educational productions, which have been honored by the American Alliance for Theatre and Education, Arts Orange County and the Orange County Department of Education.

Name: Rad TV
Description:
Rad TV is revolutionizing the digital streaming industry. The rise of the internet both amplified and hindered creators' autonomy and connection with their audiences. By empowering creators to focus on their passion and art, Rad utilizes cutting-edge technologies, enabling instant and transparent payouts. This marks the dawn of a new content era, where fans can directly engage with and support artists, becoming true participants in the movement rather than mere consumers.

Positioned at the forefront of streaming evolution, Rad serves as the foundation for tomorrow's media landscape. Currently, the platform offers subscription options and on-demand purchases, with fans fully owning entitlements through blockchain technology and NFTs. With unparalleled entertainment experiences from top-tier creators and studios, Rad is accessible on multiple devices, including PlayStation 5, PSVR, Oculus Quest, iOS, Google TV, and more. Collaborating with industry giants like Google, Sony, Disney, Viacom, and NBCUniversal, Rad is reshaping the distribution of content for the modern age.

Name: Pogoseat
Description:
Pogoseat powers agentic commerce for live entertainment — enabling fans to discover, purchase, and upgrade tickets through intelligent, conversational experiences.

Built for sports teams, ticketing systems, venues, artists, and promoters, Pogoseat’s purpose-built technologies and proven methodologies drive incremental revenue, improve the fan experience, and provide greater flexibility and personalization.

Our white-labelled, AI-driven platform allows fans to buy last-minute tickets, upgrade seats, or access exclusive VIP experiences — before and during events — while giving teams and venues the tools to monetize unused inventory, increase engagement, and automate sales through deep integrations.

Name: The Corner of Story and Game
Description:
Welcome to The Corner of Story and Game, where worlds collide and narratives unfold! Hosted by Gerald Ford, the podcast invites you to pull up a chair and immerse yourself in captivating conversations with worldbuilders, gamers, writers, and more.

At The Corner of Story and Game, we're passionate about exploring the intersection of storytelling and game design. Whether you're a seasoned gamer, an aspiring writer, or simply curious about the creative process, our cozy table in the corner offers a welcoming space to delve into the magic of storytelling in all its forms. And we often end up wandering down the paths of philosophy in our discussions.

Join us as we dive deep into the stories hidden within games, unravel the tales that writers weave, and uncover the intricate layers of game design. The podcast delves into every corner of the storytelling universe from board games to video games, novels to comic books.

Each episode is a journey into the heart of creativity, featuring insightful interviews with industry experts, thought-provoking discussions on the art of storytelling, and behind-the-scenes insights into the world of game design. Whether you're seeking inspiration for your next gaming adventure or seeking a deeper understanding of the creative process, The Corner of Story and Game has something for everyone.

So come on in, grab a seat at our table, and let's embark on a storytelling adventure together. Welcome to The Corner of Story and Game – where every tale is waiting to be told, and every game is a story waiting to unfold.

#GameDesign #NarrativeDesign #GameWriting #DigitalGames #VideoGames #BoardGames #RoleplayingGames #TTRPG #Tabletop #Writers #WritingAdvice #Novelists #ComicBookWriters #Improv #Acting #Theatre #Disney #Storytelling #Philosophy

Name: Gluttony
Description:
Gluttony is an arts venue hub, established as an Adelaide Fringe festival destination in 2011. Gluttony is located in Adelaide's East End - a pop-up paradise in leafy Murlawirrapurka/Rymill Park. It's a festival within a festival! 

Gluttony offers its patrons multiple dining precincts, bars, and fun activities, as well as ticketed performance spaces ranging from the large and lively to the intimate and atmospheric. In 2024 Gluttony presented 180+ shows, issued 275,000 tickets and welcomed more than 800,000 visitors through its gates.

Our experienced team includes site build, operations, production, front-of-house, administration, marketing, functions and bar staff.

Gluttony will pop back up for the 2026 Adelaide Fringe: 19 February - 22 March.

The Gluttony team also presents Lucky Dumpling Market, a food, bar and entertainment hub on the Adelaide Riverbank each October/November during OzAsia Festival, and has done so since 2017.

In addition, Gluttony ran Glenelg Winter Arts Festival during July 2023 and 2024 in Colley Reserve, Glenelg. This fun winter activation was presented in partnership with City of Holdfast Bay and Jetty Road, Glenelg.

Other past events by Gluttony include:
- Light Up, a New Year's Eve family-friendly celebration in Rymill Park/Murlawirrapurka, 2021-2022
- Gluttony on Tour, first held in Croydon Park, VIC in April 2022
- Base Camp, a food, bar and entertainment hub in Victoria Square/Tarntanyangga during Illuminate Adelaide in July 2022

Gluttony also provides event services such as site build, planning and licensing, bars management, food vendor coordination, front-of-house and operations, to other events and festivals. Past collaborators include Harvest Rock, Festival of Orchestra, Wine Machine, New Year's Eve in the City, and Festival X.

Name: The Little Red Company
Description:
Founded in 2012 by Naomi Price and Adam Brunes, The Little Red Company has established itself as one of Australia’s most vital independent production houses, pioneering a unique brand of music-driven theatrical experiences which attract new audiences to the theatre.  

Little Red’s critically-acclaimed catalogue of original works includesRumour Has It (2012),Wrecking Ball (2014),Lady Beatle (2017),From Johnny to Jack (2018),Christmas Actually (2018),The IsoLate Late Show (2020),There’s Something About Music (2021),Your Song (2021),Skyfall (2021),Sisters Are Doing It For Themselves (2022),Golden (2022), Lovely Day (2023), Fancy Long Legs (2024) and Taylor Made (2025) which have toured nationally and internationally to critical and audience acclaim. Over 4 million people have enjoyed a Little Red production since the company’s inception.  

From 2021 to 2024, Little Red produced theLord Mayor’s Christmas Carols which was broadcast nationally on Nine Network to more than one million viewers every year. Little Red has co-produced many original works including I Should Have Drunk More Champagne (with The Good Room), Let’s Be Friends Furever (with Brisbane Festival and The Good Room), Swing on This (with Good Egg Creative) and Rachel Burke’s Fancy Long Legs (with Brisbane Festival and La Boite Theatre).  

Little Red was a finalist at the Lord Mayor’s Business Awards in both 2020 and 2021, and bothRumour Has It andYour Song have wonthe Matilda Award for Best Musical or Cabaret. 

The Little Red Company is supported by the Queensland Government through Arts Queensland.

Name: The CSU Entertainment Alliance

The California State University Entertainment Alliance (CSUEA) connects the student, faculty and alumni network of the largest and most inclusive public university system in the nation to the ultra competitive entertainment arts and media industry. CSUEA programs provide invaluable learning, career development, and networking opportunities to CSU students on their journey from campus to career. The 23 campus CSU network featuring nearly 500,000 annual students, 3.6 million alumni and top-rated entertainment programs helps the CSUEA serve as the perfect pipeline of diverse talent to the entertainment industry. 

CSUEA programs also help students discover their creative passions while making academic and career focused decisions to best prepare for their professional futures. Industry/Campus collaborations offer the best of Hollywood to students and faculty at little to no cost! CSU campuses feature top-rated entertainment arts programs including “Top 25 Film Programs” and “Best Colleges for Your Money.” Illustrious alumni include Hollywood luminaries and industry leaders including Annette Bening, Danny Glover, Eva Longoria, Gwen Stefani, Steven Spielberg and Ryan Coogler, Disney Lucasfilm President Kathleen Kennedy and so many more! The 23 campus CSU network of nearly 500,000 annual students and 3.7 million alumni serve as the perfect pipeline of diverse talent to the entertainment industry. Industry partnerships with The CSUEA helps support an organization or company's needs and mission while also actively developing the next generation of well-prepared, value driven, hard-working industry leaders. Discover the Power of 23 by connecting with the CSUEA.

"FOREST" has already been selected for 4 international pitching forum: Cinekid (2021), Cartoon Movie (2022), KidsKino Industry (2022), Cartoon Movie (2023). It was also pre-sold in over 20 Eastern European countries at the Cannes Marché du Film in May 2023.
The slogan “Games for Movies & Movies for Games” led to the birth of AL-ONE Interactive, which is currently producing a video game based on the "TRASH" IP. The goal is to create high-quality video games, offering unique experiences based on cinematic narrative and environmental sustainability.

Name: British Youth Music Theatre
Description:
BYMT is the leading music theatre company for young people aged 11-21. Our principal aim, as an Arts Council England National Portfolio Organisation, is to provide high-quality training for talented young performers, musicians and theatre technicians. BYMT has a strong relationship with the UK’s largest teaching union, the NASUWT, who are our principal private donor and also with Trinity College London who formally assess our activities. We are also one of the Department for Education’s eight National Youth Music Organisations.
BYMT produce innovative and original work in some of the UK’s top venues and festivals with leading industry professionals. The courses are mostly residential and this provides the intensive, focused energy required to travel a long distance in a short time, constantly re-working and developing new material. As well as performance skills, our courses offer significant personal and educational benefits to young people: developing confidence and self-esteem as well as improving communication and team-work whilst working in an intense, professional environment. 
BYMT works across the UK and Ireland offering opportunities to young people aged 11-21 from any and every background. Our programme bridges the gap between local/regional drama groups and formal training at drama school/conservatoire. Since 2003 we have provided experiential training to over 6,000 young people, many of whom have successfully entered the music industries such as Ed Sheeran and Sam Smith, West End theatre such as Lauren Samuels (Beckham), TV and Film such as Charlotte Ritchie (Fresh Meat & Call the Midwife), Jack Bence (Bad Education), Lucy Griffiths (True Blood) - and many more.

Name: Cinemas Reserva Cultural
Description:
O Reserva Cultural surgiu do desejo de Jean Thomas Bernardini, fundador da distribuidora Imovision, de valorizar os filmes independentes, então ofuscados pelas grandes redes de cinema. Em 2005, no prédio da Gazeta, na Av. Paulista, Jean encontrou o espaço ideal para unir cinema de qualidade com conforto, segurança e conveniência — características que haviam afastado o público dos cinemas de rua. Assim nasceu o primeiro Reserva Cultural, com o Bistrô Reserva (pioneiro ao integrar gastronomia ao cinema) e a boulangerie Pain de France, a primeira do tipo no Brasil.

O espaço paulistano rapidamente se destacou pela curadoria de filmes fora do circuito comercial e por sediar eventos culturais, como festivais, pré-estreias e lançamentos de livros. Com o tempo, a experiência se adaptou ao público brasileiro, como na introdução da venda de pipoca após a pandemia. Outro diferencial é a emblemática parede de vidro com vista para a Av. Paulista, projetada com vidros belgas para isolar o som da cidade.

Após anos de sucesso, Jean decidiu expandir o conceito para Niterói, cidade com histórico de apreço pelo cinema independente. O local escolhido foi o complexo arquitetônico de Oscar Niemeyer, único do arquiteto dedicado ao cinema. Em 2016, o Reserva Cultural Niterói abriu suas portas, com cinco salas, bombonière, cafés e restaurantes como Brasserie Reserva, Mahatma Pizza e Drop Burguer. O espaço também conta com estacionamento e áreas para eventos, consolidando-se como um polo cultural da cidade e mantendo viva a proposta original: ser uma verdadeira “reserva” de cultura e cinema autoral.

Name: PARQUE TEMATICO HACIENDA NAPOLES
Description:
El PARQUE TEMATICO HACIENDA NAPOLES  está formado por un bosque natural de gran belleza que se dedica exclusivamente al ecoturismo y a la conservacion de especies animales menores y mayores.
En dirección a Pozo Azul hay buenos reductos de vegetación primaria y un paisaje que equivale a un santuario de flora y fauna de excepcional valor ecológico, más un entorno con todas las especies de árboles nativos de la zona. Allí se construyen senderos para recorridos a pie y cabalgatas. Los ecoturistas tienen oportunidad de encontrar alojamiento y asistencia especializada en camping ecológico o en hotel de cinco estrellas, según su elección.
El Municipio de Puerto Triunfo tiene asegurado un porcentaje de los ingresos brutos del Parque como dueño de los terrenos. 	
El Parque Temático Hacienda Nápoles genera en la actualidad 250 empleos directos y más de 1000 indirectos. Las actividades del parque son complemento y suplemento de toda la economía de la región, de su hotelería, su sector de servicios, transporte y conexos. El Parque Temático Hacienda Nápoles, se ha convertido en Destino Turístico Nacional e Internacional y en eje de desarrollo del corazón geográfico de Colombia, dando un cambio radical a un sitio que en el pasado fue emblema del narcotráfico y hoy un lugar dedicado a las víctimas de ese delito; es además fuente de riqueza para la región y lugar de descanso, conocimiento, diversión y verdadera aventura salvaje.

Name: Association of Cine & Television Art Directors & Costume Designers
Description:
Right from the inception of the film industry in India, the Art Directors have played the most important role in the making of all the films to dates. Art Director is a person who creates the entire environment according to the film director’s conception without which no scenes would have been filmed according to the original script.

In the yester years, the film studios were the only film producing institutions. Then there was the revolution as many free lancing producers thronged the industry. Thus, all the technicians of the film industry thought of looking forward to professional respect & security. Within no time, some of the crafts started forming their own crafts Associations.

Hence the Art Directors also took the initiative to have their own individual identity and they formed the Association of Cine Art Directors in 1975 which is now the Association of Cine & Television Art Directors.

The veterans who took the initivative were V. H. PALNITKER, M. R. ACHREKAR, SHANTI DEO, GANESH BASAK, ANUP KAKD, J. S. POPHELEY, WAHAB SAHEB, A. A. MAJEED AND M. K. SAYED. Apart from these towering personalities MR. BIRAN NAG, R. K. HANDA, SUDHENDU ROY, SHANTI DAS, N. B. KULKARNI, BANSI CHANDRA GUPTA, had also contributed their mite through their artistic skill to popularize Art Direction and their Arts were instrumental to make the film of International caliber.

    * Time Warner Cable - local and national TV spots
    * The Hollywood Reporter – Full Page Ad
    * Los Angeles Times, Variety, LA Weekly, Downtown News editorial cover story
    * Google Ad Campaign
    * Radio ads on KPFK-FM, KPCC-FM, 103.1-FM and 92.3 FM, 107.5FM Super Estrella
    * Theatrical trailers playing in all Laemmle theaters across Los Angeles
    * Online campaign to our 50,000+ database

The 2009 Downtown Film Festival–L.A. will be held in many venues throughout downtown L.A.’s vibrant neighborhoods. After its successful launch last year, Downtown Film Festival - L.A. returns in full force, expanding from last year’s 5-day festival to 10 full days of programming. Highlights include: a music film programming series at The GRAMMY Museum at L.A. Live!, Hollywood film premieres at the former United Artists theater at the new AT&T Center in South Park, a Paul Newman retrospective with free, outdoor back-to-back screenings of Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid and Hud at 7th+FIG plaza; “Sustainable L.A.,” an all-day green expo and environmental film series, “Digital Art L.A.,” an international selection of digital shorts and video installations along Gallery Row, and an experimental film program at SCI-arc in the Arts District.

Name: JumpIn App - Discover Interest-Twins nearby!
Description:
Download now!
http://onelink.to/jumpin (directly click on the 'Sign up' button or link in the 'Website' section!)

JumpIn is the world's first hyperlocal social discovery app. We help users connect with individuals who share their interests and goals, right in their neighbourhood! We also find events near you that match your hobbies!

3 young, naïve yet enthusiastic college buddies bonded when they realised they were the only ones in their batch who loved Shark Tank! While their friends would run away the moment a startup story was mentioned, they uncovered a fundamental issue with social networking today. 

Where do I go if I want to safely interact with someone online who enjoys the things I do? How do I find events for activities I love, without leaving my house? There's nothing out there. And so, being the excited youth they were, they set out to build a solution that will change the face of social networking and make it convenient yet safe to befriend people online!

And that's pretty much our story. If you've made it thus far, why not show us some love by downloading JumpIn!
https://linktr.ee/jmpnapp

Name: Filmmakers Ranch
Description:
Filmmakers Ranch sits on a 12-acre campus located 18 minutes east of downtown Oklahoma City and 22 minutes from Will Rogers Airport with direct flights to Los Angeles, New York, Chicago, and Atlanta. Oklahoma has one of the best TAX REBATE systems in the country with up to 35% CASH REBATE. We are home to Oklahoma's only certified Dolby Atmos sound mixing stage and the larges grip and electric company in the state. 

We are a full service studio with all amenities and production gear necessary to make a high quality feature film or TV series. 

Our campus includes a 5,500 sqft soundstage with acoustically constructed walls and ceiling, a 16x16ft elephant door and 27ft ceilings, a 3,000 sqft soundstage with greenscreen, multiple 1,000 sqft insert stages, and we have multiple standing sets including a police station, hospital, school, and an interior house. Our full production suites that can accommodate multiple large film and TV production office needs, all the way down to 2-person offices. For art departments, our facility is home to a 2,000 sqft drive-in construction room, props and art department stores, together with a full grip and electric package and full catering on site.

Outside, our facility boasts fields, forests, and a small lake that can be used by productions.  With plenty of locations within 15 minutes from the studio the only limit to what you can shoot is your imagination.

This unique "Filmmaker's Ranch" was conceived and founded by Melodie Garneau, Richard Janes and Amy Janes. We look forward to hosting your next production.

Name: Day After Day Music
Description:
Longtime agent and industry veteran Seth Shomes relaunched Day After Day Productions in April 2021. The company quickly gained momentum partnering with Yucaipa Investments in 2022.

Day After Day previously operated independently from 1996 through 2014. Shomes then joined The Agency Group, which was later acquired by UTA. During this tenure, he established the first-ever dedicated Casino Division at each agency and was subsequently honored with five (5) “Agent Of The Year” trophies at the Casino Entertainment Awards in Las Vegas.

Since its relaunch, Day After Day has achieved impressive recognition. The company received consecutive “Independent Booking Agency Of The Year (Global)” nominations from Pollstar (2024 & 2023). Additionally, founder Seth Shomes was named a Billboard 2024 Touring Power Player, a Pollstar 2024 and 2025 Impact 50 Honoree, and nominated for Pollstar‘s prestigious “Bobby Brooks Agent Of The Year Award” in 2024 and 2025.

With an incredible upward trajectory in a short amount of time, Day After Day has solidified its reputation as a powerhouse in booking a diverse client roster and is proud of its stellar reputation throughout all facets of the entertainment industry.

From its inception, Day After Day’s core mission remains unchanged: providing and uncovering the best opportunities for their clients across a variety of venues and doing so in a way that demonstrates the enduring value of hard work and strong relationships.

A roda gigante possui 42 cabines com capacidade para até oito passageiros. A estrutura conta com ar-condicionado, wi-fi, monitoramento por câmeras e interfone.

Com 91 metros de altura, a Roda Rico é uma das maiores do mundo, com dimensões superiores as de Paris, na Place de La Concorde, com 70 metros; de Toronto, a SkyWheel, nas Cataratas de Niágara com 56 metros; e de Chicago, a Navy pier, no Lago Michigan, com 70 metros.

Name: Pro Performance Sound + Acoustics
Description:
Since 2003, we have specialised in the fields of sound reinforcement and acoustics, bringing them together to create unique, cutting-edge Pro Performance solutions. 

Distribution + Sales
We are the Austrian distributor for the loudspeaker companies Alcons Audio and Lambda Labs,  as well as the acoustic brands Artnovion and Kuietly. We are registered dealers for well-known brands such as Blaze Audio, Denon, Marantz, NAD and RAM Audio, as well as Devialet.  And last but certainly not least Xilica whose audio matrices are at the centre of every Pro Performance audio concept.

Consulting
If customers want to carry out installations themselves or are limited by location or other factors, we are happy to act as consultants, advising customers on product selection and other important decisions in the fields of sound reinforcement and acoustic treatment. We also take measurements of existing sound systems and limit those accordingly to ensure that relations to the respective authorities run smoothly.

Audio concept design
From creating custom acoustic solutions to various custom subwoofer arrays to the development of specific, individual bass solutions or even new design bass concepts we are consistently improving and evolving our sound design process. Even the best systems usually do need a matching acoustic solution to reach their maximum potential. Therefore, we include acoustics in all of our sound concepts, developing custom solutions to make sure sound systems can play at the highest level.

Installations
We have been carrying out professional installations now for more than 20 years, a key driver for building knowledge and know-how. We have seen (almost) everything and are confident in our abilities. Challenges are an opportunity for us to learn and raise the bar for the next project. The extent of our experience is key to our competitive advantage in the areas of Sound + Acoustics. To us, the question is never ‘if’, but always ‘how’.

Name: HUMOUR CLUB INTERNATIONAL TRIPLICANE CHAPTER
Description:
It was on 16th October 1983, the Vijayadasamy day, that Humour Club International,Triplicane Chapter began its journey, with 15 like-minded people who wanted to promote humour in the society we live in.Then annual subscription was fixed at Rs. 12/- and the location for the club's monthly meeting, usually held on  Second Sundays, was Hindu High School in Triplicane. With growing attendance at the monthly meetings and the lack of a good venue in Triplicane, the club's monthly gathering shifted to Mylapore  initially held at Sanskrit College, then moving to Srinivasa Sastri Hall, subsequently to TAG Dhakshinamoorthy Auditorium (P.S.High School) and more recently to TAG Mylapore Fine Arts Club Auditorium.  We now meet between 4 and 6.30 p.m. on every second sunday of the month.
Through the years,many humorists fostered by the Humour Club, have gone on to pursue professional careers as comedians in the film industry. Mr.Vivekh and Mr. Charlee are two such leading comedians. HCI believes that there is humour in every person, and through that humour, we see people as people themselves.  As members of the club, we enjoy laughter-filled Sunday evenings with "clean" entertainment and no side effects!
In our monthly meetings, the first 60 minutes is dedicated to an open session where any member  can hop on to the stage and crack jokes.  Ofcourse, we do follow our unique "Code of Conduct" which ensures (a) no "A" jokes; (b) no political jokes; (c) no joke must hurt the feelings of any other person or community of people.
The joke session is followed by a 60 to 90-minute session by guest speakers.  We have so far invited more than 500 speakers from various places both within Tamil Nadu and rest of India, but have also had speakers from outside India when the opportunity arose. 
Over the years, we have grown immensely and now have a membership strength of 1800 members. The Annual Membership Subscription fee is currently Rs.500/- while the one-time Life Membership fee is RS.5000/-

Discover the best new independent films of the year, savor exquisite cuisine paired with legendary wines, and create lasting memories found only in the Napa Valley. The tenth annual Napa Valley Film Festival takes place November 11 – 15, 2020.

The Napa Valley Film Festival is presented by Cinema Napa Valley, a registered 501c3 non-profit organization headquartered in Napa, California. Name: Kids Invent Stuff
Description:
Kids Invent Stuff is a unique initiative inspiring the next generation of innovators by bringing children’s invention ideas to life. Aimed at engaging 4-11 year olds, we work with schools, communities, and families to spark creativity and encourage hands-on problem-solving skills.

Through face-to-face workshops, school assemblies, community events, and our popular YouTube channel, we bring kids’ wildest invention ideas to life. From building a jet-powered go-kart and a flame-throwing piano to an umbrella hat for dogs, we take children’s imaginative concepts and turn them into real, working creations. Each build is featured on our YouTube channel, offering an exciting, family-friendly platform for celebrating young inventors and their incredible ideas.

Our mission is to show kids that engineering and creativity can be exciting, accessible, and fun. Whether it’s leading classroom challenges, hosting live demonstrations, or collaborating with schools to inspire STEM (science, technology, engineering, and maths) learning, we’re passionate about giving children the confidence to explore and innovate. By providing a platform for their ideas, we aim to empower the next generation of inventors, problem-solvers, and dreamers.

Some of our key activities include:
 School visits: Interactive assemblies and workshops that bring invention and engineering to life.
 Community events: Engaging hands-on activities designed to spark curiosity and creativity.
 YouTube builds: Showcasing kids’ ideas to a global audience with fun, innovative builds.
 Special projects: Collaborating with partners on exciting initiatives like the world’s first robot pageant or creating inventions for celebrities.

Explore our page to see how we’re making STEM engaging for children across the UK and beyond. Whether you’re a parent, teacher, or organisation, join us in building a more inventive future - one crazy idea at a time!

Name: Tennessee Theatre
Description:
The Tennessee Theatre is a 1928 movie palace that was completely restored and renovated into a state-of-the art performing arts and entertainment venue in 2005, at the cost of $30MM. It presents dozens of touring shows every year, including Broadway, and is the home of the Knoxville Symphony Orchestra and Knoxville Opera. Other arts organizations, for-profit entities, and private clients rent the facility. 

The mission of the Historic Tennessee Theatre Foundation, Inc., is to preserve, maintain, and operate The Official State Theatre of Tennessee as a performing arts facility and theater for the benefit and enjoyment of all Tennesseans and visitors to the State of Tennessee.

Name: Alcatraz Milano
Description:
Alcatraz è dal 1998 il centro polifunzionale per lo spettacolo più grande della Città Metropolitana di Milano. La sua localizzazione nell'area centrale della città, vicinissima alle stazioni Centrale e Garibaldi, garantisce un'accessibilità ottimale tramite linee della metropolitana (M3, M5), taxi e mezzi di superficie.

Impianti audio, video e luci all’avanguardia, due palchi, backstage per gli artisti, guardaroba e bar attrezzati consentono di dare vita a qualsiasi tipo di evento: da una sfilata di moda ad una convention, da una festa privata a una produzione televisiva, dai dj set più trasgressivi ai concerti degli artisti più affermati a livello internazionale.

La dotazione tecnica residente e la professionalità del personale consentono di gestire con serenità dagli eventi più complessi a manifestazioni di minor portata. La possibilità di accedere con i TIR di produzione direttamente sul palco, la presenza di sipari per modulare lo spazio principale in ambienti più raccolti, la sala catering dedicata sono valori aggiunti che rendono Alcatraz una location unica nel panorama.

La fitta rete di collaboratori (promoter di artisti, catering, allestitori, service tecnici), infine, è un'ulteriore garanzia di qualità e supporto a qualsiasi tipologia di evento.

Davy & Kristin McGuire are multi-award winning mixed reality artists, internationally renowned for creating idiosyncratic experiences using immersive and experiential technologies, fine art, digital projection and storytelling.
The duo has been commissioned by organisations such as the RSC, Canal+, Barneys New York, London International Mime Festival and ELLE China amongst many others. Name: AEFH Talent Agency
Description:
AMSEL, EISENSTADT, FRAZIER & HINOJOSA, INC. (AEFH) originated as Fred Amsel & Associates, Inc. in 1975. The agency was founded by the legendary talent agent Fred Amsel and specialized in television and film. Michael Eisenstadt who had started his career in talent representation in 1984 as an agent trainee for Mr. Amsel and John Frazier became Co-Presidents of the company upon Mr. Amsel’s retirement in 1992 and the company was rebranded as Amsel, Eisenstadt & Frazier, Inc. (AEF). AEF continued to specialize in television and film and established their successful Youth and Young Adults Department. The agency’s expansion continued in 1998 when Gloria Hinojosa joined the agency as a TV/film agent and to helm it’s Adult Commercial Department. In 2000, PINNACLE TALENT was established as a division of AEF also specializing in adult commercial and more recently theatrical talent.

In 2011, upon John Frazier’s exit of the representation business, Michael Eisenstadt became sole President and Gloria Hinojosa became a partner. The company was rebranded once again to become AMSEL, EISENSTADT, FRAZIER & HINOJOSA, INC. (AEFH).

AMSEL, EISENSTADT, FRAZIER & HINOJOSA, INC. is a well-respected boutique talent agency specializing in television, film and commercials for adults, young adults and youth. According to the Los Angeles Business Journal’s yearly lists, AEFH is consistently among the Top 20 Los Angeles based talent agencies.

Soul Vibes LLC (Soul Vibes Entertainment)

Soul Vibes LLC, also recognized as Soul Vibes Entertainment, is a dynamic and forward-thinking entertainment company that transcends traditional boundaries to create a unique and transformative experience in the world of music, arts, and creative ventures. Established with a vision to revolutionize the entertainment industry, Soul Vibes LLC has emerged as a beacon of innovation, artistic expression, and empowerment.

Mission
At Soul Vibes LLC, our mission is to foster an ecosystem that nurtures artistic brilliance, promotes diverse creativity, and uplifts emerging talents across various artistic disciplines. We are dedicated to providing a platform where artists can explore, collaborate, and thrive, pushing the boundaries of their craft to create impactful and timeless work that resonates with audiences worldwide.

Vision
Our vision at Soul Vibes LLC is to redefine entertainment by celebrating authenticity, embracing diversity, and pushing the envelope of creativity. We aspire to be a driving force behind the evolution of artistry, transcending genres and mediums to curate experiences that connect deeply with individuals, spark conversations, and leave lasting impressions on culture.

End Goal
The ultimate goal of Soul Vibes LLC is to leave an indelible mark on the entertainment landscape. We aim to create a legacy of innovation, empowerment, and positive influence on the artists we collaborate with and the communities we engage. Through our ventures, we seek to cultivate a global community of artists, creators, and enthusiasts who are united by a shared passion for pushing artistic boundaries and fostering meaningful connections.

Our Approach
Soul Vibes LLC operates on a foundation of artistic integrity, community building, and visionary entrepreneurship. We strive to curate experiences that captivate, challenge, and inspire, allowing our artists to explore their potential to the fullest

Name: Espaço Itaú de Cinema
Description:
Desde a sua inauguração em 1995, o Espaço Itaú de Cinema tem como propósito proporcionar ao público diferentes visões do cinema, formar plateias críticas, conscientes e transformadoras e deixar um legado para a sociedade, sempre apoiando projetos que valorizam e reforçam o compromisso deste espaço com a democratização da cultura.

Com um portfólio de filmes que abrange as mais diversas nacionalidades e perfis, o circuito, que conta com salas em Brasília (DF), Rio de Janeiro (RJ) e São Paulo (SP), também oferece conteúdos esportivos, musicais e educacionais, transmitidos ao vivo via satélite e sedia os mais diversos tipos de mostras e festivais do cinema nacional e internacional. 

Preocupado em proporcionar o acesso à cultura para toda a população, em 2019 o Espaço Itaú de Cinema foi o primeiro grupo exibidor a instalar equipamentos de audiodescrição, Libras (Língua Brasileira de Sinais) e legenda descritiva em 100% das salas, que contam também com acessibilidade e assentos para pessoas com necessidades especiais.
 
Entre os programas sociais, o espaço oferece o Clube do Professor, com entrada gratuita à sessão para professores que tenham o cartão Clube do Professor e um acompanhante. Outro programa social é o Projeto Escola, que tem o propósito de integrar diferentes formas de expressão, sempre buscando relacionar áreas de conhecimento em seus programas. O projeto, além de exibir filmes, também realiza workshops, debates e outras atividades complementares para abordar o conteúdo e o entendimento dos temas apresentados. Dessa forma, busca contribuir para desenvolver pessoas com senso crítico e que sejam mais ativas na sociedade.

Name: Fritz's Adventure
Description:
Fritz’s Adventure was founded in Branson, MO as an indoor/outdoor adventure park and family attraction. Visitors of all ages and abilities climb, tunnel, jump, run, slide, rappel, and zip in this all-weather attraction that is open year-round.

The Fritz's employee engagement program gives you a chance to offer meaningful engagement opportunities to your team. Assets include a full facility private event, team building outings, corporate meeting space, an outdoor flying experience, tickets and annual passes, and invitations to special events like the wildly-popular New Year's Eve party.

Team building at Fritz's is truly one-of-a-kind. It's all about connecting and engaging with your teammates. The Dale Carnegie Institute indicates companies with engaged employees outperform those without by 202%. Though there are several options to choose from, your team can enjoy fun ice breakers, a guided (and blind-folded!) ropes course challenge, a leadership development workshop, and a catered meal.

Group outings at Fritz's are an absolute blast! Research shows that shared experiences bring people closer together and create long-lasting memories. We see this happen all the time when groups come to Fritz's. 

If you're looking for a unique, non-traditional corporate meeting space, be sure to consider Fritz's. Our third floor meeting space looks over the attraction below. There are times you just need to get your team out of the office and meet in a non-traditional space so new ideas can flow more freely.

Your company can also make Fritz's your very own through a private facility rental. Companies are amazed how employees and their families love having 80,000 square feet of explorable space all to themselves.  

About Fritz's

Fritz's Adventure offers 80,000 square feet of explorable space for all ages. This includes a multi-story ropes course, underground tunnels, laser room, City Wall, rappelling, giant treehouses, multi-story slides, warped walls, Sky Fall and more.

SOBRE NOSOTROS

Entre su equipo hay nominados a Premios Max y Goya, fruto de un cúmulo de experiencia que cubre más de 20 años de profesión.

Combining youthfulness and senior experience, 11 Varas was born as a 360-degree company in the entertainment industry, always with a focus on the creation and production of scripted/unscripted TV, film and theater thanks to an incredible pool of creative talent backed by a robust private investment.

Its Co-Founders, Jorge A. Lara and Borja Cabada, as well as its Executive Producers, Josetxu Palenzuela and Candela Izquierdo, have extensive experience in various audiovisual formats that open up the possibility of new horizons.

Among its team are nominees for Max and Goya Awards, the result of a wealth of experience developed over more than 20 years in the industry. 

On their website (www.11varas.tv) you can find a variety of formats and stories to share, to laugh, cry, fall in love with, and contemplate...

Name: Garden State Film Festival
Description:
The artistic philosophy of the Garden State Film Festival is rooted in the celebration of the independent film genre and the creation of a forum where local and other independent filmmakers can exhibit their work. In addition, our event provides novice and aspiring filmmakers, actors, and others interested in a career in the film business, the opportunity to meet and network with industry professionals in an atmosphere that is conducive to learning and mentoring. See you at the movies!
History

The Garden State Film Festival was born in 2002 after a chance encounter in a Sea Girt, NJ Grocery store by 25 year film industry veteran Diane Raver and the well known Hollywood actor Robert Pastorelli.

Through his deep ties to Hollywood, Mr. Pastorelli and Ms. Raver were able to bring an all encompassing event to the State of New Jersey. It premiered in 2003 and was immediately deemed a huge success.

Since that time, industry notables such as Glenn Close, Frank Vincent, Batman producer Michael Uslan, Austin Pendleton, Kurtwood Smith, James Gandolfini, Budd Schulberg, Clarence Clemons and others have lent their support.

GSFF is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. Our event is held on an annual basis in the spring of each year in Asbury Park, New Jersey. In addition GSFF provides a wide range of outreach and educational programs throughout the entire year.
Mission

The Garden State Film Festival was founded to promote the art of film making on all levels by showcasing a wide variety of film, video and animated works as well as provide educational programs in the creative arts to the public by industry leaders.

Name: Show Factory Bcn
Description:
Producción, distribución y gestión de actividades, eventos y espectáculos.
Show Factory Produccions es una Industria Cultural que nace el año 2.000 de la mano de Jordi Masclans y Anna Lajarín, con el objetivo de crear, producir, distribuir y gestionar espectáculos y actividades lúdicas de calidad, ofreciendo así una garantía de éxito para nuestros clientes. En Show Factory decidimos transformar nuestra pasión en nuestra profesión. Desde los inicios, nuestra principal motivación ha sido disfrutar y sentirnos orgullosos del trabajo bien hecho. Cada proyecto con el que trabajamos es único, ponemos todo el esfuerzo y dedicación para conseguir la satisfacción del cliente. Name: Folia Tropical
Description:
Criado em 2012, o Folia Tropical nasceu com o propósito de oferecer experiências marcantes no Carnaval do Rio de Janeiro, sendo o primeiro e único camarote com uma superestrutura projetada especialmente para o público pagante.
Desde então, o Folia se consolidou como um dos espaços mais icônicos da Sapucaí, reconhecido por ser o camarote que mais vive o desfile como ele deve ser vivido: de perto, com emoção, respeito e encanto por cada escola que passa.

Ao longo dessa trajetória, construímos uma relação íntima com o público, que expressa seu amor pela cultura brasileira de forma vibrante e apaixonada. Essa conexão é o que nos inspira, ano após ano, a oferecer uma experiência cada vez mais intensa, viva e autêntica.

Localizado no Setor 8, ao lado do recuo da bateria, o ponto mais pulsante da passarela do samba, o Folia Tropical oferece uma hospitalidade ímpar, que une conforto, cuidado e excelência em todos os detalhes. Thanks to our audience’s commitment, the festival has run for over 15 years, winning awards from Boston Magazine and Boston A-List, and acclaim from local film critics—including The Boston Globe’s Ty Burr, who called it the “best film fest in the city.”

Name: Dances with Films
Description:
It comes down to dreams.

DANCES WITH FILMS was formed in 1998 by a group of filmmakers who envisioned a festival where “who you know” didn’t matter, only the quality of the work. Our name, DANCES WITH FILMS, was actually a play on the plethora of ‘dance’ film festivals that cropped up left and right at the time – Slamdance, Digidance, Nodance, TromaDance. Truth be told, it started out as a rebellious joke. Originally the fest had the long title of “Dances With Films: Festival of the Unknowns” – something of a send up to all the ‘Dance’ Festivals that seemed to spring up over night. Then, after a battle with Orion Pictures, it became a symbol… of our irreverence and commitment to challenge the system. It’s actually a pretty funny story.

More expansion for year 20… 

2017 marks continuing expansion for DWF as Year 20 will (once again) be presented over 11 days, culminating in the closing night awards ceremony. Dances With Films has become known as a discovery festival as unique as its mission. Some have referred to it as a “summer camp” for filmmakers because of its friendly spirit and continual efforts to help filmmakers forge relationships that will last long after the glimmer of the fest is over.
Dances With Films has been held each year in the heart of Los Angeles. Year 19 brought even greater audiences as we returned to the Chinese Theatres in the heart of Hollywood, arguably the most famous theatre in the world. DWF is one of the highest attended film fests in Southern California with more than 20,000 attendees each year. Additionally the festival is regularly tracked by industry in Los Angeles with deals made each year.

At the core of DWF is the narrative competition section, comprising both features and shorts. Our normal schedule contains 16 competition features and more than 3 dozen competition shorts. Additionally we present around a half dozen of the most groundbreaking documentaries and about a dozen cutting-edge music videos from the indie scene.  A few years back we added DANCES WITH KIDZ! – a side bar festival that celebrates films made FOR kids and films made BY kids.  Last year we introduced DANCES WITH PILOTS, encompassing the incredible indie creations for television and web.  All of this on top of our Fusion series, which brings together a multitude of amazing additional, features and shorts.

Description:
Since its inception in 1975, Movin' On has remained true to its roots by providing a fun-filled day of diverse music, exciting events, and community involvement. As a 18+ student only show, Movin’ On has remained a substance-free environment at no charge to Penn State students.

As one of the top 5 largest student-run music festivals in the country, and a Penn State tradition now in its 44th year, Movin' On brings a free celebration intended to wish off all graduating students who are "movin' on" in their lives. Movin' On's rich history includes a wide variety of musical acts including Fall Out Boy, Gym Class Heroes, Daya, Lupe Fiasco, Judah & The Lion, MGMT, Wiz Khalifa, Big Sean, Passion Pit, Two Door Cinema Club, and more.

In the fall of 2010, Movin’ On was born through collaboration with four other other campus organizations. UPUA, GPSA, ARHS, and SPA held their own concerts in the springtime, but the students wanted one big show instead of four small scale events. With the help of UPAC, Movin’ On is funded through the Penn State student activity fee, and has combined forces with these other organizations to create one big festival.

Creada en 1996 por Ignacio Septién, actualmente atrae a más de 40 mil asistentes de México y Sudamérica en cada una de sus ediciones anuales, en la que una atractiva selección de invitados extranjeros y nacionales conviven con el público, conformado por fans de cómics, videojuegos, coleccionables, cosplay, media y lucha libre, tanto nuevos como experimentados, y por numerosas familias.

Reconocida como una de las mejores convenciones del continente americano, La Mole Convention recibe año con año a los más grandes exponentes del noveno arte, así como a interesantes invitados del cine, la televisión, el gaming y el cosplay.

Con sede en el Centro Internacional de Exposiciones y convenciones World Trade Center de la Ciudad de México, La Mole Convention ha contado con la participación y respaldo de compañías como 20th Century Fox, Xbox, Netflix, EA Games, Amazon Prime Video, SyFy Channel y Disney (que incluye a Star Wars y Marvel), WWE, Mattel, Hasbro, Riot Games, EA Sports entre otras, así como de las editoriales más importantes de México en el ámbito del cómic como TBG (Smash/Televisa) y Panini.

Name: Tallgrass Film Association
Description:
As the premier film association in America's Heartland region, Tallgrass Film Association (TFA) is dedicated to fostering and enhancing the cinematic arts. Tallgrass strives to serve as a venue and a voice for independent films and filmmakers, spotlighting films that would otherwise not have a proper theatrical screening in the region. 

In 2012, the Tallgrass FIlm Festival will celebrate its 10th anniversary as the largest independent film festival in the state of Kansas. Taking place in and around downtown Wichita every October, the internationally recognized four-day event has become a hallmark of the city's cultural landscape and the festival is internationally renowned or its world-class cinematic programming.
 
Filmmakers from around the country and the world are invited to Wichita to participate each year, which is packed with educational panels, legendary parties and is renowned in the indie filmmaking community. More than 300 independent filmmakers have attended the Tallgrass Film Festival over the last nine years, and more than 10,000 people gathered for the "Tallgrass Experience" in 2011 (it's true, Johhny Depp!). 

In addition to the flagship Tallgrass Film Festival, TFA also offers year-round programming.

Name: International Latino Cultural Center of Chicago
Description:
The International Latino Cultural Center of Chicago (ILCC) is a Pan-Latino, nonprofit multidisciplinary arts organization dedicated to developing, promoting and increasing awareness of Latino cultures among Latinos and other communities by presenting a wide variety of art forms including film, music, dance, visual arts, comedy and theater. The ILCC, originally founded as Chicago Latino Cinema, attained not-for-profit status in 1987, at which time it fulfilled its mission of promoting Latino culture primarily through the annual Chicago Latino Film Festival.

As part of the Center’s mission, the Chicago Latino Film Festival and every cultural event presented by our organization serve as vehicles to break the barriers created and perpetuated by stereotypes, and provoke the audience to challenge mainstream ideals of the Latino identity by showing, through our cultural expressions, that Latinos are defined by more than 20 different nationalities and come from all social and racial backgrounds.  As the demand grew for a wider range of cultural events; so did the offerings of the organization. In July 1999, Chicago Latino Cinema officially changed its name to the International Latino Cultural Center of Chicago and expanded its programming to include music, theater, dance, comedy and art exhibits. Currently, the Center offers over ten annual events, including the Film Festival, which is its largest event.

Avec Mimpe, partagez et trouvez n'importe où des découvertes artistiques et culturelles !

Mimpe vous offre ces principales fonctionnalités :

• Publiez et partagez les découvertes que vous faites à partir du Mimpe Button placé au centre de l'application (films, séries, musiques, restaurants, activités etc.).
• Ne partagez pas que vos découvertes personnelles, vous pouvez aussi en découvrir de la part des autres Mimpeurs en recherchant par mots-clés, catégorie et par lieu !
• Donnez une note aux autres Mimpeurs pour évaluer la pertinence de leurs découvertes ! Cela remplace les likes et le Mimpeur est noté pour l'ensemble de ses découvertes.
• Envoyez des messages privés aux Mimpeurs qui ont partagé du contenu qui vous a intéressé et avec qui vous voulez en savoir plus par exemple.

Mimpe est disponible depuis le 24 Juillet sur l’App Store et Google Play.

Name: SPI Themed Construction
Description:
Sign Producers has a long, accomplished history of designing and fabricating the highest quality signs for all types of businesses. Established in 1987, we can say with certainty, “We’ve done it all.”

Facility & Equipment – Our 25,000 sq. ft. manufacturing facility in Orlando, FL is equipped to handle all facets of production in-house. Our facility includes heated automotive paint booths, full machine shop, CNC routers, welding stations, cold laminating equipment and much more.

Everything we need to build your project, no matter how big or complex, is under our roof where we can control production quality, costs and turnaround time.

People – Sign Producers is a family owned and operated business, but we’ve also attracted the best talent in the industry. Our people are exceptional craftsmen who’ve honed their skills over many years and pride themselves on innovative, cost-effective solutions.

Materials – We are passionate about quality and therefore use only the best components. We work with top-grade aluminum, stainless steel, type I PVC, HDU foam, high-end LEDs and UL-listed products. We never substitute cheaper materials. Our signs are built to perform for years.

Clients – Our client list is a virtual who’s who of the world’s most renowned businesses including theme parks, resorts, hotels, restaurants and retailers.

Approach – We believe our clients deserve the highest level of creativity, quality and service. When you choose Sign Producers, you can be 100% confident the final product will surpass your expectations and will be delivered on time and on budget.

Name: Cannery Hall
Description: When it opens in 2023, Cannery Hall will be the largest independent music complex in Nashville. With three stages accommodating audiences from 325 – 1200, Cannery Hall aims to be the most artist-friendly, fan-friendly, and welcoming venue in Music City. Anchoring Cannery Row, just outside downtown Nashville’s Lower Broadway entertainment district, Cannery Hall’s historic building dates to 1883 and has been a music venue for over 40 years. Name: NEW SOUND GENERATION
Description:
“Championing young Indonesian artists” – Apple Music

Nutyas Surya Gumilang (NSG) is a music producer, songwriter, performer and owner of a digital independent label which based in Jakarta named NSG Music Recordings. He was born in Indonesia and raised in London, United Kingdom. NSG graduated from Kingston University and took a major in music. Before he came back to Jakarta, he worked in Activision’s DJ Hero as DJ/MashUp. Now he’s an established music producer in Indonesia and has worked with such big names in the country as Rinni Wulandari, Jamie Aditya, Indah Dewi Pertiwi, Citra Scholastika and many more. He also produced music for young and talented artists under his label NSG Music Recordings in various genres, from Pop, R&B, Hip-hop, EDM, World Music and more.

Not only working behind the camera, NSG also a performer. He is a singer, rapper and DJ. With Trinity Optima Production, a big label in Indonesia, NSG has spawned two radio hits, titled “Good Time” and “Ngumpul Ngumpul.” Under his own label, he has produced more radio hits like “Starlight,” “Losin’ My Mind,” “Sempurna” and “Undercover Lovin.” In 2015 he joined an EDM music competition on NET TV Indonesia called The Remix, where he and his partner, Meichan Munos, took the fourth place on the show as Rarasurya. Apple music stated that NSG is championing the young artists of Indonesia, and that makes NSG want to contribute more to music scenes and do his best to make his craft known, not only in Indonesia, but in the global market.

Name: View Master Events
Description:
The mission of View Master Events is to develop and execute immersive entertainment projects through best-in-class services, state-of-the-art technologies and effective project management, always within schedule and within budget.
Founded in Athens, Greece in 2010, View Master (VM) is one of the leading film and event production companies in Greece. 

View Master Events and its associated partners are a 360 / turnkey production service team, with highly experienced professionals from Greece and abroad, committed to utilize strategies and technologies to execute major projects. We design and implement our clients’ projects on time and effectively, by understanding the requirements and the limitations, by setting priorities and avoiding conflicts. 
Our services include administration and coordination of the entire subcontractors' ecosystem, managing multiple client groups and stakeholders, in the most efficient way, ensuring that the overall service delivered is exceptional, timely and cost effective. From production and artistic design, to site management and venue set up, artists’ management and hospitality, spectators’ services, risk management and insurance, we offer all services required to successfully deliver the most demanding events. 

Our unparalleled technical expertise allows us to leverage our state-of-art sound and lighting systems, provide extensive filming and broadcasting capabilities, build custom stages and special constructions, manage complicated wide screen multi-layered congress systems, brand our clients’ event with made-to-order prints of any scale, and much more, according to our clients’ needs.

Name: Arvato Mobile Brazil
Description:
Mondia Media is an innovator in the digital entertainment industry, and acts as an independent service provider for global entertainment shops for mobile telecommunications providers, hardware manufacturers and media companies. The company’s high-end technological expertise makes it one of the leading global providers in the distribution and management of digital media content. Mondia Media delivers the total value chain, ranging from licensing, production and distribution to customer support and billing. The company acquired by Mondia Ltd and the Abu Dhabi Group in January 2009 traded under the name of arvato mobile up until September 2011, and was originally created in 1999 as handy.de Vertrieb GmbH. 
Vodafone, T-Mobile, Sony Ericsson, Swisscom, T-Online, Telecom Italia, Al Arabiya and Dubai Telecom are among Mondia Media’s clients. Name: Wedgwood Circle
Description:
Wedgwood Circle is a network of business leaders, foundations, and creators investing in cultural projects that are good, true and beautiful for the common good. Wedgwood focuses on art and entertainment, including film, music, television, literature, theater, fashion, fine arts, graphic novels, gaming and new media.

Damon of Athens wrote: "Give me the songs of a nation, and it does not matter who writes its laws." With technology delivering round-the-clock content, the impact of entertainment on our beliefs and attitudes is greater than ever. Rather than just critiquing culture or removing ourselves from it, we follow Michelangelo's suggested to "criticize by creating."

While many investors and foundations desire to follow Michelangelo's advice, the current economic reality requires that we are more strategic in deploying limited capital. Wedgwood Circle provides a network and strategy for organizations and individuals to wisely invest in ways that maximize social and financial returns while generating good, true, and beautiful results.

Name: The Forum, Bath
Description:
Situated in the heart of the World Heritage City of Bath - The Forum is a stunning Art Deco ex-super cinema built in 1934.

“The Heritage City of Bath is an indisputable world class leader in the field of historical architecture. But even the longest-established residents are aware that, away from the iconic heritage trail, there’s always a new old treasure to discover - and The Forum is one such hidden gem. 

Having opened its doors to the public as a cinema in 1934, this remarkable venue celebrated its 80th birthday in May 2014. The cinema remained in operation until 1969 and the building has since accommodated a bingo hall and a dance school before Bath City Church took the building over in 1989. The Forum is Bath’s biggest venue and the third largest seated auditorium in the South West of England

But for many years, the building was overlooked, unloved and allowed to slip into a state of careworn disarray. When Bath City Church took The Forum over, it had been allowed to crumble into a sorry state of disrepair, thankfully, the church restored it to its former glory and set up a company called Bath Forum Ltd to manage the venue and deliver a new programme of events and to look at refurbishment as an ongoing project.”

Today, The Forum represents a true reflection of typical Art Deco-era splendour including lacquered wood fixtures and fittings and gold-leafed flourishes all subtly vying for your attention. In the elegant auditorium, the iconic green cinema seats offer a spacious, luxurious audience experience.

Artists who have performed at The Forum, include - Caro Emerald, Jools Holland, Father John Misty, John Grant, Jamie Cullum, Texas, Bellowhead, Gino D'Acampo, James Martin, Bath Philharmonia, Mary Berry, Paloma Faith, James Blunt and many more... 

www.bathforum.co.uk

Description:

We work in the European Union and Asia. We love to work with clients devoted to their mission, expecting the best results and changing the cliches. Our productions aim to engage and inspire the audience.

Concerts, conferences, festivals, open-air crowd events will come to life thanks to our work. To be competetive on today's market means to invest in the most recent technologies and trends - but that alone will not give You what we bring - and that is focusing the result on the audience so that it is simple in reception and intuitively close. We acheive this by hiring proffessionals and passionates but also by having creative and personal approach to create the project together with the client. Our team connects vaious elements of complicated and cutting-egde technology do deliver unforgetable results on time and within budget. Having our own production team without using middle-men agencies we are able to guaranee the most economic budget conditions.

Our Specialities:

3D VIDEO MAPPING
Large scale building projection. We specialise in trendsetting interactive mappings - controlled by audience.

DOME, PANORAMIC AND 360' DEGREE IMMERSIVE PROJECTIONS
We create immersive spaces - circumferential 360 projections, BOX projections (panorama in a square room in all 4 directions + UP and DOWN) as well as DOME and HALFDOME projections. By using our own video distribution system we can provide a breathtaking immersive experience.

INTERACTIVE INSTALLATIONS
Innovative way of engaging audience of any age. We create custom installations for children and adults - educative, artistic, theatre as well as digital and interactive games in public space.

Name: Neptuno Films
Description:
Neptuno Films inició sus actividades en Terrassa (Barcelona) en 1991, y en poco tiempo se convirtió en una de las productoras más importantes a nivel mundial dentro del panorama de la animación audiovisual para niños. 

En los últimos años, Neptuno Films ha experimentado un proceso de crecimiento continuo a través de la creación de un variado reparto de personajes, reconocidos y apreciados en el mundo entero como “La Vaca Connie”, “Dougie se Disfraza” o "Megaminimals". 

Actualmente, la compañía figura entre los principales estudios de animación de Europa, y cuenta con un departamento de distribución encargado del ramo de la televisión, video y merchandising. Según los últimos informes de “The Global Animation Business”, con la participación de la Asociación Europea de Animación CARTOON, Neptuno Films ocupó el segundo puesto en la lista de los estudios europeos más prolíficos, y fue elegida por “Animation Magazine” como uno de los diez mejores estudios de animación fuera de los Estados Unidos.

Estamos orgullosos que nuestras series hayan sido vistas alrededor del mundo. Compañías como Noggin, Disney UK, NRD, Discovery Kids LA y RTVE han emitido nuestras series.

Nuestro trabajo ha sido una unión de esfuerzo y diversión de años, y hemos querido transmitir valores positivos a los niños de alrededor del mundo, entregando contenido ingenioso y creativo para televisión.

Name: Phantom Hound Studios
Description:
Phantom Hound Studio is a video game company dedicated to providing high-quality visual representation and gameplay to LGBTQ+ and POC of the Gamer’s community.

Phantom Hound Studio aims to accurately represent minorities in the gaming industry, allowing these individuals to truly feel comfortable in their gaming experience. Through an international channel, Phantom Hound Studios will be connecting all talents; from researchers to developers in order to create an accurate visual representation of these groups. 


There is a stigma within the video game industry against representing individuals from the LGBTQ+ and cultural minorities. Often with representations that are stereotypical and discriminatory with attentional design. Our studio will stand as champion of visual equality among our competitors and give options for these groups to have exciting artistic titles that they can identify as positive media representation of themselves.

Name: Moema Festas
Description:
Moema Festas: Conectando Comunidades Através de Experiências Únicas

Fundada em 2017, Moema Festas é uma empresa especializada na organização de eventos de rua de grande porte, reconhecida pela sua ética, organização impecável e pela capacidade de superar as expectativas do público e parceiros. Sob a direção de Mariana Ribeiro e Eliana Mastandrea, a empresa rapidamente se tornou referência em Moema e região, entregando eventos de alta qualidade e cuidadosamente planejados.

Com um portfólio robusto de 17 eventos realizados, Moema Festas se destaca pela realização de cinco grandes eventos anuais, que atraem um público estimado de 35 mil pessoas por evento, chegando a picos de 60 mil visitantes em edições especiais. Nossos eventos, que acontecem tradicionalmente na Praça Nossa Senhora Aparecida, são verdadeiras celebrações da cultura, gastronomia e entretenimento, sempre proporcionando uma experiência completa para o público.

Principais Eventos:
Moema Taste (Abril) – Um mergulho nas melhores experiências gastronômicas.
Arraiá de Moema (Junho) – Tradição e alegria em uma festa junina inesquecível.
Festa das Nações (Agosto) – Uma viagem cultural pelos sabores e costumes de diversas nações.
Oktoberfest de Moema (Outubro) – Uma celebração com muita música, cerveja e diversão.
Natal de Moema (Dezembro) – A magia natalina tomando conta das ruas.

Name: Starfish
Description:
Starfish is an artist-led nonprofit building essential creative infrastructure for a changing cultural landscape. We support mid-career artists from marginalized communities with funding, strategic guidance, and artist-owned tools that enable creative and economic sovereignty. Our mission is to back cultural architects forging new pathways beyond extractive systems.

We've developed a bespoke model that adapts to the individual needs of mid-career artist-entrepreneurs and media-tech startups. Our approach is designed to nurture creativity, foster innovation, and unlock untapped markets, specifically supporting the creative IP of historically overlooked and undervalued artist-entrepreneurs. Our approach is rooted in radical ownership, innovation, and community building. We believe that artists should own their work, have access to diverse funding options, and cultivate a strong community of fans and supporters committed to them and their artistic visions.

Our goal is to create a network of diverse storytellers who make a positive impact on the world through their unique artistic visions, and believe that economic autonomy is key to achieving this goal. By empowering artists to have control and ownership over their work, we enable them to tell their stories their way. At Starfish, we drive real social and economic impact through authentic storytelling and entrepreneurship, empowering artists to make their mark on the world.

Name: Minika
Description:
Minika is an omni-channel children's project that provides safe access to fun content for children and pre-teens. 

Since 2011, we have been meeting our target audience with our meticulously prepared animated films, cartoon series, movies, animations, and TV shows, tailored to the mental development of children and pre-teens. 

Under the Minika umbrella brand, we broadcast on our MinikaÇOCUK channel for pre-school children aged 3-8 and on  MinikaGO channel for pre-teens aged 7-14.

At Minika, we promise to provide continuous entertaining content that children, pre-teens even teenagers, and families can enjoy, with our dynamic, colorful, energetic, useful, reliable, and intellectual qualities. In addition to our TV channels, we offer a world enriched with events, licensed theaters and shows, web-based games, and licensed products. Furthermore, we bring together safe and healthy content that children love to receive every month with our MinikaÇOCUK and MinikaGO kids magazines. 

With our social responsibility, "Your guide for conscious parents and happy children," we share our Happy Family Guide and podcasts with families.

In addition to popular content among children around the world, we also produce entertaining and educational local content that includes Turkish cultural values. Our first local content started with Adventurous Fins in 2017, followed by Mini&Mani, Alpman, and Fast Feet. In 2023, Turkey's first local animated superhero, Akıncı, received praise for its story and powerful visuals.

For further information, you can visit the corporate website of Turkuvaz Media Group, www.minika.com.tr, or Minika's social media accounts. You can e-mail us at info@minika.com.tr.

Name: VOKE VR
Description:
VOKE, a Silicon Valley-based company, is bringing to market a live event virtual reality (VR) platform that has already caught the attention of several professional sports franchises. 

VOKE’s non-fish-eye, true stereoscopic platform is unique in that it captures and streams both a live 180-360 degrees 2D immersive feed for mobile, tablets, and broadcast, as well as a live VR stream consumable on every VR platform. VOKE’s proprietary solution enables fans to easily switch between multiple time-synced vantage points at live events for the best seat in the house. Add in both shareable social media and instant replay capabilities and the VOKE platform becomes the most versatile and usable VR solution available for real-time, live-event action on the market.

VOKE was acquired by Intel Corporation in November 2016.

Name: Musicien
Description:
Está dirigida no sólo a quien ofrece la música, sino también a quien la demanda, por ello decidimos tener una amplia variedad de perfiles y así poder abarcar más campo: 
-	Como músico y amante de la música, ya sea amateur o profesional, hay perfiles de: Músico o cantante, orquesta, dúo, grupos, dj y charanga. 
-	Como profesional del sector: estudio de grabación, locales de ensayo, empresa de sonido e iluminación, profesor de música, tienda de música, luthier y centro de enseñanza musical, para que así ellos también den a conocer sus servicios y productos. 

Como usuario final y por defecto se asigna el perfil de fans, donde puedes contactar con los músicos o agrupaciones, interesarte por eventos, instrumentos o clases. Hay cabida para todos!

La dinámica es sencilla e intuitiva. Una vez que accedes a la web, te pedirá que te registres, mediante redes sociales o con email. Una vez registrado, debes de confirmar tu cuenta en el correo que se manda automáticamente. Hecho todo eso, te puedes mantener con el perfil de fans que se te asigna por defecto, o crearte todos los perfiles que desees. 
Para darte a conocer, te ofrecemos subir contenido como fotos, vídeos, listas de reproducción, enlaces a otras redes, comentarios, publicar tus conciertos, eventos, ofertas, servicios, para que por ejemplo las salas de conciertos que están dentro, puedan buscarte y contactar contigo para tocar en ella o publicar sus conciertos.
 
Incluimos un chat para que puedas hablar en privado. 
Puedes seguir a otros usuarios de Musicien, al igual que ellos te pueden seguir a ti, calificarlo, dar me gusta a su publicación y “remusiquearlas”.

Incluye dos apartados más que son: compraventa y alquiler de instrumentos y accesorios donde podrás vender aquello que ya no uses y profesores particulares, donde los profesores de cualquier instrumento o modalidad pueden conseguir alumnos (estamos trabajando en clases en streaming a través de nuestra plataforma).

Name: BusinessRail Experience
Description:
BusinessRail Experience is an all-inclusive professional lifetime experience event mixing business with personal growth initiatives.
Inaugurated in Portugal on Nov. 2018, the BusinessRail organizes its third edition by using the rail of the railway as a common thread to gather people with personal and professional development goals. Since its launch, BusinessRail has been attended by business-people from various nationalities who depart from several countries in order to compose the international delegation from the first city of the train route.
The program of the event takes place both in the train and in the cities included in each route (in the first year the train left Lisbon to Porto and in June this year the cities of Barcelona, Madrid, Lisbon and Porto were travelled in the Iberian Edition). 
Inside the carriage, professionals from various economic sectors make presentations of their projects and initiate international relations actions. At each destination, the delegation participates in seminars, workshops, corporate and institutional visits. Among the participants of these trips, mostly business-people are also exhibitors and speakers on their way to the congresses, forums and fairs with which BusinessRail makes collaborative agreements.
Each edition of the BusinessRail event has a unique route that allows all participants to visit new locations and explore business opportunities. 
BusinessRail is organized by the CIC - International Culture Center, JEUNE - Organization of Young Entrepreneurs of the European Union and the Sino-PLPE Federation. It is also co-organized by AJEPC - Association of Young Entrepreneurs Portugal-China and CJLP - Community of Portuguese Language Jurists.

We concluded (Oct 20th) the edition of the China BusinessRail'19 experiencing activities in Beijing, Shanghai, Shenzhen, Hong Kong and Macao.

Upcoming edition in 2020: Iberian BusinessRail (May 28th-June 6th) and more soon.

Name: TDAC
Description:
It’s a cliché, but it’s true. It all started unexpectedly, with a question….

An investor was uncertain. Despite feasibility studies that showed there was a market for a new leisure destination, they were not sure it was the right thing to do. They were not convinced the proposed concept was correct for the market and asked for advice.

They were not the only investor dealing with this challenge. Others were struggling too. They were looking for the right balance between creativity and economics. They had questions about place making, crowd handling, hospitality. 

TDAC was founded.

Our clients include developers, governments and existing attraction operators. Our core philosophy of “Finding the balance between creativity, hospitality and the business case” is at the heart of our services:

Advisory services on leisure investments
Advisory services on creative content & visitor experience
Brand messaging
Executive Management services
Hospitality training
Client representative roles
Advisory services on place making
These services are based on first-hand experience and knowledge that we have gained from more than 25 years working in multiple executive) roles in the attractions and tourism industry around the world. The TDAC team consists of European based top level professionals their fields, each with a long track record and all understanding that in developing a successful tourist attraction there is one important factor above all others: the guest. With different backgrounds, our team members approach leisure and tourist attractions from the perspective of the guest. This approach will lead to wonderful and valuable discussions between hard figures, emotions and feelings with the ultimate goal of finding the balance to success!
