Name: Adaptive / Connecting the traveller
Description:
Adaptive (formerly Adaptive Channel) provides a centrally managed solution integrating dedicated services and content for consumption anywhere whatever the availability of bandwidth.

Adaptive helps businesses design a set of services and content, a fully customized channel, which perfectly matches their business values and their customers’ needs. It takes the burden off the hospitality operator to run such channels and provides businesses with the necessary management tools to allow a simple, central and automated back office.

Adaptive has leveraged the combined experience and expertise of its founder’s team to re-define in “flight” entertainment for airlines, train and cruise ship operators.

WHY?

- Because there are numerous moments in life when you have time and you need access to your favorite content but that content is just out of reach! There are numerous occasions for this to happen: when you are in a plane, on a train, on a cruise ship, or just on the move…

- Because tablets have totally revolutionized the way we can access content when we are out of home.

- Because legacy Entertainment Systems (whether in-flight, in-room, or on-board) are no match to the user experience provided by state of the art consumer electronics device.

- Because at Adaptive, we know the complex environment of our customers and we understand the demanding requirements of their passengers or guests.

With studio spaces lining the hallways, visitors have the opportunity to openly explore the Mill and artist spaces where they can shop and learn about the artists and their works. Description:
Chamber Choir Ireland is the country’s national chamber choir, under the artistic direction of Gabriel Crouch. They hold a unique place in the cultural life of Ireland, bringing the joy of world-class choral music to over a million listeners each year through broadcasts, streaming, and live performances.

CCI's programming is as diverse as it is daring, and the choir's recordings are consistently met with critical acclaim, with releases on Harmonia Mundi, Orchid Classics, Naxos, and RTÉ lyric fm labels. 

The choir tours extensively throughout the island of Ireland, and has toured internationally to the USA, UK, and throughout Europe. Beyond the concert stage, CCI works closely with communities across Ireland, inspiring young composers in schools, supporting amateur and community choirs nationwide, and nurturing the next generation of choral artists.

Name: Eventual
Description:
Our interconnected world has never seemed smaller than it does today. We feel closer to the performers, speakers and artists that we care about more than ever before. Yet, when it comes to attracting those same talents to our local stage, nothing has changed, It’s hard. If your interest lies beyond traditional, almost impossible.

The simple factor driving this division is risk. Risk of not generating the desired hype. Of performing to empty seats. Of loosing money. This hurts everyone. Curators, bookers, venues, performers and of course ultimately the audience.
The result — an unrewarding event landscape that plays it safe instead of celebrating diversity of experiences. A landscape dominated by the mainstream.

We believe that diversity is the very lifeblood of our industry. The very thing that keeps it fresh and exciting. Eventual was built for this very reason.
Our platform takes the risk out of a risky business by handing over the decision making to the crowd.

Through crowdfunding, we empower anyone, anywhere to set up the events they actually want. Bold, crazy, ground-breaking or the most recognised super stars on the planet, we leave that up to you. If your event excites the crowd, it happens. If it doesn’t, no one spends a dime. On to the next. That simple.

Stop settling for the expected.

Reset The Stage

Wij vrouwen willen ons niet binden aan een vaste verplichting tot maandelijks borrelen, maar hebben wel behoefte aan het uitbreiden van ons netwerk op een leuke en vrijblijvende manier. De bijeenkomsten van Connected Women zullen daarom altijd gepaard gaan met een hapje, drankje en een leuke interactieve sessie van maximaal een uurtje met nog een borreltje na. 

Voordelen:
• Een inlooptijd tussen 17.00 en 17.30 tot ongeveer 19.30 uur.
• De bijeenkomsten betaal je per deelname € 35,- per keer, inclusief borrel en bites.
• Borrelen op een gezellige locatie in de regio Tiel.
• Gratis goodie bag!
• Deelnemen wanneer het jou uitkomt zonder aan een abonnement vast te zitten. Dat geeft jou vrijheid en maakt iedere bijeenkomst divers, zodat jij het meeste uit jouw netwerk haalt!

Name: High Fashion Twitter Met Gala
Description:
Created by and for the high fashion twitter community, the High Fashion Twitter Met Gala is an annual online companion event to the much celebrated Met Gala. Dedicated to creating an online space where fantasy reigns supreme and impracticality does not exist, the High Fashion Twitter Met seeks to allow fashion enthusiasts from around the world to share and express their unique creative visions without real world inhibitions. 
As the pace of technological development continues to pick up, fashion must be there alongside it. Social media has the unique capability of connecting fashion lovers from around the globe and high fashion twitter has been at the frontlines of the discussion. In an age where traditional fashion commentary has become infected by bias and advertisements, high fashion twitter is bridging the gap between brands and the public; breaking down the 'fourth wall' of consumerism and creating a new accountability mechanism in the industry. The High Fashion Twitter Met Gala endeavors to give back to this incredible community and celebrate the voices of the new generation of fashion devotees.

- hftmg staff

Description:
The opening of Bar Rouge in 2004 atop Bund 18 announced a new era in Shanghai nightlife. Rapidly becoming the city's go-to venue by offering a unique combination of high style and unbeatable Shanghai's skyline views from its spacious terrace. Sexy crowds, international DJs, fantastic theme parties, and unique Champagne celebration rituals, contribute to its amazing ambiance night after night, becoming an icon of Shanghai's glamorous nightlife.

2004年，坐落于外滩18号的Bar Rouge开启了上海夜生活的新舞台。由于拥有得天独厚的地理位置，且为世人呈现了难忘的上海夜色，Bar Rouge很快成为了上海高品质夜店的宠儿。在这里，穿着性感的人儿们，国际DJ们，美妙的主题派对，独特的香槟庆祝仪式，再加上那性感的上海之夜，让他一跃成为上海众多夜生活中的独有标志。

Name: Slottsfjell
Description:
Slottsfjell ble etablert for første gang i 2003. I løpet av få år utviklet festivalen seg til å bli en av Norges mest populære og viktigste festivaler.

Publikumsbesøket under festivaldagene var på over 60 000 på det meste. Artister som Kendrick Lamar, Biffy Clyro, Karpe, Imagine Dragons, First Aid Kit, Ellie Goulding, Mac Miller, The 1975 og alle de største norske artistene har besøkt oss gjennom årene. Festivalen har vært kjent for å booke et bredt program og har ofte vært tidlig ute med å booke artister som senere har blitt verdensstjerner.

På grunn av koronapandemien og som en del av reetableringen, hadde ikke festivalen vært arrangert siden 2018. I 2022 hadde vi gleden av å presentere en fornyet versjon av Slottsfjell tilpasset et nytt tiår etter fire år i dvale.

Festivalen har flyttet ned fra Slottsfjellet til et spennende område kun fire minutters gange fra brygga i Tønsberg. Her kan du oppleve fremtidens festival ute på Kaldnes på Nøtterøysiden av byfjorden, omkranset skjærgård og måkeskrik. På området finner du tre store utendørsscener, konseptscene, nattklubb, mathall, strand, plener og parkanlegg. Det er flere lounge-områder og steder der alle kan ta en pust i bakken.

Musikkprofilen på Slottsfjell er bred og variert. Hos oss skal du skal oppleve noen av de største internasjonale og nasjonale stjernene, men også finne din nye favorittartist. I tillegg er Slottsfjell mer enn bare musikk. Her kan du vandre i vår mathall med et spennende og bredt mattilbud, kule konseptbarer og opplevelser. På festivalområdet finner du også lounger og hyggelige steder der du kan trekke deg tilbake. Uansett stemning finner du et område som passer for deg. Festivalområdet har også egen sandstrand som tar deg til sydlige breddegrader med bølgeskvulp, palmer og tropiske rytmer.

Slottsfjell er ikke bare musikk.
Vi er mye mye mer og dette vil du ikke gå glipp av!

Name: The Neo-Futurists
Description: Since 1988, The Neo-Futurist Theater has been a collective of writer-director-performers who create theater that is a fusion of sport, poetry and living newspaper. The company has created more than 11,450 plays to date within its flagship late-night event called The Infinite Wrench, and more than 66 full-length main-stage productions incorporating its signature non-illusory, interactive style of performance. Le scelte artistiche sono orientate a soddisfare i gusti musicali di un pubblico adulto che predilige le hit italiane e straniere degli ultimi 50 anni, senza dimenticare le novità più interessanti.

Name: Seacoast Repertory Theatre
Description:
Seacoast Repertory Theatre is a nonprofit, professional regional theatre in historic downtown Portsmouth, NH with the mission of enriching the culture of the community through the shared experience of live theatre. It is a bold innovator on the American theatre scene, with award-winning art that has been featured in the New York Times and shared through live streams around the globe.

Seacoast Rep is a year-round production house, striving to use top-tier theatrical performances as a practice in walking a mile in someone else’s shoes. This practice affords humanity a more vast perspective, a respite from our individual reality, and the opportunity to broaden our views and examine the human condition in ways that enrich our hearts, spirits and minds. It is our hope that this cultivates a more empathetic society.

The Seacoast Repertory Theatre, its Board of Trustees, and its diverse leadership and staff are committed to fostering, upholding and celebrating the majesty, dignity and equality of all human beings. The Seacoast Repertory Theatre is fully engaged in representing the vastly unique perspectives, experiences, and voices of all humanity in the stories it shares. ‘The Rep’ is an equal opportunity employer dedicated to cultivating a thriving, safe and diverse workplace and community by focusing on the enrichment and growth of every person we work with and serve by engaging in the practice of examining the human condition through the shared experience of live theatre arts and education. The Seacoast Repertory Theatre fully commits to the charge of stewarding an uplift in society and leaving the world a better place than which it was found.

The Seacoast Repertory Theatre believes that theatre is for all, and is committed to removing the barriers of entry for those without opportunity in regards to access in all areas of what this organization offers. This aim sits as a cornerstone of all of the work that we do.

Name: GFA Pyro | Groupe Fiatlux-Ampleman
Description:
Le Groupe Fiatlux-Ampleman, aussi nommé GFA, est une entreprise québecoise issue du partenariat entre Concept Fiatlux et Ampleman Pyrotechnie, deux pionniers de l'industrie pyrotechnique canadienne. À elles deux, ces firmes comptent plus 100 ans dans la production et la vente de feux d'artifice. Leur association est synonyme d'excellence en pyrotechnie.
 
Fort d'un bagage imposant en création pyrotechnique, GFA est réputé pour aller là où les autres ne vont pas. Notre détermination à vouloir produire des événements originaux dans des lieux souvent inusités, fait que les producteurs d'événements tels que l'Équipe Spectra, le Cirque du Soleil ou encore le Carnaval de Québec nous identifient comme la référence en conception et réalisation de feux d'artifice à petite, moyenne et grande échelle.
 
Cette volonté de toujours repousser les limites de la créativité nous amène à créer des éléments pyrotechniques et de feu uniques à GFA. Générateurs de flammes, structures et personnages pyrotechniques ou effets spéciaux, nous prenons un malin plaisir à réinventer la roue du feu !
 
Le Groupe Fiatlux-Ampleman pour «que la lumière soit sur votre événement»!

Name: TEDxFiumicino
Description:
About TEDx, x = independently organized event

In the spirit of ideas worth spreading, TEDx is a program of local, self-organized events that bring people together to share a TED-like experience. At a TEDx event, TEDTalks video and live speakers combine to spark deep discussion and connection in a small group. These local, self-organized events are branded TEDx, where x = independently organized TED event. The TED Conference provides general guidance for the TEDx program, but individual TEDx events are self-organized. (Subject to certain rules and regulations.)

--------------------------------------------------------

About TED 

TED is a nonprofit organization devoted to Ideas Worth Spreading. Started as a four-day conference in California 26 years ago, TED has grown to support those world-changing ideas with multiple initiatives. At TED, the world's leading thinkers and doers are asked to give the talk of their lives in 18 minutes. Talks are then made available, free, at TED.com. TED speakers have included Bill Gates, Jane Goodall, Elizabeth Gilbert, Sir Richard Branson, Benoit Mandelbrot, Philippe Starck, Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala, Isabel Allende and former UK Prime Minister Gordon Brown. Two major TED events are held each year: The TED Conference takes place every spring in Long Beach, California (along with a parallel conference, TEDActive, in Palm Springs), and TEDGlobal is held each summer in Edinburgh, Scotland.

--------------------------------------------------------

For information about TED's upcoming conferences, visit http://www.ted.com/registration

Name: Skalvija Cinema Center
Description:
SKALVIJA Cinema Center is a small (1 screen and 121 seats) art-house cinema situated in central Vilnius. Small but cozy, it is well known amongst film lovers for its distinctive repertoire. The programming focuses on non-commercial European and World cinema, both classics and recent film. SKALVIJA is the major venue for cinematic events – festivals, meetings with filmmakers, retrospectives, special screenings. Distribution of European film is another important activity at SKALVIJA.

SKALVIJA yearly meets over 58 000 spectators and organises more than 1200 screenings.

The cinema is a member of two networks – Europa Cinemas and CICEA.

SKALVIJA contributes significantly to the diversity of film culture in Lithuania while organising international events. Vilnius Documentary Film Festival has become important occasion not only for film-goers but also for the Lithuanian film industry. Film programmes are usually accompanied by workshops, master classes, lectures and seminars with film professionals from Lithuania and abroad.

SKALVIJA is very keen on providing young people with an opportunity to learn more about film and filmmaking. Education is one of the key activities at SKALVIJA. Each year, different courses on scriptwriting, directing, editing and film history are organised, classroom activities are complemented by week-long outdoor filmmaking workshops.
With the establishment of Skalvija Film Academy in 2007, 14-18 year-old youth started their filmmaking classes. The Academy is a long-term hands-on workshop taking place twice a week. Students can choose from different study programmes.

The management team of SKALVIJA is open for any kind of cooperation with other cinemas, distributors, producers, project managers, or people who are passionately in love with film. If you are interested to do something together, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Name: BC Wildlife Park
Description:
The British Columbia Wildlife Park is a 106-acre park located in Kamloops, British Columbia. The British Columbia Wildlife Park is an accredited member of the Canadian Association of Zoos and Aquariums.

Our Vision
To contribute to a future that embraces conservation of wild ecosystems, biodiversity and a healthy natural environment.

Our Mission
To encourage the appreciation of and respect for BC's wildlife, and to assist in preserving biodiversity through education, research, captive breeding and rehabilitation services.

Our Motto
Conservation through Education.

Our Philosophy
The BC Wildlife Park connects people to BC's wildlife and wild places in order to encourage a sustainable society within a healthy natural environment.

Name: Muzikale Magie
Description:
Stichting Muzikale Magie is opgericht in 2015 en heeft een doelstelling die het algemeen belang dient, zonder winstoogmerk. Sinds 2021 beschikt de stichting over een ANBI-status.

De stichting ontwikkelt en faciliteert muziek en muziektheater voor kinderen, families en volwassenen, waaronder maatschappelijke contextprogramma’s met nagesprek. 
De producties zijn taboedoorbrekend en fungeren als artistieke aanzet om mensen en gemeenschappen die ver van elkaar afstaan met elkaar te verbinden. Stichting Muzikale Magie wil het maatschappelijke gesprek over complexe en kwetsbare onderwerpen op gang brengen, met muziek en theater als verbindende kracht.

Doelgroepen: 
 
Kinderen van nul tot acht jaar en hun ouders/verzorgers. 

Stichting Muzikale Magie richt zich op kinderen uit alle lagen van de Nederlandse samenleving. De stichting draagt bij aan het verrijken van hun muzikale horizon door hen in aanraking te brengen met een zo breed mogelijk palet aan genres, stijlen, instrumenten en culturen.

Muziek speelt een unieke rol in de sociaal emotionele ontwikkeling van jonge kinderen. Zij stimuleert onder meer het empathisch vermogen, de creativiteit en de verbeeldingskracht. Stichting Muzikale Magie beschouwt deze eigenschappen als essentieel om open te staan voor verschillen en om tot verbinding te komen in een diverse samenleving.

Volwassenen

De stichting ontwikkelt tevens muziektheater voor volwassenen die te maken hebben gekregen met abrupt verlies, en voor getroffenen en betrokkenen bij (fataal) geweld.

Naomi Inez Wielinga, oprichter en algemeen creatief directeur van de stichting, is zelf nabestaande van een omgebrachte moeder (1996). Vanuit deze persoonlijke ervaring wil zij meer stem geven aan het vaak onzichtbare leed na een geweldsmisdrijf en de grote groep betrokkenen en slachtoffers een menselijk gezicht geven. Door hun perspectief centraal te stellen, hoopt zij een ander licht te werpen op geweld in onze samenleving.

Name: Queer Lisboa - International Queer Film Festival
Description:
Queer Lisboa is the sole Portuguese Film Festival dedicated exclusively to screening gay, lesbian, bisexual, transgender, and transsexual themed films, a genre known as Queer Cinema. It is our purpose that of programming the most aesthetically and narrative wise relevant titles in the international panorama, so that our audience has access to a number of films whose visibility in the film circuit is very restricted. Queer Cinema is an integral part of Film History, although its taxonomy is very recent: in the early 1990’s a new genre arises, mirroring new subjective perspectives on sexual and gender identities.

Queer Lisboa is the gateway in Portugal for this genre. The Festival also invites a number of personalities working in Queer Cinema to attend the event, therefore promoting theoretical knowledge on queer themes and concepts. The film programme is organized in Competition Sections for Best Feature Film, Best Documentary, and Best Short Film; so as in non-competition sections, special screenings and film programmes dedicated to a filmmaker, theme, or country, retrospectives on the representation of homosexuality in Film History, sections dedicated to Queer Cinema subgenres, and parallel pedagogical activities.

The Festival also works on the preservation, promotion, and distribution of Portuguese Cinema, of which we regularly present retrospectives and special programmes in International Film Festivals.

Name: Zawya Cinema and Distribution
Description:
Zawya is a Cairo-based independent cinema platform with a mission to showcase and circulate quality films.
Following six successful editions of the Panorama of the European Film, Zawya Cinema was established in March 2014 as one of the first independent cinemas in Egypt, aiming to fill a much-needed gap in Cairo’s cinematic and cultural scene.
With a program split between theatrical releases and curated programs, Zawya screens a diverse selection of films from across the globe, varying from feature films, shorts, documentaries, to experimental works and retrospectives. Zawya’s program also focuses on local independent films to encourage and promote the work of young Egyptian and Arab filmmakers across different platforms. 
In addition to its regular program, Zawya organizes two annual film festivals: the Panorama of the European Film and Zawya Shorts.
In 2015, Zawya launched its distribution arm, aiming to create an alternative distribution model bridging the gap between independent films and their audience through targeted and encompassing strategies. Zawya Distribution works to give films a long shelf life, traversing past the theatrical release, with a strong exhibition on TV channels, VOD and other ancillary forms of distribution including non-commercial releases. 
In 2016, Zawya organized an Art-house Cinema Management workshop, through which weekly screenings and film programs emerged in three other cities: Alexandria, Port Said and Ismailia. This activity lasted from 2016 to 2019.  
Following four successful years of operating a single screen in Cinema Odeon, Zawya relocated in September 2018 to Downtown’s Cinema Karim to manage two screens with a combined capacity of 387 seats. 
Zawya is a member of the Network of Arab Alternative Screens (NAAS) and is supported by Misr International Films and New Century Cinemas.

Name: Cirque Du Soul
Description:
A travelling collective energy of colour, magic and dance. Only the most vibrant and open-minded party goers need apply. The 21st Century’s Moulin Rouge - It's time for you to know about Cirque Du Soul.

Established in 2013, we have quickly become one of the UK’s leading club night brands, holding 200+ events in over 20 cities with a footfall of 100,000 people annually. We invade the most quirky of hideouts, dusting off the cobwebs, chalking up the cocktail menu and sweeping the stage for a sell-out showdown of bohemian madness.

The air is soaked with the freshest collection of house, funk, soul, disco, bass, garage and hip-hop this side of Chicago. Each city bags its own headliner and the hedonists can hop, skip and jump to the next performance with our travelling troupe of misfits.

You have to play by the rules of the circus. Admission refused without visual delights. Long tails and corsets, top hats and canes, glitter, sequins and feathers, blacks, reds, golds - if you don't dress up, you can't get down.

See you on the road!

Name: BARTKRESA studio
Description:
BARTKRESA studio is a boutique design studio that specializes in developing iconic experiences around the world. Their mission is to utilize light and design to create quality and lasting experiences. The studio is headquartered in Los Angeles. Their team brings experience, craft, creativity, and a love of fine arts. They are known for their work on the Universal Studios Japan "Gift of Angels" annual Christmas show and the "Universal Spectacle Night Parade: The Best of Hollywood;" the Dragon Quest Live Spectacle Tour, HBO’s Game of Thrones premieres, HBO’s Emmy and Golden Globe parties, and the Friends 25th Anniversary show on the Burj Khalifa.

The studio is led by Bart Kresa (Founder, Master Projection Designer) who has over 30 years of industry experience and unparalleled expertise in developing engaging projection experiences.

By combining timeless artistry, industry-leading projectors, and adhering to the highest technical standards, BKS develops award-winning transformative projections. Select accolades include multiple Thea awards (Outstanding Achievement, Live Show Spectacular - Universal Spectacle Night Parade; Thea Award for Gift of an Angel), over a dozen BizBash event industry awards, and numerous other honors.

BARTKRESA studio has originated multiple 360-degree projection-mapped sculptures, including Shogyo Mujo (Burning Man, Adobe Max, SIGGRAPH; currently @ Area 15), Sviatovid (ISE, InfoComm, CSK Poland, Luma Festival, Riyadh Season), and Hako (ISE, UCSB, Victoria University Wellington, Gallery 707).

Bart Kresa established the Bart Kresa Academy of Projection Design as a one-year intensive residency for recent art school graduates interested in pursuing the art of projection mapping.

Name: One World Immersive
Description:
Welcome to One World, where we bring together the power of storytelling, innovative technology, and creative vision to transport you into immersive experiences unlike any other. 

We’re on a mission to proliferate positive visions of the future so vivid and exciting they catalyze a global movement to build a better tomorrow! We believe the most powerful way to do this is by building physical, in-person attractions that people can experience together.

We are currently building One World 2087, an immersive theatrical experience about the aspirational future of humanity and what we can do to create that future.

It’s like a movie that you walk through, where characters and scenes present a vivid, optimistic vision of tomorrow, and share insights critical to building a better future.

The show is centered around an elevator ride to space. Our Space Elevator is a custom-designed ride vehicle that uses cutting-edge technology to simulate the journey into orbit while giving guests the Overview Effect – a profound shift in perspective experienced by astronauts when viewing the Earth from space.

By inducing this effect, we hope to inspire guests to return home with renewed hope and purpose, empowering them to create a brighter world in their daily lives.

Name: Flight Simulation for Aviation Enthusiasts (SimCenter Tampa Bay)
Description:
Flight simulation is our passion and SimCenter Tampa Bay is the newest Tampa Bay attraction for Aviation Enthusiasts worldwide!  Unlike most other flight centers, we are OPEN TO THE PUBLIC and a popular destination for tourists and locals alike.  

Our parent company, Simatrix, LLC, was founded by private pilot and flight enthusiast Peter Repak, and businessman Joseph Hirku.  We are the exclusive representative of Germany-based flight simulator manufacturer, CockpitSonic, a company dedicated to flight simulation since 2000.

SimCenter Tampa Bay is the entertainment side of our business and it is a flight center in Dunedin, Florida (near Clearwater, and west of Tampa).

It currently houses three flight simulators: a Boeing 737 jetliner, an F-16 and an F-35 fighter jet simulator, all of which you can fly in pre-scheduled time slots. The two fighter jets are linked so a team of 2 can complete a mission together. 

Through our joint venture with Tampa Bay Aviation, we also offer flight experience in the FAA certified, real size R-22 helicopter simulator. 

While the flight experience we offer is for fun, and most of our customers are beginners in flying, our simulator units are SERIOUSLY REALISTIC so we can satisfy and challenge any professional as well!

If you are looking for things to do in the Clearwater area this attraction is a MUST.  Call us at (727) 643-1781
or (813) 842-4048 to schedule your visit today!

MsMono is an award-winning production company redefining storytelling by championing the bold, authentic voices of global-majority women across shorts, TV, and audio. Our mission is to transform the cultural landscape by placing these voices at the heart of storytelling — celebrating the depth, nuance, and richness of lived experience.

We believe storytelling is a powerful force for change — a way to shift culture, spark emotional connection, and expand how we see the world. Every project we produce is rooted in that purpose: to honour truth, embrace complexity, and deliver stories with integrity and impact.

Our debut our music video YOU earned three Jump Music Video Awards including Music Video of the Year. While our short film That Girl, Peugeot was made with a cast and crew that 70% female and is now streaming on Amazon Prime. The Ride, supported by BFI Network, Canada Council for the Arts, and Toronto Arts Council, premiered to critical acclaim and won Best Short Film at the Nostalgia Film Festival. We are the original production company on the ground breaking comedy audio series Do Not Disturb which launched on Audible UK to rave reviews. 

We’ve collaborated with acclaimed partners including Hat Trick Productions, Story Glass, Naked Productions, Universal Music Publishing Group, Listen Audio, Granny Eats Wolf, and We Are Parable.

We’re the creators of MsMono Meets, a vibrant event series founded in 2021 to spotlight women in film and TV through honest conversation and creative connection. Featuring talent from BBC, Sky, Disney+, Netflix, BAFTA, ITV, Amazon, and Channel 4, MsMono Meets is building a powerful community and shaping the industry’s future.

At MsMono, we don’t just tell stories — we shift narratives, break barriers, and build culture.

Name: BABEKÜHL : Creative studio
Description:
Babekühl /babe*cool/ is a design-driven art collective, a multi-disciplinary mix of artists, designers, musicians, photographers, animators, and film-makers with a deep portfolio of multi-media projects.
 
We seek to further understand the world around us, and our place within it. We create new media art without boundaries; art that interacts with - and responds to - its surrounding environment. Through collective decades of experience and experimentation, Babekühl has firmly established itself as an internationally sought-after hub of creators. 
 
Our team has exhibited art around the world, founded record labels, made award-winning short films, curated music festivals, started families, and participated in a million creative experiments in the name of fun.
 
As a collective, we have created music videos, installation art, film titles, stage designs, and creative direction on a variety of commercial and studio projects. Our work has been commissioned by Justin Bieber, Sam Smith, the Free Nationals, Flight Facilities, the DMA’s, Vivid festival, Audible, Red Bull, Sony among others.
 
In 2020, we launched a Darlinghurst-based gallery to hero the work of emerging local artists. As well as this, we design art installations and have exhibited commissioned items in pop-up locations throughout Sydney and Melbourne.
 
Our work is accessible, autonomous, experimental, and crucially, ever-evolving.

Name: Espaço Namata
Description:
O Espaço Namata é um local de eventos único, sofisticado e comprometido com a conservação da Mata Atlântica. Foi criado na mata, no meio da cidade, para conectar pessoas com a natureza.

Somos uma das poucas empresas brasileiras reconhecidas como “Empresa Amiga da Mata Atlântica”, pela Reserva da Biosfera da Mata Atlântica (RBMA)/MAB/UNESCO. Fazemos parte do Natureza Empreendedora, um grupo negócios de impacto positivo da  Grande Reserva Mata Atlântica, apoiado pelo Sebrae e a Fundação Grupo Boticário e temos o selo Agir Sustentável, da empresa Bioqualitas. 

Nós conservamos um remanescente urbano de Mata Atlântica que melhora o clima e a biodiversidade local e nossas ações reduzem a pegada ecológica dos eventos.

A arquitetura sustentável do Espaço Namata é composta por salão com vista para a Mata Atlântica. Os ambientes são eficientemente climatizados (quente e frio) e contam com isolamento acústico de qualidade. Possui um lounge com lareira, bar com mezanino, pista de dança com palco e uma cozinha profissional com uma churrasqueira parrilla argentina. O espaço para descanso é completo: possui suíte, cozinha gourmet com fogão a lenha, solário e instalações sanitárias. 

O salão principal comporta 200 pessoas sentadas. Dispõe de dois projetores, wi-fi, acessibilidade, instalações sanitárias espaçosas, circuito interno de monitoramento e estacionamento. 
As áreas externas permitem o contato com a Mata Atlântica em plena área urbana! Para eventos ao ar livre há um grande gramado drenado, com duas fontes, uma que replica as pedras da serra e outra feita de uma combinação de bambus. A trilha leva ao espaço para luau, ao berçário de plantas nativas, ao deck, as minas d’água e xaxins e para uma lúdica experiência na mata.

Selecionamos, com muita atenção, sete buffets que são reconhecidos por oferecer gastronomia de qualidade, atendimento personalizado e serviços diferenciados.

Name: BLACKFURY
Description:
New evil, new hero
Blackfury embodies a superhero of a new kind, an out-of-category «hyper» hero, a fusion between the spirit of the samurai and the most advanced nanotechnology.
A futuristic warrior with extraordinary bone and muscular densification qualities combined with strange and advanced combat techniques, he is equipped with an armor cut from the most resistant material in the universe, menta-graphene, a black material controlled by the mind.
Contrary to the many examples of the solitary superhero, the couple formed by Blackfury and the intrepid Sky Chen holds an important place in the plot, which will only grow in the course of the adventures. A choral work with many characters, Blackfury evolves in the midst of a Shakespearian family drama with a narrative rich in Homeric combats, beautiful women, mutant creatures, and a few touches of humor...
This «neo-comic», while retaining its great classical values, merges the multiple universes of world pop culture, imbued at the same time with the serial tradition of pulp comics and Japanese prints.
With elegance in the action.
With spirit in the plot.

Name: Ashland Independent Film Festival
Description:
25th Festival: April 23 - April 26, 2026

Our Mission: To celebrate the diversity of human experiences through the art of independent film by enriching, educating, and inspiring all audiences.

For over two decades, the Ashland Independent Film Festival (AIFF) has brought audiences and filmmakers together to celebrate the power of story. We believe independent film is more than entertainment - it’s a catalyst for conversation, reflection, and change.

From our home in beautiful Southern Oregon, the Ashland Independent Film Festival has grown into a cornerstone of cultural life in the region, known for intimate screenings, engaging talkbacks, and a strong sense of community. Each year, we present a carefully curated program of narratives, documentaries, and shorts - alongside forums, panels, annual programs, and educational events that connect artists and audiences in meaningful ways.

Our impact extends beyond the screen. Through grassroots partnerships, volunteer powered operations, and initiatives like Friends of the Fest, we’re building a festival that’s inclusive, sustainable, and rooted in the community we serve. Whether you're a lifelong film lover or discovering us for the first time, you’re invited to join us in shaping the future of independent cinema.

Name: Silent Season Music, LLC
Description:
Silent Season emerges against the backdrop of a rapidly evolving hard rock and metal scene embodying resilience and depth in every note. Founders Jeremy Rae (Vocalist) and David Pappalardo (Drummer) established the band in 2008 alongside Brendan Sheehan (Guitarist), later adding Enzo Ramirez (Guitarist) and Joe Abbott (Bassist) to complete the lineup.

Drawing inspiration from modern hard rock icons like Breaking Benjamin, Sevendust, and Metallica, Silent Season's music speaks to the soul, reflecting a commitment to positivity and perseverance both in the industry and in life. Their debut album, ‘Breaking Me Down,’ (produced by industry veterans Brett Hestla, Brad Young, and Alex Hatziyannis, and mastered by Jonathan Wyner) quickly gained traction with support from stations like Sirius-XM Octane and Music Choice, along with FM stations nationwide. Their first single ‘Chance’ soared to the #1 spot on Music Choice’s Metal channel within a week of its release signaling the arrival of a new force in the hard rock scene.

Their 2019 EP, 'The War Within, Vol 1,' followed by singles like 'Wounds' and 'Addiction' have further solidified their place in the industry. All leading to their latest single, 'Hopeless,' released on March 1, 2024.

Silent Season's impact has been felt far and wide, with millions of streams across various platforms and accolades from publications like Alternative Revolt Magazine and All Access Music Magazine.The band's journey has been marked by memorable performances, touring with acclaimed acts such as Sevendust and Twelve Foot Ninja, and sharing stages with the likes of Black Veil Brides and Hinder.

Silent Season's story is one of perseverance, passion, and the enduring spirit of Hard Rock Music.

Name: Centar Skenderija Sarajevo
Description:
U samom centru Sarajeva, na lijevoj obali rijeke Miljacke smješten je Centar Skenderija koji uspiješno egzistira od 29.11.1969. godine kada je premijerno otvoren projekcijom filma "Bitka na Neretvi". Centar Skenderija predstavlja, jedinstveno arhitektonsko djelo, arhitekata: Živorada Jankovića, Halida Muhasinovića, Ognjena Malkina. KSC Skenderija je 1969. godine, dobila nagradu magazina "BORBA", opšte priznanje za najbolje arhitektonsko djelo u Jugoslaviji.

1969. godine održana je prva sportska manifestacija - Međunarodno prvenstvo Jugoslavije u stonom tenisu, a već četiri godine kasnije (1973.) Svjetsko prvenstvo u stonom tenisu - STENS i Prvenstvo dvanaest najboljih stonotenisera Evrope. Zatim je u Skenderiji održano finale Kupa evropskih šampiona u košarci, Balkansko prvenstvo u odbojci za žene, takmičenja za svjetsko prvenstvo u košarci 1970. godine, te Interkontinentalni kup šampiona u košarci. Također je održano Međunarodno prvenstvo Jugoslavije u rukometu te brojni profesionalni mečevi velikana boksa, bokserski meč Parlov-Grin, kao i brojne utakmice kojim je domaćin bio Košarkaški klub Bosna. 1984. godine, za vrijeme XIV Zimskih olimpijskih igara, Skenderija je bila domaćin brojnih sportskih takmičenja u umjetničkom klizanju i hokeju.

Na prostoru od 70.000 metara kvadratnih nalaze se višenamjenske dvorane u kojima se tokom čitave godine organizuju razne sportske, kulturne i sajamske manifestacije, tetrgovački centar Privredni grad. U okviru kompleksa Skenderije nalazi se i Dom mladih, kultno okupljalište sarajevske omladine.

Svojim dugogodišnjim uspiješnim poslovanjem u oblasti organizacije sajmova, kongresa, seminara, kulturnih i sportskih manifestacija Centar Skenderija nalazi se u vrhu poslovnih dešavanja u BiH.
Location: Sarajevo, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina

Name: SoundRex
Description: SoundRex enables wireless transmission of high fidelity audio at very low latencies. We have re-engineered how audio transmission fundamentally works. Instead of the conventional bi-directional transmission, we use uni-directional transmission of data and for every dropped sound packet at the receiver, use algorithms based around Machine Learning and human auditory models to recreate the dropped sound packets accurately. Thus enabling high fidelity transmission at ultra low latencies.

Description:
The true story of a most improbable life, from a tropical island in the Caribbean, to the Royal Military Academy at Sandhurst, to the Winter Olympics, to a blockbuster Disney film...Devon Harris has certainly lived his dreams.  And he wants to help you live yours. 

From the slums of Kingston, Jamaica to life as a commissioned army officer; from a barefoot boy’s dream of winning a track race to a young man’s selection on his nation’s first Olympic bobsled team----Devon’s inspiring story of personal triumph over adversity and the uplifting story behind Jamaica’s first Olympic bobsled team will captivate your audience.

Tapping the same energy and determination that enabled him to compete, against all odds, with the best athletes in the world, Devon is now sparking audiences of all ages to dream big and take their game to the next level. Devon's sincere desire to teach others how to overcome life's obstacles has allowed Devon to follow his dreams as a highly regarded international motivational speaker, author and workshop facilitator.

Name: Illuminati Magic
Description:
Illuminati Magic is dedicated to the innovation of world class magic illusions for the discerning performer. Founded in 2017, by technology entrepreneur Nathan Buzza, Illuminti Magic has developed a myriad of illusions, known only to a select few. 

Since its inception, Illuminati Magic has rapidly become part of the magic underground and has assisted some of the world’s leading magicians with breath defying feats of magic and mentalism. 

Prior to Illuminati Magic, Nathan was the founder and Chief Executive of CommtechWireless, a global electronics business that designed mission critical electronics for hospitals, hotels, casinos and United States Homeland Security. Nathan grew this business into a successful multinational with ofﬁces in the United States, Australia, Europe and Asia deploying the technology across 8,000 locations worldwide. 

Over the course of Nathan’s career, his companies have been responsible for a host of innovations, including the design of the critically acclaimed laser Tag Game, “Q-Zar” (acquired by Rock Group “U2”), a wireless duress platform for the protection of the President of the United States as well as bespoke communication systems at Guantanamo Bay. Over the past three decades, Nathan’s focus has been developing innovative electronics: highly sensitive, mission critical, miniaturized electronics for the protection and preservation of human life. Combining Nathan’s love of magic with his experience in developing technology solutions is the genesis behind Illuminati Magic. 

Nathan is a member of Academy of Magical Arts (AMA), the International Brotherhood of Magicians (IBM), American Society of Magicians (ASM) and the  Western Australian Society of Magicians (WASM).

Nathan’s accomplishments were recognized by Ernst & Young, where Nathan was awarded the “Entrepreneur of the Year” and by Business News as the “First Amongst Equals” as well as the WA IT & Telecommunications Life Time Achievement Award for his contributions to the IT community.

Illuminati Magic is dedicated to providing:

•  Cutting edge illusions.
•  Rock solid reliability.
•  Simplicity and speed of operation.
•  “Plug & Play” Functionality.
•  A fully integrated product suite.
•  World class customer support and service. 

Illuminti Magic is “Num Custos Mysteria” – the “Keeper of Secrets”.

Bettors enjoy the bet-tracking and analytics that enable them to make informed decisions and maximize their chances of success in this dynamic world of sports betting, while partner sportsbooks note the increased engagement, retention, and handle fueled by our platform. With Juice Reel, bettors securely input their sportsbook information one time and the platform syncs with the sportsbook to automatically load the users' bets into our app. From there, bettors will see analytics on their performance over time and insights such as your best/worst teams, how you've done on straight bets vs parlays vs teasers, and much more. Our "Live" screen tells you how your bets are performing in REAL-TIME based on what is happening in the game, fluctuating with every play.

Name: British Theatre Playhouse - Bringing to the world the best in British Entertainment
Description:
The British Theatre Playhouse, founded in 2004, is a long-standing member of the British Chamber of Commerce and the European Chamber of Commerce. Priding itself on ‘bringing you the best of live British entertainment’, the company has since produced and presented a series of highly successful British productions in Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Sri Lanka, Indonesia, and the UK. Our first production in October 2004 was  Oscar Wilde's "The Importance Of Being Earnest" at Raffles Hotel Singapore. Cecilia Leong-Faulkner is the founding Managing Director of the company, with four Advisors to assist in the growth and the development of the British Theatre Playhouse.

The British Theatre Playhouse was honoured to have the presence of President Halimah Yacob, former Presidents of Singapore, Mr S.R. Nathan and Dr Tony Tan, and former Minister Mentor, Mr Lee Kuan Yew and Mrs Lee and Emeritus Senior Minister, Mr Goh Chok Tong and Mrs Goh in the audience. The British Theatre Playhouse has a Patron in Singapore: the British High Commissioner, H.E. Kara Owen. In Malaysia, our Patron is H.E. Charles Hay. The Life Patron is Sir Alan Collins

British Theatre Playhouse pride ourselves on high standards equivalent to London’s West End and offer UK casts comprising prominent stage, television and film actors. Some notable plays we have put up since our founding days include Alan Ayckbourn's "How The Other Half Loves", "Private Lives that was nominated as Singapore Tourism Board 2006 Best Leisure Event, "Yes, Prime Minister" and “The Vortex starring Hollywood actress Jane Seymour OBE”.

The British Theatre Playhouse is internationally focused with a British connection. It has a UK branch office to work more closely with established British playwrights, writers, actors, musicians, directors, musical directors, set and costume designers.

The British Theatre Playhouse is committed to giving back to society through high profile charity gala events to raise funds for the less fortunate.

ABOUT US

We are a UK-based company providing production hire services to the corporate events, live events and festival events Industries. As a full technical production company PHL offer all elements for your festival / event stage production, including the very best in PA Systems, showcasing L’Acoustics K2 and Kara sound system in our extensive range of hire stock. PHL have a complete range of the latest stage lighting including Robe, Clay Paky, SGM, Ayrton, Martin and High End brands along side many generic lighting equipment, strobes and effects. To compliment, PHL hold a vast range of LED Screens capable of providing public viewing for any sized stage, event or venue. This allows PHL to provide LED Screens in custom configuration to enhance your most creative stage or event design concepts.

OUR HISTORY

Production Hire was founded over 15 years ago initially as a PA hire company. Over the years we identified a demand in the market from our client base to source a single supplier that could provide all the required elements for a festival / event stage production. This inspired us to move into Lighting, LED Screens and more recently Stages. We now have a range of Stages for any sized events up to + 50,000 capacity audiences. Another recent addition is our own Transport Fleet, with a number of arctic trucks, 7.5 ton lorries and long wheelbase vans, allowing PHL to offer in-house cost effective transport solutions.

Name: Gosforth Civic Theatre
Description:
Gosforth Civic Theatre is an arts venue, café and community hub in Gosforth, and is home to, and run by, Liberdade Community Development Trust.

Liberdade is a disability arts organisation, we began in 2003 as an apprenticeship scheme with the aim of enabling 8 young people with learning disabilities to set up and run their own physical theatre company. Those 8 original company members and now many more show how running an organisation can offer people with learning disabilities choice, and the opportunity to shape the world in which they live.   

We opened Gosforth Civic Theatre in 2016, and in 2019 we hosted more than 900 events and activities, and invited over 50,000 people through our doors. In the words of Ozzy, one of our founding members, we opened the theatre because; 

“Historically society has created places for people with learning disabilities to go, at Gosforth Civic Theatre, people with learning disabilities are creating a place where everyone can come together.”

Like all arts organisations we want to change the world, we want to bring people together to create understanding, we want to decide what is the new normal by being extraordinary, and we want to shape our community by telling our stories and providing a home for everyone to enjoy.

لماذا كوناكت شمال إفريقيا؟

لقراءة المزيد، يرجى زيارة موقعنا: www.connectafrika.org

*

Connect NordAfrika e.V. is an independent non-profit non-governmental educational organization that uses Virtual Debates methodologies to provide youth from North Africa with a safe space and the necessary skills to debate issues of their interest with peers from the region, from Africa, Europe and beyond, and to collaboratively design policies aiming at driving positive change in their region.

Why Connect NordAfrika e.V.?

Three reasons on why we are launching Connect NordAfrika e.V. and its activities:

i) We would like to strengthen the commonalities between the North African countries through youth of the region for a true and viable union of the populations;
ii) We aim at equipping youth of the region with 21st century skills to play an active role in the democratization of their communities, and to increase their employability;
iii) We would like to facilitate through intercultural learning the connection of North African youth with their peers from the African continent, Europe and beyond for a greater openness towards Africa and the world.

Name: House of Taylor - The Elizabeth Taylor Companies
Description: House of Taylor preserves and sustains Elizabeth Taylor’s legacy through content, partnerships, and products that support her vision for a kinder, braver, more beautiful world. In the 1990s, Elizabeth coined the name “House of Taylor” for her fragrance and jewelry brands. Today, House of Taylor emerges, once again, in the latest chapter of Elizabeth’s story. We have chosen to honor her entrepreneurial spirit by re-introducing the name, which, to us, represents even more than her business savvy. For everyone who has witnessed or experienced Elizabeth’s love and generosity, the name reflects how she embraced the world. Indeed, the doors to her home were always open, welcoming anyone in need of a fierce champion and loyal friend. The three Trustees of the Elizabeth Taylor estate, selected by Elizabeth, lead House of Taylor. They spent many years by Elizabeth’s side, as she lived her values every day. Her compassion, courage and conviction, as well as her unwavering confidence and love of celebration continue to inspire House of Taylor today as the overseers of her name and likeness in culture, The Elizabeth Taylor Archive, and The Elizabeth Taylor AIDS Foundation (www.elizabethtayloraidsfoundation.org). For more information, go to www.elizabethtaylor.com. Connect even more at www.facebook.com/ElizabethTaylor, www.twitter.com/ElizabethTaylor or www.instagram.com/ElizabethTaylor.

Name: Ivy Film Festival
Description:
Held annually since 2001 in a week-long April event, Ivy Film Festival has grown to become the largest student-run film festival in the world. Festival week features advanced screenings of feature films, panels, keynotes, workshops, and masterclasses with some of the most highly regarded professionals in the industry, culminating with the Official Selection of short student films, screenplays, and virtual reality experiences. In 2016, Ivy Film Festival expanded its reach to partner with dozens of universities across the world through its Satellite Film Festival, bringing its world-renowned Official Selection to audiences throughout the globe.

Past industry guests have included Jack Nicholson, Martin Scorsese, Oliver Stone, Wes Anderson, Adrien Brody, Laura Linney, Wes Craven, Park Chan-wook, Aaron Sorkin, Olivia Wilde, Jon M. Chu, Bryan Cranston and Lena Dunham, among many others.

The festival features four separate student competitions, each with its own individual awards: the domestic undergraduate film competition; the graduate school film competition; the international film competition; and the screenplay competition.

Name: Juan Camilo Vergara Historiador
Description:
Juan Camilo Vergara es un historiador Ph.D. experto en historia de Rusia, Europa y Medio Oriente, con más de 15 años de experiencia, quien desde 2015 incursionó en el entretenimiento cultural del país con sus cursos y conferencias de historia.   
Se formó como historiador en la Universidad de la Sorbona de París, y realizó una maestría y un doctorado de historia rusa en la Escuela de Altos Estudios en Ciencias Sociales de la misma ciudad. Igualmente, adelantó otros estudios en la Escuela de Altos Estudios Económicos de Moscú y el Instituto Nacional de Lenguas Orientales de Francia.
A lo largo de su carrera ha realizado publicaciones en diferentes revistas científicas entre las que se destacan Mundos Rusos de Francia y Jóvenes Investigadores de Rusia. Así mismo, fue panelista de la Asociación Norteamericana Antiesclavista.
Nuestra apuesta se ha convertido en una oportunidad para que los apasionados por la historia encuentren una manera diferente de aprender, hacer comunidad y ampliar su visión del mundo sin salir de casa. De esta manera hemos logrado reunir a más de cinco mil personas de Colombia, Latinoamérica y Estados Unidos, de manera simultánea con nuestra oferta cultural. 
Conoce más de nuestros cursos y conferencias en www.jcvergara.com

Name: The Forecastle Festival
Description:
A Forecastle is a superstructure at the bow of a ship where the crew is housed. Hard at work in the unruly sea, it’s a place workers gather after a long day to unwind. A place where the people come together, for one whale of a good time.

Founded in 2002 by Louisville native JK McKnight, the Forecastle Festival has grown from a neighborhood event to one of the country’s most anticipated summer festivals, drawing tens of thousands of fans from across the world to Louisville’s scenic 85-acre Waterfront Park.

In addition to featuring a who’s who of musical acts such as The Black Keys, Widespread Panic, Smashing Pumpkins, My Morning Jacket, Bassnectar, The Flaming Lips, Band of Horses, Sleater-Kinney, and The Avett Brothers, Forecastle has consistently promoted local artists as well as focusing on environmental activism and outdoor recreation. Past Forecastles have featured prominent organizations, industry leaders, and distinguished speakers, such as Robert F. Kennedy Jr. (Riverkeepers), Rob Caughlan (Surfrider Foundation) and Christopher Childs (Greenpeace International)

Forecastle is co-produced by Knoxville-based AC Entertainment, one of the country’s premiere independent concert promoters, putting on more than 750 concerts throughout the Southeast.

http://forecastlefest.com
http://acentertainment.com

Name: Virginia Film Festival
Description: The Virginia Film Festival at the University of Virginia has been celebrating the magic of the movies and inspiring audiences for 37 years. Every autumn, the Festival showcases celebrated new features and documentaries, fresh perspectives on timeless classics, and local filmmakers from right here in Virginia. The Festival brings in a fascinating selection of guests, from internationally acclaimed directors and actors to professors and leading cultural experts who lead discussions that stimulate, educate, and engage. Today, the Festival stands as one of Virginia’s most important cultural landmarks, and one of the most respected regional destination film festivals in the United States. The 37th Annual Virginia Film Festival will be held October 30-November 3, 2024. #VAFilmFest

Планета Кіно — ексклюзивний представник технології 4DX в Україні з червня 2013 року, коли компанія підписала договір про співпрацю з південнокорейською компанією CJ 4DPLEX — провідною компанією в сфері 4D-технологій. Планета Кіно також була ексклюзивним представником корпорації IMAX в Україні з 2006 по 2016 роки. Разом з цим мережа впроваджує власну технологію CINETECH+ та кiноресторан RE'LUX.

Name: Warts and All
Description:
Warts and All Theatre started small.

Aiming to provoke the artist in everyone, the company initially ran a few acting programmes and performances in Northampton, with the intention of growing the programme to schools and other locations in the Midlands.

Since then, participation has grown five-fold.
Rapidly, Warts and All Theatre has become the recognised young person’s theatre company in Northampton, Coventry and Wellingborough and it now has a growing team with a new residency at Delapre Abbey in Northampton.

And yet, despite its rapid growth, at its heart it has stayed the same organisation, one that believes that through theatre, everyone should be given the chance to speak their truth in a fair and open environment where communities can thrive; creating theatre that provokes, challenges the establishment to change their perception of young person’s theatre and embeds positive social change.

It’s a radical concept, but Warts and All Theatre won’t stop, and plans to continue creating extraordinary theatre, in unexpected places.
#speakyourtruth

Name: Loco Entertainment Group

2003 yılından itibaren sektörün yaratıcısı, lideri ve yeniliklerin öncüsü olan Alcoholoco artık “Loco Entertainment Group” olarak büyümeye devam ediyor. İçecek catering alanındaki servislerini çeşitlendiren “Loco Entertainment” her türlü kurumsal etkinlikte alkollü ya da alkolsüz içecek servisinde kalitenin tek adresi…

Loco Entertainment, 1000 m2 alanda özel tasarım mutfağı, haftalık 1,5 ton kokteyl üretimi yapan imalat atölyesi,  tasarım departmanı, workshop alanları ve ofisleriyle hizmet vermektedir. Aylık 150.000 bardak kapasite ile hizmet verebilen Loco Entertainment Group, 300 kişiye varan profesyonel ekibi, 20 kişilik bir davetten 20.000 kişilik etkinliklere kadar servis verebilecek alt yapıya sahiptir.

Tecrübeli yönetim ekibi ile 10’dan fazla etkinlikte eş zamanlı olarak hizmet verebilmektedir. Yurt içinde olduğu gibi yurt dışında da Kurumsal alanda yoğun faaliyet gösteren Loco Entertainment; Festivaller, Ürün tanıtımları, fuarlar, açılışlar, lansmanlar, kongreler, bayii toplantıları, yıl sonu davetleri, gala geceleri ve personel geceleri gibi farklı tarzdaki organizasyonlar için alternatifler sunmaktadır. 
Loco Entertainment bünyesinde, Alcohoholoco Bar Hizmetleri, Loco Academia, Loco Space, ve Refresh’in olmak üzere  4 farklı marka ile hizmet vermektedir.

Name: Creation Theatre Company
Description:
We’re Oxford’s largest professional producing theatre company, specialising in site-specific inventive theatre in extraordinary locations. We have the only permanent rep company in the UK. 
You don’t need a theatre building to make great theatre. The magic happens in many places! We seek out places that have never been used for theatre before, an gather our community there, allowing them to experience their own city in new ways. 
Our shows are beautiful, ugly, fast, furious, wacky, twisted, surprising, spooky, magical, daring, haunting, challenging, inspiring, hilarious, sexy, sassy, cheeky…but never predictable.
Our education department run after school sessions, Saturday drama club, a rich programme of workshops through the holidays and interventions in schools. 
29 years, 90 shows, 600,000 audience members aged 5-95…we are Oxford’s own Creation Theatre Company.

Ce projet fou a pour vocation de développer un tourisme local et durable te permettant de découvrir ou redécouvrir la richesse de notre beau pays.

Tu as une âme d’explorateur et tu désires partir à l’aventure, rien de plus simple, télécharges le Explore Switzerland Pass et il te suffira de montrer ton QR code lorsque tu te rends chez nos partenaires.

Notre mission et de rendre accessible à tous la culture, la mixité et la variété de la Suisse, et cela le plus simplement possible.

Nous croyons que chacun peut s’approprier sa Suisse et souhaitons développer des valeurs de solidarité, de partage et d’innovation autour de notre projet. En cette période de grand chamboulement, Explore Switzerland souhaite apporter son soutien au tourisme Suisse et c’est pourquoi nous lancerons très prochainement un Crowdfunding afin de financer le projet et que chacun chacune puisse participer à cette belle aventure.

Alors attrape ton Explore Switzerland Pass, rejoins notre communauté et part à la découverte de la Suisse !

#Dontbefooledbythesize

Luca, Djeson et Maël

Description:
Paraíso das Mensagens – Há mais de 20 anos espalhando amor, emoção e carinho

Com mais de duas décadas de história, o Paraíso das Mensagens se consolidou como referência quando o assunto é emocionar através de presentes personalizados e mensagens inesquecíveis. Desde o início, nossa missão tem sido clara: tocar corações e transformar momentos simples em lembranças eternas.

Especializada em presentes criativos, cestas personalizadas, homenagens e surpresas que falam ao coração, nossa empresa se destaca pela sensibilidade e dedicação em cada detalhe. Seja em datas comemorativas como aniversários, Dia das Mães, Dia dos Namorados, ou em homenagens surpresa, o Paraíso das Mensagens está sempre pronto para ajudar você a demonstrar amor, gratidão e carinho de forma única.
O que oferecemos:

Mensagens personalizadas e emocionantes, homenagens no carro, ao som do sax ou violino, helicóptero com pétalas de rosas e telegrama animado;

Cestas de café da manhã, chocolates, pelúcias, diversos modelos de ramalhete de rosas e flores, buquê de noiva com variação de rosas. 

Surpresas entregues com carinho;

Serviço de entrega que leva mais do que presentes – leva sentimentos

Com uma equipe apaixonada pelo que faz, trabalhamos todos os dias para proporcionar experiências memoráveis a quem dá e a quem recebe. O Paraíso das Mensagens não entrega apenas produtos – entregamos emoção em forma de presente.

Access: Webnnel is available on both Playstore and AppStoreand can also be accessed on PCs and Laptops on www.webnnel.com

Reader friendly user interface: The ui/ux of both the website and (Ios & android) apps ensure a clutter free and soothing user experience. With no unnecessary and distracting pop-up ads, users can now have a fuss-free reading experience.   
 
Seasons format: We are redefining the terms E-NOVELS and E-COMICS!
With an aim to provide the writers their due credit and prevent creative exhaustion, Webnnel has introduced a very innovative and interactive format of storytelling that keeps the readers engaged. 
 
Webnnel publishes three seasons every year. 1) Winter 2) Summer 3) Fall. 
During each season, which lasts 4 months, Webnnel introduces a limited number of new E-Novels and E-Comic series whose new chapters and episodes are published on a weekly basis. 
 
Read and Follow for free: The ongoing E-Novels and E-Comics series can be viewed and followed for free! 
 
Premium series: The  E-Novels and E-Comics  series published in earlier seasons can be accessed through the premium series section. The user can either rent out the entire season of a series or one or multiple chapters from a season.

Name: Laemmle Theatres
Description:
Laemmle Theatres specializes is showcasing arthouse, independent, and foreign films. Laemmle is a scion of cinema's golden age. The company was established in 1938 by Kurt and Max Laemmle, nephews of legendary Universal Pictures founder Carl Laemmle. The company is currently run by Robert Laemmle and his son, Greg Laemmle.

In over 70 years of operation, we have been guided by our commitment to exhibit "quality film without regard to genre or provenance". Our theaters serve over a million film patrons each year from seven locations in the greater Los Angeles region including Beverly Hills, Hollywood, Santa Monica, Pasadena, and Claremont. 

In addition to standard movie-going, Laemmle provides unique cinematic experiences such as one-night screenings, special events, premieres, and Academy qualifications. These events reflect Laemmle's commitment to being an artistic resource and gathering place for the entire Los Angeles community. In addition, our popular Sneaks Club gives cinephiles access to movies prior to their release, helping to create a buzz for an eclectic range of films that may rate high on artistry yet lack the marketing reach of big Hollywood releases.

One way that we're sure to know how is through the introduction of Indonesian cinema culture within the vibrant and multicultural people of Australia as part of educating Indonesian language and culture in the Australian soil, as well as promoting the masterpieces of Indonesia's new wave of aspiring artists and filmmakers to international audiences.

Description:
Located in the heart of the City Center, the Mankato Civic Center, formerly Verizon Center, has established itself as one of the Midwest's premier centers for meetings, events, and entertainment. With our 6,500 seat Arena, 2,200 seat flexible Grand Hall, state-of-the-art Convention Center, and unique Reception and Banquet Halls, we can deliver any event that you can imagine. With over 70,000 square feet of flexible meeting and event space, the Mankato Civic Center Center is equipped to host a multitude of events. 

Owned and operated by the City of Mankato, the Mankato Civic Center opened in 1995 with the hopes of revitalizing downtown Mankato, MN and generate a substantial regional economic impact. The economic impact now exceeds over $40,000,000+ annually. The Mankato Civic Center is also home to the Minnesota State University, Mankato Mavericks division one Men's and Women's hockey teams.

The Mankato Civic Center staff also oversees the Vetter Stone Amphitheater at Riverfront Park. The Vetter Stone Amphitheater was named a top outdoor stage for concert goers in or near the Twin Cities and was recently named the fourth best outdoor music venue in Minnesota by the Star Tribune. The review complimented the amphitheater's tiered limestone slab seating, grass lawn and the location of its beer and food tents. Also cited, was the stage's theater-quality, woodsy setting and proximity to Mankato's historic downtown.

CosMedia.Inc is led by veteran media executive Mike Cosentino, former President of Content & Programming, and leadership-team executive for BCE's (TSX: BCE) media division, Bell Media. There, Cosentino led Programming, Production and Studio negotiations for the company's Entertainment services including top-ranked Network CTV, the CTV Streaming Platform, the CTV Cable Channel Group (CTV Drama, CTV Comedy, CTV Sci-Fi, & CTV Life) and the International Channel Brands- Discovery Channel, E!, Comedy Central, and MTV. He also led the Company's content launch strategy for Crave, Canada's leading domestic SVOD service, where he greenlit the first ever Crave Original, the now iconic series Letterkenny. Other series greenlit under his watch were hit drama's Transplant and Cardinal, comedy Children Ruin Everything, and #1 reality show The Amazing Race Canada. 

Since inception CosMedia.Inc has partnered with some of the World's foremost entertainment brands in Canada, the US and abroad including FremantleMedia, Viaplay, Shout! Factory Studios, Talpa Entertainment, Quiver Entertainment & Distribution, Reel World Management, KC Capital, Incendo, Aftershock Media, Mogul Productions, Blue Ant Media, A+E Networks and more. 

In January, 2023 the company launched CosMedia LATAM, a Latin American Distribution Arm and in May, 2023 signed an exclusive partnership with Colombia based RCN and its distribution division RCN Distribution to localise and distribute movie, documentary and series content to broadcasters and streamers in the LatAm market. 

CosMedia.Inc is based in Toronto, Canada.

Description: Game of Thrones is an American fantasy drama television series created for HBO by David Benioff and D. B. Weiss. The series, set on the fictional continents of Westeros and Essos at the end of a decade-long summer, interweaves several plot lines. The first follows the members of several noble houses in a civil war for the Iron Throne of the Seven Kingdoms; the second covers the rising threat of the impending winter and the mythical creatures of the North; the third chronicles the attempts of the exiled last scion of the realm's deposed dynasty to reclaim the throne. Through its morally ambiguous characters, the series explores the issues of social hierarchy, religion, loyalty, corruption, sexuality, civil war, crime, and punishment. It is the most recent big-budget work to have contributed to the popularity of the fantasy genre in mainstream media.

Localisation idéale : À la croisée des chemins touristiques, à seulement 1h de Genève, 2h de Lyon et 4h30 de Paris, notre Eco-Bivouac offre un cadre inspirant pour vos événements professionnels.

Description:
As a rapidly growing division within Parkwood Holdings plc, Parkwood Theatres has an annualised turnover of £10m; already operating four theatre facilities in England.

Parkwood Leisure secured its first dedicated theatre venue in April 2011 at the Playhouse in Weston-super-Mare, whilst simultaneously taking on full responsibility for the management of the neighbouring Winter Gardens. A third venue, The Hawth Theatre, was awarded to the company in February 2012 by Crawley Borough Council.

Having secured these two management contracts, that each span a ten-year period, a strategic decision was made to create the Parkwood Theatres brand.

Parkwood Theatres’ number of venues increased to four subsequent to securing the 15-year contract to operate the Hazlitt Theatre in Maidstone; the contract commenced with Maidstone Borough Council on the 1st October 2013.

The aim & ambition of Parkwood Theatres is to grow our portfolio of public sector venues, supporting councils to reduce the cost of arts & culture provision in their respective localities. Name: PNN TV Cambodia
Description:
Cambodia’s biggest ever TV studio complex is due to open in the 2nd quarter of 2015.

The studio, which is located at Garden City in Phum Prek Ta Rat, Sangkat Prek Ta Sek, Khan Chroy Changvar, on the outskirts of Phnom Penh belongs to Cambodia’s newest and most modern TV channel PNN. The complex is expected to be operational from April onwards when more than 300 staff will work producing TV programs and content.

Built at a cost of more than USD $10 million, the complex will consist of 5 studios measuring 2500 square metres, 1200 square metres, 500 square metres, 300 square metres and 200 square metres respectively. 

A further USD $10 million dollars is being spent on equipment. 

“It is a significant investment that is expected to take broadcasting in Cambodia to the next level,” says PNN Managing Director Glen Felgate. “The studios and facilities are being built with local production in mind. There will also be significant nationwide coverage.”

PNN, which is owned by the LYP Group, is a terrestrial channel that is aimed at the mass market. Over 50% of the schedule will be locally produced. Programs are expected to include ‘homegrown’ game shows, variety shows and talk shows as well as news.

Bought-in programing will be sourced from TV stations from across the Asia region.

“We have conducted research that shows that Cambodians’ lifestyles are changing and we are building a schedule to reflect that,” adds Felgate. “PNN will offer something different to what is already on air here in Cambodia.”

Crediamo che ognuno debba sentirsi libero di esprimere se stesso in ogni sua forma, perseguire i propri sogni, vivere la propria vita.

Crediamo che ogni aspetto della realtà debba essere riconosciuto, ogni gesto valorizzato, attraverso logiche sociali incorruttibili e meritocratiche.

Crediamo che ognuno meriti di ricevere più di quanto ha dato, solo in questo modo tutti saranno motivati a continuare a dare, con passione ed entusiasmo, il proprio tempo, le proprie conoscenze, la propria energia per creare qualcosa di grande.

Crediamo che sia possibile creare un mondo migliore, sano e stabile, basato sulle persone, sulla trasparenza, sulla socialità reale supportata da strumenti digitali e non viceversa.

Crediamo che sia possibile dare a chiunque la possibilità di guadagnare divertendosi, condividendo il proprio tempo, le proprie passioni con chiunque voglia viverle.

Crediamo che sia arrivato il momento di creare qualcosa di grande, qualcosa che sia di tutti, qualcosa che dia la possibilità a chiunque di esprimersi liberamente, indipendentemente dalla propria età anagrafica o provenienza geografica, qualcosa che riconosca, a chiunque ne faccia parte, il valore che ha portato.

Crediamo che lightdrop sia il primo social anti-social, ideato per far tornare le persone a sorridere guardandosi negli occhi, attraverso la condivisione di esperienze reali... perché solo condividendo la propria vita si possono vivere emozioni autentiche.

“Il nostro scopo è che lightdrop diventi talmente efficace che possa un giorno sparire e smettere di essere usato.”

Il team, lightdrop

Name: Hip Hop International
Description:
Founded in 2002 and based in Los Angeles, Hip Hop International is the producer of multiple live and televised street dance competitions that are the largest and most respected in the world.  Hip Hop International was created to focus attention on and foster an understanding of street dance. In 2002, HHI innovated the 5-8 member crew competition, a format further popularized during seven seasons of “America’s Best Dance Crew” (ABDC), the show HHI created for MTV.

In the United States, HHI properties include ABDC, Urban Moves Dance Workshops, USA Hip Hop Dance Championship, World Hip Hop Dance Championship and World Battles: Bboy, Popping, Locking and All Styles.

Around the world, Hip Hop International is firmly established as the foremost authority in hip hop and street dance in every HHI affiliated nation through its internationally respected competitions, educational workshops and Urban Moves dance workshops taught by the most sought after presenters and choreographers.  Paying homage to its roots in b-boy culture, Hip Hop International’s worldwide street dance battles featuring the most notorious bboys, lockers, poppers and all stylers culminates every year with the World Battles held in conjunction with the World Hip Hop Dance Championship.

Name: FJ Productions
Description:
FJPRODUCTIONS is a full service film and TV production company. We develop and produce everything from live TV remote shoots, to documentaries, TV commercials, TV programs, video vignettes and webcasts. 

We are a one stop production facility. We take a project from initial concept development through production, post production and distribution. 

Over the years we have produced TV shows, sports events, documentaries, TV commercials and industrials. In the process we have built successful relationships with broadcasters, clients and vendors, in the United States and abroad. 

With a talented and dedicated team of professionals, FJ Productions has established itself in this competitive arena as a reliable and competent production shop, able to conform to budgets and adhere to tough deadlines and strict technical standards. Some of our programs have aired in major networks around the globe: The Hollywood Reporter TV (HBO Latina and syndication); Red Carpet Reporter (Syndication); Planeta Brasil (TV Globo); Shape Up (Fox and Lightworks Program Distribution), Uncommon Place (Multishow), Shop the World (Fox, NBC, CBS, ABC) and others. 

FJ Productions has a studio in Sherman Oaks, California and a TV crew based in New York.

Name: FilmyMoji
Description: FilmyMoji focuses on a proven value proposition of producing, distributing and monetisation of the digital content based on films, media and entertainment. The unique selling proposition of FilmyMoji is that of having a legacy of technical expertise in digital content creation and the story telling prowess. The team has successfully delivered 10 VFX movie projects, did art assets for 4 mobile games, produced 2 short films and has more than a Million of social media fan base.

Name: Right Angle Entertainment
Description:
YEAH, WE’RE ON A MISSION…
Our mission is to bring your brand to life and have your audience moved by the experience. The second half of our mission is to do this with professionalism and ease for you, our partner.

WE’RE PRETTY LEGIT…
Right Angle Entertainment was co-founded by a couple of industry pros that have have wrestled the wild beast that is live entertainment and events and come out the winners.  Alison Spiriti and Justin Sudds started Right Angle in 2014,  specializing in the production, management and distribution of live theatrical and concert events. Right Angle Entertainment has worked with brands and companies such as America’s Got Talent, Cirque du Soleil, Lucasfilm, DreamWorks, NBC, Live Nation, Michael Cohl & S2BN among many others.

AND NOT BAD TO WORK WITH…
Right Angle Entertainment works closely and collaboratively with managers, producers, artists, agents, studios and licensors to bring their brands and properties to life on stage. If you ask around, you’ll hear that we’re not bad to work with and we deliver great projects.

With over 35 years collective experience in presenting on the road, managing and representing artists, and producing new work, RAE’s founding partners have relationships with the leaders in our industry as well as a deep understanding of the live event landscape both domestically and internationally.

Name: H2SNOW
Description:
H2SNOW was started by Helen Gavine in 2000. Helen love’s sailing and skiing. And in her corporate life she found that she built the best business relationships by taking people out on a boat or up a mountain. She found a bit of fresh air, away from the office, doing activities that rely on team work, developed deeper and stronger relationships with the people she was with.

But when getting people to organize the boats and the skiing for her she found that whilst most sailors and skiers are great at their sport they were not great at the detail.

So she decided to stop playing part-time organizer and go full time. She took the plunge, gave up her job and got out on the water, took people up the hill and set up the office!

Now she and the team spend all their time finding and organizing events on great boats, fabulous chalets and amazing new places for you to use to develop great relationships with your team and your clients.
She hopes you find them as great for relationship development as she does
