Name: SPAC - São Paulo Athletic Club
Description:
Cena 1 – 13 de maio de 1888. Sala imperial do Palácio de Petrópolis. A Princesa Isabel Regente está sentada em sua escrivaninha da melhor mobília inglesa Chippendale. Está pronta para assinar a Lei Áurea, em nome de Dom Pedro II. Esse dia o Imperador decretou feriado.
 
Cena 2 – Mesmo dia numa mesa de bar na rua São Bento em São Paulo. Meio-dia, e vários britânicos, alguns engenheiros da recém construída São Paulo Railway e outros comerciários da cidade, estão saboreando um gin tonic, conversando sobre a ideia de fundar um clube social-esportivo, onde poderiam disputar seu jogo predileto, o Críquete, bem como compartilhar horas de lazer com as famílias. Entre eles estão William Snape, William Speers, William Fox Rule, Peter Miller, Percy Lupton e Charles Walker.
 
Este não é um roteiro de um filme do renomado diretor Fernando Meirelles, porém foram dois fatos determinantes da história do Brasil e do São Paulo Athletic Club, carinhosamente apelidado de SPAC, hoje Clube Atlético São Paulo. O SPAC é considerado o Clube mais antigo da cidade de São Paulo.

Name: The Ginger Brands
Description:
Excellence in Experiential Entertainment

At the Ginger Brands, we aim to lead the way for modern experiential entertainment through the greatest combination of authentic hospitality, creative cocktails, captivating spaces, and truly engaging activities.
Our brands include Escape Room Live | THRōW Social | Kick Axe Throwing.

The Ginger Brands focus on providing the highest quality experience from start to finish in the exploding experiential socializing scene. With a major focus on large group events, each brand includes spacious lounge and bar areas with the feel of boutique hotels to cater to corporate clientele as well as those looking for a great night out.

Ginger is considered a pioneer in the competitive socializing scene in the United States and is responsible for opening the first escape rooms in both Washington, D.C. and Northern Virginia in 2014, and the first urban axe throwing lodge in New York City in 2017. All of her venues are ranked number one on TripAdvisor and Yelp. Her latest concept, THRōW Social, combines unique ‘backyard-style' games with food & libations. It is open in Washington, D.C. & Delray Beach, Florida.

Ginger and her brands have been featured on CNN, VICELAND, Fast Company, the New York Times, the New York Post, TIME Magazine, Hollywood Reporter, Reuters, the Washington Post, the Washington Business Journal, New York Magazine, and Washingtonian Magazine, among others.

#gingercos #competitivesocializing #experientialentertainment #thegingercompanies #kickaxe #Throwsocial #escaperoomlive #thinkplaydo

Name: MDS & Entertainment
Description:
MDS & Entertainment is where temperament meets technique. With over 25 years in the field, we are committed to pushing the boundaries of dance and performance art. Our offerings include:

Elite Private Dance Coachings: Personalized training that helps dancers of all levels achieve their full potential.

Dance Workshops and Master Classes: Cutting-edge education for all ages and skill levels, blending traditional and contemporary dance techniques.

Tailored Performances: Custom dance shows that resonate with audiences and create unforgettable experiences.

Stunning Stage Productions: Professionally produced performances that combine innovative choreography and captivating stagecraft.

Creative Spaces for Rent: Premium studio spaces designed to inspire creativity and collaboration.

Our work has been recognized both nationally and internationally, including accolades from prestigious events such as LUGA, the Swisscom Challenge, FIFA World and Euro Cup, Snowboard World Cup Arosa, Ski World Cup Adelboden, and more. 

Join us in our journey to transform the dance industry and leave a lasting impact on the world of performing arts.

Name: Ignite Arcade
Description: Imagine stepping into a world where both modern and retro games coexist under one roof. How about enjoying some craft cocktails while playing? This isn't just any ordinary arcade bar; it's a place where the young and young-at-heart can gather. Whether you're aiming for high scores or just looking to relax, there's something here for everyone.

Name: The Ryan Center
Description:
A state-of-the-art, multi-purpose facility, the Thomas M. Ryan Center opened its doors in June 2002 and hosts family entertainment, concerts, athletic events, trade shows, conventions and other community events.  The Center seats 8,000 for basketball, and over 6,000 for standard concerts, family shows, and other events. The facility has 1,120 club seats as well as 7 private luxury suites. The Ryan Center was designed and built to meet all ADA specifications to accommodate our guests with disabilities. Located in Kingston, the Center draws on an audience of over 1.4 million people within a 40-mile radius.

Rhode Island lighthouses were the inspiration for the design of the three towers, marking the North and South entrances of the Ryan Center. Standing 86 feet high and located on the University of Rhode Island campus in scenic South County, the 200,000 sq. ft. building is home of the University of Rhode Island Men’s, Women’s Basketball Programs and University of Rhode Island Football Program.

Name: The 99 Club
Description:
The 99 Club is an award-winning comedy club and one of the UK’s most established platforms for live stand-up. With over two decades of experience, we bring world-class comedy to life six nights a week across our Central London venues. Known for sharp lineups, packed audiences, and consistently high-quality shows, we’ve earned our place as a trusted name in live entertainment — for both public and private events.

Voted Best London Comedy Club at the Chortle Awards for 10 consecutive years, we showcase the UK’s top comedic talent — from rising stars to established favourites.

Beyond our nightly shows, we create tailored comedy experiences for corporate events, private celebrations, and brand activations — with in-person, virtual, and hybrid formats available nationwide.


Our mission? To make comedy the highlight of your night — whether you're planning a team social, an awards night, or just looking for a brilliant night out in London.

Name: Cast Partner
Description:
Cast Partner has consistently proven its standing as a leader in the casting space since its founding in 2005. Our full-service company has offices in New York, Los Angeles, Miami and Mexico City with an international reach, from Europe, through Asia to Latin America.

Collaborating with clients in every industry, we have established ourselves as a creative casting agency distinguished for its aesthetic, methodology, and skillful execution. With a boutique-minded approach, we deliver expert casting and unparalleled production support on projects of every size.

Follow us on Instagram @castpartner and @castpartnermexico

Name: Miss Italia
Description:
Miss Italia è il concorso di bellezza che da oltre 80 anni elegge la ragazza più bella d'Italia fra migliaia di candidate in centinaia di selezioni, dai piccoli borghi alle grandi città.

Fin dalla prima edizione, ha visto tra le sue concorrenti molte ragazze che sono diventate famose nel mondo dello spettacolo, ma non solo: Silvana Pampanini, Silvana Mangano, Gina Lollobrigida, Sophia Loren, Lucia Bosè, Elsa Martinelli, Brunella Tocci, Federica Moro, Simona Ventura, Mirka Viola, Roberta Capua, Martina Colombari, Anna Valle, Anna Falchi, Daniela Ferolla, Denny Mendez, Francesca Chillemi, Cristina Chiabotto, Miriam Leone, Giusy Buscemi, Giulia Arena e tante altre.

Ideato da Dino Villani, nasce nel 1939 con il nome di “Cinquemila lire per un sorriso” per cambiare, nel 1946, nel più conosciuto “Miss Italia”.

Dal 1959 il Concorso passa alla guida del grande Enzo Mirigliani, che l'ha curato e fatto divenire l'evento più atteso dell'anno.

Dal 2002 è condotto da Patrizia Mirigliani che lo ha reso un evento al passo con i tempi introducendo continuamente delle modernità.

Name: BLOB FACTORY - Game studio
Description: First of all a forge of innovative ideas, blunted by decades of experience. Solutions from a different point of view. Four multi-published Game Designers will accompany your company to the conquest of this expanding sector with passion and expertise.

Name: Billy Strings
Description: Michigan-born and now Nashville-based, Strings arrived on the music scene as one of the most compelling new artists with the release of his 2017 debut LP, Turmoil & Tinfoil. Since his debut, Strings has been awarded Guitar Player of the Year and New Artist of the Year at the 2019 International Bluegrass Music Awards, selected as one of Rolling Stone’s 2017 “New Country Artists to Know” and performed on “Jimmy Kimmel Live!” and PBS’ “Bluegrass Underground.” Often playing over 200 shows per year, he has also become known as an electric live performer, keeping the improvisational tradition of bluegrass alive while incorporating elements of several diverse genres. WXPN’s World Café declares, “a bona fide phenom...with his virtuosic guitar playing front and center, Strings fuses bluegrass to psych rock, country and jam music, without fussing over what bluegrass should be.”

Name: Jumble DXB
Description:
Jumble is the ultimate Team Building destination. A first of its kind ever, Jumble brings a unique type of adventure to the shores of Dubai. It’s a team experience that is unique, unconventional, and completely quirky where you take on a series of physical and mental challenges as you progress.
You need a team to play Jumble, minimum 3 and max 6 in each team. Teams move from one room to the other by completing challenges (that can be physical, mental or skill; or a combination of all three). There are over 70 rooms and definitely needs a few visits to experience each thrilling experience. Your squad will determine how many rooms can be completed in your visit and there is no "I" in Jumble either :)

That's where we come in, by linking kids' activity providers with parents and children.

Name: Bobó Filmes
Description:
Na Bobó, acreditamos que transformações começam quando damos voz às pessoas. É contando suas histórias que conseguimos transmitir ideias e sentimentos que tocam, tiram do lugar, ampliam perspectivas, fazem pensar e abrem o olhar.

Nossa experiência em criação, roteiro, produção, direção, edição e finalização, nos permite unir eficiência e imaginação. FOREVER MODELS MANAGEMENT {verb}., 1. Innovation 2. Success 3. Inspiration 4. Expertise 5. Evolution

Name: PDV365
Description:
Tenha controle em tempo real sobre o consumo dos seus clientes em seu estabelecimento ou evento!

Otimize o seu tempo em até até 800%.

Terminal híbrido PDV365 utiliza equipamentos que integram os seguintes módulos.

Emissão de Ficha de Consumo
Módulo para controle de bares, eventos, shows e similares através da emissão de fichas de produtos (agua, cerveja, refri) e o melhor: Acompanhe tudo em tempo real.

Emissão de Ingresso
Realize emissão de ingressos para seu evento ou estabelecimento, crie uma rede de pontos de venda e tenha um aumento nas suas vendas.

Cashless Payment
Maior praticidade e o fim das filas! Pagamento feito por cartão ou pulseira NFC através de recargas pré-pagas no evento ou antecipadamente.

Aceita Cartão e Dinheiro
Nosso terminal aceita cartões de crédito e débito integrados com nossos módulos de fichas de consumo, ingressos e cashless.

Conte com as soluções de quem possui mais de 20 anos de experiência no mercado, são mais de 10 mil eventos gerenciados ao longo de nossa trajetória. Em conjunto, nossos produtos já permitiram impressões superiores a 10 milhões de tickets de ingressos ou fichas de consumo.

Name: EMÁJYN
Description: White glove events consulting company, specializing in executive experiences, tentpole events and client entertainment strategy.

Name: Hurwitz Creative
Description:
Hurwitz Creative is a multi-award winning creative content company that leads the film and television industry in all marketing platforms, including: electronic press kits, television specials and series, featurettes, and DVD specials.

Since opening our doors more than twenty years ago, Hurwitz Creative has worked on over 300 films and television series, contributing to many of the largest and most successful marketing campaigns in the industry. We are an entirely self-contained Production and Post Production facility that employs some of the most preeminent producers, editors and graphic artists in the industry, and because we can oversee each project start to finish, we are able to masterfully and efficiently actualize the client’s vision. Our boutique nature fosters candid communication between team members and client, which in turn produces above and beyond, high-quality results that exceed expectations.

In short, our experience makes us capable; our creativity makes us memorable.

Name: 560 Media Rights Ltd
Description:
560 Media, established in 2015, is the world’s fastest growing royalty collection company. 

560 Media administers the collection of royalties generated from secondary television rights on behalf of film and TV rights owners including production companies, distribution companies and broadcasters. In its short history it has secured over 50 clients including household names such as the BBC, FremantleMedia and ITV. At the core of our culture is a passion for delivering great results with high levels of client service and satisfaction.

Here’s what our clients say…

Eva Kelly (Head of Rights, Agatha Christie) - “John and his team have a fantastic depth of knowledge and a wonderfully personable and transparent approach. John really understands how important secondary rights income is to producers and is on hand to provide advice and guidance above and beyond the day to day administrative responsibilities. We remain hugely impressed by 560 and are delighted to have forged our working relationship with them.”

Nikki Touchard (Global Director of Rights, BBC Studios) - “John and his team are extremely knowledgeable in this sector and we were very impressed by the passion and commitment they demonstrated during our rigorous tender process. We are in no doubt that this dynamic company is best placed to manage our rights globally.” 

Paul Cohen (Group Commercial Director, Hat Trick) - “I am pleased to team up with 560 having previously worked with John (O'Sullivan, CEO) for many years. I know we can rely on their expertise and the personal service a company like ours expects”. 

Duncan Walker (Chief Operating Officer, ITV Studios Global Entertainment) - “Secondary rights are an important income stream, so it’s essential to partner with an organisation who understand the market thoroughly. John and his team are first class experts in their field and we’re delighted to be working with them.”

Name: I am not a Tourist - Starting point for Expats
Description:
I am not a Tourist Media & Events is all about making expat life easier. From finding a place to live to setting up utilities to opening a bank account.  I am not a Tourist covers all aspects of expat life in the Netherlands, for over 15 years now!

𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗮𝘁 𝗦𝘂𝗿𝘃𝗶𝘃𝗮𝗹 𝗚𝘂𝗶𝗱𝗲
This annual guide, 37,500 copies distributed through more than 600 distribution points, provides essential information to help internationals settle into the Netherlands: how to find a job or housing, information on the local health and education systems, how to start a business or deal with pension plans in your adopted country. 
www.expatsurvivalguide.nl

𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗮𝘁 𝗙𝗮𝗶𝗿 𝗔𝗺𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗱𝗮𝗺
The I am not a Tourist Expat Fair Amsterdam is a unique opportunity to get all the information and contacts you need in one place. Within a single day, you'll have the chance to meet groups and clubs, service providers, experts, and other expats. If you're looking for a house or a job, starting a business, or just want to meet other internationals, the I am not a Tourist Expat Fair is for you!
www.expatfairamsterdam.nl

𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗮𝘁 𝗙𝗮𝗶𝗿 𝗘𝗶𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗼𝘃𝗲𝗻
The I am not a Tourist Expat Fair Eindhoven is a prime opportunity for the expat community in the South of the Netherlands to learn more about life in the ‘low lands’. 
www.expatfaireindhoven.nl

𝗝𝗼𝗯 𝗙𝗮𝗶𝗿 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗜𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗻𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹𝘀
This is the event for pursuing an international career in the Netherlands. Whether you are new to the Netherlands, have already settled in or still live abroad, the i am not a tourist Job Fairs for Internationals can help you find your perfect job. You can be just graduated or have an extensive CV, currently working or in between jobs.
www.jobfairforinternationals.nl

Name: GOP Varieté München GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Erleben Sie modernes Varieté am „Max II Denkmal“
Lassen Sie sich im stilvollen Ambiente unseres Hauses in der Maximilianstraße von herausragenden Künstlern begeistern und von herzlichen Gastgebern umsorgen.

Weltklasse Artisten und Entertainer berühren Ihr Herz und verführen die Sinne. Jeden zweiten Monat wechselt das Showprogramm und mit ihm das internationale Ensemble. Mit viel Phantasie, Liebe zum Detail und einer großen Portion Leidenschaft zeigen Ihnen die Ausnahmekünstler alle Facetten zeitgenössischer Varieté-Kunst — humorvoll, kunstvoll, artistisch und spektakulär.

Zudem haben Sie optional die Möglichkeit, die raffiniert abgestimmten, kulinarischen Highlights unserer Köche zu genießen, denn GOP bedeutet Entertainment für alle Sinne!

Ihr Event bei uns im GOP

Lassen Sie sich von einem unvergesslichen Erlebnis begeistern und überraschen Sie Ihre Gäste mit einer Veranstaltung in unserem Varieté-Theater! Sie planen Ihre nächste Firmenfeier, ein Kick-Off-Event, eine Hauptversammlung oder ein privates Fest? Dann sind Sie bei uns genau richtig. Mieten Sie unser komplettes Haus für Ihre Feier oder finden Sie den für Ihre Veranstaltung passenden Bereich. Individuell nach Ihren Wünschen realisieren unser kompetentes Team Ihr persönliches Event – von der ersten Idee bis hin zur Durchführung – professionell, kreativ und alles aus einer Hand!

Name: Stupid Old Studios
Description: Producing High Quality Comedy. Stupid Old Studios is an award-winning video production company and studio based in Melbourne, Australia. We produce web series, music videos, TV broadcast content and videos for the education and non-profit sectors, all with a focus on comedy.

Name: Woollim Entertainment
Description:

Developing a systematic process for everything ranging from casting to training to production and management, Woollim has been able to successfully produce a variety of artists.

Name: Unsolved Case Files
Description:
We recognized the growing interest in true crime and wanted to create a product for that market. We were midway through development of a product about serial killers when we had a change of heart. We decided we didn't want to glorify murderers. And if anyone in the true crime arena should be honored, it’s the investigators who catch the killers and bring justice to the family members left behind.

Turning a case file full of documents and pictures into something you play is anything but simple. We spent months brainstorming how to make an experience that not only felt authentic but was also interactive and fun. We wanted to immerse players into a story and deliver an experience more exciting than a Hollywood blockbuster.

Eventually, our concept evolved into a real workable case with a realistic-looking case file and a three-step process to provide plot twists and release new evidence as detectives work through the case. We also developed an online answer key so you can test theories without spoiling the answer and get hints if you're stuck. 

After six months of hard work, we sent our first 14 prototypes of the Harmony Ashcroft Case to Amazon.
We sold that first batch of cases in a week and got the feeling we might be onto something.
Things got a little crazy about 2 months after we sold our first case because several of our fans' social media posts started going viral. 

At one point we went from 24 Facebook fans to 24,000 in 24 hours!
In August of 2019, just seven months after our first sale, we partnered with international game distributors, Goliath Games and The Pressman Toy Corp. This partnership has enabled us to get Unsolved Case Files on the shelves of Walmart, Target and numerous other national retail stores. The positive feedback we keep receiving from all the fans out there keeps us going day and night.

As long as there’s still detectives ready to solve them, we won’t stop making Unsolved Case Files.

Description:
There are the only four things in the world that have permission to have their own ‘songs.’

Television series/films.  Religions.  Countries.  Schools.

Inspire knows more about #4 than anyone in the world.

The extraordinary, emotional, thrilling, multi-dimensional art of university music.

Because there’s absolutely nothing, nothing like it.

Picture game-day at Notre Dame’s football stadium with 85,000+ die-hard, multi-generational fans.  The marching band roars on the field triumphantly blasting “Cheer, Cheer for Old Notre Dame.”  Every person in the stadium stands and belts out the words – bleeding as they sing a song that lives in the deepest place in their soul.

That’s university music.

A cash-cow for fundraising.  Profoundly impacts school spirit and culture.  Defines the heart of a university.

Yet, astoundingly, so many universities are missing this amazing opportunity. So many schools have alma maters or fight songs that its students and alumni can’t even sing.

That’s where we come in.

It all comes down to three things that make a great music program.

Great songs.
Great recordings.
Great touchpoints.

We know, better than anyone, how to over-deliver on all three.

Let’s make your university sing.

Name: The Comedy Store, Manchester
Description:
Situated in Manchester’s fashionable Deansgate Locks development, Manchester’s long-awaited The Comedy Store threw open its doors on 14 September 2000.

The Manchester Store is the only venue of its type in the country, with a 500 seat theatre-style auditorium, spacious public bar, dining area, VIP Ward Room and the Store’s offices occupying two converted railway arches in the £14m development.

The Manchester venue is continuing the tradition established by our sister venue in London of staging top-quality shows featuring the best names in the business at the same time as showcasing new talent. Like London, the Manchester venue stages The Best in Stand-Up every Friday and Saturday evening (with two shows on a Saturday) and Stand Up Thursday take up the respective days with three comics performing extended sets. The week is rounded up on the first Sunday of the month with `king Gong – a chance to see the freshest talent on the circuit go up against the famous Comedy Store gong. Second and Last Sundays are New Stuff, which sees comics debuting new material.

As well as staging our own shows four nights a week, The Comedy Store, Manchester is also available for hire and is the perfect venue for charity and corporate events.

Their creative acumen extends to feature film: Cutforth and Lipsitz produced 2011’s Justin Bieber: Never Say Never, and made their directorial debut in 2012 with Katy Perry: Part of Me (both for Paramount Pictures). They have also produced and directed documentaries that have premiered at the SXSW and Sundance Film Festivals. Name: East Anglian Festival Network
Description:
The East Anglian Festival Network (EAFN) provides a framework to connect East of England Festival Organisers, Workers, Suppliers, Traders, Venues, Performers and Festival goers across the region.  EAFN aims to help build the relationships that will support our local economy and culture, whilst reducing environmental impact.
The EAFN provides a membership scheme, a directory of Festivals, Venues and Suppliers and a forum for the East of England Events Community to share information and knowledge across the community.
Over 800 Festivals, Fairs and Fun Days are held each year across Cambs, Essex, Herts, Norfolk and Suffolk). Thank you to all the Organisers (and their teams) that make all these exciting events happen.

East Anglia and adjoining counties in the East have a wealth of quality Suppliers, Contractors and Traders to provide the products and services for our region’s Festivals and Events.  Sourcing locally can have huge financial, environmental and logistical benefits.
Our region also has a multitude of excellent indoor, greenfield and street-based Venues and a rich vein of talented Artists and Entertainers.

EAFN (in association with Gigs Out) publicises and promotes the Region’s Festivals and Events to Fun loving people across the region and beyond. 
The whole East Anglian Festival Network community should be congratulated for their significantly positive effect on our local economy and our region’s social and cultural well-being.

Name: Escapely
Description:
Escapely creates unforgettable escape game experiences.

TEAM BUILDING
Our virtual team building events are a blast and we can host groups of any size in a seamless and cohesive experience. Our fully-staffed events include dedicated moderators who work one-on-one with each team. At the end, we all come back together to  announce the winners! Our self-moderated events take place on an interactive platform where teams can view clues and evidence and get hints when they need. At the end, they see how they stacked up on the leaderboard!

We offer many escape room themes, including holiday-specific themes, and an interactive murder mystery.

Our in-person team building events include Art Heist, an escape room activity with clues and evidence that can come to you anywhere; Urban Clue Quest, an immersive clue-solving adventure with clues hidden in the real world in select US cities; Anywhere Adventure Quest, a puzzle-solving scavenger hunt that we run at conferences, on college campuses, or anywhere else; Amazing Escape Race is a cross between an escape room and the amazing race with challenge stations and moderators!

ESCAPE THE CITY
Escape the City is like a citywide outdoor escape room. Find clues in the real world and use them to solve puzzles in the box. Then, input solutions on the app to find out where go next! View the list of available cities on our website - we are always working to release more! Perfect for families, friends groups, dates, and more.

SCAVENGER QUEST
Scavenger Quest is a one-day event played as a race! Players meet to receive their treasure map and an emcee kicks off the event. They search for clues, solve puzzles, and interact with real actors while trying to be the first to arrive at the finish line. A leaderboard updates in real time and then the winners are announced at the end!

Marbo Trade este distributor exclusiv in Romania, al companiilor Osram, Clay Paky, ChamSys & Chris James.

Domeniul important, care si-a pus amprenta asupra activitatii firmei noastre il constituie prestarea de servicii in domeniul de iluminare tehnologica, videoproiectie, ecrane LED indoor si outdoor, sonorizare si scenotehnica, cu propriile echipamente achizitionate de la firme de mare renume in domeniu: ARRI, CLAY PAKY, LT – LIGHT, EUROTRUSS, VMB, etc.

Totodata, firma Marbo Trade  participa cu echipamente profesionale de sunet, de iluminat tehnologic si scenotehnica, cu personal tehnic de inalta specializare, la realizarea de video-clipuri muzicale si publicitare, parade de moda, spectacole in sala si in aer liber, campanii electorale si campanii publicitare, standuri expozitionale.

Name: talentrack.in
Description:
talentrack is India's largest talent-hiring and networking platform for the media, entertainment, creative & art (MECA) industries. Winner of the Best Talent Exchange for Media & Entertainment Award at the 8th Global Film Festival 2015, talentrack has over 40,000 artists registered. This includes actors, models, singers, dancers, photographers, stylists, writers, designers and more. 

talentrack's web+mobile platform allows artists across categories to build, manage & promote their portfolios. Recruiters like film producers, casting agents, modelling agencies, event companies, ad agencies etc can access this talent database through their easy-to-use web+mobile dashboards. talentrack processes thousands of job & audition applications every month and is the market-leader in talent hiring for this media, entertainment, creative and art sectors. 

The company was founded in 2015 by Vineet Bajpai, one of India's best-known digital entrepreneurs. Vineet's first company Magnon was acquired in 2012 by TBWA, a global top-ten ad-agency, part of the Fortune 200 Omnicom Group (NYSE:OMC). Before founding talentrack, Vineet was the Group CEO of TBWA\India and was ranked in 2014 as among the 100 most influential people in India's digital ecosystem.   

Apart from being the definitive talent-exchange & networking platform for the MECA sector, talentrack is also the leading aggregator for this industry with artists, recruiters, film-makers, agencies, service providers, vendors, training institutions etc all converging on this one platform. 

You can download the talentrack app from Play Store or App Store, or visit www.talentrack.in

Description:
Based on our XR platform, we create embodied experiences dedicated to redefine the way people connect, explore, and engage through the virtual space. 
Imitera is all about creating the virtual place where we meet as the people we are in reality, keeping it simple and social. While most XR setups are heavy on tech and solo experiences, we're offering a plattform that anyone in the office can fire up to bring teams and customers together. Think less about costly simulations and more about easy, multi-user sessions where showing off your product is as straightforward as a coffee break chat, even if the real deal isn't in the room. Name: Sosia&Pistoia
Description:
Un piccolo miracolo dell'imprenditoria italiana che ha saputo radicarsi nel teatro, nel cinema, nella tv, nella pubblicità, nell'editoria, negli eventi. 
Oggi a Sosia&Pistoia fanno capo attori come Ninni Bruschetta, Lella Costa, Marco Baliani, Dario Vergassola, Giobbe Covatta, Maria Amelia Monti, Pamela Villoresi, Ottavia Piccolo, Gianfelice Imparato, Stefano Fresi; personaggi televisivi quali Camila Raznovich, Carlo Cracco, Antonino Cannavacciuolo, Mario Tozzi;  con il nuovo marchio S&P Literary l'agenzia consolida anche la propria attività editoriale.  

Una struttura ramificata che affonda, dunque, i propri interessi in tutti i settori raggruppandoli in un unico marchio. Una struttura che, con i suoi circa trenta dipendenti oltre ai collaboratori esterni, raccoglie tutte le professioni dello showbiz: attori, giornalisti, sceneggiatori, scrittori, autori, intrattenitori, registi, chef stellati. 

Ma non sono tanto i nomi o i numeri a parlare di Sosia&Pistoia, quanto la sua storia. 

L'agenzia nasce a metà degli anni '80 in un clima fortemente creativo sull'onda di un fenomeno entusiasmante come l'avvento dei Nuovi Comici, in parte figli di quel grande laboratorio aperto che fu il Gran Pavese Varietà di Bologna, di un festival innovativo come Polverigi. Sotto la sua ala crescono Patrizio Roversi, Syusy Blady, i Gemelli Ruggeri... Un'onda travolgente di intelligenze che presto entrano in tv ('Lupo solitario', 'L'araba fenice'), approdano all'editoria (Giobbe Covatta con l'oltre milione di copie vendute di 'Parole di Giobbe' ha di fatto anticipato il fenomeno dei libri comici) e diventano testimonial di importanti marchi pubblicitari. Da Sosia&Pistoia passano Fabio Fazio e Antonio Albanese, Vincenzo Salemme e Enzo Iacchetti, Daniele Luttazzi e Gioele Dix, Enzo Jannacci e Ugo Chiti.

Energy, athleticism, dynamism, and passion are classic American dance ideals that move our dancers to achieve higher levels of artistry and skill, whether through the drama of contemporary pieces or by making classic ballet storytelling come to life.

We produce high-caliber ballet performances that engage the mind and spirit and express Maryland’s unique voice through movement. Our goal is to make ballet accessible to all while attaining ever-higher levels of artistic excellence.

Ballet Theatre of Maryland is committed to diversity, equity, inclusion, and access as it is essential to accomplish our mission and vision. Our goal is to make ballet accessible to all while attaining ever-higher levels of artistic excellence. We operate a fleet of all Carbon Composite Formula Racecars (not tube frame chassis - 1960's technology) outfitted with MoTeC Data Acquisition systems and Go-Pro Onboard Video Cameras, running on Hankook Racing Slicks with five speed sequential racing gearboxes.

Racecar performance figures include 0-60 MPH in 4 seconds, pulling up to 2 G's in the corners and braking.

Not only do you get personal instruction from a former F1 racer, all Allen Berg Racing School courses offer feedback from our team of professional race engineers using the MoTeC data systems.

Allen Berg Racing School is the school of choice by TeamUSA Scholarship and License Certified by the Sports Car Club of America (SCCA)

Whether you are seeking a once in a lifetime experience or you're an established race driver in search of improving your track performance, we have a program for you!

We have had the pleasure to be used as an outsource Houdini simulation team for partners like Diptongo, LaPost, Stargate, TwoFrames, IntiVFX, and other strong post production houses in the latin american region. We are excited to have contributed with them for upcoming projects for A24 and Catalyst studio.



For Hallmark and Lifetime channel we have provided VFX services for over 6 movies through partners like Synthetic Cinema and Hollyware Productions, including Love in the Maldives, Rockettes, and My Father's Murder in Greece directed by Colin Theys.



In the Latin American region we have been the main VFX house for over 10 movies, including 5 movies for 2/4 Producciones with director Marco Velez, and the upcoming Bolivian romantic comedy La Lengua Desnuda by Jorge Sierra.



 We believe strongly that the VFX toolset can revolutionize storytelling for latin america by providing a means for expressing the already strong cultural heritage of the fantastic. 



Through crafting the design, the pre, the production and post of audiovisual experiences, we accompany each step of the process, to make sure every bit of energy is appropriately channeled, understood, enlightening to the creative process, excellently executed, and cost effective. We operate out of Bogota, Colombia.

Name: Stand Up NY
Description:
Along with providing some humor in your news feed. We are a longstanding Manhattan landmark. Stand Up NY opened its doors in 1986 and has kept them open ever since. Stand Up NY is the city’s premiere destination for urbanites looking to have a good laugh. Some of America’s most beloved jokers – think Chris Rock, Jerry Seinfeld and Louis CK – are regulars that have graced the stage of what New York Magazine calls the “incubator of stand-up nobility.” Tucked into a residential block of 78th Street on the Upper West Side, it is a classic reborn by renovation. 
Purchased in 2008 by entrepreneurs and best-buddies Gabriel Waldman and Dani Zoldan, Stand Up NY is no longer just a dimly-lit comedy club, it's also a great event space. Boasting a sleek and modern design (the brainchild of famed nightclub impresario Steve Lewis and Marc Dizon – the guys behind Marquee, Butter and Hudson Terrace) and fired-up versions of everyone's favorite bar snacks, Stand Up NY has distinguished themselves from their competitors. With a showroom that accommodates over 125 guests, you'll have room to burst into hysterics without knocking over your neighbor's scotch. 
Stand Up NY features some of the brightest young talent in the business as well as bigger names returning to the city that gave them their start.

 You could bet with us for the first time on 17 May 1997, when the then Korunka was launched by CHANCE a.s. 
In 2013, the company was split off from CHANCE a.s. and Loterie Korunka s.r.o. was established. 
Since 1 April 2018, Loterie Korunka has been part of the Tipsport Group.
 2024 is a turning point for us (not only) in terms of branding. Korunka becomes Maxa. The contemporary, clear and easy-to-remember name reflects the modern look and scope of our current and future offer.

Name: JAPAN Fes
Description:
What's 『JAPAN Fes』

『JAPAN Fes』 is a Japanese festival that has found its home in New York. It is renowned as the world's largest Japanese food festival, attracting over 1,000,000 visitors annually and hosting more than 70 events throughout the year, featuring 2,000 vendors.

As Japan Fest, based in New York, we hold a deep appreciation for the traditional spirit of "和洋折衷" (the fusion of Japanese and Western influences). Our aim is to create a festival that embodies this concept while embracing the local community's spirit. We strive to showcase the rich cultural fusion and traditions of Japan, rooted in the local culture and heritage.

We firmly believe in the power of food and art to bring people of diverse backgrounds and cultures together in a natural and comfortable environment. It is through these shared experiences that we foster cultural exchange and create memorable moments.

We take immense pride in being a part of this movement and invite you to join us in celebrating the vibrancy and diversity of Japanese culture.

Stay tuned for our upcoming events and be part of the excitement!

Name: TCL Chinese Theatres
Description: Since 1927, The TCL Chinese Theatres has been the home of the most important, star powered red carpet movie premieres and special events, where Hollywood’s biggest and brightest talents have come to watch their movies.  The most famous movie theatre on the globe is world-renowned for its unique forecourt of the stars, featuring cement hand and footprints of major movie stars, from Marilyn Monroe to Brad Pitt, and numerous stars from all eras of Hollywood.  In addition to being a major international tourist destination, TCL Chinese Theatres, and its six adjacent cinemas, the TCL Chinese 6 Theatres, are everyday working movie theatres, hosting millions of moviegoers year round.  The TCL Chinese Theatre was declared a historic-cultural landmark in 1968, and there has always been a restoration program in process to maintain the theatre's beauty. With its current, on-going facelift and new name and new added amenities and event spaces, guided by a new and vigorous ownership team, the TCL Chinese Theatre and its famed “hands and footprints in cement” forecourt will continue to be the preferred location for tourist visits and the entertainment industry’s most prestigious red carpet premieres for years to come.

Name: Paradise Park
Description:
Paradise Park is Kansas City's Premier Family Destination, offering Family Fun & Adventure, unique attractions, educational and discovery play, and professional development opportunities in a wholesome, safe, clean and friendly environment!

In our 35,000 sq.-ft. building, you will find the Children's Edutainment Center (CEdC), a first for the greater Kansas City area that integrates children's educational experiences into a fantasy of discovery play, exploration and fun!  From soft play to interactive cooking, children can choose from over 19 different areas. The CEdC caters to children ages 9 and under. 

The fun doesn’t stop there! With a multi-level foam factory, you can fire foam balls through our air-powered cannons, geysers, and blasters. A 24-ft. rock climbing wall is uniquely designed to accommodate the varying skills of climbers of all levels with enough hand-holds to allow the novice climbers to show their stuff.  When we say "Take a spin," we mean it with our bumper cars.  Play the classics or new favorites like “Big Bass Wheel” and “Highway 66” mini-bowling in the game room.  

Outdoors, you can race the go karts or jr. go karts around our 1,000-ft, road course inspired track. It's the ultimate driving experience!  Our 18-hole miniature golf course is regarded as both beautiful and challenging. Whether you are looking for some extra batting practice or you just want to take a few swings, we have plenty of softball and baseball batting cages.  You will also find a children's play garden and picnic pavilion with a nearby campfire area and sand volleyball court.

Enjoy our premier hosted birthday parties as well as our first-class indoor and outdoor group facilities that can entertain and accommodate over 1,000 guests. Help build your team with corporate events, retreats or special outings.

Name: Chango.tv
Description:
CHANGO
Produtora de audiovisual com sede em São Paulo, desenvolve conteúdo de qualidade para TV aberta, TV a cabo, cinema e internet. Com estrutura própria de direção, roteiro, produção, edição e pós-produção, é liderada por Diego Barredo e Gabriel Canterino, dois renomes da produção audiovisual brasileira.
Entre outras produçoes, a Chango desenvolve integralmente o Late Night diario Programa do Porchat na Record TV e o cooking show Chef ao Pé de ouvido na GNT-Globosat.

PROGRAMA DO PORCHAT
Talk Show diário, transmitido por uma das maiores emissoras do país (Record TV). Apresentado por Fábio Porchat (Porta Dos Fundos) teve o maior índice de audiência, na sua estréia, da história dos Talk Shows brasileiros desde 2016 (9,2 pontos de média).

No ar há mais de dois anos, o programa já entrevistou alguns dos maiores nomes do entretenimento brasileiro: Jô Soares, Xuxa, Danilo Gentili, Marília Gabriela, Eliana, Raul Gil, Sabrina Sato e muitos outros. Além deles, também recebe anônimos e ilustres, abordando pautas e agendas atuais, especialistas em modificações corporais, comediantes ou jornalistas fofoca - o programa transita entre o sério e o divertido, desde que o conteúdo seja relevante.

Name: Group Dot BR - NY's Only Brazilian Theater Company
Description:
OUR MISSION

Group Dot BR is NY’s only Brazilian theatre company that presents Brazilian culture through the performing arts. By using avant-garde, physical, choreographic, and contemporary theatre as tools, while supporting Portuguese as a heritage language, Group Dot BR engages a multicultural community by offering theater productions, workshops, consulting, readings, and a wide range of presencial and online events. 


BIO

Born out of the love that its founders, Andressa Furletti, Thiago Felix and Debora Balardini, share for their Brazilian roots, the company started in 2011 with a public reading of the play Cerimônia do Adeus by Mauro Rasi. Fueled by the desire to give voice to Brazilian dramaturges, .BR produced A Serpente (The Serpent) by Brazil’s most known and controversial dramaturges, Nelson Rodrigues. With sold out performances and a nomination to the 2012 Brazilian International Press Awards, it was clear that the work should continue. In 2013, Infinite While It Lasts, Group Dot BR’s first devised work based on the live and work of Brazilian poet and composer Vinicius de Moraes landed on the bohemian bar Nublu in East Village. A second run of the show happened in 2014 held at Studio 151 for four weeks. The show was nominated to the 2014 Innovative Theatre Awards for Outstanding Choreography/Movement and to the 2014 Brazilian International Press Award. Most recently, Inside The Wild Heart, an immersive theatrical experience based on the life and works of the Brazilian Jewish writer Clarice Lispector, premiered in 2016, after two years in the making. The show had a five week run at the Immersive Gallery in Williamsburg, a multi-level 4,000sft venue. Inside the Wild Heart had four nominations and earned Andressa Furletti an award for Best Actress at the 2017 Brazilian International Press Award.
 
For the last five years Group Dot BR has grown considerably and its future looks very promising.

Name: Carolina Theatre
Description:
Originally built in 1927, the Carolina Theatre in Uptown Charlotte is being lovingly restored to its original splendor and will soon serve as a dynamic civic hub.

The 36,000-square-foot historic theatre was once a thriving vaudeville theatre and movie palace that hosted acts such as Bob Hope, Katherine Hepburn and Elvis Presley. FFTC is now working to restore the long-vacant Carolina Theatre to its original grandeur to create a vital civic engagement space. Construction is currently underway.

Programming at the theatre will include speakers, community engagement events, town hall meetings, arts and entertainment, films and more.

The Carolina Theatre will adjoin FFTC’s headquarters in the Luski-Gorelick Center for Philanthropy, and will be located in the Belk Place civic campus. The Belk Place campus is named for Katherine Belk and the late Thomas M. Belk, and the late Claudia and John M. Belk, and honors the many civic contributions of the Belk family.

Un rendez-vous qui rassemblera plus de 60 écoles marocaines dans une ambiance estudiantine où règne l’esprit sportif. Les Olympiades de notre Institut n'est pas seulement un événement sportif mais plutôt un événement humain par excellence, qui vise à consolider les valeurs humaines chez les étudiants ainsi que renforcer les relations sociales entre eux et leur donner la chance d'avoir un échange d'idées, de cultures, d'expériences et pourquoi pas d'innovation. Toujours dans le cadre de ces objectifs, les Olympiades de cette année portera sur l’ère digitale et aura comme thème : “𝗟𝗲 𝗗𝗜𝗚𝗜𝗧𝗔𝗟 𝗱𝗮𝗻𝘀 𝗹𝗮 𝗿é𝗶𝗻𝘃𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗱𝘂 𝗗𝗜𝗩𝗘𝗥𝗧𝗜𝗦𝗦𝗘𝗠𝗘𝗡𝗧 à 𝗹’è𝗿𝗲 𝗱𝗲 𝗹’𝗜𝗡𝗡𝗢𝗩𝗔𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡 ” Cet événement grandiose aura lieu les 28, 29 Février et 1er Mars 2020, vous êtes donc invités à nous rejoindre à l'un des plus importants événements de l'année académique. Beaucoup d'activités, une ambiance merveilleuse, une rencontre exceptionnelle et plein d'autres surprises vous attendent. Alors soyez au rendez-vous, et surtout soyez nombreux.

Name: The Connect Show
Description:
Welcome to The Connect Show, a vibrant hub bustling with a community of budding business owners eager to foster mutual success and growth. Here, collaboration reigns supreme as entrepreneurs come together, offering invaluable support and encouragement.

The Connect Show is more than just a community; it's a grassroots, volunteer-driven organization comprised of seasoned business professionals dedicated to extending a helping hand to new entrepreneurs. Through shared experiences and a wealth of knowledge, this community thrives on providing guidance, mentorship, and the essential tools needed to navigate the intricate landscape of starting and developing a business.

Within these collaborative spaces, members actively engage in fostering an environment of support and camaraderie. They share insights, strategies, and best practices, creating a nurturing ecosystem where ideas flourish, challenges are met with collective wisdom, and successes are celebrated together.

The essence of The Connect Show lies in its commitment to cultivating a culture of assistance and empowerment. It's a place where the journey of entrepreneurship is embraced, where barriers are broken down, and where individuals unite to pave the way for one another's prosperity.

Whether you're taking your initial steps in the world of business or seeking to expand your horizons, The Connect Show stands as a guiding beacon, offering a network of support that propels aspiring entrepreneurs towards their goals and aspirations.

Join us every Tuesdayat 10:00 a.m.  for another episode of the The Connect Show.

Our hosts include Tracy Champagne of Small Biz MKE, Kim Knaak of Opportunity’s Knaaking, Jon Taylor from MKE VIDEO, Charlene Oesterling from Stoopid Good World, Dotty Posto In Plain Sight, and Heike Heemann IdeaShare Coaching.

Name: Bali Nusa Dua Theatre
Description:

Devdan – treasure of the archipelago is a new stage performance "spectacular" in Bali; it is a high-energy visual tour of Indonesia's culture and diversity. This Bali show features a fusion of traditional Indonesian dance activities with modern contemporary dance, world-class aerial acrobatic attractions, dazzling costumes and hi-tech special effects. The show is one of the most amazing Bali attractions and ensures to provide a perfect choice to fulfill your entertainment activities during your stay in Bali. The show was created in Bali with the aspiration to introduce and entertain guests with the artistic and natural attractions that are alive in Bali and Indonesia. The show is performing four times per week at Bali's newest and most advanced theatrical complex's located in the heart of Nusa Dua Bali, Bali's number one tourist and entertainment area. Acrobats and Artists from around Indonesia are ensured to provide guests with one of the most memorable attractions during their visit to Bali.

Name: UCL Film & TV Society
Description:
The UCL Film & TV Society has been a forum for both cinema lovers and emerging filmmakers at University College London since 1948. FilmSoc offers an exciting range of film-related activities open to all levels of experience, as well as opportunities for members to meet others who share a passion for film and TV.

Turning 70 in 2018, FilmSoc is not only one of UCL’s longest running societies, but also one of the oldest in the country. The society has produced a number of notable alumni throughout its history, including director Christopher Nolan (President 1992-94) and producer Emma Thomas. 

Alongside regular film screenings, outings and socials, we run a yearly slate of productions for different levels of experience - ranging from termly shorts to webseries - as well as training workshops and talks from industry professionals. Production members gain access to our stock of equipment and the use of our dedicated studio located in the Bloomsbury Building on UCL campus. We also run our own blog and podcast, as well as a film festival - the Festival of the Moving Image (FOMI).

Whichever aspect of film you’re interested in, from watching, making or discussing films, you will be able to develop your interest and skills as well as meet other like-minded people at the UCL Film & TV Society!

Name: Scene Scapin/Scapin Staging
Description:
Scapin Staging specializes in the sale and rental of staging equipment and the design and installation of permanent or temporary structures for the entertainment industry. We have been providing staging products and equipment to stage and event professionals since 1995. Driven by a management team that offers 30 years’ experience in the theater and show business scene, Scapin Staging has rapidly evolved into one of the most important sale and rental companies of staging equipment in Canada.

Fuelled by a sense of innovation, Scapin Staging was the first company to introduce a stage riser model with interchangeable legs for height adjustment. We were also the first to introduce the Prolyte products line in North America for truss and roof systems. Today, Scapin Staging carries the largest inventory of Prolyte trusses in Canada.

Furthermore, we have our own riser fabrication and maintenance workshop that enables us to quickly deliver or repair equipment. Scapin’s Montreal location also houses a sewing workshop as well as a flame proofing facility for stage curtains and decor elements. A cleaning and conditioning service is also available for your worn out or damaged curtains.

Through its implication and its creativity, Scapin Staging has built a solid reputation in the event industry. We always strive to help our clients achieve their vision by addressing their wildest challenges. Our expertise goes beyond the technical aspects of a job, being able to deliver any event from CAD drawings to on-site installation.


Scène Scapin se spécialise dans la vente et la location d’équipement scénique et la conception et l’installation de structures permanentes ou temporaires pour l’industrie du spectacle. Elle offre des produits et services aux professionnels du monde du spectacle ainsi qu’aux organisateurs d’événements depuis 1995. Pilotée par trois professionnels du domaine de la scène et du spectacle ayant chacun plus de 30 ans d’expérience dans le domaine, Scène Scapin est rapidement devenue l’une des plus importantes entreprises de vente et de location d’équipement de scène au Canada.

Innovatrice, la compagnie a été la première à introduire le praticable de scène avec un système de pattes interchangeables permettant l’utilisation à différentes hauteurs. Elle a également été la première à introduire les produits Prolyte en Amérique du Nord pour la réalisation de toits de scène et de ponts d’éclairage. Elle possède aujourd’hui le plus grand inventaire de ces produits au Canada.

Son bureau de Montréal abrite également un atelier de fabrication et de réfection de praticables ainsi qu’un atelier de couture et un service d’ignifugation pour les rideaux de scène et décors (JD Ignifugation). Un service de nettoyage et de réparation de rideaux est aussi disponible.

Au fil des ans, Scène Scapin s’est forgée une réputation des plus enviables dans le milieu événementiel grâce à son esprit créatif et son désir de satisfaire les exigences de sa clientèle et de relever les défis les plus fous. Le soutien qu’elle peut apporter aux différents concepteurs peut largement dépasser le cadre technique. Avec son équipe expérimentée, Scène Scapin assure la réalisation d’un projet de la planche à dessin jusqu’à son installation.

Name: Levitated Inversions
Description:
Levitated Inversions is an Australian circus company providing world-class entertainment. We offer high-end specialty acts and shows that redefine and challenge the perspective of what circus and live performance can be. We deliver exciting entertainment for corporate events, festivals, private functions, sporting events and weddings.

Founded and directed by world champion juggler, Kenny Cheung, and award-winning acrobatic juggler, Josh Croall, we have produced immersive experiences nationally and worldwide for over 20 years with numerous corporate clients and companies. We offer customised performances for any event, theme or style.

Clients include: Adelaide Fringe, Canva, City of Canterbury Bankstown, Doltone House, Facebook, Georges River Council, ICC Sydney, IKEA, KPMG, Microsoft, Partridge Pty Ltd, Sydney Opera House, The Lego Group, The Star Sydney Casino and Westpac.

Name: Digital Dance Culture
Description:
Digital Dance Culture is a dance advertising and production company dedicated to releasing quality content globally. 

Mission
Our mission is to deliver all genres of popular music to the world through industry quality dance video productions. We will unite all American street dance cultures to better serve authentic content to aspiring dancers around the globe. Our journey is fueled by our desire to empower and transform the lifestyles of local street dancers with the advancement of music sales worldwide.

Vision
As the world continues to get smaller and the lines are blurred between longstanding cultural and geographic barriers, new opportunities are borne to positively affect the world. Digital Dance Culture is a pioneer and trust of authentic American street dance cultures and was established for the longevity of American urban dance. Music and dance are both universal languages with the highest levels of expression. We envision a world where dance is truly appreciated as the bond that brings people and cultures together in the digital era.

What We Do
Visual Record Label
We are one of the first and only urban dance companies to produce industry ready music videos featuring America’s top street dancers that have tenured careers in Hollywood, Las Vegas and around the world.
Brand Media Publishing
We partner with Dance Mogul Magazine to produce urban dance cultural literary works digitally and in print.
Career Support
We don’t manage dancers. We provide them financial, marketing and entrepreneurial opportunities needed to advance their position in the expanding American urban dance mainstream talent circuit.
Talent Introduction
We introduce both extraordinary and unique talent that we have inspired, taught and directed into the semi-professional street dance circuit.
Licensed Music Rights
We have access to licensed music via Para Music Group for dance music video productions.
Booking
We are dedicated to booking and collaborating with the world’s top music artists.

Name: The Last Great Hunt
Description:
The Last Great Hunt is an internationally renowned, artist-led collective of five theatre makers: Gita Bezard, Adriane Daff, Jeffrey Jay Fowler, Arielle Gray, and Tim Watts. We are based, and make our theatre, on Whadjuk Noongar Boodja.

We are creators, innovators, and above all else, explorers. With each new theatre experience, we hunt for new ideas and new ways of connecting with our expanding audiences across Australia and the world. Joined by our Director of Operations, Jac Low, and Producer, Georgia Landré-Ord, we are the Hunters: creating high-quality, rigorous, relevant, and entertaining original work. 

Our shows feature an eclectic variety of forms, styles, and experiences, ensuring that our audiences are engaged, challenged, and moved. We believe that theatre should be accessible to all—free from barriers to participation and engagement—so our work is designed to reach diverse audiences. From large-scale productions to intimate, non-verbal pieces that transcend language, and nimble touring works that bring theatre to new and unexpected places, we are committed to creating work that is inclusive, immersive, and open to everyone, regardless of background or experience 

We aim to be recognised as a sustainable, Boorloo/Perth-based global theatrical force, regularly creating acclaimed, invigorating, original work. We take a leadership role in the development of the arts in Perth while offering opportunities, resources, and development to our artists and our Core Operations team. 

Chris Isaacs and Kathryn Osbourne are Founding Artists of The Last Great Hunt.

Name: MusiFiction
Description:
MusiFiction est né d’une volonté de renouveler la fiction-audio. 

Le concept : des fictions originales – sous la forme de nouvelles – interprétées comme au cinéma (avec différents personnages, dont une voix off) où musiques et bruitages participent de l’effet visuel de l’histoire.

Fruit d’un travail collaboratif, MusiFiction déploie un savoir-faire varié afin d’offrir à l’auditeur un concentré d’émotions, d’actions, de rythme et de fraîcheur.

Comédie, aventure, drame, science-fiction, thriller, etc… De nombreux genres sont ainsi déclinés dans un style imagé, clair et vif. Plus d’une cinquantaine de nouvelles ont été créées à ce jour.

L’écoute jubilatoire d’une histoire qui se vit « comme au cinéma » : tel est l’objectif de MusiFiction.

Venez nous découvrir sur www.musifiction.com
Abonnez-vous sur facebook, instagram : musifiction et twitter : @musifiction1
Et écoutez-nous sur Spotify, Itunes, Deezer et Google Podcast en tapant "MusiFiction"

Name: FUN4U
Description:
Kaj pomeni "fun"?

Preden skočimo na predstavitev, si vzemimo trenutek, da razmislimo o besedi "fun". Zabava ni samo smeh ali igra – je širok spekter doživetij, ki povezujejo ljudi, sprožajo nasmehe in ustvarjajo spomine. Pri Fun4U to razumemo kot umetnost: od adrenalinskih teambuildingov do elegantnih svečanih dogodkov. Naš "fun" je kot švicarski nož za prireditve – vsestranski, uporaben in vedno pripravljen na akcijo. In ravno ta širok razpon storitev nas dela posebne.

 Pozdravljeni pri Fun4U, kjer običajne dogodke spreminjamo v izjemne zgodbe! Pri nas fun ni samo beseda – je naš način življenja. Verjamemo, da bi moral vsak dogodek, pa naj gre za team-building avanturo ali poslovni retreat, biti praznik življenja, smeha in povezovanja.

 Kaj vse ponujamo? Naš meni storitev je tako raznolik kot vaša domišljija:

 Teambuilding dogodki, ki iz sodelavcev naredijo pravo ekipo.

 Aktivacije produktov, kjer vaša blagovna znamka zasije kot zvezda večera.

 Športne prireditve, ki zbudijo tekmovalni duh in dvignejo utrip.

 Resort aktivacije, ki dopust spremenijo v nepozabno doživetje

 Corporate retreati, kjer se strategija sreča z nasmehi.

 Svečani dogodki, kot so obletnice in novoletne zabave, ki vsako zgodbo naredijo nepozabno.

Ne pustite se zavesti imenu – čeprav smo mojstri zabave, svoje delo jemljemo resno. Naša ekipa strokovnjakov poskrbi, da je vsaka podrobnost popolna, vi pa se lahko prepustite užitku.

Pri Fun4U vemo, da so najboljši dogodki tisti, ki vas še dolgo po koncu držijo v nasmehu. Zato, naj gre za majhno srečanje ali velik gala večer, nam prepustite, da vaš naslednji dogodek začinimo z dozo zabave.

Fun4U "Rojen iz srca , zgrajen za veselje ."

Name: Los Angeles Copyright Society
Description:
The Society, whose roots trace back for 50 years, is a members-only organization of attorneys who practice in copyright, trademark, communications and related areas. LACS’s members include outside lawyers, lawyers at motion picture studios, media companies and other corporations and entities dealing with intellectual property. Members and guests enjoy and learn through the society of others who have common interests and skills. The group meets monthly over dinner during the months of September through June to hear speakers present on varied topics of vital and current interest to practitioners in the fields listed. Frequently, the topic for an evening is one the leading issues of the moment and, on many occasions, about a case just argued or currently pending in the Supreme Courts of the United States or California. The meetings occur in a setting designed to encourage professional and intellectual exchange about the topic as well as other areas of common intellectual and professional interest. Members and guests exchange views and debate differing positions. The meetings are frequently sold out.
Although membership requires showing an acceptable level of experience in the fields, an associate members’ program opens the meetings to attorneys who do not meet the criteria (space allowing). The Society also exerts significant efforts in passing on its experience in these areas to a wider audience and, in particular, to encouraging students through several of its programs to explore this exciting and vital area of the law, meeting experienced professionals and potential mentors and learning in a relaxed and convivial environment.

Name: Dark Hour Haunted House
Description:
Plano Texas Haunted House: Dark Hour Haunted House is DFW's premier haunted attraction, conveniently located in Plano, Texas on Plano Parkway just off of Hwy 75 and the PGBT. Since opening its doors during the Halloween Season in 2013, the goal of Dark Hour Haunted House has always been a simple one: produce the highest quality haunt experience available. Sets worthy of a Broadway production, professional actors, as well as strategic use of technology produces a genuine theatrical experience in terror for Dark Hour visitors. New shows are produced monthly which build on the existing theme of the Witch of Coven Manor, creating an expanded exploration of fear throughout the year.

While Dark Hour Haunted House includes the implementation of animatronics from the industry’s leading manufacturers, the technological aspect of the show is much more than that. The lighting effects for the show are run on a system usually reserved for concerts & theatrical events. A centrally located console, linked via DMX, controls color changing LEDs instantly altering the look & feel of the show with minimal manual manipulation, allowing for changes during the show without the guest even being aware. Motion sensors are used selectively which provide surprises at optimal moments. The audio experience is controlled by Q-SYS by QSC usually found in stadiums, convention halls, theatrical venues, and major theme parks such as Universal Studios Hollywood, and Knott’s Berry Farm. WAV files delivered by QSC full range speakers produce optimal clarity of sound.

While visitors returning each month can expect to recognize some aspects of the previous experience, great care is given to crafting the individuality of each monthly themed show. The dedicated staff works thousands of hours to provide distinct areas filled with fright for the visitor ensuring that each not so simple scare builds upon the last in telling the story of Coven Manor and the horrifying things that happen there.

Name: White Dinner
Description:
Идеята за грандиозна вечеря в бяло, се заражда преди 30 години в Париж. Всички поканени са облечени в бяло, за да се намерят по-лесно в парка, но... традицията се запазва, а с времето все повече и повече странични наблюдатели проявяват интерес да се включат в пикника. 
Днес събитието се провежда в десетки градове - Париж, Дубай, Хонг Конг, Сидни, Монреал, Мелбърн, Рига, Ню Йорк, Торино, Милано и много други. 
На събитието се събират между 1,000 до 16,000 ентусиасти, облечени в бяло и вечерящи под звездите. В дъжд или слънце, събитието не се отменя и всички са там! 
На Балканите бе проведено за първи път миналото лято в София на 27.07.2017 г. и в събитието се включиха над 320 гости, последвани месец по-късно от жителите на Букурещ с 800 гости.
  
КОНЦЕПЦИЯ
Изискан градски пикник в бяло, на открито, в града.

Популярно публично място, където вечерящите могат да видят и бъдат видяни.

Всички посетители са облечени в бяло и носят сами масите, столовете и вечерята си.

Гостите създават сами атмосферата на масата: порцеланова посуда, украса, бели свещи, бели салфетки, бели пера, бели аксесоари и цветя. Всичко е изискано и е ЕКО! Без еднократни пластмасови чинии и чаши. 

Всичко е ТАЙНО! 
Само регистрирани членове на клуба получават регулярно мейли с информация за събитието.  Участващите научават в последния момент (с мейл 1 ден преди събитието), къде точно ще се проведе събитието и стигат до мястото в центъра на града пеша или с организиран транспорт от Организатора, когато събитието се провежда в периферията на града.
След вечерята всички участници са задължени сами да се 
погрижат за почистването след себе си. Всичко е еко, ние държим на града ни!

Представете си един красив бял флаш моб в центъра на града! 
Носещи изискана храна и вино с кошници и пикник колички, разпъват сами и подреждат красивите бели маси, бели свещи, носят любимата си храна, а дори някои се изживяват като мастършефове на място, пред любимите си хора на тяхната приятелска маса :)

Name: Foredragsholder Malene Wilken
Description:
Kast fortøjningerne, og gør drømmen til virkelighed!

Med udgangspunkt i egne erfaringer, holder jeg foredrag om at gøre drømme til virkelighed.
Foredragene henvender sig til virksomheder, foreninger, sejlere og helt almindelige mennesker. Kort sagt eventyrere fra 12 år og opefter.

Tak for et inspirerende foredrag.
Det ‘frie valg’, der ligger for os til at sætte fra havn med ‘projekter’, og hvordan begrænsninger overvindes, fortælles på en god og lavpraktisk måde.
Drømme kan blive til virkelighed.
Ebbe Dalgaard Nielsen, JCI Holbæk

Jeg kan varmt anbefale, at høre et af Malenes foredrag - inspirerende oplevelse og glimrende appetitvækker til at fordybe sig i bøgerne! 
Man blir´ varm og glad! 
Helle Mortensen, Psykoterapeut MPF

Malene Wilken leverede et underholdende, medrivende og hyggeligt lysbilledforedrag på Holbæk Bibliotek. 
De omkring hundrede publikummer var med om bord hele vejen, var med til at tilrettelægge og planlægge turen, oplevede genvordighederne med havet i Biscayen, holdt jul i Portugal, så delfiner og andre havdyr rundt om det gode skib ”Æfnityr” og nød de smukke middelhavslande og - byer fra søsiden. 
Og som vi kunne forstå, et to år langt eventyr med små børn der trods besværlighederne og afsavnene har rystet den lille familie tættere sammen. 
Et meget engageret og inspirerende foredrag, som varmt kan anbefales.
Jan Holmberg, Bibliotikar

Malene Wilken har en enestående og enkel tilgang, til fortællingen om at forfølge sine drømme. Hun kan på et par timer, få selv den største udfordring til at dreje sig om at lysten til at ville og turde mere. Alt sammen pakket ind i en forfriskende og jordnær personlighed, der gør at vi alle kan følge med og derigennem inspirerer hun og udfordre publikum til, at tage...
Michael B Lauritsen, Medstifter af Kalto

Yderligere information og anmeldelser: www.aefnityr.dk/foredrag
Æfnitýr betyder eventyr på oldnordisk, og er navnet på den båd jeg gjorde min første store drøm til virkelighed i

Name: Mosesian Center for the Arts
Description:
The Mosesian Center for the Arts is a vibrant multi-disciplinary arts organization bringing performing and visual arts education, exhibitions, professional theater, live music, and other arts events to the Greater Boston area.

The 30,000 square foot arts center, located within a former United States Army arsenal, houses a 340-seat main stage theater, a 100-seat black box theater, exhibition galleries, classrooms, a rehearsal hall, and resident artist studios.
Mosesian Arts is located six miles from downtown Boston, borders the Charles River and the Brighton neighborhood of Boston, and is easily accessible from surrounding suburbs and Metro West. Programming includes professional theatrical and musical performances, gallery exhibitions, literary and art discussions, and performing and visual arts classes and workshops for all ages. Watertown Children’s Theatre is Mosesian Arts’ flagship performing arts education program, providing exceptional theater arts classes and performances for youth and families. The venue also hosts celebrated and cutting-edge performing arts companies in the Greater Boston region, such as New Repertory Theatre, Flat Earth Theatre, Improv Asylum, Guerilla Opera, and Boston Midsummer Opera.

Responsible for and identified with the highly successful "An Audience with..." theatre series, Clive Conway Celebrity Productions brings household names in showbusiness, current affairs, sport and politics to hundreds of venues around the country every year.

The format of the show is simple. During the first part of the evening the speakers look back over their life and times - sometimes solo, sometimes in conversation with an interview - and later they take questions from the audience; often a book signing follows. This intimate and interactive aspect of the show provides a memorable experience for any audience.

Audiences are always interested in meeting their favourite personalities and hearing what they have to say: our attendees are frequently thrilled with our shows and many of our audiences returning to them time and time again.

Should you wish to bring any of our shows to your theatre please email Richard Clarke at richard-clarke@zen.co.uk

Name: Hollywood Arab Film Association
Description:
Hollywood Arab Film Association - HAFA was founded in 2021 to take lead upon all the activities that enables bringing the Arab Cinema to the heart of Hollywood; thus launching the very first edition of Hollywood Arab Film Festival in April 2022.
MISSION
To promote inclusion and representation of North African and Arab filmmakers/artists in the American film and art industries by building their capacity through training, networking, and education.
To promote cultural diversity and intercultural dialogue in the United States of America through the arts and cultural institutions, by connecting people and building a more cohesive and open society.
VISION
To create a central platform for Arab and North African artists and filmmakers to showcase their unique cultural identity, while also serving as a launch pad for their careers by strengthening their skills and widening their exposure to the world. 
To educate Western audiences on Arabic film culture and advocate for Arab filmmakers' work within the American industry.

Name: Gilda's LaughFest
Description:
Gilda’s LaughFest, the nation’s first-ever community-wide festival of laughter, has quickly earned a reputation for being one of the nation’s marquee events for both participants and artists. This major 10- day Midwest festival is based in Grand Rapids and includes events throughout West Michigan. Created by Gilda’s Club Grand Rapids and launched in March 2011 to celebrate laughter for the health of it, the festival features stand-up, improv, showcases, and a variety of seriously funny stuff.

We are serious about our “funny” here. LaughFest brings together a diverse audience of children and adults every March to honor laughter as an essential part of emotional health and wellbeing. And what better time for a laughter festival than when it’s typically cold, icy, and distinctly un-funny outside?

All proceeds from LaughFest benefit the programs offered through Gilda’s Club Grand Rapids, a free community with a comprehensive program of education, structured sharing times, networking, lectures, workshops, and social activities designed to support emotional health.

In addition, each year of LaughFest has attracted an average of 50,000 attendees to West Michigan!

WHO LAUGHFEST HAS FEATURED:

Maria Bamford, Mike Birbiglia, Lewis Black, Wayne Brady, Jim Breuer, Hannibal Buress, Bill Burr, Rodney Carrington, Margaret Cho, David Cross, Mike Epps, Judah Friedlander, Jim Gaffigan, Whoopi Goldberg, Kathy Griffin, Chris Hardwick, Kevin Hart, D.L.Hughley, Gabriel Iglesias, Anthony Jesselink, Jay Leno, Loni Love, Stephen Lynch, Marc Maron, Joel McHale, Kevin Nealon, Seth Meyers, Jim Norton, Brian Regan, Amy Schumer, Martin Short, Sinbad, Lily Tomlin, Chris Tucker, Betty White, Justin Willman, and many more!
