Description: Tambola is a number based game. Which is very popular and addictive. We take this game to another level, Virtually! The Host picks a number randomly and calls it out. Players are given tickets with numbers written on them. If the announced number is present on a player’s ticket then the player strikes out that Number on their tickets. It is played in Corporate events, Social events, Birthdays, Anniversaries, Parties, Kitty parties, Clubs, Even for Family gatherings. It is a very flexible game in terms of the number of players, rules, and prizes. The number of players can be from 3 to 100 to 10000 to 100000 or even more. Rules & prizes can be tweaked depending on the host to make it more fun. Players can play it with 1 or more tickets simultaneously sometimes.

Name: Sanderson Group China
Description:
Sanderson Group is an Australian transnational group company engaging in theme parks, scenic spot design and construction, operates business in more than 24 countries on four continents with offices in Australia, India, Singapore, Malaysia, Philippines, Dubai, Chinese Mainland and Macao, and more than 300 senior designers. 
Sanderson Group was founded on Gold Coast, Australia in 1989 by Steve Sanderson, current global CEO of the group, and participated in design and construction of Sea World, Tokyo Disney Sea, Warner Bros. World Abu Dhabi, and other world-famous tourism project. 
In 2001, the group established Sanderson Macau Amusement Park Design Company in Macau. The group has participated in the design and construction of Pharaoh's Palace Casino, Hotel Golden Dragon, The Venetian Macao and a series of entertainment and leisure projects.
After achieving brilliant performance in Macau, the group established Sanderson China Amusement Park Design Company in Shanghai in 2007 to announce the entry to Chinese Mainland market formally. In the following ten years, Sanderson China participated in the creative design and construction of more than 100 themed amusement and cultural tourism projects in Mainland China. In 2015, Sanderson China Amusement Park Design Company is renamed to Sanderson China Art Design Consulting (Shanghai) co., Ltd., the sole branch of Sanderson Group in Mainland China.
By dint of global resources and experience of the group, Sanderson China Art Design Consulting (Shanghai) co., Ltd. runs through entire industrial chain and is committed to establishing deep and valuable cooperative relations with customers in the process of project design and construction. We integrate unique brand value of our customers into the design, and develop immersive, emotional and unforgettable entertainment, leisure and vacation experience for tourists by combining themed entertainment elements, interactive technology and performing arts innovation.

Name: Classic Fun Center
Description: Classic Fun Center is THE place for FUN. With activities ranging from skating to bouncing to climbing, it is the ideal location for all types of calorie burning entertainment. Schedule a birthday party, a work party, a church party, or a school party and be prepared to experience the time of your life. Classic Fun Center is located in Layton, Sandy, and Orem, Utah.

Name: Martha's Vineyard Film Society
Description:
Established in February 2002 by Richard Paradise, the Martha's Vineyard Film Society, Inc. is a member-funded 501 (c)(3) non-profit arts organization dedicated to screening the best in independent films, movie classics, documentaries, and world cinema for diverse audiences of all ages throughout the calendar year. In 2012, the society presented over 150 films, to over 18,000 patrons at various screening venues around the island. 

In 2012 we established a permanent home for the Film Society at the Martha's Vineyard Film Center, located at the Tisbury Marketplace in Vineyard Haven, MA which has led to an expansion of its arthouse programming to year-round.  In 2015 the Film Society collaborated with the MV Theater Foundation to renovate and to operate two historic movie theaters on Martha's Vineyard.  The film society programs and operated the Capawock and Strand movie theaters and focuses are larger more commercial first run releases.  In 2015 our annual attendance was over 50,000 admissions. 

Although offering an enriched film program is the primary reason we exist, the Society also presents film-related speakers, educational programs and special events to enhance this main mission and increase the public's appreciation of fine cinema in all its forms.

In 2006, the Film Society established the "Martha's Vineyard International Film Festival", a 4 days/nights festival of world film and events. More than 2500 people attended last year's festival, bringing together film lovers, artists, writers, and those who make movies. This has become a much anticipated Island event each September (http://www.mvfilmfest.com for details). Subsequently, the festival has expanded to include three mini-festivals -- the MV Environmental Film Festival, Filmusic Festival, and the DOCUMENTARY WEEK. 

In the past 15 years, we've screened over 1000 feature films, 100s of short films, and some of the most critically acclaimed movies at various venues.

Name: You Can Dance! Dance Wellness
Description:
You Can Dance!
Dance Wellness

You Can Dance! is the first dance company to be recognised as a Start Up by the Government Of India. 

You Can Dance! is a dance company with an emphasis on promoting dance not just as an art form, but also as a skill and a means to improve your overall wellness.

We started our company with a mission to professionalise the dance industry in India. We endeavour to provide a platform for both professional and amateur dancers, regardless of age, economic & social background.

Our driving forces are innovation & personalisation. 

Group & Personal Dance Classes / Offsite Dance Classes / Dance Wellness training for corporates / Wedding Choreography / Choreography / Events
Spotlight by You Can Dance!

Name: Lutinerie de Montréal
Description:
La Lutinerie de Montréal se spécialise dans la production de grands événements au Québec. 

Notre programmation hivernale : 
- le Grand Marché de Noël de Montréal au Quartier des Spectacles, 
- le Village de Noël sur la Place du Marché Atwater, 
- le Marché de Noël de Jean-Talon. 

Notre programmation estivale :
- les Guinguettes sur le bord du canal-de-Lachine et au Parc Jean-Drapeau
- Oasis au Parc Rosemont,
- la Fête Nationale dans le Sud-ouest. 

Vous souhaitez participer ou être associés à nos événements ?
Vous souhaitez faire appels à notre "Studio Lutinerie" pour un aménagement, un décor ou l'organisation de votre événement? 

Contactez info@noelmontreal.ca

Name: Ignisense
Description:
The paragon of youth events, that captivates and binds more than 15,000+ youngsters at a time under the vibrant roof of SIIB. IGNISENSE has entertainment, and fun integrated with awareness and responsibility, creating a holistic and magical environment making this event grand, extravagant, and worthwhile.
 IGNISENSE invites students from all around the country to put their ingenuity and aptitude to the test at an unparalleled level of competition. This spellbinding event enthralls the young souls for a glorious decade. IGNISENSE passed through the test of uncertain times of the pandemic with flying colours and was able to mesmerize the virtual audiences with an experience like no other. IGNISENSE is back in 2022 and ready to light up Pune’s skyline once again with its epic celebration of passion, talent, and life.
#HAILIGNI

Name: Psühhobuss
Description:
Psühhobuss ühendab meelelahutuse ja teaduspõhise psühholoogia. 

 Pakume osalejatele ahhaa-efekte teaduslike psühholoogiliste katsete kaudu, mis avardavad mõttemaailma ja loovad vahvaid elamusi. Lisaks anname kaasa praktilisi teadmisi, mida kasutada ka oma igapäevaelus.

 Meie teenused sobivad suurepäraselt meeskonnaüritustele, aidates avastada uusi vaatenurki mõtlemise, õppimise ja koostöö tõhustamiseks. 

 Too vaheldust ja uut energiat – kutsu meid seminaripäevale, koolitusele või tööpäeva lõppu! Pakume erinevaid teenuseid alates tarretisest aju lahkamisest kuni vaimse tervise töötoani.
Kõik teenused on personaliseeritavad!

Name: STAMP Music + Sound Production
Description:
STAMP is a multi award-winning music and sound production house based in Montreal, the global hub of digital creativity. We are your one-stop solution for all things audio, offering expertise in music, sound design, and audio engine implementation. From film and television to video games, VR, AR, and advertising, we deliver the highest quality audio, tailored precisely to your vision.

Our team of audio and music veterans has earned the trust of major studios worldwide, including Square Enix, Disney, HBO, Apple TV+, Netflix, Triotech, TV5, Cirque du Soleil, among others.

Services:

- Original music composition for film, television, video games, dark rides, and interactive media
- Audio post-production: sound design, voice design, foley, mixing surround & Atmos up to 7.1.4 
- Audio engine integration with extensive knowledge in Wwise, FMOD, Unity and Unreal
- Music licensing advisory, stratregy, and content partnerships

Name: The Second Studio Podcast
Description:
The Second Studio is a podcast about design, architecture, and the everyday. Hosted by Architects and Partners of FAME Architecture and Design David Lee and Marina Bourderonnet, the show features interviews with creative professionals; guides for designers and architects; design reviews of buildings, spaces, and other creative projects; and casual conversations about everyday life. Honesty and humor are used cover challenging subjects in the show’s long-format and unscripted discussions. 

The Second Studio is available for free on iTunes, YouTube, Spotify, and all other Podcast directories.

Name: Replay Events Ltd.
Description:
Replay Events is a unique, UK-based company specialising in the organisation of video gaming events and the supply of games consoles, computers and related equipment.

The Replay Events team are responsible for staging some of the UK’s biggest gaming shows, such PLAY Expo Manchester and PLAY Expo Blackpool. They have also provided equipment and technical expertise to a number of other highly successful video game and technology-themed exhibitions.

Replay Events were proud to receive the Best Education Initiative award from TIGA (games industry trade body) for their work on the Games Britannia festival at Magna Science Adventure Park, July 2012 and were finalists in the 2014 and 2016 MCV awards.

Clients include BAFTA, Gamer Network, Science Centre Singapore, Museum of Science and Industry, Endemol, The Urbis Museum, The Gadget Show, GAME, North Tyneside Council and the National Media Museum.

More information about Replay Events can be found at www.replayevents.com.

Name: Charmed I'm Sure (Music Supervision & Rights Licensing)
Description:
Charmed I'm Sure is the award-winning music supervision and rights licensing agency for Advertising, Film & TV founded in Sydney, Australia. 

As a leading International Music Consultancy, we simplify the process of finding, imagining, or creating the perfect sound for any project. 

We handle all project management & music rights holder discovery, including negotiations, approvals, international clearances, and contracting through to invoicing for our client projects. 

We're trusted by brands and advertising agencies in Australia, New Zealand, Japan, Thailand, Canada, Singapore, the United Arab Emirates, the USA & around the world to provide award-winning music supervision services.

Our clients include: FIFA, Coca-Cola, Bacardi, Google, eBay, Qantas, McDonalds, Samsung, Air New Zealand, Westfield, Domino's, Virgin Australia, The Body Shop, Hungry Jacks, Officeworks, Electronic Arts, Wild Turkey, Optus, Bumble, Toyota & more.

Contact us to learn how we can help.

Name: Borda Productions
Description:
At Borda Productions, we are committed to excellence in the promotion, production, and management of festivals and large-scale events. Our team produces more than 80 events and festivals across the United States each year.

Borda Productions: Events That Make You Move

- Ranked a "Top 5  Fall Music Festival in the World" by EDM.com in 2014 
- Ranked a "Top 10 Fall Music Festival in the World" by Vibe Magazine in 2013
- Rated a "Top NYE Destination in the Country" by Spirit Airlines Onboard Magazine

Name: Infofed Co., Ltd
Description: Infofed, with our 4 years expertise on Esports, we are now the leading Esports company in Thailand hosting Esports Team, Esports Academy, Esports Tournament and Virtual Esports Arena. With the trend of Metaverse, Infofed is now working on the Metaverse technology firstly by connecting through Esports. Our aim is to bridge every opportunity beyond imagination to the world of Metaverse.

Name: Greyman Studios
Description:
Greyman Studios is a technology profiled company focused in the development of entertainment, creative and hi-tech projects, doing both our original productions and services to other companies being prominent the transmedia treatment.
 
Certified as a JEI (spanish certification for innovation startup companies) Greyman Studios has a valuable profile that covers the ground breaking challenges and opportunities that new technologies bring.
 
Founders of Greyman Studios have highly experienced and skilled in the entertainment industry (feature films and videogames) in international projects that has obtained the most important awards (Goya and Oscar nominations).

Name: Best seller to box office
Description:
At the junction between the book and the audiovisual worlds, Best seller to box office is designed to help producers, directors, screenwriters, production managers and heads of development find the book for their next production.

Best seller to box office was created in 2009 in Paris by two passionate sisters who wanted to offer books the chance of a second life on the screen. 

Best seller to box office gathers more than 42,000 literary works from around the world, whether recent, less recent or to come, according to their potential for adaptation. 

Used today by more than 400 producers and production companies around the world, Best seller to box office has become an essential tool in a constantly evolving adaptation market. 

The search engine and its many filters allow users to find the most relevant books, get insight on their adaptation potential and access information about film rights in real time.

Strong from over ten years’ experience, Best seller to box office’s platform is tailored to the working process of audiovisual professionals, and incredibly effective to simply and quickly find the book for their next success on the small or big screen.

A positioning at the heart of the industry, an expert trade knowledge, a unique network, a qualitative selection, a skilled eye and an objective stance associated with the use of new technologies make Best seller to box office unrivalled.

On one side of the team are experienced scouts from the publishing world whose task is to source all the published or to-be-published books with adaptation potential, and on the other side, skilled readers in charge of reviewing the submitted books. Their goal is to spot and catalogue literary works that can be adapted for television or cinema before they are published and become unmissable. 

The now more than ever efficient online platform allows audiovisual professionals to access this expertise anywhere and at any time, offering them both flexibility and autonomy.

Name: VAUNT
Description: Vaunt creates in-person, once-in-a-lifetime destination programming and alternative competitions with pro athletes and entertainers. The company provides fans with access to celebrities personalities , while also creating opportunities for talent to build and monetize their own brands, both locally and abroad.

Name: Brisbane Street Art Festival
Description:
BSAF is an annual public art event that seeks to provide opportunities for creative practitioners and the wider community to develop positive partnerships through engagement and collaboration. As an avenue for artistic expression, BSAF endeavours to create a multi-disciplinary platform that encourages any and all art forms to participate. BSAF provides a framework of showcase and engagement for public art across Brisbane.

Building from the strong response and support of our 2016, 2017, 2018 and 2019 festivals, BSAF returns in 2020 bigger and better than ever before with over 60 artworks being created by some of the most exciting street art practitioners from Brisbane, Australia and Internationally. BSAF is establishing itself as a leading annual public art festival, with the 2019 event having the support of a number of local and state government organisations, commercial enterprises, and academic institutions enabling the program, scope and scale to grow dramatically.

The festival’s 2-week program will include: live mural art, music, theatre, numerous exhibitions, creative master classes and workshops from some of our leading creatives, offering a diverse program of learning, creative development and collaboration.

Name: Sheen Animation Studio
Description:
Sheen Animation Studio Pvt. Ltd. is one of the pioneers in the field of animation, gaming and VFX . Sheen Animation Studio has in-house capability in 2D and 3D animation. Our resources are our strength. Sheen Animation Studio is having its corporate and production facility based in Delhi , the capital of India.

SERVICES
Animation Production
Sheen Studio has a history of delivering both 2D and 3D dazzling serials and features. We work with some of India's most talented creative directors, designers, animators and effects artists, Sheen Studio can make your project both unique and eye catching!

Broadcast Video
Our creative skills are complimented by a strong technical base to deliver great pictures and compelling stories. Specialists in all aspects of Final Cut Studio, Shake, and After Effects we can take your project from concept to completion. We can deliver your finished masters, your DVDs, promotional print materials and even the interactive website to promote it.

Commercials
We are happy to be a part of your team, whether it is directing, editing, finishing or producing the whole thing.

Corporate Video
Our corporate videos are unique, visually stylized and will get your message out there in an engaging and entertaining package.

Effects & Compositing
As part of our post production services we offer compositing with Shake and After Effects and are very experienced in all aspects of green screen shoots and onsite FX supervision.

“Quality with time Commitment”

Name: Champion Film Salon International Film Festival
Description:
Champion Film Salon is an international film festival designed to bring together an inclusive group of filmmakers with disabilities as well as films about those with disabilities. During our annual festival we celebrate all of our filmmakers accomplishments while raising awareness for our champions and their organizations.

It's your story; tell us about the champion in you!

Name: Bryan-David Scott
Description:
Welcome to the Official Bryan-David Scott Company Page

Join us on a culinary tour that takes you behind the scenes of my world-renowned kitchens, exclusive events, and tantalizing food adventures. Here, you’ll get a first-hand look at the artistry, passion, and innovation that goes into every dish I create.

But it’s not just about the food -- it’s about connecting with you, my amazing community. Whether you’re a food lover, a budding Chef, or simply someone who enjoys the finer things in life, this page is your passport to exquisilicious recipes, insider tips, and exciting updates on my latest projects.

I invite you to follow me, share your thoughts, and connect with me directly. Let’s make this space a vibrant community where we can inspire each other and celebrate our shared love for extraordinary food, coffee, and life’s little luxuries.

Bryan-David Scott

Name: Piemonte Movie Glocal Network
Description:
L’Associazione Piemonte Movie ha l’obiettivo di promuovere e diffondere il cinema realizzato in Piemonte. Collabora con la Film Commission Torino Piemonte, il Museo Nazionale del Cinema e il Torino Film Festival. Ha ideato e cura il Glocal Film Festival e costruito il Glocal Network, diffuso sull’intero territorio regionale attraverso i Presidi Cinematografici Locali.

Tra i suoi progetti:
• Dal 2000 organizza il Glocal Film Festival, che promuove la cinematografia locale attraverso concorsi (documentari e cortometraggi), focus, marteclass, omaggi
• Dal 2014 cura l’Enciclopedia Multimediale del Cinema in Piemonte.
• Dal 2017 gestisce la rassegna Movie Tellers – Narrazioni cinematografiche, che ogni anno nel mese di ottobre porta nei cinema di 27 città piemontesi il meglio della produzione annuale del sistema cinema regionale.
• Nel 2018 ha avviato con la Città di Torino, la Film Commission Torino Piemonte e il Torino Film Festival, il contest e laboratorio video Torino Factory, dedicato ai giovani filmmaker under 30. 
• Dal 2018 cura la collana editoriale Movie Tellers, edita da Alzani Editore. Il primo volume, Un uomo, una città – Il commissario di Torino, è stato presentato al Salone Internazionale del Libro di Torino.
• Dal 2019 gestisce il Cinema delle Valli su mandato del Comune di Villar Perosa (To).
• Dal 2020 ha lanciato i progetti La Fabbrica del villaggio, per creare un percorso turistico cross-mediale a Villar Perosa, e Piemonte Factory, contest e laboratorio video dedicato ai giovani filmmaker under 30 piemontesi.

Name: The Underground Chicago
Description: The Underground, located in the heart of River North at 56 W Illinois and named “Chicago Hotspot” by US Weekly and “Best in the US” by Nightclub & Bar Magazine, has not only elevated Chicago nightlife to unprecedented heights by attracting a rotating guest list of Chicago notables, celebrities, and international DJs, but is also a perfect location for a wide range of events, including corporate buyouts, unique brand launch events, charitable high-energy fundraisers, festive holiday parties, and private receptions with colleagues, family, or friends for up to 50 guests, 100 guests, 200 guests, even 425 guests — making it one of the largest and most unique private party venues in the River North area!

Name: R30 SPACE CLUB
Description: Organizujemy eventy, wydarzenia, zabawy, gry oparte na moto-sporcie. W każdą zabawę wpleciona jest fabuła, scenariusz. Organizujemy także szkolenia biznesowe, oferta jest dedykowana dla firm, dla grup przyjaciół, dla wszystkich! Zapraszamy :)

Description: Read, Listen, Enjoy: Audiobook Summaries Await...

Name: Ingresso Nacional
Description: Os melhores eventos do Brasil estão na IN. Somos uma empresa de tecnologia que atua na gestão e vendas de ingressos, oferecemos ferramentas potentes e eficazes, além de soluções INteligentes que revolucionam a forma como produtores criam e administram seus eventos. Possibilitando que os organizadores possam criar, organizar, gerir e divulgar todo tipo de evento e de público, em qualquer lugar do país. Um evento incomparável merece Ingresso Nacional.

Name: Haikuists
Description: At Haikuists, we write personalized haiku poems on typewriters at every type of event imaginable.  Each interaction takes just a few minutes, and culminates with the creation of a custom gift for the event guest to take home.  Some people have likened the experience to "a photo booth for the soul."

Name: TEDxUofW
Description:
About TEDx
TEDx events are independently organized TED events. Those passionate about sharing ideas can host a local event modeled after the official TED conference, where TEDTalks video and live speakers combine to inspire a small local audience. The TED conference provides general guidance for the TEDx program, but individual TEDx events are self-organized and branded after the host city. (Subject to certain rules and regulations.)

About Us
We are a group of University of Washington students looking to bring together established and innovative individuals under the TEDx banner. We independently plan and host a TEDx event every spring here at UW since 2012.

We are a registered RSO at the University of Washington. If you have any questions, feel free to contact us or email us at tedxuofw@uw.edu.

Name: Lichter, Grossman, Nichols, Feldman, Rogal, Shikora & Clark, Inc.
Description:
Our practice is focused on negotiating agreements for our clients with studios, production companies and other financiers in connection with film, television, live stage and new-media projects, as well as selling rights in literary properties and motion pictures.

Since its inception in 1992, the firm has been regarded as one of the top transactional entertainment law firms in the nation. Our attorneys are very active in the industry and in the broader community, appearing on panels at conferences and festivals in the US and abroad, lecturing at well-known universities and law schools, and promoting numerous charitable causes.

Our clients include prominent and award-winning writers, directors, actors, producers, authors, playwrights and animators, many of whom have been represented by the firm since the beginning of their careers.

Name: Games2U Worldwide Headquarters
Description:
Games2U takes you where no games have gone before. With unique interactive experiences like our mind-blowing Video Game Theaters, heart-thumping 4D Movie-Ride experience, high-tech Outdoor Laser Tag, Giant Hamster Balls, life-size, kid-driven U:bot Robots, U:launchers and much, much more...

A Games2U event is like nothing you've ever experienced before. It is perfect for birthday parties, corporate events, team builders, employee appreciation, school fundraisers, festivals and carnivals.

Name: Waggle Ventures Inc
Description:
Waggle is the place to share your aww-some pet and animal friends. You can join our community at http://waggle.tv.

Incubated by Broadway Video Ventures, Waggles's investors include Raine and Lowercase Capital.

Name: Vérité Films Inc.
Description: Vérité has created and/or produced over 300 episodes of award-winning series television in the areas of comedy, drama, children's and youth, documentary, performing arts and animation. Vérité is best known for creating Canada's highest-rated comedy franchise of all time - Corner Gas - which includes the new smash hit series Corner Gas Animated, Corner Gas: The Sitcom and Corner Gas: The Movie. Vérité has won or been nominated for more than 120 national and international awards, including an International Emmy, The Prix Jeunesse and many Canadian Screen Awards.

Name: Talent X Alexander
Description: Talent X Alexander is a SAG/AFTRA franchised agency representing both union and non union talent of all ages for TV, Film, Commercial, Theatre, VO, Industrials and Print. The Talent X team, led by industry veteran Laura Alexander, is passionate about discovering and developing top talent while serving as a professional partner to production & casting. Our dynamic & diverse roster offers clients a wide range of professional talent while our team with over 50 years of combined experience provides first rate service ensuring each project’s success and ease. Although based in Chicago, we have an extensive network of both clients and talent across the US.

Name: Truly Immortal Group Of Companies
Description: Truly Immortal was founded in 2020; it started as a talent management agency but is now operating as an overall outsourcing company based in Singapore.

Name: Goldrush Entertainment
Description:
Goldrush Entertainment is a multiple award-winning, finance focused production company. Founded in 2008 by President and CEO Eric Gozlan, Goldrush has produced a number of films for worldwide consumption which have won several prestigious prizes including the film "Beautiful Boy" winner of the International Federation of Film Critics Discovery Award at TIFF.

Based in Montreal, Quebec, Canada with representation in Los Angeles and Toronto, Goldrush Entertainment has fully or partially financed, produced and distributed 13 feature films.

Name: Ravensburger Digital
Description: Start Up

Name: Teq4
Description: Experts in Immersive and interactive experiences. TEQ4 is a gateway to a network of experts whose careers have been devoted to conceiving, designing, building and operating entertaining and educational immersive and interactive experiences around the world.

Name: SEGA SAMMY HOLDINGS INC.
Description: Sega Sammy Holdings Inc., through its subsidiaries, engages in the game machine, entertainment content, and resort businesses. The company operates through Entertainment Contents, Pachislot and Pachinko Machines, and Resort segments. It develops pachislot machines and provides machines for the pachinko business; offers entertainment-related content and services, including consumer and arcade games, toys, and animation; and develops and operates hotels, entertainment and commercial facilities, and casinos. Sega Sammy Holdings Inc. was founded in 2004 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

Name: Reuzenrad Lamberink
Description:
Reuzenrad Lamberink is an international, driven and enthusiastic family business specialized in manufacturing, revision and renting of Ferris Wheels. Lamberink has more than 40 years of experience in the industry. Safety and quality are a high priority at Lamberink. The Ferris Wheels meet the latest safety requirements and Lamberink works closely with official inspection authorities. Our motto is: ‘nothing is too crazy, everything is possible’. The sky is the limit.

Manufacturing
Lamberink currently manufactures two types of Ferris Wheels: the RL33 and RL45. While manufacturing the Ferris Wheels, our unique design is used. This design makes it possible to (dis)assembling the Ferris Wheel in a short amount of time. In addition to this design, the Ferris Wheel can completely be customized with additional options, such as decoration, logos, additional lighting or a wheelchair gondola. We also provide custom transportation solutions. 

Revision
Revision means to improve, replace or redesign the components of your Ferris Wheel. The revision work can include blasting and spraying of the masts, repainting or restyling. 

Events
You can rent a Ferris Wheel for one day or more. It is a real eye catcher and gives your events guaranteed extra dimension and promotion. The Ferris Wheel that you can rent is Sky Wheel, and is manufactured by Lamberink in 2016. It is possible to fully customize the appearance of the Ferris Wheel to your requirements, such as adding advertising banners. 

Examples of realized projects:
- Drive-in Wheel. Our Ferris Wheel can be converted to carry four cars. Parking your car has never been so exciting.
- The Rotating Studio – Q-Music. We adapted our Ferris Wheel for radio station Q-Music, so that there was space for an entire studio. 
- Shell Eco-marathon. For this event we changed the style of the Ferris Wheel. A total of 48 banners were hung around the Ferris Wheel, so the event was seen from a long distance.

Name: Victory Arts
Description: Victory Arts is a Canadian based children’s content creator and producer with engaging properties and lovable characters that capture the hearts of kids and parents. Originally a production service company, Victory Arts is now fully focused on producing and distributing its own animated and live action IP content properties including YOUniverse, Plane Jane, Hugz and Kissez, Shirley Locks, apacApets, Alphabet Stories and Alpha Ants .

Name: ROCKSHIP TECHNOLOGY PTE. LTD.
Description: Loklok is an overseas streaming platform. The business started in mid-2021 and achieved rapid development throughout the year. LOKLOK strive to bring selected high-quality global content using localization methods, serving local users, establishing its own unique content selection and distribution capabilities, and finally allowing the product to cover most countries and regions in the world. Loklok has a large number of high-definition video content, fully equipped with multi-language subtitles.

Name: Genuine Entertainment LLC
Description:
A disruptive force of good in the entertainment industry, Genuine Entertainment is an award-winning producer and paladin of premium licensed content and consumer products. Specializing in brand management and strategic licensing in genre entertainment, we engineer licensing programs that extend genre brands into crucial markets and ancillary media with authentic, meaningful contributions to their franchises and fandoms. Once the course is plotted, we serve as both packager and producer to recruit the right partners, steer the creative process, facilitate approvals, and take accountability over the final results. 

Prioritizing passion and strategic planning in equal measure, we bring the best companies and creative minds together across all corners of pop culture: film, TV, digital series, books, art books, comics, manga, video games, tabletop games, tabletop role-playing games, interactive/immersive entertainment, AR/VR, collectibles, and more.

Name: Raffles Chelsea
Description:
Private members club Raffles Chelsea is named after the colonial mogul Sir Thomas Stamford Raffles.  

Founded in 1967 by Peter Evans, the club has a long and vibrant history. The club has amongst its members Royalty, celebrities and several generations of established families.

Members enjoy the club for its exclusivity and luxury, as well as its music, which lies at the core of the club.  Raffles attracts some of the best acts and DJs in the world. 

Not only a private member’s nightclub, but Raffles can be hired as an exclusive event space from 12pm until the early hours, seven days a week. The club enjoys a late license until 5am.

Take advantage of the main club room or the Dom Pérignon room for all your party planning needs. 

Whether you are planning to host a launch party, corporate event, birthday party, fashion show or you just want an excuse to gather colleagues, friends or family in a room, the events team are here to guide you through every step of the process and we are confident that we can exceed your expectations and more.

Name: Only Everything
Description:
Imagine you are at the apex of boredom. Contemplating all things existential and waiting for the seconds to merge into minutes. You’re on the commute to work. Ugh.

Suddenly the bus stops, and on hops Jimmy Fallon wearing broken-in Cons, ripped jeans and a white tee. He's holding the best damn looking pizza you’ve ever seen. Cheese more melted than the faces at the front of an RL Grimes show.
He takes the seat next to you and offers you a slice. Thanks Jim. 
That’s what Only Everything is. We're the all-encompassing boredom-quencher you’ve been ravenous for since you left bed this morning. Serving you piping hot youth culture news, essential music and fashion intel, hand-picked viral content, and the skinny on what’s happening in your city. Only Everything’s aim is to keep you stuffed to the brim with entertainment options.
But wait, leave a 'lil room for dessert.

Offline, we throw our own weekly, monthly and annual events, showcasing the best in local and international talent, and wrangling a crew of hungry Aussie hustlers who work as hard as they play. 
 
We've also got our own in-house agency and can toast to collaborations with Ford, Glue Store, Abrand, Adidas, Barney Cools and more. That ripping content you saw for Nikon and Dior, yeah that's ours too. Keen to throw some chili onto your own advertising game? Shoot a friendly email through to hello@onlyeverything.work. Witty memes welcome. 

We believe that life shouldn’t be taken too seriously. Go on, have another slice o' pizza.

ABOUT ONLY EVERYTHING
Only Everything exists to provide entertainment for youthful Australian's. We fuse online content and offline experiences to deliver a fresh take on cultural expression.
We're an online publication, events collective, agency and evolving youth culture brand speaking to influential Australian's.

„Lieliska dāvana“ - tā ir lietuviešu kapitāla uzņēmuma „Gera dovana” filiāle Latvijā. “Gera dovana” Lietuvas dāvanu tirgū darbojas no 2007. gada un var lepoties ar katru ceturksni pieaugušu lojālo klientu loku, moderniem pircēju apkalpošanas risinājumiem un plašu dāvanu sortimentu. Veiksmīgais bizness Lietuvā veicināja investīcijas Latvijā. Vēloties Latvijas iedzīvotājiem piedāvāt lieliskākās dāvanu idejas, aicinām pievienoties arī Jūs!

Name: Rondje Rotterdam
Description:
Ervaar Rotterdam als nooit tevoren met o.a. Simon Stokvis, Joris Lutz en 'Naar de Haaien'

De imposante skyline en het uitgebreide aanbod van Rotterdam op cultureel, sportief en culinair gebied maken Rotterdam tot één van de leukste steden om te bezoeken. Onder leiding van Simon Stokvis (Sjoerd Pleijsier); hoofdredacteur van De Bruine Rotterdammer, Joris Lutz; theaterman, presentator, zanger/gitarist maar vooral entertainer, of het meest in het oog springende Rotterdamse trio ‘Naar de Haaien’,  is een bezoek aan Rotterdam zo veel leuker. Rondje Rotterdam is een voorstelling in een touringcar en zodoende een ongekende belevenis met veel humor. Een unieke combinatie van (muziek)theater en een stadstour boordevol informatie en hilarische dialogen. Een uitje Rotterdam met de vermaarde Rotterdamse humor.

Rondje Rotterdam neemt je mee op een bijzondere stadstour door het Rotterdam van heden en verleden. Uiteraard voert de tour langs de belangrijkste iconen van de stad na vertrek bij het ss Rotterdam, zoals het nieuwe Centraal Station, De Kuip en de imposante Martkthal. 

Ook hebben we een culinaire variant, Rondje ‘PROEF’ Rotterdam. Deze smaakvolle citytour is naast entertainment, tevens gevuld met culinaire hoogstandjes. Met tussenstops bij diverse Rotterdamse horeca gelegenheden, maken we op een geheel andere wijze (hernieuwd) kennis met Rotterdam. Zo krijgt u een kijkje achter de schermen bij de oudste Stadsbrouwerij van Rotterdam; De Pelgrim, het Martcafé in de wereldberoemde Markthal, het nostalgische Zalmhuis met een fabuleus uitzicht op de Nieuwe Maas, ontdekt u het ware verhaal van Kaat Mossel en een heerlijke afsluiting bij het ss Rotterdam. Na deze tour weet u het zeker, Rotterdam smaakt naar meer!

Al deze bijzondere stadstours kunt u alleen, met een groep, of als personeelsuitje meemaken. Op onze website kunt u meteen online boeken of overleg met ons op welke datum uw bijzondere uitje is.

010 820 9226
info@rondjerotterdam.nl

Description: Founded in 2019, Fenix Film & Television has quickly established itself as one of the leading production companies in Alberta. Collectively, our team has produced successful tv shows for major networks including, Discovery, HGTV, History, APTN, T+E, Super Channel and OUTtv, with Fenix most recently producing two seasons of the ground-breaking docu-reality series, PUSH for CBC. The show, which marked the first major-network series in Canada to feature a full leading cast of people with disabilities, has been celebrated for its ‘person first’ storytelling and unfiltered portrayal of life as a wheelchair user. Fenix’s co-produced feature-length documentary, ONLY UP, which investigates the staggering gender inequality that persists in the fast-growing world of aviation, premiered on Super Channel in January 2024. Ambi founder and CEO Andrea Iervolino shares this vision, and asked Julie to join AMBI in 2014 to launch the company’s new sales operation.

AMBI plans to distribute 8-10 films every year including in-house and third-party productions. All titles will feature recognizable cast, prolific directors and commercial content. Most will have the potential for a major theatrical release in North America and other major territories. AMBI has a highly qualified and driven team, a solid plan and the strong support of the established talent agencies in Los Angeles as well as established producers, writers, show runners and directors.

Name: Cow Palace Arena & Event Center
Description:
Since opening in 1941, the Cow Palace has welcomed 50 million visitors through its doors. The Cow Palace is officially the 1-A District Agricultural Association, a State agency of the California Department of Food and Agriculture's Division of Fairs and Expositions. 

The Cow Palace was completed in 1941. The new arena boasted a concrete and steel roof that covered nearly six acres. The first event to be held in the new arena was the Western Classic Holstein Show in April, 1941. In November of that year, the first Grand National Rodeo was held, featuring a tribute to the late Will Rogers. The show was declared a smash hit.

Cow Palace highlights include appearances by the Royal Canadian Mounted Police, Liberace, the Billy Graham Crusade (with attendance of 696,525), John F. Kennedy, Evel Knievel, the Beatles, the Rolling Stones, and Elvis Presley. In addition to these, the Cow Palace has been the host of many successful sold-out concerts. Some of the more memorable are those by the Grateful Dead *, the Who, the Doors, Rod Stewart, Santana, ZZ Top, Yes, Paul McCartney & Wings, Neil Diamond, Elton John, U2, and Prince.

Mission Statement for the 1-A District Agricultural Association

Promote and showcase a variety of entertainment and events to serve the needs and reflect the cultural diversity of the community. Conduct annually a unique event, The Grand National Livestock Expo, Horse Show, & Rodeo, and continue to encourage youth participation in the agricultural industry. Provide a well-managed, year round multi use facility for the use and enjoyment of the Bay Area and surrounding communities.

AsOne theatre company was founded by actress and artistic director, Jane McKell in 2004 ...

"We do love the razzmatazz of big production shows in London. We love, even more, intimate and independent theatre that truly reaches  the hearts and minds of its audience.  Our aim is to KEEP INTIMATE & INDEPENDENT THEATRE LIVE and KICKING in the South and West."

AsOne theatre is a not for profit company limited by guarantee.  Its work is funded via various means:

- It sells tickets through a touring production each year. 
- It is successful in winning grants from the Arts Council and other funders, for educational and community projects. 
- It taps into the captains of industry for sponsorship support in return for business advertising, profiling and corporate entertainment.  

Last but by no means least, it relies on an amazing bank of volunteers who believe in the magic of theatre.  They initiate, support and put the 'fun' in fundraising on the company’s behalf.  

If you are an independent theatre lover, follow our social media updates on Facebook, Twitter and/or LinkedIn

Bovendien bezit zaal 1 de nieuwste innovatie voor bioscoopgeluid: Dolby ATMOS en 4K projectie.
Dolby ATMOS heeft 64 unieke geluidskanalen die een zeer spectaculair ruimtelijk en levensecht geluidsbeeld opleveren. 4K projectie levert een 4x scherper beeld dan in een standaard bioscoopzaal.

Zaal 1 is de parel van het gebouw. De grootste zaal met totaal 218 stoelen waarvan 38 superdeluxe VIP stoelen. Zaal 1 is ook de zaal die gebouwd is als congreszaal en dus ideaal voor verhuur met betrekking tot bedrijfspresentaties, congressen, evenementen en lezingen.  

Tot slot is adverteren in de bioscoop is dé snelste manier om lokaal uw diensten of producten onder de aandacht te krijgen van een grote doelgroep .Voorafgaand aan alle films laten wij een programma met lokale reclame zien op het grote doek. 

De mogelijkheden voor verhuur, bedrijfsuitjes en adverteren zijn groot. Neem contact op met verhuur@cinemagouda.nl voor alle mogelijkheden.

Name: Ros na Rún
Description:
Ros na Rún is a popular Irish television production broadcasting new episodes every Tuesday and Thursday on TG4, with 82 episodes in a season. 

Now in its 22nd year Ros na Rún is the single largest independent television production commissioned in the history of Irish broadcasting. Eo Teilifís in partnership with Léirithe Thír Eoghain produce the popular soap opera which has screened numerous ground breaking moments on television in Ireland over the past 21 years, including the first ever gay kiss shown on screen back in 1996.

Filming takes place over a two week cycle, with two studios working simultaneously on a purpose-built set in the West of Ireland. A unique project - a script to screen production all based in one location. Pre-production, filming, post-production, Editing, audio-post and video-post are all done on the set in an Spidéal, Co.Galway.  

Ros na Rún is renowned for the high quality of its dramatic scripts, and has the unique ability to portray the realities of contemporary Gaeltacht and rural living with humour and intelligence.  Its realistic storylines are not afraid to tackle the challenging social issues of our times. High quality production values ensure an extremely successful result. 

Life in Ros na Rún is never dull and the village’s name has more than one meaning,  it can be translated into English as ‘Headland of the Secrets’.

Name: Play Distribution
Description:
Play Distribution might be the new kid on the technology and entertainment block in New Zealand & Australia but it has solid foundations based on years of experience in the industry, which means it can confidently foot it with more established players.

Based in the Auckland, New Zealand, suburb of Hobsonville, Play Distribution’s passion for the industry is what sets us apart from the others. Simply put, we love what we do and we’re great at what we do.

Experience means confidence and Play Distribution’s founder Raja Henley has spent the last 20 years involved in all aspects of the entertainment distribution business in New Zealand.

Our staff have the knowledge and experience to deal with every aspect of the process, from sourcing product, sales and product management to marketing and brand awareness. We really are a one-stop solution.

Financially sound, Play Distribution’s team is also committed to top-notch customer service and is knowledgeable in marketing strategies, brand development, strategic partnerships, business planning, product development and international sales.

The bottom line is that dealing with us is stress-free and easy, and we’re committed to you, meaning you’ll get the best service around.

Over the next year Play Distribution will travel the globe attending some of the world’s biggest and best trade shows such as CES, CeBit, GamesCom, the Hong Kong Electronics Fair and E3 to source the best cutting-edge consumer electronic and entertainment products from around the world.

We like to think that at Play Distribution we approach things a little differently from our competition. There’s nothing we like more than to think outside the box and come up with innovative distribution methods that aren’t the norm.

At the end of the day you want a distribution company that puts 100 per cent into achieving exceptional customer service, is totally committed to you and delivers results-focused outcomes. That company is Play Distribution.

Name: Ambo TV
Description:
Mission Statement: 
Ambo TV brings inspirational live sermons from the most captivating, next generation Christian pastors, along with in-studio discussion, to a broad multi-platform audience.

Purpose Statement:
Ambo TV is a Christian Network that provides quality and thoughtful Christian programming in a non-denominational and multicultural manner.  Ambo is committed to presenting dynamic, word-based sermons from a variety of pastors, teachers and preachers of the gospel.  The name Ambo derives from the early church practice of delivering sermons from a platform referred to as an ambo.  We are honoring and perpetuating this tradition by delivering the word of God to the modern church from a multi-media platform.

We are also committed to partnering with pastors and churches that embrace well established core Christian values and beliefs.  To this end, we do not and will not permit advertisers on Ambo TV whose messages or products are inconsistent with these values and beliefs. We aspire to be a family-friendly, safe network that encourages and inspires viewers through the preaching and teaching of the gospel.

Name: Luxury Treasure Hunts
Description:
Luxury Treasure Hunts creates the world’s best immersive treasure hunts.

In a unique blend between escape rooms (or islands) and Hollywood-sized productions, we blur the line between reality and staged expeditions. 

Luxury Treasure Hunts believes we all have that thirst to be seen and heard by our loved ones. To be a hero in our tribe. To go on adventures together. And so, they’ve brought decades of filmmaking experience to create an adventure where your entire family works together, has fun and shines whilst solving a unique quest.

Will challenges arise and things go wrong? You bet. 
Will you overcome and come out stronger together on the other side? Absolutely. 
What’s in the chest? It doesn’t matter: it’s getting there together that will stay with you, forever.

Ultimately, we deliver a strong emotional moment between wonder, excitement and catharsis.

Unlike pirates, we want our heroes to find the treasure, and unlike movies, we don’t get any second takes.

Wherever, whenever in the Mediterranean there is a treasure waiting to be found. Every destination hides a secret story. And we know how to get you the first clue…

Welcome to the adventure of a lifetime.

Vous n’avez ni l’envie, ni le temps d’organiser votre évènement (séminaire, congrès, lancement de produits…) mariage, outia réception ou évènement privé de A à Z mais souhaitez marquer durablement les esprits de vos convives ? Qu’ils soient publics ou d’entreprise, de grande ou petite taille, Afrah group gère avec attention tous vos évènements en proposant notamment un service inédit d’évènement « clé en main ». Owner / Booker

Name: Creative Kingdoms, LLC
Description:
With a passion for changing the way people communicate, collaborate, interact and play, Creative Kingdoms' experiences have been entertaining and educating players around the world for over a decade. At the beginning of 2013, Creative Kingdoms became a wholly owned subsidiary of Great Wolf Resorts and is led by a talented team that is dedicated to the growth and success of live-action gaming and entertainment for the benefit of our players, clients and partners.

Our interactive adventure game MagiQuest, featured at Great Wolf Lodge Resorts, invites players into the fantasy world of Vellara where they journey for magical items, craft powerful runes, and do battle with mythical creatures such goblins, dragons, and Shadowlords with the aid of several unique inhabitants of Vellara who serve as allies during their adventures.  With a personalized wand, each player has the ability to activate effects and environments in the world around them as they complete their tasks on the journey to become a Master Magi and hero of Vellara.

Our space exploration adventure Cosmic Quest, featured at the Kennedy Space Center Visitor’s Center, introduces to players a day in the life of NASA scientists and engineers as they visit intractable space-themed kiosks as they tour the Center.  With the knowledge gained along their way, they then take on the challenges of capturing and redirecting an asteroid in deep space, launching a rocket heading to Mars, as well as additional NASA-inspired encounters.

MagiQuest, Cosmic Quest, along with several other Creative Kingdoms games and interactives are featured in 18 locations across the country and growing to include Minneapolis, Chicago, and Atlanta by early 2018!

Name: Millenáris
Description:
A 2001-ben átadott Millenáris egy népszerű, egész évben látogatható budapesti desztináció számos eseménnyel és 65 000 négyzetméteren elterülő változatos növényzetű, zöld parkokkal. A történelmi múlttal átitatott, egykori Ganz gyárból átalakított területen helyet kapnak kulturális és közösségi programok, tudományos kiállítások, ezenkívül fesztiválok és rendezvények széles sorának szolgál helyszínéül a komplexum. Játszótereinek és hatalmas zöld területeinek köszönhetően családok közkedvelt szabadidős színtere Bel-Buda központjában, egy urbánus közegben. A Millenáris az innováció és az egész életen át tartó tanulás támogatója.

Since 2001, Millenáris has been a popular year-round destination in Budapest with numerous events and 82,700 square meters of green vegetation. The complex, which has been imbued with its historical past was transformed from the former Ganz and Partner Iron Mill and Machine Factory. It houses cultural and community programs, scientific exhibitions, as well as a wide range of festivals and events. Thanks to its playgrounds and huge green areas, it is a popular leisure scene for families in the center of Buda in an urban setting. The Millenáris is a supporter of innovation and lifelong learning.

Name: Tropical Butterfly House, Wildlife & Falconry Centre
Description:
Encounter the exotic and discover a wild family day out at the Tropical Butterfly House, Wildlife & Falconry Centre, rated number 1 for things to do in Sheffield on TripAdvisor!

Meet lemurs, meerkats, owls, otters, snakes and other amazing animals during unforgettable animal encounters throughout the day. Take your seat for spectacular displays, featuring free-flying birds of prey, parrots and charismatic mammals.

Explore the indoor rainforest; home to butterflies, birds, bats, crocodiles and creepy-crawlies from around the world and meet and feed the friendly residents of the Farm Barn. 

Get closer than ever before to some of the most popular animals in the award-winning Wilderness Walk-through, and get a selfie with a dinosaur!

Pre-booked school and group visits are welcome, and VIP Experience Days and Animal Adoptions are available to purchase.

The Realm of Camelot adventure playground, outdoor Wet Play Area and indoor Activity and Craft Centre will entertain children in all weathers, and popular themed events take place at the centre during School Holidays.

Facilities include a Picnic Room, Jungle Gift Shop, pre-bookable Party Room, and a modern Butterfly Café, serving freshly prepared hot and cold food, and handmade cakes. New for 2017 is Lottie’s Coffee Lounge, open from 9am daily, wildlife centre admission not required to enter.

The Tropical Butterfly House is open from 10am daily, and is located just 5 minutes from M1, junction 31, with free car parking.

Head to www.butterflyhouse.co.uk to plan your visit. 
Find us on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram.

Name: Alexandria Colonial Tours
Description:
Alexandria’s Original Ghost & Graveyard Tour, located in Old Town, offers an entertaining & educational experience filled with ghost stories, legends & folklore. Walking tours are a 28-year Old Town tradition & explore Old Town's streets & back alleys. All tours are led by Colonial costumed guides with authentic 18th century lanterns. Tours are offered to the public from mid-March thru Nov. Groups can also hire guides for a private tour. Wedding parties, students & groups of all kinds can schedule tours & be led by their own private guide any time of the year except October weekends. Tours include:
 
* The Ghost & Graveyard Tour-Follow a guide in 18th-century costume through haunted streets of Old Town. Listen to ghost stories, legends & folklore as you tour the city by lantern light! Hear about unsolved mysteries, tales of romance & angry ghosts looking for revenge. (Special Halloween Tour also available)
* African-American History Tour-Take a journey from slavery to freedom; from segregation to equality & from hardship to triumph. The saga from enslaved people to leadership positions in business, government & arts is among the greatest of American stories. Alexandria is uniquely qualified to tell that story.
* The Historic Walking Tour-Walk in the footsteps of George Washington & Robert E. Lee along our brick-lined streets, by elegant Federal homes & cobblestone alleyways. From Colonial times thru the Civil War, Alexandria has been the scene of many “firsts” in American history. Hear Alexandria's story of how the city impacted our nation.
* Christmas Tour of Washington & Old Town Alexandria-Celebrate an Old-Fashioned Day of Christmas. Experience holiday magic! Tour our glittering nation’s capital decked in its holiday finest & Old Town's Colonial holiday decorations & sparkling lights. Come, relax & enjoy a spectacular bus tour.
For more info or to reserve a tour, please call 703 519 1749.

Esta visão rapidamente se tornou real quando em 2013 os desportos electrónicos tiveram o inicio do seu “Boom”.

A formação de jogadores em Portugal apresentou-se como o passo fulcral para o desenvolvimento da área, tendo em conta o reduzido número de jogadores com as suas qualidades mecânicas, individuais e de trabalho em equipa, desenvolvidas. O sucesso foi imediato e ainda hoje se reflecte no elevado número de jogadores de topo a nível nacional a competir em Portugal e a nível internacional, formados pelas nossas academias. Esta formação em conjunto com o aparecimento do mercado de transferência de jogadores e a estratégia aplicada em ambos levou a EGN Esports a múltiplas conquistas em competições nacionais e internacionais.

We produce premium narrative content—short films, series, and branded originals—through a disciplined, multi-SPV model that protects capital, promotes transparency, and scales creative ownership. Our current slate, the Grace Slate, totals $115.8 million across three projects, beginning with the short film Grace and culminating in the series The Null Hypothesis.

Quentasia operates at the intersection of culture, capital, and community. We bring institutional-grade governance to independent media while amplifying underrepresented voices that shape the future of entertainment.

For investors, we offer a structured entry point into an uncorrelated asset class built on measurable risk controls.
For brands, we provide authentic integrations and cultural relevance anchored in purpose-driven storytelling.
For advisors and staff, we offer the chance to help design a new model—one that pairs creative freedom with financial rigor.

Our mission is simple: make inclusive content investable and build the studio of the future—independent, transparent, and built to last.

Name: The Great Escape Room
Description:
The Great Escape Room was one of the originators of the Escape Room craze that has swept the country. Opened in 2015 as a family venture, they created a new genre of entertainment that set the framework for thousands of innovative and creative artists to follow. The Great Escape Room is a real-life room escape game based on popular computer and mobile phone games. After entering a room with your team, the door is closed and you have entered into a new and immersive reality. Within a timeframe of 60-120 minutes (depending on the escape room), it is up to you and your teammates to work together to uncover a series of clues and solve challenging puzzles which will lead to your great escape. The owners’ dream was to create a three-dimensional experience in which participants could see, hear, and fully immerse themselves with clues and puzzles that have captivated people for many years. They also wanted to make sure teamwork was a big part of escaping their rooms. The family devised a clever series of puzzles that inspire lateral thinking, and most of all, a sense of fun and adventure.

The Great Escape Room is an ideal experience for team-building events, birthday parties, a night on the town, or just an outing with the family. And the unique structure of the rooms is compatible with larger groups so nobody is ever left without anything to do. New ideas and rooms are in constant development as there is no limit to imagination.

Yaratıcı bar danışmanlarından oluşan ekibimiz, projelere bir tasarım projesi gibi yaklaşır. Bir müşteri olarak sizinle yakın bir şekilde çalışıyoruz ve atmanız gereken tüm adımlarda size rehberlik ediyoruz. Öncelikle, dilekler ve yön hakkında daha fazla bilgi almak için yerel pazar ve dünya çapındaki kokteyl trendleri hakkında kapsamlı araştırmalar yaparak başlıyoruz. Elimizdeki bu sonuçlar ile ilerleyoruz. Markanın tarzına ve mekanın temasına uygun güçlü bir içecek konsepti oluşturmak ve bunu barın tüm küçük detaylarında mükemmelleştirmek için çalışıyoruz . Farklı aşamalar için, sürecin herhangi bir anında geri bildirim verme imkanı veren eskizler, ruh hali panoları ve açıklamalar sağlayacağız. Bu, bar için gerçekten benzersiz deneyimler yaratmanın başlangıcı olacak. Tüm duyuları düşünmek. 5 duyuyu hareket geçiren hikaye anlatma duygusu uyandıran ve mekanın konseptine tamamen uyan içeceklerle kişiye özel hazırlanmış içecek programları hazırlıyoruz.
Bar dizaynı yaratmak için estetikten pratiğe bir yolculuk.çoklu duyusal bir deneyim yaratmak için dokular , malzemeler , ışık ve hayat bulan mekanla oynamak , tüm ihtiyaçlarınızın karşılandığından ve barın beklendiği gibi çalıştığından emin olmak için tasarım sürecinin her aşamasında size rehberlik edeceğiz.
Bara giren misafir nasıl kokacak? Bardan çıkarken kendilerini nasıl hissetmelerini istiyoruz? Bardaki dekoru, barmenlerin kıyafetlerini  hız ve tutarlılık için güçlü bir lojistik planın nasıl hazırlanacağını düşünün.
Hazırsanız size tüm bu süreçlerde rehberlik etmek için buradayız.

Name: Adventure Park USA
Description:
About Us:
 
Since the summer of 2005 when Adventure Park USA opened its gates, guests have been raving about this exciting family entertainment center. Adventure Park USA is a 17.5 acre Western theme park featuring a 22,000 square foot building to accommodate indoor as well as outdoor adventures. The park’s Western theme infiltrates all of the store fronts, the golf courses, the laser tag, and three roller coasters.
 
Owner Larry Stottlemyer opened the state-of-the-art facility with hopes of becoming one of the best amusement parks in the area, something he has definitely accomplished. Mr. Stottlemyer previously owned and operated the Putt-Putt attraction in Frederick, a local favorite. He accomplished extraordinary amounts with this franchise, hosting an arcade ,a roller coaster , 2 miniature golf courses, concessions, water wars, parking, and laser tag all on only 1.7 acres of land.
 
Despite the abundance of attractions currently available at Adventure Park USA, the park is rapidly growing. With plenty of land to expand, Mr. Stottlemyer hopes to one day introduce an incredible water park to Adventure Park USA.
 
Our Mission Statement:
 
At Adventure Park USA, we are committed to presenting our guests with an amazing amusement park experience. With unforgettable attractions, compassionate and committed staff members, convenient party planning packages, corporate event options, a day care, and a summer camp, there's something to fulfill the whole family's quest for adventure. Adventure Park USA provides a vacation experience in a fun, family environment - guaranteed to be affordable and fresh every time you visit!

Name: Cursitor Street
Description:
What is The Cursitor?

In 1894, The Fleet Street Club opened in Cursitor Street where it stood until a bomb destroyed it in 1941. The members were given shelter by The Column Club until 1946, whereupon they renamed themselves The Fleet Street Column Club.

In 1952, some of the original Fleet Street Club members arranged for a regular reunion, which they named The Cursitor Street Christmas Reunion Luncheon. It has been held successfully every year since then. The chosen charity that day was Great Ormond Street Hospital, and a number of charities have received generous donations every year since.

Now affectionately known as ‘The Cursitor’ it is recognised as the outstanding get-together for a wide variety of people associated with the media and their guests, old and young, male and female, buyer and seller, advertiser and advisor.

One of the many traditions to have survived is the atmosphere of friendship and warmth in which to celebrate the beginning of the festive season, and to pay tribute to our senior colleagues who have retired during the previous 12 months.

The Cursitor is a grand and joyous occasion but it is also a time to remember those less fortunate than ourselves. Significant sums have been raised for charity, including the advertising industry’s own charity, NABS.

Above all, The Cursitor is an occasion when friendships are formed and cemented, goodwill is unsurpassed, and we all feel a sense of pride in our industry.

The Cursitor committee is comprised as follows:

President
Robert Hicks

Vice President
Stevie Antonioni

Committee Members

Stevie Antonioni, Martin Cole, Craig French, Robert Hicks, Sara Patel, Sophie Workman

These activities include: prediction pools, quizzes, chats, virtual spaces for small sized groups, virtual spaces for influencers, prediction brackets, polls and even learning and awareness online activities, that will encourage people’s interactions with each other and, not less important, will encourage broad and deep engagement in both: Media Events as well as Events organized by the Quipus Community.

Advertisers will appreciate higher the impact of their Digital Marketing Campaigns, resulting from powerful segmentation capabilities, at times when people’s awareness is higher due to the imminency of the respective Event.

Event’s Sponsors will be interested in such broader engagement (time span and depth) by both: their natural followers and their community. Studies show that immersion on any Event tends to be deeper if audience can share their experience via Social Networks. 

So far, we have experimented with more than 20 Events, including The Oscars, The Miss Universe, The Super Bowl, as well as Events in-house developed by ourselves at Quipus, such as: iWorldcup (imaginary soccer World Cup), Corporate Towers of Caracas (architecture appreciation activity), and Parrots of Venezuela (wildlife awareness activity), among others.

A “Quipus Social Network Prototype” is being designed and developed, primarily to allow us to experiment with the Social Networking experience of the Quipus User.

If you reached this paragraph: are you ready to help us to advance?

Name: PAMPULHA IATE CLUBE
Description:
Foi na Belo Horizonte do final da década de 50 que surgiu a idéia de se construir um novo clube na cidade voltado para a alta sociedade mineira. E não deveria ser apenas um clube que reunisse as pessoas por castas, mas que se tornasse conhecido nacionalmente pela sofisticação e importância social. Um clube diferente de todos os demais inclusive no espaço físico e que garantisse lazer, esporte e recreação de qualidade, sobretudo para os jovens.

A obra seria imponente e três grandes mestres assinaram os projetos: Oscar Niemeyer, Roberto Burle Marx e Cândido Portinari. O local escolhido media 300 metros ao longo da Av. Otacílio Negrão de Lima, de frente para a Lagoa da Pampulha e englobando uma área total de 44.000 metros quadrados. Um projeto arrojado, de grandes proporções e que contou com o apoio dos principais dirigentes da cidade e do Estado, o Governador José de Magalhães Pinto, o Prefeito Aminthas de Barros e os vereadores da Câmara Municipal.

Tudo foi programado para oferecer um cenário grandioso e exuberante, a começar pela piscina que, com cento e dois metros de extensão, até hoje é um dos principais cartões postais do Clube. Niemeyer criou a forma insuperável, Burle Marx utilizou mudas e flores de todo o mundo para criar um maravilhoso jardim e Portinari enfeitou, com sua arte esplendorosa, o interior do salão de festas e o cenário dos jardins, com o quadro “Frevo” e com um painel de azulejos intitulado “Peixes”. O quadro, quando da fundação do PIC Cidade, foi removido da Pampulha e instalado no hall principal do novo prédio, na rua Cláudio Manoel, Praça da Liberdade.

El bienestar de cada persona con la cual interactuamos, ya sea empleado, socio comercial, cliente o proveedor es fundamental para nosotros. La calidad y pulcritud de nuestros patos de goma solo se pueden garantizar a través de una relación de confianza. Garantizamos y discutimos importantes características internacionales llevando a cabo un control de calidad para cada     producto. 

En cada uno de nuestros proyectos garantizamos un respaldo constante plasmando valores fundamentales como: Compromiso, Orientación al cliente, excelente calidad, dedicación en cada diseño; eso es Duck House. 

Compromiso social: Desde nuestra posición como pequeña empresa somos conscientes de nuestro entorno y nos sentimos responsables de ello, por eso: reciclamos cada insumo de nuestros productos dejando el menor impacto posible en cada proceso. Además, participamos activamente en eventos culturales, deportivos y sociales con el ánimo de fomentar la alegría, solidaridad e imaginación en nuestra sociedad.

Name: Independent Production Fund/ Fonds Indépendent de Production
Description:
The Fund was established in 1991 by Maclean Hunter Limited with capital endowments of $29.2 million and has since become independent of any parent company. The annual revenues generated by the endowment and recoupment on investments constitute the funds at the Board’s disposal each year. The Fund is “certified” by the CRTC as an independent production fund, eligible to receive BDU (Broadcast Distribution Undertaking) contributions.

The Foundation is incorporated federally as a corporation without share capital and has been granted charitable status. The Board of Directors which represents the industry makes all funding decisions. The operations of the Fund are administered by offices in Toronto and Montreal.

The IPF provides administrative services to other Private Funds.

Description:
Providing family fun since it opened in 1996, M&D's, Scotland’s Theme Park is one of the country’s most popular visitor attractions for kids and adults of all ages and the only Theme Park in the country.
 
M&D’s Theme Park is open from April to October and offers a fantastic mix of rides to suit the whole family.
 
Set in Strathclyde Country Park, the Theme Park forms part of a multi-million pound complex which is open all year round and comprises an 18-hole Adventure Golf course, Cosmic Bowl – Scotland’s first Glow in the Dark bowling alley – Krazy Congo soft play area, Amazonia, Scotland’s only indoor tropical rainforest, as well as restaurants, bars, a snooker hall and Game Zone, one of Scotland’s largest indoor amusement arcades.

Name: The Red Sparrow
Description:
The Red Sparrow is in love! With stories. And storytellers. And the craft of storytelling. After all, life is but a story. There are ups. There are downs. There are twists and there are turns. There is suspense, there is romance and there is drama and there is oodles of cliches. 

We are a community that appreciates art, not just the end product but also the hard-work and rigour that goes into it, beyond the spotlight. 
After all, a film is probably the only form of expression that takes us away from the ordinary and makes us a part of the journey of emotions that the characters are on, while onscreen! 

We do this by looking at films with a critical eye, by talking to people who make these films happen and by creating a community of people who, as the cliche goes - eat, breathe and sleep films!

Name: Global EPIC Event
Description:
Introducing the Entertainment & Performing Arts Industry Conference (EPIC) brought to you by TheatreArtLife and The Broadway Stage Management Symposium. A global online entertainment conference event to be held in one 24-hour period on January 10, 2022.

Join this EPIC virtual event as we cover the discussion pillars of CREATE, DESIGN, PERFORM & PRODUCE and bring a collection of directors, performers, technicians, producers, designers, writers and more from all over the globe, crossing the Americas, EMEA, Africa and Asia-Pacific. 

he global pandemic shut down live entertainment and arts around the world and many countries are still not back to normal life. This time has shown us however, that we can connect across oceans and continents. EPIC, for one 24-hour rotation of the earth, provides the space for thousands of entertainment professionals from every corner of the globe to come together to share ideas, connect, communicate and learn from each other. 

Early Bird tickets available till November 11 only! 
More information here: www.globalepicevent.com

Name: Flash Mob America
Description:
Founded by Staci Lawrence and Conroe Brooks, Flash Mob America is an organization whose sole purpose is to create Joy thru Surprise. By surprising an unsuspecting audience, we celebrate, honor, and bring awareness to artists, charities, campaigns, and social causes. We hope to inspire the world to come together as ONE.

Based in Los Angeles, we are a nationwide, full service Flash Mob production company with an extensive community of passionate Flash Mob enthusiasts from all over the country! With our incredibly talented staff of producers, filmmakers, photographers, and choreographers, we handle all aspects of Flash Mobbing including music rights acquisition, original song creation & choreography, extensive social networking & casting, and all filming and editing needs.

We have been defined as The Flash Mob Experts, because of our ability to combine creative expression, viral marketing, ease of community organization, and most of all, our unwavering intent to hold true to the very nature of Flash Mobbing which is to give back to the community by bringing everyone closer together. FMA is committed to creating joyful experiences for everyone who participates in and witnesses our events.

HISTORY

In 2009, moved by Michael Jackson’s emotional memorial, Staci Lawrence and Conroe Brooks produced the first American tribute to the late King of Pop by recreating Sweden’s “Beat It” flash mob.  And then the unexpected: Universal Music Group hired the team to produce a flash mob to surprise the late pop icon’s sister, Janet Jackson. The national attention spread like wild fire and Flash Mob America was born. Forging forward, Staci and Conroe – now recognized in the industry as the experts in the field – worked nonstop to grow Flash Mob America into a full-service flash-mob production company. 

In 2014, Conroe left the company and Dax Valdez, FMA’s Marketing Director, joined Staci as co-owner.

Name: Made In Melbourne Film Festival
Description:
The Made in Melbourne Film Festival is an exclusive showcase for Melbourne filmmakers and short films that are 'Made in Melbourne'.  MIM celebrates the desire, drive, and diversity of our local film community by screening the very best short films Melbourne has to offer.  

Short film is a diverse art form.  It can create instant characters, employ well-timed twists, say much with so little, explore themes and styles which it's bigger brother - the feature - simply cannot sustain.  A great short film will captivate and entertain, provoke and enlighten, challenge and inspire.  And nobody makes great short films quite like Melbourne.
 
Yes, the Made In Melbourne Film Festival is unapologetically proud.  Our city by the bay has a thriving film community and festival culture and MIM aims to provide emerging and established filmmakers a platform to showcase their work in front of their peers and an appreciative audience.
 
Now in our fifth year, MIM continues to grow and offer filmmakers fantastic prizes and accolades.  Last year the festival screened at the majestic Astor Theatre and the stylish Order of Melbourne, highlighting a great range of talent, and encouraging crowd interaction by hosting Q & A with the filmmakers and allowing the audience to decide the winners.
 
Even more is in store for 2013; with support from the Melbourne City Council we have big and bold plans to expand the festival like never before.  MIM is just getting started ...

Name: Who'z The Boss Music, Inc.
Description:
Who’z The Boss is home to a diverse team of 250 award-winning songwriters and producers from around the world. The company is the result of collaboration between Parker Lee Williams and Dave Herrero, two distinctly talented individuals who have been deeply involved in the music industry for over five decades, collectively. 

Parker Lee Williams, two-time Emmy nominee, the former music director for the Oprah Winfrey Show and Harpo Productions, and creator of the Harpo Sounds Music Library and Hip Hop legend, has over 20 years of experience in developing custom music for Harpo Productions, including the Oprah Winfrey Show, the Dr. Oz Show, and OWN productions (such as Super Soul Sunday and Oprah’s Master Class). He worked with Oprah Winfrey for 26 years, serving as the Harpo Music Director for over a decade. In this role, he achieved a myriad of accomplishments including two Emmy nominations and the creation and marketing of “Harpo Sounds” Music Library, which proved very successful for Harpo Productions both creatively and financially. Parker has also been a pioneer and leading force in the Hip Hop world, from adolescence until present day. He was one of the first hip-hop DJs in Chicago, bringing the New York hip-hop sound to the Windy City.

His partner Dave Herrero is a first-class world touring blues musician, bandleader, composer, and music producer. He and his international team of award winning composers were leading producers for the Harpo Sounds Music Library. Together, Herrero and Williams have created Who’z The Boss Music Library, bringing their unique library building approach to production houses, television and radio productions, and multimedia producers across the globe.

Williams’ and Herrero’s extensive music backgrounds combine decades of valuable industry knowledge and creative excellence.
