Name: MALAC - Langues pour tous
Description:
Depuis 2016,  MALAC offre des cours de langues de haute qualité pour les enfants, les jeunes et les adultes . Nous sommes spécialisés dans l'enseignement de l'arabe, de l'anglais. Nouveautés de la rentrée prochaine : l'espagnol, l'allemand et le portugais .

Nous avons un fort engagement envers nos apprenants et travaillons dur pour créer un environnement d'apprentissage stimulant et inclusif . Grâce à notre approche pédagogique innovante, ludique et notre équipe enseignante native qualifiée, nous avons aidé des milliers d'apprenants à atteindre leurs objectifs linguistiques .

Nous sommes fiers d'avoir développé la Franchise et de pouvoir être bientôt dans de plusieurs villes . Chez MALAC, nous croyons que l'apprentissage des langues est essentiel pour favoriser la compréhension interculturelle et la réussite professionnelle . Nous sommes déterminés à offrir un service de qualité et à aider nos apprenants à atteindre leur plein potentiel linguistique .
Nous proposons également un enseignement multi-support pour que l'apprenant progresse avec envie, aisance et de façon ludique, le tout dans la bonne humeur . Nous organisons également une diversité d'activités culturelles (Théâtre, Musique, Calligraphie, Cuisine, Contes, Poésie, Danse, Voyage, ...) pour compléter notre offre d'enseignement . Enfin, nous offrons une flexibilité de nos offres et la diversité de nos formules d'apprentissage pour répondre aux besoins et contraintes de chacun . Nous sommes fiers d'être certifiés Qualiopi, ce qui garantit la qualité de nos formations. De plus, nos formations sont éligibles au Compte Personnel de Formation (CPF), offrant ainsi à nos étudiants la possibilité de financer leur formation en utilisant leur crédit d'heures CPF.

Name: Carpeto
Description:
Jouer nous fait grandir !

L’enfant qui joue avec des jeux et des jouets, seul ou avec d’autres, développe des qualités essentielles qui participent à sa construction

LIBERTÉ : Libre d’associer ses jouets, ses figurines, ses cubes, ses petites voitures, l’enfant entre en contact avec le monde qui l’entoure et, dès le plus jeune âge, il va développer des qualités de manipulation, de préhension, de construction et de concentration.  

CONFIANCE : Ce faisant il va développer sa confiance : confiance en lui et confiance dans le monde qui l’entoure en s’appropriant son espace de jeu. 

EXPÉRIENCE : Il va aussi faire l’expérience de certaines règles physiques comme la pesanteur ou tout simplement la fragilité d’une tour de kapla… convoquant Newton bien avant ses premiers cours de physique !  

SOCIABILISATION : En jouant avec d’autres - ses frères et soeurs, ses parents - l’enfant va aussi développer des réflexes sociaux comme le partage, l’échange, l’interaction ou la co-construction, une notion très en vogue dans les entreprises.    

IMAGINATION : Enfin, son imagination va pouvoir s’épanouir car jouer n’est-ce pas avant tout raconter une histoire et faire travailler son imagination ? à partir d’éléments dont il dispose : ses jouets, l’espace de sa chambre, les histoires qu’on lui a lues, ses connaissances et ses références culturelles. 

AUTONOMIE : L’enfant va créer des connexions pour mettre ces différents éléments en relation et inventer sa propre aventure. Le scénario pourra d’ailleurs s’écrire “en live”, la fin étant rarement écrite au départ du jeu.
 
L’enfant qui joue n’est pas seulement en train “d’occuper son temps” ou de se “divertir” mais il développe réellement - de manière fondamentale et à son rythme - des qualités, des aptitudes et une créativité qui seront essentielles à son développement harmonieux et à son épanouissement personnel (comme le souligne les pédagogies alternatives : Montessori and co…)

Name: Unexpected Productions Improv
Description:
Unexpected Productions doesn't just teach improv skills, but skills that can apply to everyday life; Active listening, verbal/non-verbal communication, creativity, acceptance of ideas, responding quicker in the moment, flexibility to change, problem-solving, and appropriate risk taking. Multinational corporations based in Seattle, like Amazon, Microsoft, Boeing, and Starbucks have integrated Unexpected Productions’ trainings into their daily operations.  Local groups like the Space Needle, Virginia Mason and Group Health have also integrated Unexpected Productions’ unique teachings.

Unexpected Productions started out 31 years ago in a Chinese restaurant in Pioneer Square and evolved into a leader in improv in Seattle, the greater Pacific Northwest and the United States. Almost every improv troupe in the city has members that came from Unexpected Productions troupe or were taught in its improv school; including Jet City Improv, ComedySportz, as well as countless others. 

Their International Festival of Improv, now in its 19th years, has brought improvisers from around the world to Seattle.  After the festival, they bring back to their homes styles and knowledge that they learned at Unexpected Productions.  Participating countries have included Spain, India, France, Japan, Slovenia, Germany, Mexico, Holland, Canada, Italy, Belgium, Australia, New Zealand, 

From its home at the Market Theater in Seattle’s Historic Pike Place Market, Unexpected Productions has created well over 150 original shows. In addition to creating original works, for 30 years, Unexpected Productions’ has produced and presented Seattle TheatreSports, the first Theatresports in the United States, and Seattle’s longest running show.

Name: TEDxNapoli
Description:
In the spirit of ideas worth spreading, TEDx is a program of local, self-organized events that bring people together to share a TED-like experience. At a TEDx event, TEDTalks video and live speakers combine to spark deep discussion and connection in a small group. These local, self-organized events are branded TEDx, where x = independently organized TED event. The TED Conference provides general guidance for the TEDx program, but individual TEDx events are self-organized. (Subject to certain rules and regulations.)

About TED 

TED is a nonprofit organization devoted to Ideas Worth Spreading. Started as a four-day conference in California 26 years ago, TED has grown to support those world-changing ideas with multiple initiatives. At TED, the world's leading thinkers and doers are asked to give the talk of their lives in 18 minutes. Talks are then made available, free, at TED.com. TED speakers have included Bill Gates, Jane Goodall, Elizabeth Gilbert, Sir Richard Branson, Benoit Mandelbrot, Philippe Starck, Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala, Isabel Allende, and former UK Prime Minister Gordon Brown. Two major TED events are held each year: The TED Conference takes place every spring in Long Beach, California (along with a parallel conference, TEDActive, in Palm Springs), and TEDGlobal is held each summer in Edinburgh, Scotland.


For information about TED's upcoming conferences, visit http://www.ted.com/registration

Follow #TEDxNapoli on: 
Twitter http://twitter.com/TEDxNapoli
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/TEDxNapoli/
Instagram: http://instagram.com/TEDxNapoli

Create, combine, and style tricks as you hit Downtown LA and other iconic California locations where street legends have left their mark. Dive into the digital skate subculture with more than 60 real skate spots connected by block after block of plazas, schools, pools, buildings, car parks and corridors. Name: Cyber Live
Description:
Cyber Live Metaverse is a 3D open-world dedicated to music and art related, designed as an additional intellectual and entertainment layer to the physical world in the form of a game. Cyber Live enables users to expand professional activities with new opportunities in the Metaverse while offering a unique experience for a broad audience. 

Cyber Live Metaverse is an online-multiplayer game combining the elements of RPG, Strategic and economic genres, in which the main role is played by real people using 3D Avatars and navigating in a 3-dimensional virtual world. Instead of fictional characters, players play themselves by taking actions in the virtual world in line with their life agenda, the effects of which can bring measurable financial, professional, and image benefits. Users can interact with themselves and the environment with their avatars, having free movement, gestures, video and voice communication, and a choice of first, second or third person view. 

Cyber Live Metaverse is an extension of the physical reality in which players’ real life and professional goals can be realized in the Metaverse and converted into measurable values in the physical world. A series of built-in economic and quality mechanisms focuses the energy of the community and rewards talented and measurably active people.

Name: The R&D Studio
Description:
Founded in 2011, The R&D Studio is a creative-driven entertainment studio based in Malaysia.

We create, develop and produce content for different platforms and audiences. Our portfolio includes television series, telemovies, short films, documentaries, music videos and commercials for partners such as Disney, WarnerMedia, Tokyo Broadcasting System, Astro, Primeworks and RTM as well as for corporate clients and agencies.

We currently have a bank of over 100 IPs in various stages of development and production, spanning different formats and genres. 10 IPs have since found new homes with broadcasters and other clients.

A notable achievement for the studio is the production of the live-action television series DISNEY'S WIZARDS OF WARNA WALK (2018) - the first long-form TV series by Disney in Southeast Asia. We worked with Disney producers on ideation, development, scripting, casting, wardrobe and set design, production and post-production of the series. We used two sound stages in Iskandar Malaysia Studios (IMS) in Johor for the multi-cam production.

As storytellers and worldbuilders, we always try to push the boundaries of storytelling and the art form. Our first animated short film, BATIK GIRL (2018) was made for a global audience and explores themes of grief and recovery through an original visual world inspired by the South East Asian textile craft of batik. Another animated short film THE DALANG’S TALE (2021) tackles the theme of domestic violence through visuals inspired by wayang kulit or shadow puppets.

Name: MultiBebidas
Description:
Tudo o que você precisa para cuidar de toda a operação de bebidas no seu evento: Consultoria, Planejamento e Gestão de Serviços de Bebidas.
Conheça todos os nossos serviços e como podemos organizar seu evento de forma personalizada e memorável

Nascemos em 2008, com uma missão bem clara:
Criar oportunidades para as pessoas viverem momentos incríveis, tendo como valores a felicidade e a responsabilidade. E desde então somos referência em soluções ágeis, com excelência, variedade e comodidade.

Fazemos parte do Grupo Faro Participações, que hoje conta com mais de 10 empresas renomadas.

Inicialmente atendíamos o mercado universitário de Campinas-SP, com foco em distribuição em grande escala. Devido ao ótimo serviço, ganhamos a confiança do nosso primeiro parceiro, AmBev.

Com o reconhecimento do serviço prestado e, consequentemente, o aumento da demanda, vimos à necessidade de criar uma nova plataforma de atendimento: PDV's. Foi assim que a partir de 2010, iniciamos o atendimento aos bares, restaurantes, casas noturnas e conveniências.

Em 2011, iniciamos um projeto de expansão e desenvolvimento do portfólio, incluindo todas as categorias de bebidas em nosso mix de produtos.

Com o sucesso da inclusão de destilados no mercado universitário, construímos uma parceria sólida com a Diageo, empresa proprietária de marcas fortes como Johnnie Walker, Smirnoff, Ketel One, Cîroc, entre outras.

Não contentes com o impacto que queríamos gerar nos nossos clientes, fomos os pioneiros a oferecer o Serviço de Buffet de Bebidas para eventos.

Outras inovações surgiram: Com a pandemia muitos estabelecimentos fecharam, e para que pudéssemos ficar pertinho de vocês nesse momento, nos tornamos temporariamente delivery.

Ainda com sede de inovação e experiências únicas, ampliamos nosso serviço e nos transformamos em uma Agência. Hoje somos tudo o que você precisa para cuidar de toda a operação de bebidas no seu evento: Consultoria, Planejamento e Gestão de Serviços de Bebidas.

Name: Meta Media Group
Description:
Meta Media Group (formerly Modern Media), founded in 1993, is a high-end media company with a global outlook. As one of China’s leading media groups, Meta Media spans a wide range of platforms in business, culture, art, fashion, and lifestyle. The group is home to several influential publications, including Modern Weekly, Life Magazine, and City Magazine, while also partnering with international media giants to co-publish the Chinese editions of Bloomberg Businessweek, InStyle, Numéro, IDEAT, and The Art Journal (formerly The Art Newspaper China).

In recent years, Meta Media has expanded into digital publishing, acquiring NOWNESS, the world’s premier creative video platform, in 2017. We also acquired ArtReview in 2019, a leading international contemporary art magazine, further strengthening our presence in the global art world.

Meta Media is also breaking ground in new frontiers with creative spaces like ZiWU and Meta ZiWU in the metaverse, becoming the first media group in China to operate at the intersection of publishing, digital technology, and art space.

As a major force in the Chinese and global art scenes, Meta Media is dedicated to fostering artistic and cultural exchanges. LEAP, our Chinese contemporary art magazine, is the only publication of its kind distributed internationally in Chinese, English, and French.

In addition to these efforts, Meta Media has forged strategic partnerships with world-renowned institutions like the Victoria and Albert Museum in London. We are proud to be the key sponsor of the Meta Media Gallery, part of the V&A’s Photography Centre, which opened in 2018. Meta Media continues to serve as a platform for dialogue and cultural exchange, bridging China and the rest of the world through art and innovation.

Description:
Our Story
 
EDM DNA was created with the love and passion for music and the talent that it comes with. It started as a dream, but now it's a reality and we are ready to take you on this new journey!

Started by dedicated and talented entrepreneurs and musicians that wanted to give the artist a helping hand, Bad Wolf Entertainment continues to grow and the artists along with it.
On September 5, 2018, Daniel Nave owner of Bad Wolf Entertainment and Keeley Tchaikovsky owner of Tchaikovsky Entertainment partnered and joined companies to further expand and provide opportunities to artists.  The two entities will be recognized as Tchaikovsky - Bad Wolf Entertainment.

Our Vision

 There plenty of entertainment companies in the industry, but Tchaikovsky - Bad Wolf Entertainment decided to take a different approach. We are an artist support platform that empowers the artist to find work in the entertainment industry.
We believe that the artist needs to have every opportunity to succeed and we are here to help. Tchaikovsky - Bad Wolf Entertainment provides artist management, PRO (Performance Rights Organization) registration, distribution to major outlets, label contract negotiation, booking services, merchandise, artist development, event support, and marketing, official artist page/site, website services.

Tchaikovsky - Bad Wolf Entertainment works with the labels and booking management to grow the artist's fanbase, reach and recognition. This support allows the artist to focus on delivering the best content for the audience as well as engage with the fans.

Keeley Tchaikovsky is no longer a partner at EDM DNA. Her new innovative company Tchaikovsky Group Unlimited, is working very closely with Zac Claxton owner of ESN (Electrostep Network) and serves as theirA&R representative, Co-host of EDM Fun House podcast on the ESN YouTube channel and upcoming events and more.

Name: Huis Van Wonterghem
Description:
JARENLANGE TRADITIE IN GASTRONOMISCH FEESTEN
Group Huis Van Wonterghem, de feestmakers sinds 1935. Met Gregory en Barbara Van Wonterghem aan het roer is vandaag de derde generatie aan zet. Zij staan onder meer in voor het dagelijkse management. De Stijlvolle feestlocaties staan bekend om hun uitstekende service en correcte prijs-kwaliteitsverhouding. 

Gregory stelt :"Het is onze missie om te blijven investeren in de toekomst. Stilstaan is achteruitgaan. We zijn dynamisch, pikken makkelijk trends op en organiseren feesten volledig op maat van onze gasten. Een babyborrel , een themafeest of vegetarische gerechten? We hebben de nodige infrastructuur en kennis in huis voor elke gewenste formule of culinaire vraag."

Ook de aankleding en de decoratie van de zaal worden op voorhand tot in de kleinste details besproken en volgens de specifieke wensen en het budget uitgewerkt. 

FEESTEN IN STIJL
Huis Van Wonterghem beschikt met zalen Commanderie en Cappellerie over twee uitstekende feestlocaties die samen plaats bieden aan 300 genodigden. De Orangerie is dan weer een absolute meerwaarde als het weer even niet meezit. Elke banketzaal heeft bovendien een binnenkoer, een gewaardeerde surplus tijdens de zomermaanden. In Huis Van Wonterghem ligt de klemtoon op familiefeesten, maar evengoed vinden er bedrijfsseminaries plaats met aansluitend een receptie of diner.

Description:
We are Dark Crystal Games. Independent video games company.

We are making Encased.

Old-school sci-fi post-apocalyptic top-down RPG. Currently in development. Closed beta – Q1 of 2019. Release date – TBD.

Social:
Newsletter: http://eepurl.com/dhl8fP
Forum: http://forum.darkcrystalgames.com/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/DarkCrystal_HQ
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/darkcrystalhq/
Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCtGcUbYIJMihpiT19swT78g/
VK: https://vk.com/darkcrystalgames
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/darkcrystalgames/

About the game

- Encased is a modern single player sci-fi post-apocalyptic isometric role-playing game. It’s all about exploration, adventures, and survival inside a sealed territory.
- Our game is heavily inspired by the famous isometric RPGs of the late 90’s and early 2000’s. However, we aim not only to repeat the essential aspects that made those games golden classics, but also to improve and evolve the genre even further.
- The player is a participant in a project researching the technology and artifacts of a long-gone civilization.
- Wondrous discoveries, mysterious artifacts, and dangerous anomalies are constant companions.
- The story campaign will last twenty-five to thirty hours with significant replay potential. Play any character you want and watch the world change in response to your actions.
- The game will feature turn-based combat. All mechanics are designed to give players a large number of tactical choices, freedom of action and an ability to approach every combat situation in a unique and creative way.

Name: Excel Eventos
The Dream Job Podcast
Description:
This podcast is rooted in a crisis that has weighed heavy on our minds as we’ve gotten further into our 30s and further into our careers. (“Our” = Kent and Onnie, the hosts of the aforementioned podcast.) The realization is this: most of us will spend most of our adult lives at work, and most of us are either underwhelmed or actively unhappy with what we do for a living.

So we decided to tackle this generation-crushing trend in the most Millennial way possible: with a podcast. Because what problem has the world ever faced that couldn’t be solved by two college-educated white dudes talking into microphones?

Enter The Dream Job. It’s partly an excuse for the two of us to hangout and volley our latest complaints, rants, and revelations about our own careers. And it’s partly a chance for us to host frank conversations with people who - against all odds - have landed jobs that they legitimately love. We want to know what that’s like. How they got there. If it’s as dreamy as it sounds. And what lessons, if any, the rest of us can learn from the choices they’ve made.

Our story began in 1965 with the manufacture of irrigation equipment. 1989 saw the establishment of Premier Fountains as a serious business based on a concept of factory precision-made fountains that just needed assembly and water at site. This led to the development of hardware and software to make water dance to music – dancing fountains of which we are arguably the world’s largest producer.

After further expansion into entertainment related products PREMIERWORLD Technology Ltd was set up as a separate company in 2008. Today on-site we have manufacturing facilities for fabrication in steel, stainless steel, aluminium and precision machining, electrical panels, LED lights, electronic circuit, controls and devices, pump manufacture, valves and woodworking. Our R&D covers water hydraulics, electronics and animatronics. We also have a captive unit for FRP (glass fibre) mouldings.

Name: Wedding Mapping - 3D Video Projection Mapping for Weddings
Description:
Wedding Mapping
by Virtual Films!

“Un detalle espectacular para un evento exclusivo”

Wedding Mapping es tu historia de amor contada virtualmente con la técnica de 3D video mapping projection la cual consiste en adaptar la proyección a una o varias superficies modelando en 3D elementos románticos, creando ilusiones ópticas y junto con una ingeniosa musicalización lograr un espectáculo único y memorable. Imagínate acariciar el alma a tus seres queridos a través de un espectáculo de luz y efectos con lo más novedoso en tecnología!

Wedding Mapping es también ambiental para que durante el desarrollo del evento e inclusive de principio a fin, transporte a los invitados a una atmósfera elegante y versátil que vaya deacuerdo a cada una de las etapas de la recepción.

La característica clave de Wedding Mapping es que a diferencia de la proyección tradicional no hay pantalla y no se define un marco rectangular de luz; por el contrario las formas arquitectónicas, irregulares, orgánicas, con dimensión y profundidad donde se proyecta son parte del elemento sorpresa que agrada y mantiene maravillados a tus invitados.

La técnica de Wedding Mapping da vida a los objetos comunes inanimados que forman parte de la arquitectura o decoración del lugar donde decidas impresionar a tus invitados; inclusive puedes resaltar elementos estáticos de la naturaleza como son: formaciones rocosas, árboles, cascadas, etc.

Border2Border Entertainment produces and promotes a unique brand of award-winning, critically acclaimed film, television, and digital projects. We are dedicated to making each production experience enjoyable for our artists, business and broadcast partners, co-workers, and ultimately our audience.

We are creators who share and promote content for diverse, underserved audiences made by people with lived experience – women, LGBTQ+ and people with disabilities as key participants in what we make.

Our ongoing relationships with TV networks, film festivals and digital platforms around the world keep our content in demand and viewed by millions.

Name: The Babes
Description:
The Babes är showbandet som spelar på olika typer av event och står för hela underhållningsbiten och tekniken.

Vanliga upplägg för företagsevent och gala

Mingel med pianobar eller trubadur - Kvällen inleds med mingel tillsammans med vår barpianist eller trubadur, perfekt för fördrinken eller glöggminglet. Vi tillhandahåller en separat ljudanläggning och ett fristående piano om det är i lobbyn eller andra platser utanför middagslokalen. Här finns det också möjligheten att inkludera en saxofonist för att tillföra en extra touch av lyx.

Dinnershows - Under kvällens gång gör vi vanligtvis 1-3 underhållande medleys som sprider glädje och energi, ofta i synk med servering eller avdelning av maten. Varje inhopp är olika teman som disco, schlager, 80-tal, Abba och rockmusik tillsammans med klädbyten.

Gästartister - Om önskemål finns, brukar vi kompa gästartister.

Husband och jinglar - Vid prisutdelningar och awards skapar vi spänning genom en trumvirvel, följt av en festlig jingel när vinnarna tar plats på scenen.

Blåssektion - Vår vanligaste bandsättning är 5-mannaband eller 6-mannaband med saxofon. För den som vill slå på stort kan bandet utökas med en 3-manna blåssektion, extra sångare och percussionist.

Partyset - Efter middagen bjuder vi på ett 45-minutersset med en blandning av moderna och klassiska låtar som sätter igång dansgolvet. Det är vanligt med 1-2 sådana set under kvällen.

DJ - Vår egen DJ tar över efter livebandet och ser till att dansgolvet fortsätter inpå småtimmarna. Det är möjligt att inkludera saxofon, fiol eller percussion till DJ:en för en häftig upplevelse.

Komplett teknisk utrustning - Vi erbjuder en komplett teknisk lösning med ljud, ljus, trådlösa mikrofoner, inear-system, stämningsbelysning, DJ-bås samt ljud- och ljustekniker för upp till 350 pers.

Since its launch in 2000, Hop! serves as the 1# preschool TV and internet  destiny in Israel.

Luli, The Channel has also launched on several platforms in the world.

Name: Destaque Propaganda e Promoções

Fundada em 1987 como agência de propaganda e promoção de eventos, a Destaque Promoções aperfeiçoou suas habilidades para criar e gerenciar eventos sociais e empresariais, tornando-se referência de ética, profissionalismo e sucesso no nordeste brasileiro ao longo da década de 1990.

Os eventos da empresa firmaram-se como grandes oportunidades para divulgação de uma marca através de ações promocionais, já tendo contado com parceiros como Skol, Smirnoff, Oi, Siemens, Tam e Pepsi. No decorrer desses 22 anos de atuação, a Destaque já realizou mais de 3.000 shows e eventos. 

Gerindo hoje atividades nos ramos da propaganda, promoção de eventos, marketing esportivo, político e cultural, a Destaque Promoções pretende aproveitar o know how e prestígio adquiridos para expandir a sua área de atuação, unindo-se a cada vez mais parceiros que busquem agregar valores às suas marcas no Rio Grande do Norte e demais Estados do nordeste.

Vi har en vision om at levere kvalitetsteknik til livearrangementer i alle størreser og alle typer. Vi er vant til at have mange bolde i luften og til at gribe dem igen – vel at mærke i den rigtige rækkefølge.

Vi lægger vægt på at tale et forståeligt sprog og holde en god dialog.

Således sikrer vi, at samarbejdet tilpasses kundens individuelle behov, og at du som kunde ikke bare får et kasse med udstyr, men en værdiskabende totalløsning uanset behovet.

Vi glæder os til at arbejde sammen med dig!

The facility is the hub for culture and live entertainment in Maple Ridge, Pitt Meadows, and surrounding communities.

The ACT Presentation Series brings professional performing and visual arts events to our spaces each year. Over 80,000 patrons of all ages participate in, or attend, programming at the ACT annually.

We offer opportunities for businesses and groups including:
• Powerful sponsorship and brand association with an innovative, world-class performance and display centre, right in the heart of Maple Ridge
• High-quality hospitality opportunities and group ticket sales for networking, client development, and employee recognition and engagement
• Space and venue rental for corporate events and film shoots
• A variety of other unique partnerships in related activities in which to get involved

Contact Laurie Kinsman, Manager, Marketing, Communications & Brand at 604-476-2187 for more details.

We are a non-profit, public resource serving the artistic and cultural needs of the diverse audiences in our community, operated by the Maple Ridge Pitt Meadows Arts Council.

Name: WRITERS GAME
Description:
WRITERS GAME Is Bridging The Gap Between Writing Film, Games, Virtual Reality and Books.

WRITERS GAME MISSION
Our mission is to enable diverse writers from all backgrounds to create groundbreaking creative content.

CURRENT WRITERS GAME PROJECTS
Masterclass events with industry leaders. Assisting in the creation of original content for film, television, digital, publishing, games and VR.


THE MAIN EVENT

Do you have a brilliant novel brewing? Can’t get those crazy game characters out of your head? Spend your days dreaming about scripts?  WRITERS GAME is the event for you.

Over two days of masterclasses led by some of the world’s leading storytellers, we will present attendees with the tools to bring their stories to life on screen and on the page.

WRITERS GAME is designed to help attendees master the art of writing great narratives that capture the imagination.

What sets WRITERS GAME apart?
As the media landscape evolves and overlaps, the opportunities for creative and passionate writers to dominate in all creative industries are huge. We want attendees to not only learn how to excel in their chosen writing field, but also how to bridge the gap between the film, VR, publishing and gaming industries.


THE MEDIA REVOLUTION IS HAPPENING - IT'S TIME TO GET IN ON THE GAME


"But if I write for one industry, I can’t write for another, right?"
Wrong. Our writers cross all fields. Our game designers, for example Toiya Kristen Finley and Jessica Sliwinski are also published authors. At WRITERS GAME you’ll be shown what it takes to do both and more.

"What will I learn at WRITERS GAME?"
There are elements that every winning concept MUST have. The best games, screenplays and novels all possess similar traits. Our live masterclasses will help you command these skills in your writing.

Un innovativo sistema informatico consente di operare con efficacia e semplicità: pratiche che richiedevano molto tempo si risolvano con pochi click del mouse.

Attraverso il suo portale web ZenArt permette al socio artista di ottenere autonomamente il certificato di agibilità Enpals, snellendo la burocrazia da sempre poco affine allo spirito artistico.

La grande innovazione della Cooperativa ZenArt si manifesta proprio nella semplicità attraverso cui il socio ottiene la messa in regola sia per l’evento programmato anzitempo, sia per il lavoro dell’ultimo minuto.

ZenArt: la Cooperativa Innovativa!

Name: Rederij De Nederlanden
Description:
At Rederij de Nederlanden, we believe that sailing through Amsterdam’s canals is more than a journey  it’s an experience that connects, inspires and celebrates.

Our fleet of luxuriously restored salon boats, city tenders and classic barges offers the most complete and bespoke charter experience in Amsterdam. Whether it’s an intimate dinner cruise for ten or a corporate celebration for four hundred guests, we make every moment on the water exceptional.

As a trusted MICE partner, we specialize in meetings, incentives, conferences and events that bring people together in a unique, authentic setting. Together with our sustainable partners, we can even coordinate eco-friendly transport for up to 1,000 guests across the city.

Sustainability is at the heart of our vision: our fully electric fleet glides silently through Amsterdam’s UNESCO-listed canals, offering the city’s most beautiful views — responsibly.

From bespoke dining experiences and guided cultural tours to festive celebrations, our dedicated team designs every detail with precision and passion.

 Rederij de Nederlanden where connection, heritage and experience meet on the water.

Name: Cabaret Voltaire
Description:
Cabaret Voltaire is housed in the ancient subterranean caverns that underpin the bustling streets of Edinburgh's Cowgate district, right in the heart of Scotland's
capital city.

Open seven nights a week, Cabaret Voltaire is a thriving, twin-roomed venue that hosts some of the best-known club events in the capital.
It caters for all genres of dance music, ranging from the acclaimed house night Ultragroove, to the exclusive Scottish spin-off of award-winning eclectic Leeds club SugarBeat.

Cabaret Voltaire is also a key player in the city’s thriving live music scene. Currently presenting around 30 gigs a month, it stages performances by a wide array of local talent, nationally known artists and internationally famous acts.

Costruita in pochi mesi nel 1868 a pochi passi dal luogo dove ebbe sede dal 1806 al 1865 un precedente Teatro Gerolamo, la sala di piazza Beccaria è una Scala in miniatura, dotata di due ordini di palchi, del loggione e di una platea per una capienza totale, all’epoca, di 600 posti.

Name: Bliss Media 熙颐影业
Description:
Bliss Media is a global film company specializing in international film financing, production and distribution. The company was founded in 2011 and now holds offices in both Shanghai and Los Angeles. 

Bliss Media is tasked with bringing the Hollywood business model into China, creating opportunities for Chinese companies to directly participate in the investment, production and distribution process of international feature films. The company not only oversees Chinese co-productions, but also connects Chinese capital and talent to the global system in order to access global returns. Bliss Media has established long-term partnerships with a number of production companies, distributors, talent agencies, and media and fashion brands in China, America and Europe. 

With an experienced and talented team from both the film and finance industries, Bliss Media has built a reputation for actively promoting cross-platform engagement through a globalized production, investment and profit structure.

创立于2011年，总部位于中国上海并在洛杉矶设有海外分部。公司主要从事国际电影的投融资，制作，发行，版权收售以及艺人经纪业务。 

熙颐影业将好莱坞成熟的“全球化商业模式”对接中国电影产业，并致力于把蓬勃发展的中国电影市场推向世界。公司不仅自行投资出品电影并积极促进中外合拍片，更将中国资本和电影人直接带入到好莱坞电影产业的全球体系当中，为中国影视资本打开“全球获利”的大门。公司与好莱坞，欧洲以及中国众多制片公司，发行商，经纪公司，媒体以及时尚品牌保持长期稳定的合作伙伴关系。熙颐影业以“国际化运作机制，金融化投资平台，全球化电影收益”为核心竞争力，凭借在电影产业和金融产业都有着丰富经验的专业团队，积极推动跨平台的品牌互动与推广，创造多赢的商业成果。 熙颐影业正在为“华语电影产业国际化，华人影视资本全球化”而努力并已取得优异成绩。

Name: Deaf Spotlight
Description:
Deaf Spotlight is a creative incubator and curator of original stories by an underrepresented community. Our work celebrates intersectional Deaf experiences on the stage, on the screen, and in every artistic realm. 

The artists we spotlight act as storytellers and historians that keep the legacy of sign language alive and share it with the world. 

To advance the transformational narratives of Deaf, DeafBlind, DeafDisabled and Hard of Hearing (DDBDDHH) artists, we give them opportunities and 
resources that allow them to create art on their own terms. 

Our events are inclusive spaces where DDBDDHH artists and audience members can celebrate art without language barriers, and where all types of 
audience members can experience the arts through Deaf Culture and Sign Language.

Name: Magic Castle Enterprises
Description:
From our world-renowned clubhouse steeped in history right through to the cutting edge of all things multimedia and Magic, we’re taking 60+ years of goodwill and community building into the new millennium. A new promise for prestidigitation.

The Magic Castle in Hollywood was founded in 1963 by the Larsen family. The Larsens have joined together with the Pitchford family who have acquired the world famous clubhouse and surrounding real estate, as well as The Magic Castle trademark, and Genii Magazine. Together they have formed a new entity to continue the legacy of The Magic Castle, with its rich history and decades of community building. Magic Castle Enterprises seeks to support and enrich magic and the allied arts and to share this ancient artform with the world.

Name: Clark Hall Pub
Description:
First opened in 1971 (and officially established as a student pub in 1975), Clark Hall Pub is not only the oldest bar on Queen’s University campus, but also the first student-owned and operated bar in Canada. Clark Hall Pub is colloquially known as the “Centre of the Universe”, though students with a more rudimentary grasp of cosmology will always be able to locate it directly above the Campus Bookstore.

Clark Hall Pub began as a place for students and professors to interact outside of the classroom. Beer was sold out of a cooler. We’ve since swapped the cooler for a fully stocked fridge, but professors still frequent the pub with their students. Although it is a service of the Engineering Society, the pub’s management, staff, and patrons represent all faculties of Queen’s.

We’re open every Wednesay night for Live Band Bingo or Games Night, every Thursday for free live music shows, and every Friday afternoon for Rituals. Aside from these weekly events, we also host a huge range of private ones; from the Dean’s Reception to comedy nights, from Battle of the Bands to conferences, and everything in between.

Bands such as Arcade Fire, the Arkells, Two Hours Traffic, Craig Cardiff, Peter Katz and more have played on Clark’s stage. The Tragically Hip once competed for, and lost, a chance to be Clark’s house band.

We have a storied history, as any alumni will tell you.

Description:
theLOOP is an all-encompassing nightlife entertainment group conceived at the dawn of the century.  It aims to deliver the most innovative and spectacular world-class nightlife experiences possible to a very exciting market.

關於theLOOP

你可能沒有聽過 theLOOP，但你一定聽過北京四季酒店、CÉ LA VI 等國際知名品牌，甚至，你也可能去過知名的夜店「OMNI」與「KOR」，還有新世代的頂級娛樂空間 「ONCOR 響艷都市會所」，或者，熱愛音樂的你更可能聽過 LOOPTOPIA 樂托邦國際音樂季。這些亞洲頂尖的品牌背後全都有 theLOOP 的身影，theLOOP不僅與國際品牌在亞洲各據點深耕餐飲娛樂的體驗，更以自身的實力在亞洲打造突破框架的品牌與店家，將亞洲新一代的娛樂軟實力伸入國際。

從 2000 年成軍以來，我們一直都在產業默默耕耘，22年過去，在這樣的兢兢業業中，theLOOP的努力漸漸得到國際的肯定，不僅陸續拿到了 Live Design Awards、 iF 設計大獎、德國紅點最大獎—— Best of the Best，以及Tales of the Cocktail、《橄欖餐廳評論》、Asia's 50 Best Bars等眾多獎項。

而在得獎之後，我們也沒有停下腳步，而是更加努力的將自己的經驗向外發展，希望能將我們在這 20 多年中得到的，獻給更多熱愛這個領域的所有人。

作為一間專注於設計「體驗」的亞洲頂級品牌，我們擁有超過200人的精實部隊，在一個個新項目的經驗中，我們累積了多項實力，超越經營店家、打造活動的範疇，我們所做的一切體驗設計，已經具有可以跟世界頂尖團隊匹敵的能力。

而 theLOOP 能夠走到今天，最重要的原因是，我們是那麼的在乎每個人的感受：每天困擾著我們的、鼓舞著我們的、讓我們緊張、讓我們哭泣、但卻也是最讓我們感動不能自已的，就是每一位客人的笑臉。

在這個利基點上，我們認為自己是相當稱職的設計師，但並不是過往大家想像的空間或平面設計師，我們是「體驗設計師」。對一般的設計師來說，顏色、空間是他們掌握的元素，但對體驗設計師來說，我們的元素與色彩更為豐富：是3D動畫、是燈光、是音響、是音樂、是舞台、是道具、是服裝、是舞蹈、是酒精、是料理、是服務....在每一項上做到盡善盡美，是 theLOOP 最重要的使命。

邀請你一起來體驗最極致的餐飲享受，更希望你能一路陪著我們成為亞洲的驕傲，將頂級的夜生活體驗散佈至世界各地！


Our strengths lie fully in utilizing the group's most valuable assets; our professional management team, creative competitiveness, and the rich resources brought by our key partners and stakeholders.

Since 2001, theLOOP has been cultivating Taiwan's nightlife industry thru a multitude of platforms.  We strive to continue our mission by constantly elevating our strengths and competencies to provide successful new ventures.

Name: Cape Fear Regional Theatre
Description:
Cape Fear Regional Theatre is committed to presenting an annual series of professional, quality plays, performances and special events that, in addition to entertaining, will enlighten, inspire, and educate performers and audiences. CFRT seeks diversity in its artists, as well as its audiences. The Theatre brings together a unique combination of artists: professional from outside the region, regional professionals, and non-professionals. CFRT seeks to maintain a working environment of mutual respect and support, creative freedom, and collaboration.
Cape Fear Regional Theatre (CFRT) is unique among regional theatres.  It is not a union house though it follows professional standards.  It brings in top talent from Broadway while providing a stage for CFRT trained performers.  It has built its reputation on quality productions that attract over 3,500 subscribers annually. The main-stage produces a variety of classic and new works and CFRT is frequently first in line to acquire the rights to Broadway hits.              
Our mission is to enlighten, inspire and educate and we believe in the power of live performance that it can accomplish that goal.  We are advocates for arts in education and that is precisely why our partnership with the Cumberland County School District is so important.  The arts improve basic skills such as reading and mathematics as well as self-discipline and self-efficacy.

Name: Off The Hook Comedy Club
Description:
Off The Hook Comedy Club located in Naples, Florida was founded by owner's  Brien Spina and his father Santo. The club is located inside ROW Seafood By Capt. Brien & Crew. Off The Hook was the first venue in Southwest Florida to incorporate a full service restaurant into a comedy club.

The venue host's multiple shows every week. Off The Hook was created to bring the biggest names in comedy to Southwest Florida.
 
Off The Hook Comedy Club has staged over a thousand comedians, and was the first comedy club to book Tom Green,  MTV star Steve-O and Jim Jefferies in the USA.” Off The Hook was home to Bubba The Love Sponge’s first ever Bamboozle Festival.

The venue has featured the biggest comedians in the country including Mike Epps, Darrell Hammond, Pauly Shore, Carlos Mencia, Kevin Hart, Chris Kattan, Gabriel Iglesias, Eddie Griffin, Andy Dick, Kevin Nealon, Maron Wayans, Louie Anderson, Tom Arnold, Jackie Mason, Jim Breuer, Tommy Chong and many more.

Off The Hook is a 8000 square foot venue that is available for private events such as wedding receptions, holiday parties, birthdays and corporate retreats.


Get your tickets to the next show online at www.offthehookcomedyclub.com or call (239)389-6901.

Name: Zero Infinity One
Description:
We've been building out a vision for spatial immersive entertainment, systems, and telepresence.  Our solutions will propel a market migration from phones to glasses.

If Mr. Lumière - one of the two brothers who invented the "Cinématographe" - had seen the future, he would never had said his own invention "had no future".  Video, and screens, are how we do almost everything now.  Sometimes the grandeur of applicability is hidden even from inventors themselves.

Industries are machines, and most were built to run on old fuel. New wineskins need new wine.  

New formats and industries are achieved by the re-imagination of experience rather than by just applying new technologies to existing ones. 

Social psychology changes.  People care about experiences, not technology.
AI is great, but there are two primary applications of XR everyone will care about enough to buy glasses, advancing from ye olde way (phones) to a new paradigm:

1) Telepresence (holographic telecommunications)
2) Entertainment (not screen based, but spatial)

We're doing this from vision - not from market trend analysis.
Vision, which will certainly become reality.

Name: Game Night Out
Description:
Game Night Out creates private, host-led experiences built around hospitality, connection, and original party games.

We bring friends, families, and colleagues together for exclusive events designed to feel welcoming, comfortable, and thoughtfully run. Every experience is guided by expert hosts who focus on great hospitality as much as engaging gameplay. From the moment guests arrive to the final round, we handle the flow, explain the games, and read the room so groups can relax and enjoy being together.

The experience is fast-moving and full of laughter, set in a cozy, home-like space that encourages conversation and connection. It is not about competition or spectacle. It is about making people feel taken care of and creating shared moments that turn into lasting memories.
You and your group will compete head-to-head in a series of original party games. Each game moves fast, keeps you on your toes, and requires you to think quickly and work as a team. They are challenging enough to keep you guessing, yet familiar enough so that everyone can participate and have a blast.

Every experience is guided by a Host who helps introduce each game, explain the rules, encourage competition, and keep the night on track and full of laughter.
